data.jd_text:
**Description**
 Operations is the beating heart of Amazon. This key part of our business makes sure we fulfill and dispatch orders efficiently so that our customers get their items on time. As Network losses PM, you’ll be working in collaboration with Operations and Central NL teams in identifying gaps while keeping strong control on losses triggered by operations utilizing tech, tools and metrics developed by ROW central program.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Work closely with the central NL program team to implement tech enablement, standardization of metrics, processes, and review mechanisms.
* Analyze deviations from ideal processes in the aim of and develop strategies to minimize losses triggered by operational misses.
* Drive coordination with operational leaders and partners, utilizing tools and metrics developed by the central program.
* Break down loss buckets by assignable causes and develop input metrics to track and improve performance.
* Revamp reporting mechanism to consolidate all reporting platform under 1 singel platform leveraging AI in order to facilitate and raise the bar deep dive
* Represent Operations NL losses in WBR/MBR cadences and and collaborate on improvement initiatives with wider stakeholders outside operations
* Regularly report on progress, challenges, and opportunities in network loss reduction to senior management.
* Adapt and implement best practices from other markets to the local context.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 3\+ years of defining and implementing process improvement initiatives using data and metrics experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Knowledge of Excel (Pivot Tables, VLookUps) at an advanced level and SQL
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of driving end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* 3\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- Q\-Express Documents Transport

data.jd_text:
We're hiring for a fast\-growing technology company building a
 **unified IoT platform** 
 across multiple business lines.
   

  

 This is not a "sit back and manage" role.
   

  

 This is for someone who
 **owns the product and makes sure it actually ships** 
 .
   

  

 You'll sit at the intersection of:
   

  

* product thinking
* engineering execution
* business priorities


 And you'll be the person who makes all three move in the same direction.
   

  

**What You'll Own**
****Product Management****
* Define and manage the product roadmap
* Prioritise features based on:
+ customer value
+ business impact
+ engineering bandwidth

* Write clear user stories \+ acceptance criteria (no ambiguity for engineers)
* Define MVP scope with strict discipline (no feature creep)
* Run structured requirements discovery with internal and external stakeholders
* Track competitors (IoT platforms, cloud ecosystems, etc.)
* Build product collateral:
+ one\-pagers
+ demo scripts
+ integration guides


****Project \& Delivery Management****
* Run full Agile cycles (planning → execution → review → retros)
* Manage distributed engineering teams across time zones
* Own project health dashboards (no surprises to leadership)
* Track risks early:
+ dependencies
+ blockers
+ mitigation plans

* Maintain documentation ecosystem:
+ architecture decisions
+ product specs
+ onboarding guides

* Monitor budget vs actuals
* Coordinate with internal teams (HR, Finance, Legal) to keep delivery unblocked


****Stakeholder Management****
* Prepare board\-level monthly updates
* Manage structured requirements intake pipeline
* Own client demo environments
* Coordinate with hardware/OEM partners on integrations


**What We're Looking For (Must\-Have)**
* 4\-8 years in Product / Project Management within a product\-based tech company
* Strong IoT understanding:
+ MQTT
+ device lifecycle
+ APIs
+ cloud IoT ecosystems (You don't code—but you must understand enough to challenge engineers)

* Proven experience:
+ owning a roadmap
+ making trade\-offs
+ shipping real products

* Hands\-on Agile execution (not just attending meetings—you've run them)
* Comfortable with ambiguity and zero\-process environments
* Strong written communication (you'll write everything that matters)
* Experience with tools like:
+ Jira / Linear
+ Notion / Confluence

* Based in UAE or ready to relocate immediately (non\-negotiable)


****Nice to Have****
* Experience in:
+ IoT platforms
+ industrial tech
+ hardware \+ software ecosystems

* Exposure to AWS / Azure (basic admin level)
* Certifications (CSPO / PMP / PRINCE2\)
* Arabic language skills

 CRM \& Loyalty Program Manager

 Afnan Perfumes founded in 2007, is a UAE\-based international fragrance brand celebrated for its premium perfumes and exclusive designs. Renowned for superior quality an
data.jd_text:
**Job Title:** 
 CRM \& Loyalty Program Manager
 



**Location:** 
 Ajman (UAE) or Remote (India)
 



  





**Company:** 




 Afnan Perfumes founded in 2007, is a UAE\-based international fragrance brand celebrated for its premium perfumes and exclusive designs. Renowned for superior quality and ethical values, Afnan has grown into a global perfume house of high repute, captivating consumers worldwide and maintaining exceptional production standards, driven by a professional and dedicated team.
 



  





**Job Summary:** 




 The CRM \& Loyalty Program Manager will be responsible for conceptualizing, launching and scaling a global e\-commerce loyalty program aimed at driving top\-line revenue growth and improving customer retention. The role will lead the end\-to\-end CRM strategy, including loyalty program design, campaign management, customer lifecycle marketing and performance monitoring. This position will focus on selecting the right CRM and loyalty technology stack, developing data\-driven customer engagement initiatives and executing targeted campaigns that increase repeat purchases, enhance customer lifetime value (CLV), and strengthen long\-term customer relationships across global markets, ultimately contributing to sustained e\-commerce revenue growth.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Conceptualize and develop a global loyalty program strategy aligned with e\-commerce growth.
* Design the program structure, including points, tiers, rewards, referrals and member benefits.
* Develop e\-commerce\-first loyalty mechanics optimized for online customer journeys.
* Define customer value exchange (earn \& burn logic, reward structures, redemption rules).
* Launch and scale loyalty programs across multiple global markets.
* Evaluate and implement the right CRM and loyalty technology stack.
* Lead integration with e\-commerce platforms, marketing automation tools and CDPs.
* Ensure systems support: Personalization, Omnichannel engagement, Global scalability, Customer segmentation and automated lifecycle campaigns
* Work closely with external and internal IT and data teams to implement CRM infrastructure.
* Build and manage CRM campaigns across the full customer lifecycle: Acquisition, Welcome journeys, Repeat purchase, Retention and Reactivation
* Develop automated customer journeys across: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Push notifications, Loyalty program communication and implement behavioral and transactional segmentation.
* Drive customer retention and repeat purchase rate through CRM initiatives.
* Develop programs to improve:
* Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)
* Average Order Value (AOV)
* Purchase Frequency
* Optimize loyalty\-driven conversion strategies.
* Monitor and evaluate loyalty pricing incentives and reward economics. Work with internal teams to analyze:
* Discount effectiveness
* Promotion ROI
* Reward redemption impact
* Use pricing analytics tools and dashboards to monitor performance.
* Track key CRM and loyalty metrics such as: Loyalty member growth, Redemption rates
* Repeat purchase rate, Customer lifetime value, Campaign ROI.
* Build reporting dashboards for performance monitoring.
* Use A/B testing and data insights to optimize campaigns.



  





**Required Education and Experience:** 



* 6–10 years of experience in CRM, loyalty programs or lifecycle marketing
* Strong experience in e\-commerce customer engagement
* Proven experience launching loyalty programs from concept to scale
* Hands\-on experience with CRM platforms and marketing automation tools
* Strong analytical mindset with experience in data\-driven marketing
* Experience with global loyalty programs
* Knowledge of customer data platforms (CDP) and loyalty program platforms compatible with Shopify
* Experience managing campaign automation and customer journeys
* Exposure to AI tools, marketing automation, and advanced data analytics will be an added benefit.
* Understanding of pricing and promotion analytics
* Experience working with cross\-border e\-commerce markets



  





**What We Offer** 



* A challenging and influential role in a dynamic, fast\-paced environment.
* Opportunities for daily learning and growth alongside a passionate team.
* A competitive compensation package with comprehensive benefits.
* Potential for career advancement within Afnan Perfumes, reflecting our commitment to employee development and global presence.



  





 Afnan Perfumes is committed to building diverse and inclusive teams and upholding an equal employment workplace that is free from discrimination. We hire stellar individuals regardless of their race, color, ancestry, religion, gender identity, national origin, sexual orientation, age, marital status, medical conditions, disability, or veteran status.

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description** 




 Swank Development is a premium property developer based in Dubai, specializing in creating exclusive residential spaces that reflect the vibrant heritage and traditions of Europe, particularly Portuguese culture. With decades of experience spanning construction, design,
data.jd_text:
**Company Description** 




 Swank Development is a premium property developer based in Dubai, specializing in creating exclusive residential spaces that reflect the vibrant heritage and traditions of Europe, particularly Portuguese culture. With decades of experience spanning construction, design, and furniture, Swank Development seamlessly combines meticulous craftsmanship, bespoke luxury, and thoughtful design to reimagine sophisticated living.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Project Manager to oversee and coordinate all aspects of real estate development projects in Dubai. This full\-time, on\-site role involves managing project timelines, resources, and stakeholders to ensure successful project delivery. The Project Manager will monitor and expedite project progress, oversee logistics, conduct and supervise inspections, and ensure adherence to quality standards, should be involved in involved in managing luxury Villa projects from the ground up.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Conduct research to identify and evaluate potential development sites and strategic land opportunities
* ROI models to assess project viability, good working knowledge of site activities and also someone who is well versed in identifying sites for developments and has the ability to conduct feasibility studies
* Support due diligence, zoning, and pre\-acquisition planning in coordination with internal and external stakeholders
* Create clear, professional presentations, investment decks, and internal reports for senior management
* Deliver structured market and competitor analysis with visual data representation
* Assist in aligning projects with relevant regulatory authorities (Dubai Land Department, RERA, Municipality)
* Support the design team and senior Project Management team with pipeline tracking, reporting, and internal updates
* Liaise with planning, design, and finance departments to help bring project ideas into execution



  





**Requirements:** 



* Minimum 5 years’ experience in with Real Estate Developers in UAE (G\+2 Villa projects)
* Dubai Municipality (DM) approved Project Manager
* Strong experience in preparing presentations and professional reports for projects
* Solid understanding of the Dubai real estate market (Real Estate Developers), including trends, regulations, and urban planning policies
* Ability to work collaboratively with diverse teams and manage multiple priorities
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Project Management a related field
* Excellent communication, organizational, and analytical skills
* English language proficiency is a must



  





**What We Offer:** 



* Competitive salary package with performance\-based incentives
* Direct involvement in some of Dubai’s most ambitious real estate projects
* Opportunity to grow within a fast\-moving, design\-led development firm
* Collaborative and entrepreneurial team culture

data.jd_text:
**Project Definition \& Planning** 



* Identify/Define scope of work to be delivered for projects.
* Handle Project Start Up, Project Planning \& Organization, Project Scheduling, Budget Estimating \& Planning, Quality Plan, Resource Plan, Risk Management Plan.
* Capture the detailed functional specifications for projects and ensure clear communication on clarification of technical interfaces with the Stakeholders,
* Consultants and/or Contractor to avoid discrepancies during project execution.
* Act as the focal point among company, customer and other stakeholders during the implementation of the security system.



  





**Project Execution \& Monitoring** 



* Establish method statements for successful Project Implementation.
* Project Monitoring, Reporting and Control evidenced by Projects Progress Reports with sufficient clarity on Actual Vs Planned efforts, % of progress achieved, changes and issues, number of open risks, and issues recorded and resolved.
* Manage changes and risks effectively and escalate as appropriate in a timely fashion.
* Manage team members to achieve the assigned objectives and milestones.
* Review Implementation Team’s Daily/Weekly reports and submit Weekly/Monthly reports to Management and Customers.



  





**Compliances, Control \& Communication** 



* Identify and Manage Quality Level. Define Quality Plans as necessary and administer appropriate Quality Assurance \& Control measures throughout the Life Cycle of the Project.
* Ensure adherence to design conventions, scope, specifications and contractual obligations.
* Oversee the project to verify HSE compliance to standards.
* Identifying, managing and mitigating project risk. Update indicators, achievements, activities and results according to the Project Log.
* Monitor and control the project budgets; highlight variations to the management in order to avoid overspendings and initiate ideas on cost optimization while delivering projects to increase profitability; Proactively disseminating project information to all stakeholders



  





**Project Documentation \& Closeout** 



* Ensure availability of adequate documentation or records for project referencing as per the File Management guidelines provided.
* Initiate for Internal and External Project Closeout.
* Facilitate the active exchange of successful Project Management programs, practices, procedures, lessons learnt and other pertinent information of common interest with Peers.



  





**Required Criteria:** 



* Bachelors Degree in Electronics’ and Communication / Electrical / Computers/ IT Engineering
* 8\+ years relevant industry experience in Project Management in MEP, Low Current and Audio Video Projects.
* PMP Certification preferred
* Industry knowledge and up\-to\-date with emerging technology trends in Low Current System not limited to CCTV, Access Control and other Security Solutions, ICT, Structural Cabling, Audio Video projects.

data.title: Experience Operations Director - Dubai
data.raw_snippet:
**About Valtech**
 At Valtech, we are reshaping the way brands connect with their customers. As a global digital innovation company, we fuse creativity, technology, and strategy to solve complex business challenges and deliver exceptional experiences.
   

  

 With over 6,500 experts in 60\+ office
data.jd_text:
**About Valtech**
 At Valtech, we are reshaping the way brands connect with their customers. As a global digital innovation company, we fuse creativity, technology, and strategy to solve complex business challenges and deliver exceptional experiences.
   

  

 With over 6,500 experts in 60\+ offices across 20\+ countries, we are expanding our footprint in MENA with Dubai as the strategic hub. At Valtech we thrive on driving business transformation as trusted partners to the world’s most recognized brands. To our people we offer growth opportunities, a values\-driven culture, international careers and the chance to shape the future of experience.
   

  

**About The Team**
 We are part of Valtech MENA, the experience innovation company, combining the uncommon to unlock a better way for people to experience the world. We work at the intersection of disciplines, cultures, and perspectives to create solutions that go beyond expectations, helping brands move ahead and lead in a digital world.
   

  

 We value clarity, collaboration, and a strong respect for craft. That mindset shapes both what we create and how we work together.
   

  

**Overview**
 We are looking for an Experience Operations Lead to take ownership of how experience design is delivered across projects.
   

  

 This role focuses on turning strong experience direction into high quality, well structured delivery. You will ensure that ideas hold up through the realities of timelines, tools, team dynamics, and technical constraints, without losing clarity or intent.
   

  

 You will define how delivery works, support teams in executing it, and ensure a consistent standard across all work.
   

  

**The role**
 You are responsible for making sure that experience design is delivered properly, consistently, and at a high level of quality.
   

  

 You work from a clear experience direction and help shape how it is delivered in practice. You are not solely responsible for defining the vision, but you contribute to how it evolves through real delivery.
   

  

 You create clarity where there is complexity and structure where there is ambiguity. You care about craft and about the systems that allow that craft to scale.
   

  

**What You Will Own**
**Delivery and execution**
* Own the delivery of experience design work across projects and clients
* Translate experience direction into clear and actionable plans
* Ensure UX, UI, motion, and content outputs are consistent and high quality
* Make decisions to maintain quality under real constraints
* Protect the integrity of the experience through handover to engineering


**Delivery strategy and standards**
* Define how experience design is delivered across projects and programs
* Establish clear standards for workflows, documentation, and quality
* Work closely with leadership to shape delivery approaches
* Balance quality, speed, and feasibility in day to day work


**Design operations and workflow**
* Establish scalable ways of working across teams and projects
* Improve collaboration between design, product, and engineering
* Define and apply documentation standards that teams can follow
* Support delivery across geographies and with external partners
* Create clarity in how work moves from concept to execution


**Team support and production**
* Support designers in their day to day work
* Manage resourcing, timelines, and coordination
* Remove blockers so teams can focus on design
* Help maintain consistency and quality across the team


**AI and operational improvement**
* Explore how AI and tools can improve workflows and delivery
* Identify opportunities to automate and simplify work
* Support the team in adopting new tools in a practical way
* Continuously improve how the team works


**How You Work With Others**
 You work from clear experience direction while collaborating closely with design, product, and engineering teams.
   

  

 You are the point of authority for experience delivery within projects. You guide teams and stakeholders toward decisions that support both quality and feasibility.
   

  

 You work closely with the Head of Experience and other leads, contributing to how the department evolves while owning delivery within your scope.
   

  

**Experience**
**What we are looking for**
* 8 or more years in digital design, product, or experience delivery
* Strong hands on background across UX and UI
* Experience leading delivery or improving design operations
* Comfortable working with cross functional teams and clients


**Core Skills**
* Strong understanding of UX and UI in real delivery environments
* Clear sense of quality and attention to detail
* Ability to structure work and create clarity in complex situations
* Confident working with tools, documentation, and workflows
* Calm and organized under pressure


**Additional Strengths**
* Experience with design systems and scalable approaches
* Understanding of front end, motion, or interaction design
* Interest in using AI and modern tools to improve delivery


**Your application process**
 Once you apply, our Recruitment team will review your application. If your skills and experience align with the role, we’ll reach out for next steps. ⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud: Only engage with official Valtech email addresses ending in @valtech.com. We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let us know.
   

  

**Commitment to reaching all kinds of people**
 We design experiences that work for all kinds of people \- and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. Explore our Diversity \& Inclusion site to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.

data.title: Senior Security Program Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**About noon** 




 noon is the region's leading consumer commerce platform. Since its launch on December 12th, 2017, in Saudi Arabia and the UAE, and its expansion into Egypt in February 2019, noon has grown into a diverse ecosystem spanning marketplaces for food delivery, quick commerce, fintech,
data.jd_text:
**About noon** 




 noon is the region's leading consumer commerce platform. Since its launch on December 12th, 2017, in Saudi Arabia and the UAE, and its expansion into Egypt in February 2019, noon has grown into a diverse ecosystem spanning marketplaces for food delivery, quick commerce, fintech, and fashion. noon is a work in progress \- six years in, but only 5% done.
 



  





**noon’s mission:** 
 Ring every doorbell, every day.
 



  





**Role Overview \- Senior Security Program Manager** 




  





 Noon’s Group Cybersecurity is hiring a Senior Security Program Manager to run the execution engine of security org across the noon group of companies. We need a senior program manager who can turn a complex security roadmap into predictable delivery.
 



  





 The role spans keeping the security portfolio moving with clean artifacts and executive\-grade reporting. It is designed to be more hands\-on and cross\-cutting than a traditional PMO function, while also being broader in scope than a TPM role focused on delivering within a single engineering team or system.
 



  





 You will PM the security roadmap across Platform Security, Application and Product Security, GRC, and engineering partners. You will own the planning system, the delivery rhythm, the reporting model, and the closure standards for security initiatives.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* Own the cybersecurity portfolio execution model including planning, governance rhythm, risk, reporting, and closure standards
* Drive quarterly planning for the security roadmap including sequencing, resourcing assumptions, and critical path
* Translate CISO projects and priorities, regulatory commitments, and audit requirements into executable program plans with owners, milestones, dependencies, and measurable outcomes
* Run weekly execution reviews with security leadership, enforce action closure, and manage decision deadlines
* Build and maintain the Group Security Scorecard across entities and functions, defining the metric set, targets, owners, and data sources and including it in the monthly reviews.
* Maintain the cybersecurity portfolio system of record covering initiative status, milestones, risks, dependencies, and decisions
* Produce executive\-ready reporting packs with consistent format across progress, risks, decisions required, and next milestones
* Write one\-pager program briefs for major initiatives covering scope, success metrics, owners, milestones, acceptance criteria, and timelines
* Track hiring and onboarding critical path for roadmap delivery milestones, without owning recruiting execution
* Improve execution visibility through automation, tooling, and dashboards that keep portfolio health current with minimal overhead on teams



  





**Who we need?** 




  




* Senior PM experience running cross\-functional portfolios across multiple teams with tight delivery expectations
* Strong ability to drive accountability through clarity, structured pressure, and escalation, without relying on formal authority
* Strong ability to build a delivery system including cadence, artifacts, templates, dashboards, and consistent reporting
* Executive\-grade writing and communication with concise updates, clear risk framing, and clean decision asks
* Strong judgment on prioritization, sequencing, and tradeoffs under competing demands and constrained capacity
* Ability to convert ambiguity into scope, milestones, owners, and measurable outputs
* Strong program management fundamentals with a bias toward execution, not ceremony
* Security fluency across variety of security domains, enough to pressure\-test plans and timelines without being the technical decision maker.
* High ownership and maturity handling sensitive information while representing the security leaders and CISO.



  





**Preferred experience** 




  




* Experience in a CISO office, security leadership office, or security program portfolio in a large tech company
* Experience delivering security transformation programs across multiple geographies and business units.
* Experience PM’ing security roadmaps that include detection and response maturity, platform security modernization, secure engineering programs, and governance remediation.
* Experience building governance rhythms and reporting packs used by executives, audit committees, or senior leadership stakeholders
* Experience in high\-scale consumer internet, e\-commerce, fintech, payments, logistics, or marketplace environments
* Strong program management tooling depth (or equivalent) and dashboarding habits that leadership can actually consume.



  





 Is this you?

data.title: Senior Project Manager - Ports and Marine
data.raw_snippet: Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development
data.jd_text:
Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development. Operating in 100 countries, Egis puts the expertise of its 19,500 employees at the service of its clients and develops cutting\-edge innovations accessible to all projects. Through its wide range of activities, Egis is a key player in the collective organization of society and the living environment of citizens all over the world.
   

  





 With 3,500 employees across 8 countries in the Middle East, Egis has delivered over 700 complex development projects, stimulating economic growth and enhancing quality of life. Ranked among the top ten firms in the Middle East by Engineering News Record (ENR), Egis is committed to sustainable development. The Group’s operations in the Middle East are built on strategic acquisitions and a deep understanding of local market conditions. Egis’ long history of providing comprehensive engineering, consulting, and project management services makes it a trusted partner for regional governments, investors, and developers.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 We are seeking an experienced Senior Project Manager to lead complex port and marine infrastructure projects in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. In this pivotal role, you will oversee the planning, execution, and delivery of large\-scale maritime projects while managing cross\-functional teams, stakeholders, and resources. The ideal candidate will demonstrate strong leadership capabilities, analytical thinking, and a comprehensive understanding of ports and marine operations in a dynamic, fast\-paced environment.
   

  




* Direct end\-to\-end project delivery for ports and marine infrastructure initiatives, ensuring adherence to scope, schedule, and budget parameters
* Develop and maintain detailed project plans, timelines, and resource allocation strategies using industry\-standard project management tools
* Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks through proactive analysis and contingency planning
* Manage stakeholder communications and expectations across multiple organizational levels and external partners
* Oversee contract negotiations, vendor management, and procurement activities in compliance with organizational policies
* Lead and mentor project teams, fostering collaboration and accountability to achieve project objectives
* Monitor project performance metrics and prepare comprehensive status reports for senior leadership
* Ensure compliance with maritime regulations, safety standards, and local regulatory requirements specific to UAE operations
* Coordinate with engineering, operations, and technical teams to resolve issues and optimize project outcomes
* Conduct post\-project reviews and implement lessons learned to enhance future project delivery


**Qualifications**

 \*\*Required Qualifications:\*\*
   

  




* Minimum 8\+ years of project management experience, with at least 5 years in ports, marine, or maritime infrastructure projects
* Professional project management certification (PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent)
* Demonstrated expertise in budget management, resource planning, and schedule optimization
* Strong knowledge of maritime industry operations, port facilities, and marine engineering principles
* Proficiency with project management software (MS Project, Primavera, or similar platforms)
* Excellent stakeholder management and interpersonal skills
* Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
* Proven ability to lead cross\-functional teams and manage complex stakeholder relationships



 \*\*Preferred Qualifications:\*\*
   

  




* Experience managing projects in the Middle East region
* Familiarity with marine terminal operations and cargo handling systems
* Experience with design\-build or engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) project delivery models
* Advanced certifications in risk management or specialized maritime project management


**Additional Information**

 Degree in Civil engineering

data.jd_text:
Join Our Team at Eaton: Empowering Tomorrow, Today!
   

  

 Eaton has been a key player in the Middle East for 40 years. In July 2024, we announced the construction of a new sustainable
 **campus in Dubai** 
 , which will bring together our commercial, manufacturing, and support functions, providing room for future growth.
   

  

 Eaton's Global Data Center Segment is focused on helping data centers realize real business benefits today while optimizing their operations for the future. With the rise of big data, edge computing and cloud, data centers are under pressure to be more high\-performing, sustainable and cost\-effective than ever, without compromising resilience or security. At the same time, new opportunities and revenue streams require faster speed\-to\-market. With our digital intelligence, world\-class cyber\-secure products and services, reliable, compatible solutions and engineering expertise, we help data centers realize real business benefits today while optimizing their operations for the future.
   

  

 Within this segment, Eaton has an opening for
 **Global Program Engineer Manager \- Digitalization.** 
 This role is a strategic, globally scoped position responsible for defining, deploying, and governing Eaton’s post‑order execution framework, PMO standards, and digital operating model across the Global Data Center Segment.
   

  

 This role ensures consistent, predictable, and scalable execution of complex, multi‑region data center programs by establishing global governance, driving digital adoption, and enabling transparency across order execution, engineering, services, and regional delivery teams. The position serves as the single point of accountability for PMO governance and digitalization within the Global Data Center Segment and operates as a key partner to regional leaders, functional owners, and global program teams.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
**Global PMO Governance**
* Define and own the global PMO governance model for post‑order execution across all regions (Americas, EMEA, APAC).
* Establish standardized program lifecycle frameworks, phase gates, escalation paths, and decision rights aligned with Eaton’s matrixed operating model.
* Ensure governance rigor for large, complex, and multi‑site data center programs, including hyperscale and strategic customer engagements.
* Act as the central authority for program health reviews, executive escalations, and cross‑regional issue resolution.


**Digitalization \& Tool Enablement**
* Lead the digital transformation of post‑order execution, driving adoption of standardized tools, dashboards, and digital workflows.
* Define global requirements for program visibility, KPI reporting, risk management, and forecast accuracy.
* Partner with Digital, IT, and functional teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and aligned with enterprise standards.
* Enable real‑time transparency for leadership through data‑driven insights and standardized reporting.


**Execution Excellence \& Performance Management**
* Define and govern global KPIs covering schedule adherence, cost performance, change management, execution risk, and customer commitments.
* Drive consistency in program cadence, review rhythms, and performance metrics across regions.
* Identify systemic execution gaps and lead continuous improvement initiatives to improve speed, predictability, and customer outcomes.
* Support post‑mortems and lessons‑learned processes to institutionalize best practices globally.


**Cross** 
**‑** 
**Functional \& Regional Leadership**
* Operate as a trusted partner to Post Order, Engineering, Services, Supply Chain, Sales, and Regional Operations leaders.
* Influence without direct authority in a highly matrixed, global organization.
* Support organizational change management (OCM) for new governance models, tools, and ways of working.
* Serve as a connector between global strategy and regional execution realities.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Business, Operations, or a related discipline from an accredited institution.
* \+12 years of experience in program management, PMO leadership, or execution governance within complex, global organizations.
* Experience using Salesforce in an enterprise or global environment to support strategic customers, complex program execution, and multi‑region reporting.


**Skills**
* Experience in data centers, mission‑critical infrastructure, power systems, or large‑scale capital projects.
* Strong background in digital PMO tools, dashboards, and execution analytics.
* Experience supporting or governing post‑order, delivery, or execution‑heavy environments.
* Familiarity with Agile, hybrid, or scaled program management methodologies in industrial or infrastructure contexts.
* Experience working in or with EMEA‑based global teams.


**Why Join Eaton**
* Competitive compensation and benefits, aligned with your experience and impact.
* Opportunity to work on challenging, high‑impact projects within a dynamic and collaborative team environment.
* Your aspirations matter – Eaton actively supports internal mobility and promotes from within whenever possible.
* Your growth matters – We invest in long‑term development through continuous learning, upskilling, and global programs via Eaton University.
* Your contributions matter – Reliability, safety, efficiency, and sustainability are at the heart of what we do, driving meaningful impact on people’s lives and the environment.
* Your wellbeing matters – Health, safety, and wellness are a priority. At Eaton, wellbeing goes beyond programs, empowering employees with the tools and environment to thrive.


**Living And Working In Dubai**
**Dubai is a vibrant,** 
 cosmopolitan city known for its modern architecture, luxurious lifestyle, and rich cultural heritage. Living and working in Dubai offers an exceptional quality of life with world\-class amenities, a safe environment, and a thriving expatriate community. Experience a dynamic blend of work and leisure in one of the world’s most exciting cities.
   

  

 Ready to make a difference? Join Eaton’s Dubai Team and be part of a company shaping the future of sustainable manufacturing and power management!
   

  

 All positions may require participation in video and in\-person interviews as part of the hiring process. All candidates will be evaluated based on job\-related competencies, and all candidates’ privacy rights and data security will be protected in accordance with applicable laws.
   

  

 We are committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for job applicants and employees. Our recruitment processes use balanced selection criteria and avoid unlawful discrimination against applicants on the basis of their age, colour, disability, marital status, national origin, gender, gender identity, genetic information, race or racial origin, religion, sexual orientation or any other status protected or required by law.

data.jd_text:
**What You Will Do**
 The Field Remediation Program Manager – Fire Detection Systems will lead and oversee field remediation operations, ensuring the effective management of remediation projects, compliance with health and safety standards, and customer satisfaction. You will be based in Dubai and collaborate with cross\-functional teams to develop and implement strategies for resolving complex field issues and continuously improving operational efficiency. Your role will also emphasize proactive risk management and the delivery of high\-quality outcomes within allocated budgets and timelines.
   

  

**How You Will Do It**
* Take full accountability for the successful execution and completion of all remediation projects, ensuring adherence to safety and integrity standards. Establish clear objectives, monitor progress, and implement corrective actions as necessary to achieve desired outcomes.
* Engage directly with field teams and customers to address challenges, streamline workflows, and remove barriers to optimal performance. This includes maintaining open lines of communication and fostering an environment of trust and collaboration.
* Lead cross‑functional collaboration with internal stakeholders to ensure timely and effective remediation.
* Promote a culture of continuous improvement by encouraging candid feedback and innovative problem\-solving approaches.
* Deliver regular status updates and comprehensive final reports to senior leadership.
* Foster a collaborative team environment by encouraging diverse perspectives and leveraging collective strengths to achieve program objectives. Ensure alignment with company values and long\-term vision.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, or a related field. Advanced degree preferred.
* Minimum of 5 years of experience in field remediation or a similar role, with demonstrated leadership in managing complex projects.
* Minimum 5 years Experience in managing Fire detection projects
* Proficiency in project management software and tools.
* Strong problem\-solving skills and the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, capable of engaging stakeholders at various levels.
* Commitment to upholding high safety and ethical standards in all operations.

data.title: Renewables Project Engineering Manager
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking a Renewables Project Engineering Manager \[RES PEM] within the Technical Centre for Power \& Utilities \[TCPU] to lead and manage the technical delivery of renewable energy projects across the Middle East, Africa, \& Caspian Countries.
   

  

 The role is cantered on Project Enginee
data.jd_text:
We are seeking a Renewables Project Engineering Manager \[RES PEM] within the Technical Centre for Power \& Utilities \[TCPU] to lead and manage the technical delivery of renewable energy projects across the Middle East, Africa, \& Caspian Countries.
   

  

 The role is cantered on Project Engineering Management under Owner’s Engineer \[OE], Project Management Consultancy \[PMC], and Independent Engineering \[IE] assignments for utility\-scale Solar PV, Wind, and BESS projects.
   

  

 The successful candidate will combine strong engineering background, structured project management, and client\-facing capability, ensuring high\-quality technical delivery, schedule control, and effective coordination across disciplines.
   

  

**Roles \& Responsibilities**
**Project Engineering \& Management**
 Represent the Technical Centre – Power \& Utilities as Project Engineering Manager \[PEM] / Engineering Manager \[EM] / Project Manager \[PM] on renewable energy projects under OE / PMC / IE roles.
   

  

 Lead and manage the technical review and design oversight process across:
   

  

* Civil \& structural engineering
* Electrical and grid integration
* Energy yield \& performance analysis
* Technology, permitting, and compliance


 Define and manage project workflows, deliverables, responsibilities, and review cycles.
   

  

**Technical Review \& Due Diligence**
**Review And Coordinate Technical Assessments Including**
* Plant design and engineering documents
* EPC, OEM, and O\&M contracts
* Technical inputs to financial models


**Ensure Technical Compliance With**
* International standards \[IEC, IEEE, ISO, NFPA, EN]
* Local grid codes and authority requirements
* Identify technical risks, mitigation actions, and optimization opportunities


 Schedule, Cost \& Reporting
   

  

* Review project management plans, schedules \[Primavera P6 or equivalent], and execution strategies.
* Monitor progress against budget, schedule, and scope.
* Prepare: \- Project progress reports \- Monthly status updates \- Invoicing plans and technical inputs to claims \[as applicable]


 Client \& Stakeholder Interface
   

  

* Lead and participate in: \-
* Technical meetings \- Design reviews
* Workshops with clients, EPCs, OEMs, and utilities
* Act as the primary technical interface for assigned projects.
* Support site visits, construction reviews, and commissioning activities when required.

data.jd_text:
We are seeking a Renewables Project Engineering Manager \[RES PEM] within the Technical Centre for Power \& Utilities \[TCPU] to lead and manage the technical delivery of renewable energy projects across the Middle East, Africa, \& Caspian Countries.
   

  

 The role is cantered on Project Engineering Management under Owner’s Engineer \[OE], Project Management Consultancy \[PMC], and Independent Engineering \[IE] assignments for utility\-scale Solar PV, Wind, and BESS projects.
   

  

 The successful candidate will combine strong engineering background, structured project management, and client\-facing capability, ensuring high\-quality technical delivery, schedule control, and effective coordination across disciplines.
   

  

**Roles \& Responsibilities**
**Project Engineering \& Management**
 Represent the Technical Centre – Power \& Utilities as Project Engineering Manager \[PEM] / Engineering Manager \[EM] / Project Manager \[PM] on renewable energy projects under OE / PMC / IE roles.
   

  

 Lead and manage the technical review and design oversight process across:
   

  

* Civil \& structural engineering
* Electrical and grid integration
* Energy yield \& performance analysis
* Technology, permitting, and compliance


 Define and manage project workflows, deliverables, responsibilities, and review cycles.
   

  

**Technical Review \& Due Diligence**
 Review and coordinate technical assessments including:
   

  

* Plant design and engineering documents
* EPC, OEM, and O\&M contracts
* Technical inputs to financial models


 Ensure technical compliance with:
   

  

* International standards \[IEC, IEEE, ISO, NFPA, EN]
* Local grid codes and authority requirements
* Identify technical risks, mitigation actions, and optimization opportunities


 Schedule, Cost \& Reporting
   

  

* Review project management plans, schedules \[Primavera P6 or equivalent], and execution strategies.
* Monitor progress against budget, schedule, and scope.
* Prepare: \- Project progress reports \- Monthly status updates \- Invoicing plans and technical inputs to claims \[as applicable]


 Client \& Stakeholder Interface
   

  

* Lead and participate in: \-
* Technical meetings \- Design reviews
* Workshops with clients, EPCs, OEMs, and utilities
* Act as the primary technical interface for assigned projects.
* Support site visits, construction reviews, and commissioning activities when required.


 Business Support \& Continuous Improvement
   

  

* Support tendering and proposal preparation for renewable energy projects.
* Contribute to improving internal: \- Best practices
* Project management tools
* Engineering workflows
* Knowledge sharing within TCPU


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in electrical, Mechanical, Power, or Renewable Energy Engineering.
* Minimum 9–12 years of experience in renewable energy projects.
* Proven experience in Project Engineering Management / Engineering Management for utility\-scale projects.
* Demonstrated exposure to:


 Solar PV plants
   

  

 Wind farms
   

  

 BESS projects \[assessment, integration, or execution

data.title: Global Project Logistics Transport Engineering Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**It's more than a job**
 In an administrative role at Kuehne\+Nagel, tasks such as managing office operations or coordinating schedules certainly contribute to your team's success, but they also provide meaningful moments for people around the world. Because your attention to detail supports your c
data.jd_text:
**It's more than a job**
 In an administrative role at Kuehne\+Nagel, tasks such as managing office operations or coordinating schedules certainly contribute to your team's success, but they also provide meaningful moments for people around the world. Because your attention to detail supports your colleagues to perform at their best, such as ensuring the timely and seamless transport of hearing aids and advanced medical devices that change lives. At Kuehne\+Nagel, our work contributes to more than we imagine.
   

  

 ‎
   

  

 The primary purpose of the Global Project Logistics Transport Engineering Manager is to develop, maintain, and implement technical standards across Kuehne\+Nagel’s global project logistics operations. This role plays a critical part in mitigating risk exposure, increasing the win ratio of project bids, and driving operational excellence.
   

  

 The position requires the use of CAD applications to create technical drawings and develop load‑securing concepts for overland transportation, including but not limited to road, rail, barge transfer, and site laydown operations. The role gathers, translates, and prioritizes customer and operational requirements into actionable technical initiatives, while providing hands‑on support for on‑site operations and HSE‑related activities.
   

  

 This role ensures strong technical support and effective knowledge transfer for both internal and external stakeholders, enabling seamless customer implementations and the adoption of new technical solutions. Additionally, the position contributes to the organization’s transformation agenda by advancing sustainability within global project logistics engineering.
   

  

**How you create impact**
* The role interacts extensively with global and national project logistics teams, business units, functional units , customers, suppliers, and technology partners.
* Perform cargo securing calculations to ensure safe transport for all possible modes of transport.
* Develop technical drawings, including 2D and 3D CAD designs
* Conduct route and site surveys, as well as feasibility studies
* Select appropriate equipment based on vendor drawings and site conditions
* Supervise operations and conduct pre\-shipment inspections
* Develop comprehensive journey management plans to optimize transport routes and schedules


**What we would like you to bring**
* University degree in engineering or a related technical field.
* Experience in project logistics or freight forwarding, ideally in large‑scale projects.
* Strong project management background, including solution design and technical implementation.
* Effective communication and stakeholder management skills across cultures and functions.
* Ability to interpret technical drawings, perform calculations, and work with 2D/3D CAD tools.
* Good understanding of transport regulations, engineering standards, and HSSE requirements.
* Strong analytical and problem‑solving skills.
* Willingness to travel for site surveys, operations, and customer engagements.


**What's in it for you**
 A role that offers international exposure, hands‑on involvement in complex project logistics operations, and the opportunity to develop both technical and managerial capabilities. You will work closely with global teams, customers, and suppliers, gaining valuable experience across engineering, operations, and project execution. The position provides continuous learning, professional development opportunities, and a clear pathway for career growth within a dynamic, multicultural environment.
   

  

**Who are we**
 Logistics shapes everyday life \- from the goods we consume to the healthcare we rely on. At Kuehne\+Nagel, your work goes beyond logistics; it enables both ordinary and special moments in the lives of people around the world.
   

  

 As a global leader with a strong heritage and a vision to move the world forward, we offer a safe, stable environment where your career can make a real difference. Whether we help deliver life\-saving medicines, develop sustainable transportation solutions or support our local communities, your career will contribute to more than you can imagine.
   

  

 We kindly advise that placement agencies refrain from submitting unsolicited profiles. Any submissions of candidates without prior signed agreement will be considered our property and no fees will be paid.

data.title: Program Manager – Customer Experience & Support (E-commerce)
data.raw_snippet:
**Reports to: Head of Central Operations \& Strategy – Omnichannel**

**Job Type: Full\-Time** 








**About Lulu** 








 Lulu is one of the most trusted and expansive retail brands in the Middle East, with operations across 6 GCC countries—UAE, KSA, Qatar
data.jd_text:
**Reports to: Head of Central Operations \& Strategy – Omnichannel** 








**Location: Dubai** 








**Job Type: Full\-Time** 








**About Lulu** 








 Lulu is one of the most trusted and expansive retail brands in the Middle East, with operations across 6 GCC countries—UAE, KSA, Qatar, Oman, Bahrain, and Kuwait. We serve millions of customers every week through a powerful combination of physical and digital touchpoints.
 







 Our store network spans over 250 outlets, including:
 







**• Hypermarkets (\~120\+):** 
 Large\-format stores offering full grocery and department store assortments.
 



**• Express Stores (\~110\+):** 
 Neighbourhood essentials with curated ranges.
 



**• Mini Markets (\~25\+):** 
 High\-frequency top\-up stores designed for convenience.
 







 With this extensive offline footprint, we're now on a mission to build the most loved ecommerce platform in the region, integrating our physical scale with seamless digital capabilities.
 







 But we’re not solving only for grocery.
 







 Our digital platform will power multiple verticals including fashion, electronics, mobiles, household goods, and more. We’re also preparing for the next generation of store formats—from express stores to experiential showrooms.
 







 Lulu Digital aims to become the everyday shopping platform for millions—offering scheduled and on\- demand delivery, cross category convenience, personalization at scale, and regional relevance at global standards.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 At LuLu, we operate one of the largest retails and omnichannel ecosystems in the region, serving millions of customers across both physical stores and digital platforms. Our customer experience and support teams play a critical role in ensuring seamless interactions across all touchpoints—from app and website to in\-store and last\-mile delivery.
 



 As a
 **Program Manager – Customer Experience \& Support** 
 , you will lead the design, development, and execution of initiatives that enhance customer experience and operational efficiency across LuLu’s e\-commerce and support ecosystem. You will drive continuous improvement, innovation, and customer\-centric transformation while ensuring alignment with business goals and scalable operations.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead the design and execution of initiatives to improve customer experience across digital and support channels (app, website, contact centre, last\-mile support).
* Drive end\-to\-end customer journey improvements, focusing on order fulfilment, delivery experience, returns, and support interactions.
* Partner with cross\-functional teams including Product, Operations., Logistics, Marketing, and Customer Support to align CX strategies with business objectives.
* Analyse customer data, feedback, and operational metrics to identify pain points, trends, and improvement opportunities.
* Drive continuous improvement and innovation through automation, process optimisation, and adoption of new tools.
* Develop and manage knowledge management frameworks to ensure consistent, high\-quality customer interactions across support teams.
* Establish and monitor CX KPIs such as CSAT, NPS, response time, resolution time, and retention metrics.
* Support governance and prioritisation of CX initiatives, ensuring measurable business impact and scalability.
* Ensure all processes comply with regulatory, operational, and service quality standards.
* Foster a customer\-first culture across teams, driving accountability, collaboration, and performance excellence.







**Qualifications \& Skills** 



* 8–12 years of experience in Customer Experience, E\-commerce Operations, Contact Centre, or Business Improvement roles.
* Bachelor's degree in business, Operations, Supply Chain, or related field (master's preferred).
* Strong experience in e\-commerce / retail / omnichannel environments.
* Proven ability to manage cross\-functional projects and drive large\-scale operational improvements.
* Strong understanding of customer journey mapping, CX frameworks, and service design.
* Experience working with customer support tools, CRM systems, and analytics dashboards.
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong communication and leadership capabilities.

data.jd_text:
**Description**
 Interested in working on an innovative and high\-impact business that is changing the way customers think about grocery? The MENA Grocery team (UFG) is offering a role to own building new business from ground Zero. We are seeking a self\-starter who can quickly familiarize themselves with this fast\-paced environment, build relationships/trust with cross\-functional teams, and assume ownership within the program which will require understanding of complex business/Tech/Ops processes at Amazon and our partners and devising an optimal engagement model. You must be able to thrive and succeed in an entrepreneurial environment, and not be hindered by ambiguity or competing priorities. High judgment, analytical talent and good document writing skills with concise communication are essential to success in this role.
   

  

 In this role, You will influence internal and external stakeholders and leadership to buy in to your strategic direction in forging new business partnerships, drive program end to end to onboard partners while ensuring flawless execution and continuously analyzing key metrics to drive improvements for your business.
   

  

 This position involves regular communication with senior leadership on Business and customer offering reviews, Operations excellence improvement areas, project execution and risks. You should be comfortable working both at a strategic level and diving deep into the details to ensure solution feasibility and quality of execution.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Partner Onboarding \& Merchant Launch
   

  

* Lead end\-to\-end partner onboarding programs, including new merchant acquisition, integration, and launch
* Manage merchant expansion initiatives to scale from current operations to 5\+ merchants per country
* Coordinate with cross\-functional teams to ensure successful merchant launches and ongoing relationship management
* Own the merchant onboarding lifecycle, ensuring timely delivery of all capabilities and requirements


 Contracts \& Legal Matters
   

  

* Partner with Legal teams to negotiate and execute partnership agreements, including Master Service Agreements (MSAs), addendums, and heads of terms
* Manage contract lifecycle from drafting through signature, ensuring compliance with company policies and financial requirements
* Coordinate contract reviews, approvals, and amendments with internal stakeholders and external partners
* Ensure all legal documentation is properly stored and tracked in Contract Central


 PMO \& Technical Program Management
   

  

* Build and manage PMO project schedules, plans, and metrics to support program delivery


 New Initiatives \& Programs
   

  

* Scope and deliver complex, business\-critical programs end\-to\-end, driving overall program strategy and roadmap
* Define business and systems requirements working with internal and external stakeholders
* Lead strategic initiatives such as new market launches, service expansions, and operational improvements
* Develop and execute project plans from design to release, securing resources and managing implementation


**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* Experience implementing repeatable processes and driving automation or standardization
* Knowledge of Excel at an intermediate level (e.g., pivot tables \& charts, multiple criteria lookups, nested logical/IF formulas, data cleansing, array formulas, etc.)
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules
* Experience defining and executing program requirements
* Experience in complex problem solving, and working in a tight schedule environment

data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
 As a PM on the Supply Chain Automation team, you'll design and build full\-stack applications and data\-intensive systems that power critical supply chain decisions. You'll work with massive datasets, develop and implement science\-based artifacts capable to impact broader supply ch
data.jd_text:
**Description**
 As a PM on the Supply Chain Automation team, you'll design and build full\-stack applications and data\-intensive systems that power critical supply chain decisions. You'll work with massive datasets, develop and implement science\-based artifacts capable to impact broader supply chain, and create intuitive interfaces that enable our operations teams to work smarter and faster.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Design, develop, and deploy full\-stack applications for supply chain optimization and automation
   

  

 Build scalable backend services using modern technologies (Java, Python, Node.js, etc.) on AWS infrastructure
   

  

 Develop responsive, performant frontend applications using React, JavaScript/TypeScript, Redux, and modern web technologies
   

  

 Architect and implement data pipelines leveraging our lakehouse architecture with Apache Iceberg
   

  

 Work with large\-scale data systems including Amazon Redshift, S3, and EMR
   

  

 Perform data mining and analysis to uncover insights that drive supply chain improvements
   

  

 Develop and support scientific solutions that are exemplary in terms of design, clarity, extensibility, and the ability to evolve over time
   

  

 Innovate with the latest technology to build highly automated solutions for efficient forecasting and supply chain automation
   

  

 Design, develop and deploy end\-to\-end machine learning solutions in the Amazon production environment to improvise the current supply chain through forecasting
   

  

 Own the full software development lifecycle from design to deployment and operations
   

  

 Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and contribute to technical strategy
   

  

**About The Team**
 Join Amazon's Supply Chain Automation team, chartered with building the next generation of automation and optimization systems from the ground up. Our mission is to transform supply chain operations through intelligent automation, reducing manual effort while increasing speed, accuracy, and efficiency across Amazon's fulfillment network.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 2\+ years of software development experience
* 3\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Bachelor's degree in engineering, computer science or equivalent
* Experience programming with at least one modern language such as Python, Ruby, Golang, Java, C\+\+, C\#, Rust
* Experience designing rich user interfaces using modern web frameworks (such as React, Angular, and Vue)
* Knowledge of object\-oriented design, data structures, and algorithms
* Experience with modeling tools such as R, scikit\-learn, Spark MLLib, MxNet, Tensorflow, numpy, scipy etc.
* Experience with scripting language (e.g., Python, Java, or R)
* Experience effectively gathering information from multiple data sources
* Experience architecting/operating solutions built on AWS


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. **Job Description**
 Parsons is seeking a dynamic and motivated
 **Assistant Project Manager (Arabic Speaker)** 
 to join our growing team in Dubai! In this role, you will play a key part in
 **supporting the successful management and delivery of complex infrastructure** 
**government projects, working alongside a multidisciplinary team of professionals shaping the future of the region.**
**What You'll Be Doing**
* Assist in day\-to\-day project management activities, ensuring alignment with project goals, timelines, and quality standards.
* Manage and control all project\-related communications to ensure transparency, accuracy, and timely information flow across stakeholders.
* Coordinate and oversee all project deliverables, ensuring timely submission and adherence to contractual and technical requirements.
