data.jd_text:
Currie \& Brown is looking for a
 **Project Director** 
 to join our project management team in Dubai, UAE working on
 **Data Centre** 
 projects.
 



  





**What will you be doing?** 




  




* Responsible for project definition and delivery
* Responsible for establishing project delivery plans and appropriate control mechanisms to assure effective delivery of the project
* Responsible for leading the project team and performance management of the Currie \& Brown team
* Work within established financial systems to independently produce plans and schedules and track and manage budgets, highlighting variances in order to manage and control project delivery targets
* Use own knowledge and experience of industry best practice to review and manage project processes and policies, providing insightful recommendations that support senior management to improve processes and systems
* Interact effectively and proactively across the organisation, seeking to develop ways to support collaboration and ensure projects can be delivered to meet customer expectations
* Advise senior management on progress and issues relating to own project, providing subject matter advice in order to support successful delivery in line with project objectives and strategies
* Present any business project risks or issues to senior managers (with proposed mitigation) to ensure the project is not adversely impacted, and ensure the delivery of projects to compliant standards
* Liaise and collaborate with clients and stakeholders, in order to ensure all parties are informed and aware of project progress and expectations
* Deliver aspects of Currie \& Brown’s vision to their respected project(s)



  





**What do you need?** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent
* Experience of leading Data centre projects previously
* Project management professional certification or accreditation
* Proven team leader capabilities, behaviours and values
* PMC Experience
* Experience during both pre\-contract and post\-contract phases
* Knowledge of industry best practice
* Excellent contract administration experience
* Commercial acumen and the ability to manage relationships with external stakeholders
* Proven ability as a trusted advisor to the client



  





**Our corporate values** 




  





 At Currie \& Brown, we know that when it comes to a good idea, it doesn't matter where it comes from. That's why we take a collaborative, open\-door approach to running our business. Our people, from apprentices to senior management, make our company what it is. Everyone in the Currie \& Brown family, no matter how experienced, contributes to our success in their own way, and we have fun doing it.
 



  





 Unlike other companies, we focus on the long term and deliver on our commitments. We take a compassionate and inclusive approach to our work and always invest in the future of our people. Whether it's the desire to work internationally, the urge to develop, or even the curiosity to work in a new sector, we are there for our people at every stage, offering guidance, support and the structure to achieve. That's why so many of us have been building successful careers here for so long.
 



  





 With the backing of our parent company, we are an independent company. Our people are able to make quick and flexible decisions, and work directly with some of the world's best partner brands in our industry through Dar Group.
 



  





 This mix of our scale and size, our partnerships and our people makes us a true industry leader around the world.

data.title: Global Program engineer Manager -  Multi‑Tenant Data Centers
data.raw_snippet:
Join Our Team at Eaton: Empowering Tomorrow, Today!
   

  

 Eaton has been a key player in the Middle East for 40 years. In July 2024, we announced the construction of a new sustainable
 **campus in Dubai** 
 , which will bring together our commercial, manufacturing, and support functions, providi
data.jd_text:
Join Our Team at Eaton: Empowering Tomorrow, Today!
   

  

 Eaton has been a key player in the Middle East for 40 years. In July 2024, we announced the construction of a new sustainable
 **campus in Dubai** 
 , which will bring together our commercial, manufacturing, and support functions, providing room for future growth.
   

  

 Eaton's Global Data Center Segment is focused on helping data centers realize real business benefits today while optimizing their operations for the future. With the rise of big data, edge computing and cloud, data centers are under pressure to be more high\-performing, sustainable and cost\-effective than ever, without compromising resilience or security. At the same time, new opportunities and revenue streams require faster speed\-to\-market. With our digital intelligence, world\-class cyber\-secure products and services, reliable, compatible solutions and engineering expertise, we help data centers realize real business benefits today while optimizing their operations for the future.
   

  

 Within this segment, Eaton has an opening for
 **Global Program engineer Manager \- Multi‑Tenant Data Centers (MTDC).** 
 The role is a globally focused leadership role within the Post‑Order CoE, accountable for driving consistent execution, operational alignment, and customer outcomes across Eaton’s largest MTDC customers. This role ensures that Eaton delivers as One Eaton for multi\-tenant customers by coordinating post‑order activities across regions, business units, and functions. The position is based in Dubai and operates with global responsibility across EMEA, Americas, and APAC.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
**Strategic Account Operations Leadership**
* Act as the global post‑order CoE operational lead for assigned MTDC strategic accounts.
* Ensure Eaton delivers as One Global Organization, with consistent execution models and customer experience worldwide
* Serve as the primary operations interface between Eaton and MTDC customers following contract award.
* Ensure alignment between commercial commitments and execution capabilities across regions.


**Global Execution Governance**
* Drive adoption of standardized global execution models, operating rhythms, and governance frameworks for MTDC customers.
* Lead cross‑regional operating reviews focused on schedule, quality, risk, cost, and customer satisfaction.
* Establish performance visibility through dashboards, metrics, and structured reporting.


**Risk Management \& Issue Resolution**
* Proactively identify delivery, capacity, quality, and schedule risks across global deployments.
* Lead structured mitigation plans and escalations in partnership with regional and functional leaders.
* Ensure rapid issue resolution while maintaining strong customer confidence and trust.


**Cross** 
**‑** 
**Functional Coordination**
* Coordinate execution across Engineering, Supply Chain, Manufacturing, Project Management, Quality, Services, and regional delivery teams.
* Influence outcomes in a highly matrixed global environment without direct line authority.
* Support alignment between Global Account Management, regional sales teams, and post‑order execution.


**Continuous Improvement \& Scalability**
* Champion continuous improvement initiatives to enhance execution efficiency, predictability, and scalability for MTDC programs.
* Capture lessons learned and deployed best practices across regions and accounts.
* Support digitalization and process maturity initiatives aligned with Eaton Business System (EBS) principles.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Operations, Business, or a related discipline from an accredited institution.
* Minimum of (15\) years of progressive experience in operations, strategic accounts, program management, or complex project execution.


**Skills**
* Experience in data centers, mission‑critical infrastructure, power systems, or large‑scale capital projects.
* Familiarity with global framework agreements, long‑cycle projects, and multi‑region execution models.
* Experience working across EMEA, with exposure to Americas and APAC operations.
* Knowledge of Lean, Six Sigma, or structured continuous improvement methodologies.
* Experience with agile, hybrid, or ProLaunch‑style methodologies.


**Why Join Eaton**
* Competitive compensation and benefits, aligned with your experience and impact.
* Opportunity to work on challenging, high‑impact projects within a dynamic and collaborative team environment.
* Your aspirations matter – Eaton actively supports internal mobility and promotes from within whenever possible.
* Your growth matters – We invest in long‑term development through continuous learning, upskilling, and global programs via Eaton University.
* Your contributions matter – Reliability, safety, efficiency, and sustainability are at the heart of what we do, driving meaningful impact on people’s lives and the environment.
* Your wellbeing matters – Health, safety, and wellness are a priority. At Eaton, wellbeing goes beyond programs, empowering employees with the tools and environment to thrive.


**Living And Working In Dubai**
**Dubai is a vibrant,** 
 cosmopolitan city known for its modern architecture, luxurious lifestyle, and rich cultural heritage. Living and working in Dubai offers an exceptional quality of life with world\-class amenities, a safe environment, and a thriving expatriate community. Experience a dynamic blend of work and leisure in one of the world’s most exciting cities.
   

  

 Ready to make a difference? Join Eaton’s Dubai Team and be part of a company shaping the future of sustainable manufacturing and power management!
   

  

 All positions may require participation in video and in\-person interviews as part of the hiring process. All candidates will be evaluated based on job\-related competencies, and all candidates’ privacy rights and data security will be protected in accordance with applicable laws.
   

  

 We are committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for job applicants and employees. Our recruitment processes use balanced selection criteria and avoid unlawful discrimination against applicants on the basis of their age, colour, disability, marital status, national origin, gender, gender identity, genetic information, race or racial origin, religion, sexual orientation or any other status protected or required by law.

data.title: Project Director
data.raw_snippet:
About the job
 



  





**CSCEC ME is recruiting an Project Director to join our project management team.** 




  





  





**Job Summary:** 




 Project Director will lead the end\-to\-end delivery of a deep tunnel gravity sewer line project, ensuring execution aligns with technical specif
data.jd_text:
About the job
 



  





**CSCEC ME is recruiting an Project Director to join our project management team.** 




  





  





**Job Summary:** 




 Project Director will lead the end\-to\-end delivery of a deep tunnel gravity sewer line project, ensuring execution aligns with technical specifications, safety standards, contractual obligations, and project timelines. The role demands strong leadership in managing large\-scale underground works, including TBM operations, shaft construction, and complex stakeholder coordination.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* Provide overall strategic direction for the successful execution of the deep sewer tunnel project.
* Ensure project delivery within scope, time, budget, and quality requirements.
* Lead multidisciplinary teams including engineering, construction, commercial, and HSE.
* Oversee design review, construction methodology, and execution of deep tunnel works using TBM methods.
* Monitor critical activities such as shaft sinking, tunneling, lining, and utility connections.
* Ensure compliance with international standards and client specifications.
* Administer contract obligations, claims management, and variation orders.
* Oversee budgeting, cost control, and financial reporting.
* Liaise with clients, consultants, and subcontractors on contractual matters.
* Act as the primary point of contact for clients, government authorities, and regulatory bodies.
* Manage relationships with utility agencies and ensure coordination for interface works.
* Lead project meetings, reporting, and progress reviews with stakeholders.
* Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks, especially related to geotechnical conditions and underground works.
* Ensure strict adherence to HSE standards and promote a safety\-first culture.
* Oversee emergency response planning for tunneling operations.
* Lead and mentor senior project staff, including construction managers and engineers.
* Ensure optimal allocation of manpower, equipment, and materials.
* Drive performance management and workforce productivity.



  





**Qualifications \& Experience:** 



* Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering.
* Minimum
 **18–25 years** 
 of experience in large\-scale infrastructure projects.
* Proven experience in
 **deep tunnel sewer, metro, or underground projects** 
 .
* Strong knowledge of TBM operations, shaft construction, and geotechnical engineering.
* Experience in GCC or international mega projects is highly preferred.

data.title: Program Manager – Events (UAE National), Deals and Events
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
 The Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region (UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt) is one of Amazon’s key Emerging Markets. Amazon runs several High Velocity Sale Events (HVEs) each year, including Ramadan, Eid, Prime Day, 11\.11, and White Friday, offering customers compelling value whi
data.jd_text:
**Description**
 The Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region (UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt) is one of Amazon’s key Emerging Markets. Amazon runs several High Velocity Sale Events (HVEs) each year, including Ramadan, Eid, Prime Day, 11\.11, and White Friday, offering customers compelling value while supporting sellers across the region. These tent\-pole events play a critical role in driving customer acquisition, engagement, and long\-term growth for Amazon in MENA.
   

  

 We are looking for a Program Manager to support the planning, execution, and performance tracking of these large\-scale events. This role will work closely with the Events team to coordinate key milestones, monitor event performance, and ensure strong cross\-functional alignment across Marketing, Category, Finance, Operations, and Tech teams.
   

  

 The Program Manager will play an important role in maintaining operational excellence across the events program. This includes tracking deliverables across multiple stakeholders, supporting in performance analysis, identifying trends in customer and business metrics, and helping translate insights into actionable recommendations. The role requires strong organization, analysis, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple workstreams in a fast\-paced environment.
   

  

 A successful candidate will be highly analytical and data\-driven, structured in their approach to problem solving, and comfortable working with data to understand performance drivers. They will demonstrate strong ownership of their workstreams, clear written and verbal communication, and a willingness to dive deep to support the team in delivering high\-impact customer events.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Event Program Coordination: Support the planning and execution of High Velocity Events across UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt by tracking key workstreams, milestones, and dependencies. Maintain structured tracking mechanisms to ensure teams are aligned on timelines, deliverables, and event readiness. Identify risks early, escalate blockers where required, and support the resolution of operational issues to keep programs on track.
* Performance Monitoring \& Analysis: Analyze event performance across key business metrics using Excel and internal tools. Work with large datasets, build reusable templates, and support recurring reporting to monitor performance throughout the event lifecycle. Conduct structured analysis to identify performance drivers, highlight gaps vs. plan, and provide data\-backed insights to inform decision\-making. SQL experience is a plus.
* Reporting \& Insights: Create and maintain performance dashboards, reports, and event recaps to provide visibility on key metrics and outcomes. Support the preparation of leadership updates by synthesizing insights and highlighting key trends.
* Process Improvement \& Automation: Partner with Business Intelligence teams to improve reporting processes, test new tools, and support automation of recurring analyses. Help document best practices and continuously improve internal event processes and playbooks.
* Stakeholder Coordination: Partner with cross\-functional stakeholders across Marketing, Category, Finance, Operations, and Tech to ensure alignment on priorities and deliverables. Facilitate clear communication across teams, track follow\-ups, and support governance mechanisms through structured updates and reporting.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree or above
* Knowledge of Microsoft Excel at an advanced level, including: pivot tables, macros, index/match, vlookup, VBA, data links, etc.
* Experience in data analysis, with the ability to interpret and draw insights from data to inform decision\-making processes
* Experience managing multiple projects, prioritizing, planning, and managing time
* Experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Knowledge of databases (querying and analyzing) such as SQL, MYSQL, and ETL Manager and working with large data sets
* 1\. Experience working in e\-commerce, retail, analytics, or other fast\-paced operational environments.
* 3\. Experience building dashboards, reporting tools, or automated tracking mechanisms to support program performance.
* 4\. Experience working with cross\-functional teams across technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* 5\. Experience supporting large programs, campaigns, or operational initiatives with multiple stakeholders.


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- Q\-Express Documents Transport
   

  

 Job ID: A10376313

data.title: Project Director, Marine
data.raw_snippet: Since first going into action in 1909, the BESIX Group has over the years grown into a multidisciplinary company with a leading position in its markets: construction, property development and concessions. BESIX Contracting specializes in construction, infrastructure and marine works, often in contra
data.jd_text:
Since first going into action in 1909, the BESIX Group has over the years grown into a multidisciplinary company with a leading position in its markets: construction, property development and concessions. BESIX Contracting specializes in construction, infrastructure and marine works, often in contracts with a high level of complexity. In Benelux and France, the Group’s regional affiliates BESIX Infra, Belemco, Cobelba, Jacques Delens, Vanhout, Wust and Lux TP ensure a strong presence and a local approach. With Franki Foundations, West Construct, Socogetra, BESIX Environment and Van den Berg, the Group offers specialist niche solutions for the building market like deep foundations, geo\-engineering, road construction, water treatment and cable and pipeline construction.
   

  





 Backed by our experience in our home markets, we have built up strong positions outside Europe. A typical example is the Middle East, where over a 50 year period we have built up an impressive portfolio. This diversification in activities and geography pays off by reducing our risk exposure
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Why This Role Matters**




 The Project Director is responsible for overseeing a large marine project (\>USD 300m) or multiple small marine projects through local deputies. He/she leads and manages the project(s) departments to achieve successful completion of a project, within given safety, quality, budgets and timeframe. He/she is the overall responsible for the P\&L of the project(s).Through their leadership on project management, their key responsibilities include meeting clients, consultants and project(s) stakeholders, organizing the project departments to ensure timely availability of working documents, coordinating work preparation, managing sub\-contracting and purchasing processes, and ensuring the efficiency of project delivery to the clients and consultants. He/she is accountable for Health Safety and Environmental assurance and control, Quality Assurance and Control, on\-site technical preparation and execution, plant fleet management, contractual relations with the Employers and interactions with Authorities and Third Parties.
   

  





**What You’ll Drive**



* Supervise and coordinate activities for the successful completion of the project(s) in accordance with client requirements, organizational policies/procedures, contract terms, and specified time and cost parameters.
* Coach and mentor project managers working under them
* Establish the organizational chart and project processes to ensure the proper functioning of the support team in various sections, in accordance with company policies.
* Address processes malfunctions as needed and motivate staff effectively.
* Coordinate activities on the project(s) among different trades and departments.
* Validate contractual options, whether they are technical, financial, or time related.
* Validate legal matters, with the agreement of the Six Construct legal department.
* Manage contractual and financial follow\-up and budget control.
* Approve all engagements related to the project.
* Conclude supply and sub\-contracts after preparatory work by the support team, including pre\-contract quality and performance audits.
* Engage in social contacts and public relations to benefit the company.
* Coordinate with all third parties, negotiate with contractors, suppliers, and subcontractors throughout all stages of the project life cycle, and participate in handling tenders and contracts.
* Implement project budgets and allocate resources, enforce project standards, conduct technical reviews, manage team.


**Qualifications**

**You’re a Great Fit If You Have**



* Experienced people and team manager, seeking consensus and demonstrating good listening skills.
* Advanced understanding of contract management.
* Is a natural organizer with deep understanding of process management within an organization.
* Holds deep knowledge of marine construction works, both technically and practically.
* Has the ability to rapidly assess issues, develop alternative solutions, and implement pragmatic strategies.
* Excellent communicator, both internally and externally.
* Demonstrates proficiency in negotiating at a high level and in complex environments.
* Exhibits professionalism, an entrepreneurial spirit, and a results\-oriented approach.
* Holds a high degree of flexibility and adaptability.
* Commercially gifted.
* Fluent in English, and additional European language, such as French or Dutch, is considered an asset.
* Willingness to relocate as required by business needs



**Why You’ll Enjoy Working with Us**



* Competitive Benefits
* Positive Workplace Culture
* Opportunity to work with a leading international construction group
* Exposure to large\-scale, high\-impact projects in the Middle East
* Collaborative, diverse, and professional work environment
* Career growth and development opportunities


**Additional Information**

 A career at BESIX is a lot more than just a job, it's about being part of our changing and innovative world. Your skills, ambition and passion will contribute to the development of our different businesses and allow us to succeed in the challenges of the coming years.
   

  





 Working for the BESIX group allows you to be a part of a dynamic, creative and entrepreneurial company which is now recognized as a Belgian Top Employer. It gives you a safe and collaborative working environment with ambitious and innovative goals for the world of tomorrow, but also for your career and personal development.
   

  

 We are looking for different kinds of personalities, mindsets, backgrounds and genders to build the iconic and sustainable projects of tomorrow.
   

  

  

  

 Are you ready to make an impact and leave a positive legacy for years to come? If you are passionate about our purpose to Excel in creating sustainable solutions for a better world, come and join our caring BESIX family. Together we will co\-create our future.
   

  

  

  

 Working at BESIX brings a lot of great benefits including:
   

  




* An attractive remuneration package including a salary in line with the market and a range of employee benefits such as flexible mobility advantages, extra\-legal pension, medical care insurance, work\-life balance program (such as teleworking, child care, flexible work schedule, mobile working), Health Management (sport, health check\-up program, …)
* Career development programs that serve not only to ensure that you are constantly learning and improving but also that give you the possibility to expand your career horizon
* A dynamic, creative and safe working environment with innovative colleagues supporting your endeavors (ideas, projects, goals, ambitions)
* Possibility to work on complex projects within both a local and international environment,
* The choice to remain locally anchored for the coming years or to seek an exciting international career opportunity within the group

data.title: Student Affairs Coordinator - Onboarding & Success
data.company: Rochester Institute of Technology, Dubai (RIT Dubai)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**









 This role is dedicated to supporting first\-year students as they transition from high school to higher education. This position acts as a central hub for support and resource connection for new students from onboarding throughout the first year. The role drives strategic s
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**









 This role is dedicated to supporting first\-year students as they transition from high school to higher education. This position acts as a central hub for support and resource connection for new students from onboarding throughout the first year. The role drives strategic student success initiatives aimed at improving retention, academic performance and campus engagement. The role will improve new student satisfaction and retention by easing the transition into university life, assisting with social integration, and helping students understand academic requirements.
 



  




 General Duties and Responsibilities:
 
  
 



 Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:
 



 ·      Coordinate, develop and promote existing and new strategic initiative aimed at enhancing the overall new student experience based on critical needs of students and university
 



 ·      Support new students with visa, medical insurance, special needs and accommodation, student residence accommodation and commuter transportation services 
 



 ·      Develop key strategies to support a successful transition to university life
 



 ·      Lead and execute initiatives supporting new student recruitment and retention
 



 ·      Increase overall community engagement in new student support
 



 ·      Help students understand university policies and connect them to resources
 



 ·      Serve as a resource for student concerns, providing guidance, referrals, and support for academic, social, and personal challenges
 



 ·      Facilitate leadership development with student volunteers in support of orientation
 



 ·      Coordinate closely with the Student Government for new student support
 



 ·      Establish and maintain good relationships with relevant staff and faculty, student leaders, paid student workers and regularly communicate relevant information provided by students
 



 ·      Ensure student issues are effectively managed to a successful resolution, providing a clear and customer\-focused summary of the issue to all relevant staff and if appropriate to any external parties
 



 ·      Act as a representative on behalf of the Student Affairs Office on University committees when required to ensure students are supported (i.e., various committees, staff council, commencement committee, task forces) in addition to special projects
 



 ·      Support the department head with budget allocation and spending
 



 ·      Data driven program refinement and reporting
 



 ·      Support the Associate Director with reporting requirements
 



 ·      Coordinate the role’s work in support of both the Student Affairs and University’s strategic objectives
 



 ·      Ensure adherence to university policies, regulatory bodies and the UAE laws
 



 ·      Support new student emergency and sensitive situations, during and outside of official office hours
 



 ·      Perform any other related tasks as assigned / needed.
 



 ·      Ensure compliance with all relevant (internal and external) regulations including QHSE requirements using RIT policies and procedures as appropriate.
 



  
 


 Job Qualifications:
 





 ·      Bachelor’s degree in education, counseling, business or a related field
 



 ·      Experience in student affairs, academic advising, teaching or customer service
 



 ·      Previous experience working with young adults in a guidance or mentorship capacity
 



 ·      Ability to train and effectively lead student volunteers and paid student workers
 



 ·      Expertise in Productivity Tools (i.e. Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workplace)
 



 ·      Proficiency in Student Information Systems (SIS) and CRM systems (e.g., Peoplesoft and Slate).
 



 ·      Experience in Artificial Intelligence Tools for Higher Education
 



 ·      Knowledge of Forecasting and Analytics Tools
 



 ·      Ability to work under pressure, multi\-tasking and meet deadlines
 



 ·      Accuracy and attention to details
 



 ·      Self\-driven, motivated, supportive, team player and transparent.
 



  
 


 Application Process:
 





 Please email your application to careersdubai@rit.edu. Please submit the following items as part of your application:
 



  
 



 o   Subject line must include the source, your name and position you are applying for; e.g.: RIT Website –Name – Student Affairs Coordinator
 



 o   Resume or curriculum vitae
 



 o   Contact information
 



 o   A cover letter detailing your technical/professional, teaching, and scholarship qualifications and achievements, and how these address the required and preferred qualifications for the position.
 



 o   Names, addresses and phone numbers of three references

 Executive Director \- Human Capital
 



**Location:**

**Overview** 




 We are supporting a leading organisation in D
data.jd_text:
**Title:** 
 Executive Director \- Human Capital
 



**Location:** 
 Dubai
 



**Reporting to:** 
 Chief Group Services Officer
 



**Subordinates:** 
 4\-5
 



  





***UAEN Applicants only please (non negotiable)***




  





**Overview** 




 We are supporting a leading organisation in Dubai with the appointment of an Executive Director \- Human Capital. This senior leadership role will drive the overall people strategy, ensuring the business attracts, develops, and retains high\-performing talent while fostering a strong, values driven culture.
 



 The role will act as a strategic partner to senior leadership, shaping workforce planning, organisational design, and talent initiatives across the organisation.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Strategic HR Leadership** 



* Develop and deliver the overall human capital strategy aligned with business objectives
* Partner with senior stakeholders on workforce planning and organisational design
* Drive employee engagement, culture, and wellbeing initiatives
* Ensure compliance with UAE labour laws and governance frameworks
* Oversee HR and manpower budgets and ensure effective cost management
* Leverage data and analytics to support decision\-making and continuous improvement



**Learning \& Development** 



* Lead the learning and development strategy across the organisation
* Identify capability gaps and implement targeted development programmes
* Oversee training budgets, systems, and external providers
* Promote a culture of continuous learning and leadership development



**Talent Management \& Engagement** 



* Oversee performance management, succession planning, and talent development frameworks
* Drive a high\-performance culture through effective review and feedback processes
* Develop leadership pipelines and high\-potential talent programmes
* Enhance the employee value proposition to attract and retain top talent
* Lead engagement initiatives and ensure follow\-through on employee feedback



**Compensation \& Benefits** 



* Oversee salary reviews, incentives, and market benchmarking
* Ensure payroll governance, accuracy, and cost control
* Implement reward strategies that support performance and retention



**Employee Relations \& HR Operations** 



* Oversee HR operations including onboarding, contracts, and compliance
* Manage complex employee relations issues and ensure fair outcomes
* Ensure accurate HR reporting, documentation, and audit readiness
* Oversee employee lifecycle processes including exits and transitions



**Continuous Improvement \& Analytics** 



* Monitor HR metrics including headcount, attrition, and engagement
* Provide insights to leadership on workforce trends and risks
* Identify and implement process improvements and efficiencies



**Leadership** 



* Lead and develop a team of HR professionals
* Build a high\-performance, collaborative team environment



  





  





**Mandatory requirements:** 



* 10 years of experience in HR minimum
* Bachelors degree minimum qualification
* Experience in Talent Management and Organizational Development
* UAEN applicants only please \- non negotiable

data.title: Programme Director - Airport Planning
data.location: Sharjah, Sharjah Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 We are seeking an experienced Aviation Programme Director, to contribute to the growing Aviation Team here
   

  

 in the Middle East. The Aviation Programme Director role plays a pivotal senior leadership role, steering a diverse portfolio of complex aviation projects across
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 We are seeking an experienced Aviation Programme Director, to contribute to the growing Aviation Team here
   

  

 in the Middle East. The Aviation Programme Director role plays a pivotal senior leadership role, steering a diverse portfolio of complex aviation projects across the Middle East. The position blends strategic oversight with hands\-on delivery, ensuring that major airport and aviation infrastructure programmes meet the highest standards of technical excellence, safety, and stakeholder alignment. Beyond programme execution, the director drives business development \- cultivating client relationships, identifying emerging opportunities, and shaping winning proposals that expand WSP’s aviation footprint in the region. It’s a role that demands vision, commercial acumen, and the ability to orchestrate multidisciplinary teams toward transformative outcomes in one of the world’s most dynamic aviation markets.
   

  

 The successful candidate will play a key role in shaping the future of airport design, delivering world\-class facilities that enhance operational efficiency, passenger experience, and environmental sustainability.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Technical Leadership \& Project Delivery:**
* Lead the project delivery of various scopes of work with an initial focus for the delivery of the Concept of Operations for DWC phase 2\.
* Translate operational and user requirements into spatially coherent layouts that reflect passenger, staff, service, and equipment flows, ensuring clarity, efficiency and functional alignment.
* Support airport masterplanning activities by assisting in the preparation of concept building footprints, interface zones, circulation concepts and area relationships across landside, airside and support facility environments. I
* Identify gaps, inconsistencies, missing elements and operational misalignments, providing clear corrective recommendations and contributing to the refinement of Scope of Work and associated deliverables.
* Support WSP’s QA/QC processes by ensuring all design outputs meet project requirements, client expectations and WSP quality benchmarks.
* Lead and contribute to the design and engineering of airport infrastructure, including runways, taxiways, aprons, terminals, and airside/landside facilities, ensuring compliance with ICAO, FAA, IATA, ACI, and regional regulations.
* Oversee the full project lifecycle from concept development and feasibility studies to detailed design, construction support, and commissioning of aviation projects. Drive the adoption of BIM, GIS, and advanced digital design tools to enhance project efficiency and accuracy.
* Develop strategies to future\-proof airport infrastructure, incorporating emerging technologies, climate resilience, and net\-zero sustainability goals.


**Client \& Stakeholder Engagement:**
* Establish and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including airport authorities, airlines, government agencies, regulatory bodies, and industry partners.
* Collaborate with architects, planners, contractors, and subcontractors to align design solutions with operational and safety requirements.
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, understanding their needs and expectations while ensuring project objectives are met.
* Represent the company in industry forums, working groups, and regulatory discussions to influence aviation infrastructure policies and standards.
* Participate in workshops and coordination meetings with airport authorities, operators, airlines, government entities and project partners, offering clear explanations of functional design intent, spatial logic and layout development.
* Capture operational feedback, user needs and stakeholder comments, translating them into updated layouts, diagrams, functional narratives and structured documentation.
* Prepare technical notes, functional design reports, diagrams, briefings, presentation materials and submission packages that support project communication and decision\-making.
* Collaborate with other Business Units to develop and deliver a ‘OneWSP’ service offering to aviation clients.


**Business Development \& Strategic Growth:**
* Develop and implement strategies to secure and deliver major aviation projects, aligning with business objectives and market opportunities.
* Identify new business opportunities, contribute to proposals, and lead bid strategies to secure high\-profile airport infrastructure projects.
* Work closely with the local and global aviation leadership to share best practices, resources, and technical expertise to enhance overall company capabilities.
* Support the development of aviation proposals, RFP responses and bid submissions by preparing methodologies, design approaches, scope definitions, delivery strategies, effort estimates and sample layouts.
* Work closely with project managers to define design\- related milestones, delivery plans and task allocations, ensuring alignment between design activities and PM structures.
* Provide design\-oriented support throughout the project lifecycle to ensure that planning, coordination, delivery and client communication are seamlessly integrated


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in civil engineering, Structural Engineering, Architecture, Aviation Planning, or a related field.
* Chartered Engineer (CEng, PE, or equivalent) certification preferred.
* 15\+ years of experience in airport design and delivery, engineering, and project management, including leadership roles in major aviation projects.
* Proven expertise in overseeing and delivering all components of new airfield design and development.
* Extensive experience working on complex mega airport projects and multi\-billion\-dollar infrastructure developments.
* Understanding of all aspects of design delivery including both AIA and RIBA stages including Operational Readiness (ORAT) and Handover.


**Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.**
 Join our close\-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
   

  

**With us, you can. Apply today.**
 Onsite

 An innovative Program Manager with superior analytical and planning abilities and preferred experience in Supply Chain / Logistics. Must have knowledge and experience in direct\-to\-customer fulfillment operations as well as excellent technical, problem\-solving, and communication s
data.jd_text:
**Description**
 An innovative Program Manager with superior analytical and planning abilities and preferred experience in Supply Chain / Logistics. Must have knowledge and experience in direct\-to\-customer fulfillment operations as well as excellent technical, problem\-solving, and communication skills.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 The candidate will be responsible for a) launching new programs to accelerate speed (Dark Store, SSD, Direct customer deliveries etc) b) setting up the network and Transportation configurations (NDC ) , Fulfillment experience (FX) charters across across all emerging markets. It will also include program managing the launch of new systems . tools , dashboards, processes as well as undertaking cost/speed improvement projects. The candidate will need to work with cross functional/cross country teams spanning finance, operations, 3PL, tech to set up the processes for maintaining the Configurations as well in driving improvements in existing fulfillment. The candidate will be directly responsible for senior leadership reviews on this programs.

data.jd_text:
**Role Overview**
 SYNCOMS is scaling its AI capabilities toward
 **high\-impact, production\-ready systems** 
 across multiple business areas and markets.
   

  

 We are looking for a
 **hands\-on AI Team Lead** 
 who will drive
 **execution, global coordination, workflow design, and delivery** 
 across multiple AI initiatives. This role requires someone who can
 **combine technical understanding with strong coordination and process thinking** 
 , ensuring fast, structured, and measurable output.
   

  

 You will work directly with the
 **Head of AI and Company Director** 
 , with a strong emphasis on
 **daily reporting, accountability, and delivery visibility across all projects** 
 .
   

  

**Core Objective**
 To ensure
 **fast, structured, and scalable delivery of AI\-driven workflows and systems** 
 , by focusing on:
   

  

* Global coordination across teams.
* Daily execution tracking and reporting.
* Workflow design and process optimisation.
* Rapid MVP development and iteration.
* Efficient use of modern AI/LLM tools.


**Key Responsibilities**
**Global Coordination (Critical Focus):**
* Act as the central coordination point across teams in:
+ Dubai
+ UK
+ India

* Ensure daily alignment on all projects and tasks.
* Follow up continuously to maintain progress and deadlines.
* Identify and resolve delays, inefficiencies, and blockers.
* Maintain clear communication across time zones.


**Daily Reporting \& Execution Tracking (Core Requirement)**
* Provide daily reporting directly to the Company Director, including:
+ Status of each project.
+ Task\-level progress.
+ Risks, blockers, and delays.

* Track:
+ Team output.
+ Delivery timelines.
+ Performance improvements.

* Ensure full visibility and accountability across all ongoing projects.


**Workflow Design \& Process Optimisation**
* Design and improve AI\-driven workflows across marketing and business operations.
* Continuously optimise processes to improve:
+ Speed.
+ Efficiency.
+ Output quality.

* Architect workflows that can scale across multiple regions and high user volumes.
* Focus on practical execution over theoretical design.


**Rapid MVP Development**
* Design and support MVP (Minimum Viable Product) builds within 1 week timelines.
* Ensure quick turnaround from concept to working solution.
* Iterate rapidly based on feedback and performance.


**AI Systems \& LLM Utilisation**
* Support implementation and optimisation of:
+ AI/ML systems.
+ LLM\-based workflows and tools.

* Ensure use of the most suitable and up\-to\-date models for performance and efficiency.
* Contribute to:
+ Model fine\-tuning.
+ RAG\-based workflows (basic level).
+ Performance monitoring and improvements.


**Product Readiness \& Deployment Support**
* Assist in moving solutions into production\-ready environments
* Support:
+ API integrations
+ Testing and validation
+ Deployment workflows

* Ensure solutions are usable, scalable, and business\-ready


**Team Supervision**
* Guide and coordinate junior AI engineers.
* Assign tasks and ensure timely completion.
* Maintain:
+ Code quality.
+ Structured workflows.
+ Delivery discipline.


**Experience**
**Candidate Profile:**
* 2–5 years in AI/ML, automation, or technical systems.
* Experience in workflow design, process optimisation, or system delivery.
* Exposure to team coordination or supervisory responsibilities preferred.


**Technical Skills**
* Understanding of:
+ AI/ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow – basic to intermediate).
+ LLMs and AI tools (practical usage).
+ APIs and deployment workflows.

* Familiarity with:
+ Automation tools.
+ Data pipelines and basic MLOps.


**Core Competencies**
* Strong coordination and follow\-up ability.
* Excellent reporting discipline and accountability.
* Ability to design and optimise workflows and processes.
* Execution\-focused with a fast delivery mindset.
* Strong communication across global teams.


**Performance Expectations (First 6 Months)**
* Establish daily reporting discipline across all projects.
* Ensure strong coordination across global teams.
* Deliver rapid MVPs (within \~1 week cycles where applicable).
* Improve workflow efficiency and reduce delays.
* Support multiple AI systems reaching production\-ready stage.
* Enhance execution speed and process structure.


**Compensation \& Incentives**
* Competitive salary aligned with AI Team Lead / Supervisor level.
* Performance\-based bonus assessed by the Company Director.
* Based on:
+ Delivery consistency.
+ Speed of execution.
+ Coordination effectiveness.
+ Output quality.


**Growth \& Opportunities**
* Work with a multinational group (35\+ years established).
* Exposure to large\-scale operations (multi\-country, high user base).
* Opportunity to design systems impacting millions of users across multiple regions.
* Potential to:
+ Travel to UK and other countries.
+ Participate in international meetings and strategy discussions.

* Fast\-track growth based on performance and ownership.


**Final Positioning**
 This role is ideal for someone who:
   

  

* Can combine technical understanding with strong coordination skills.
* Is focused on execution, speed, and delivery.
* Can design and optimise workflows that produce real business results.
* Wants to grow into a senior AI delivery or leadership role.

data.jd_text:
JOB TITLE: HEAD OF HARD LUXURY
   

  

 REPORTS TO: STORE MANAGER
   

  

 LOCATION: DUBAI MALL
   

  

 ORGANISATION UNIT: HERMES MIDDLE EAST LLC
   

  

 SCOPE OF JOB: The Head of Hard Luxury is responsible for partnering with the Store Manager to
   

  

 successfully run all aspects of the business in his/her departments including building sales, team
   

  

 management, identifying opportunities and client development via CRM and services initiatives
   

  

 and operations.
   

  

**RESPONSIBILITIES:**
**People development and team management**
* Conducting interviews and participating to the recruitment of the team.
* Daily supervision of the team (coaching, training, organizing morning briefs and assisting


 in achieving sales objectives).
   

  

* Being able to assess the team members and identify talents among the team members


 and conduct development plan/improvement plan when needed.
   

  

* Conducting monthly touch\-base meetings and Annual Performance Evaluations.
* Lead sales staff of his section hand in hand with the team leader and indirectly the rest


 of the team in the absence of the other Floor Managers.
   

  

* Motivate teams, create a sense of team spirit, discipline and mutual respect, as well as


 dedication and loyalty to the company, recognize individual and team efforts.
   

  

**Sales and Service**
* Demonstrates an active management presence on the sales floor (manager on duty


 MOD coverage).
   

  

* Delivering exceptional service and ensuring all team members embody the Hermes


 spirit.
   

  

* Identifying sales opportunities for his/her section by weekly review of business by métier,


 tracking delivery and special orders.
   

  

* Responsible for achieving the sales goal for the year for his/her section.
* Communicates CRM standards, follows up daily for associate compliance and to


 maximize quality of client capture rate and detailed information.
   

  

* Making critical client decisions and running business during Store Director visits to


 Podium/Paris.
   

  

**Operations**
* Ensures policy and procedure is clearly communicated to team and all are actively


 compliant.
   

  

* Complete the Daily Sales Report accurately with qualitative feedback when required.
* Ensure and anticipate proper schedule needs for the team. Keep accurate record of


 vacation, public holidays, and attendance in partnership with Sales and Service Support
   

  

 team and HR.
   

  

* Supports Sales and Service Support function and Stock Management function.


 Product management
   

  

* In charge of several métiers/product categories in terms of sales, visual merchandising,


 inventory control, training, etc.
   

  

* Be responsible for market updates and give buying advice to store manager.
* Partner with VM team to highlight business needs.
* Responsible for maintaining stock levels in all métiers, MOS, and sell through.


**MEASURES OF SUCCESS:**
* Successfully leads the assigned Métiers.
* Develops and coaches the team to deliver excellent service and results.
* Achieves business results of the department and overall stores.


**Experience**
* Prior management experience in luxury retail/ retail is essential.
* 4 \+ years in Retail or related experience.
* Must possess basic office skills including proficiency in Excel, Word, Cegid.
* Ability to interpret sales data and translate to effective business.


 recommendations/action plan.
   

  

* Clear written verbal communication skills.
* “Hands on” Manager, leading by example, with strong leadership skills.


 A creator, artisan and seller of high\-quality objects since 1837, Hermès is an independent, family\-owned French house that employs nearly 25,185 people worldwide. Driven by its permanent entrepreneurial spirit and consistently high standards, Hermès cultivates the freedom and autonomy of each individual through responsible management. The company perpetuates the transmission of exceptional know\-how through strong territorial anchoring that respects people and resources. Sixteen artisanal métiers feed the creativity of the house, whose collections are presented in over 300 stores around the world.

data.raw_snippet: **We are a dedicated Squad on a mission to reshape watchmaking, rooted in our legacy since 1884\. With a passion for crafting timepieces that thrive across air, land, and sea, we bring together a unique fusion of casual elegance, sustainability, and inclusive luxury. With 140 years of heritage and o
data.jd_text:
**We are a dedicated Squad on a mission to reshape watchmaking, rooted in our legacy since 1884\. With a passion for crafting timepieces that thrive across air, land, and sea, we bring together a unique fusion of casual elegance, sustainability, and inclusive luxury. With 140 years of heritage and over 1,900 passionate individuals across 20 countries, we’re excited to continue our journey forward.** 




**Join our vibrant team in Dubai as a Visual Merchandising Executive and be part of something extraordinary!** 




  





 Your main mission will be to drive excellence across every stage of the VM process—from planning and logistics to clear guidance and flawless execution. This is a pivotal role within the business, requiring a highly organised, self\-motivated individual who thrives on bringing structure, creativity, and consistency to in\-store presentation.
 



  





  





**Your contribution:** 





 Planning \& Logistics
 




 • You coordinate all Visual Merchandising activities, managing communication with Global, ordering POS and campaign materials, and ensuring smooth logistics, timely delivery, and flawless implementation.
 



 • You manage the GWP program end\-to\-end, including ordering, distribution, and in\-store/event usage, while monitoring stock levels, optimising utilisation, and recommending process improvements.
 



 • You collaborate closely with the Global team on Capex projects (store openings and refurbishments), overseeing design, approvals, agency standards, budgets, and execution.
 



 • You manage the VM budget in partnership with the Marketing Director.
 



  





  






 Implementation \& Coaching
 




 • You regularly visit all locations to review standards, provide coaching, and deliver product training.
 



 • You coordinate and implement campaigns with retailers and boutiques, ensuring alignment with brand strategy and achievement of KPIs.
 



 • You communicate launch plans and VM updates clearly to boutiques, ensuring alignment with Global guidelines and consistent reporting and feedback.
 



 • You ensure all locally produced materials meet brand standards, liaising with Global teams for approvals where required.
 



 • You collaborate with retail teams to develop boutique activities and events that support commercial priorities.
 



 • You support PR and Events teams in designing and executing fixtures, pop\-ups, and special activations.
 



  





  






 Execution \& Decoration
 




 • You partner with VM contacts in each boutique, providing commercial and visual guidance while sharing best practices.
 



 • You work closely with Retail teams to ensure boutique decoration is refined, locally relevant, and aligned with global VM standards.
 



 Do you think there is even more to discover in this role? You're right — apply today and learn more!
 



  





  





**You will perfectly fit into our Squad if:** 




 • You have at least 3 years’ experience in a similar role within a luxury environment in the GCC.
 



 • You demonstrate excellent organisational and planning skills.
 



 • You communicate effectively, with the ability to motivate and guide store teams to execute to brand standards.
 



 • You bring strong knowledge of the region and cultural awareness.
 



 • You are willing and able to travel across the region.
 



 • You have a confident, dynamic personality and a strong interest in market trends and innovations.
 



 • You are fluent in English; Arabic is an advantage.
 



 We invite you to apply even if you do not meet all of these criteria.
 



  





  





**Our values:** 




  





**At Breitling we are...EPIC! :** 



* Entrepreneurship – We take ownership, act with agility, and dare to challenge the status quo.
* Performance – We strive for excellence and deliver with impact, precision, and passion.
* Innovation – We embrace creativity and continuously push boundaries to shape the future.
* Care – We look after our people, our clients, and our planet, with respect and responsibility.



  





**Want to take on this mission and join our team? Apply now!**

data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description** 




 Founded in 2001, Golden Square Engineering Consultants (GS) is a multi\-disciplinary planning and design firm specializing in sustainable, energy\-efficient, and innovative architectural and engineering solutions. With offices in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Al Ain, Sharjah, Baghd
data.jd_text:
**Company Description** 




 Founded in 2001, Golden Square Engineering Consultants (GS) is a multi\-disciplinary planning and design firm specializing in sustainable, energy\-efficient, and innovative architectural and engineering solutions. With offices in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Al Ain, Sharjah, Baghdad, and Canada, GS delivers high\-quality, cost\-effective results for industrial, residential, commercial, and institutional facilities across the UAE and the MENA region. Partnering with clients in both public and private sectors, the company is known for its expertise in design\-build, peer review, and third\-party consultancy projects. GS is proud to have contributed to numerous landmark projects, maintaining a strong focus on quality, timely delivery, and fostering trusted relationships with international partners.
 



  





**Technical Director – Architectural \& Engineering Consultancy** 




**Location:** 
 Dubai, United Arab Emirates
 



**Reporting to:** 
 Managing Director / Executive Director
 



**Role Overview** 




 The Technical Director is the highest technical authority within the organization, responsible for leading multidisciplinary design and construction supervision functions across a diverse portfolio of projects. This role ensures technical excellence, regulatory compliance, and alignment between design intent and project execution throughout the full project lifecycle.
 



 Combining strategic leadership, client engagement, and financial oversight, the Technical Director drives performance, innovation, and quality across architectural and engineering teams while supporting business growth and operational efficiency.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**Technical Leadership** 




 Act as the organization’s principal technical authority across all disciplines (architecture, structural, MEP, quantity survey).
 



 Establish and enforce design standards, technical policies, and quality assurance frameworks.
 



 Ensure all designs comply with local authority regulations, codes, and international best practices.
 



 Provide expert technical input during concept, schematic, detailed design, tender and construction stages.
 



 Review and approve major technical deliverables and engineering solutions.
 



**Project Oversight \& Delivery** 




 Oversee the full project lifecycle from concept design through construction supervision and handover.
 



 Ensure alignment between design intent and on\-site execution.
 



 Lead multidisciplinary coordination to deliver integrated, efficient, and buildable solutions.
 



 Monitor project performance related to quality, timelines, and budgets.
 



 Identify and mitigate technical risks and implement corrective actions.
 



**Client \& Stakeholder Management** 




 Act as a senior technical advisor and key point of contact for clients.
 



 Support business development through technical input in proposals and presentations.
 



 Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, authorities, and stakeholders.
 



 Lead technical negotiations and resolve complex project issues.
 



**Team Leadership \& Development** 




 Lead, mentor, and develop multidisciplinary technical teams.
 



 Oversee recruitment, performance management, and succession planning.
 



 Promote knowledge sharing and technical excellence across departments.
 



**Financial \& Operational Oversight** 




 Contribute to business strategy and operational planning.
 



 Oversee project profitability, resource allocation, and cost control.
 



 Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial performance monitoring.
 



 Ensure efficient utilization of technical resources across projects.
 



**Compliance and Quality** 




 Ensure adherence to UAE regulations, authority requirements, and international standards.
 



 Implement and monitor QA/QC procedures across all projects.
 



 Drive innovation through adoption of new technologies, digital tools, and sustainable design practices.
 



 Stay updated on industry trends, codes, and emerging technologies.
 











**Qualifications \& Experience** 




 Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Architecture.
 



 Minimum 18–20 years of experience in architectural/engineering consultancy (pre and post tender stages).
 



 Proven experience in leading multidisciplinary teams.
 



 Strong knowledge of UAE codes, standards, and authority requirements (e.g., Dubai Municipality, DDA, etc.).
 



 Demonstrated experience in design management and construction supervision.
 


* For CV please send to : mary@gsengint.com

**Today, we deliver hundreds of millions of food orders, gr
data.jd_text:
**Who are we?**
**When you think of food delivery in the MENA region, we’d be pretty surprised if talabat didn’t pop into your mind first! Since delivering our first order in Kuwait in 2004, we’ve grown quite a lot over the past 17 years.**
**Today, we deliver hundreds of millions of food orders, grocery items and other products per year, to our customers in nine countries throughout the region with more than 3,000\+ employees! Our food delivery business works with over 27,000 brands and almost 50,000 branches, while our q\-commerce concept, talabat mart, now delivers groceries to customers in Bahrain, Egypt, Jordan, Kuwait, Oman Qatar, and the UAE in 30 minutes or less!**
**Our philosophy is to make sure we do what is right for our ecosystem \- our customers, our partners, our people, our riders, and the communities in which we operate. Our \#techforgood program allows our customers a safe and convenient way to contribute to important causes in their community through donating to local and international charities directly on talabat with a focus on food insecurity in the region. Since its inception in 2020, we have facilitated the donation of well over 1 million meals to those in need, as well as donated over $1\.5 million to charity with the help of our partners and customers. talabat is part of Delivery Hero, the global leader in online food delivery and q\-commerce.**
**As Talabat continues to grow and keep ahead of the curve we have launched our very own end\-end grocery service across the MENA region: tMart**

 stakeholders effectively.

data.title: Director of Digital Asset Trading & Exchange Operations
data.raw_snippet:
Welcome to
 **MultiBank Group** 
 , a global financial pioneer established in 2005 in California and now proudly headquartered in Dubai, UAE. We specialize in delivering cutting\-edge trading technology, unparalleled liquidity, and exceptional customer service. Our extensive range of financial produ
data.jd_text:
Welcome to
 **MultiBank Group** 
 , a global financial pioneer established in 2005 in California and now proudly headquartered in Dubai, UAE. We specialize in delivering cutting\-edge trading technology, unparalleled liquidity, and exceptional customer service. Our extensive range of financial products includes Forex, Metals, Shares, Indices, Commodities, and Cryptocurrency CFDs.
 







 Join our thriving community of over 2 million clients across 100 countries, contributing to a daily trading volume exceeding US$ 35 billion. As a heavily regulated institution with oversight from 18\+ financial regulators across 5 continents, and recipient of over 80 financial awards, MultiBank Group is devoted to innovation, excellence, and empowering our clients to achieve their financial goals.
 



  





**mb.io** 
 is the regulated cryptocurrency exchange under MultiBank Group, offering a user\-friendly platform for instant, secure trading including Bitcoin, Ethereum and more. As we expand our offerings in the cryptocurrency space, we are looking for a
 **Director of Digital Asset Trading \& Exchange Operations** 
 to join the team.
 



  





**Role Overview:** 




  





 We are seeking a senior crypto trading leader to build, lead, and scale a new chapter in our digital asset trading capabilities. This is a strategic and hands\-on role responsible for shaping and advancing the firm’s crypto trading, liquidity, exchange infrastructure, and derivatives capabilities. The role spans
 **OTC, perpetuals, funding logic, market making, liquidity sourcing, hedging, and market structure design** 
 , while also playing an important part in the strategy surrounding token\-related initiatives, exchange engagement, and broader platform growth.
 



  





 The ideal candidate will bring a strong combination of
 **trading leadership, derivatives expertise, liquidity and market\-making experience, token exposure, and operational depth** 
 . They should understand how to build and scale a crypto trading function that is commercially effective, technically sound, and aligned with a more structured and institutional operating environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





**Trading Leadership \& Strategy** 



* Lead and scale the crypto trading function across Spot, Derivatives, OTC, and Market Making.
* Define and execute the overall trading strategy in alignment with the company’s growth plans, platform roadmap, and commercial objectives.
* Take ownership of the trading desk’s performance, operating model, and long\-term capability buildout.
* Develop a clear framework for how the business prices risk, sources liquidity, manages execution, and supports product growth.



  





**Derivatives, OTC \& Pricing** 



* Lead the design and launch of the derivatives trading capability from the ground up, including perpetual products, funding logic, hedging frameworks, and exposure management — this is a greenfield build requiring someone who has stood up a derivatives desk before.
* Lead the development of OTC pricing and execution frameworks, including liquidity sourcing, cross\-venue hedging logic, and real\-time pricing across crypto and fiat pairs.
* Ensure pricing, execution, and risk systems reflect actual market behaviour and support sustainable commercial performance.
* Improve the desk’s ability to manage complex market conditions, funding dynamics, and non\-linear risk.



  





**Market Making, Liquidity \& Market Structure** 



* Design and oversee
 **market\-making strategies** 
 to optimise liquidity, spreads, order book depth, and execution efficiency.
* Define and execute
 **liquidity strategy across exchanges and providers** 
 , improving access, reducing slippage, and enhancing execution quality.
* Shape
 **market structure, execution workflows, and venue strategy** 
 to support client flow and platform growth.
* Develop frameworks to manage
 **flow dynamics, adverse selection, and client behaviour** 
 effectively.
* Manage liquidity across
 **CEX and DEX environments (including AMMs)** 
 , optimising execution in both off\-chain and on\-chain markets.
* Oversee integration with
 **custodial providers (e.g. Fireblocks)** 
 , addressing latency, settlement, and operational coordination.
* Drive
 **end\-to\-end latency optimisation** 
 across order routing, signing, and on\-chain settlement.
* Maintain
 **tight spreads and consistent market depth across venues** 
 , managing fragmented liquidity and multi\-exchange listings.



  





**Token Strategy \& Exchange Engagement** 



* Lead token trading and liquidity strategy, including managing simultaneous listings across multiple Tier 1 CEXs, coordinating with exchange listing teams, meeting liquidity requirements, and managing launch windows and post\-listing market support.
* Manage cross\-exchange price consistency, arbitrage mitigation, and unified order book strategy to minimise price discrepancies and adverse arbitrage pressure when the token is live on multiple venues.
* Work closely with relevant stakeholders on exchange relationships, listing processes, and ongoing liquidity support across key venues.
* Ensure token and exchange strategy are underpinned by strong compliance awareness, including wash trading monitoring, market manipulation prevention, and adherence to exchange\-specific listing rules and regulatory requirements.



  





**Spot Platform \& Exchange Infrastructure** 



* Oversee spot trading pair selection, curation, and lifecycle management on the MBIO platform, ensuring pairs are commercially viable and supported by adequate liquidity.
* Bring hands\-on experience with
 **matching engine architecture, order book design, and trade settlement workflows** 
 , working with technology teams to deliver best\-in\-class execution and liquidity on the platform.
* Optimise on\-platform settlement processes and ensure seamless integration between the matching engine, custodial layer, and external liquidity sources.



  





**Risk, Governance \& Infrastructure** 



* Own risk management across trading books, liquidity operations, token\-related exposure, and counterparty activity.
* Build robust controls around inventory, hedging, funding, execution, liquidity, and operational escalation.
* Partner with technology teams on execution tools, APIs, pricing systems, automation, and trading infrastructure.
* Ensure that trading activity operates within a strong governance and compliance framework suitable for a serious and growing platform.



  





**Cross\-functional Leadership** 



* Work closely with Product, Technology, Risk, Compliance, Operations, and senior management to align trading strategy with business objectives.
* Act as the senior internal owner for all matters related to trading logic, liquidity architecture, market structure, and execution design.
* Support decisions that sit across commercial strategy and trading reality, ensuring the platform is built in a way that is both scalable and market\-relevant.



  





**Reporting \& Senior Management Communication** 



* Establish and maintain
 **structured reporting frameworks** 
 covering trading performance, P\&L, risk exposure, liquidity metrics, and market conditions, ensuring senior management has full visibility at all times.
* Deliver regular dashboards, commentary, and strategic updates to the executive team, translating complex trading dynamics into clear, actionable insights.
* Proactively escalate material risks, market events, or operational issues with clear recommendations and proposed action plans.



  





**Team Building \& Management** 



* Build, lead, and mentor a high\-calibre trading team and supporting trading operations capability.
* Create a culture of accountability, speed, analytical rigour, and disciplined execution.
* Strengthen the function in a way that supports scale without compromising control, performance, or market edge.'



  





**Candidate Profile:** 




  




* 7\+ years of experience in
 **crypto trading, derivatives, OTC, liquidity management, or market making.**
* Proven track record of
 **building or leading a crypto trading function** 
 within a structured or institutional environment.
* Strong expertise in
 **derivatives trading** 
 , including perpetuals, funding, hedging, pricing, and risk management.
* Solid experience in
 **OTC execution, liquidity sourcing, market making, and cross\-venue trading strategies.**
* Deep understanding of
 **market structure, liquidity dynamics, exchange microstructure, and client flow behaviour.**
* Experience working with
 **tier\-1 crypto exchanges, liquidity providers, and token\-related trading environments** 
 (including listings or post\-launch support).
* Good command of
 **quantitative or systematic trading concepts** 
 , with the ability to collaborate with technical teams.
* Hands\-on experience with
 **DEXs (e.g. Uniswap), custodial platforms (e.g. Fireblocks), and hybrid CEX/DEX environments** 
 , including latency and settlement considerations.
* Familiarity with
 **trading infrastructure** 
 , including matching engines, order books, and execution systems.
* Proven ability to manage
 **fragmented liquidity, cross\-exchange pricing, and arbitrage dynamics.**
* Strong
 **leadership, judgment, and crisis management skills** 
 in high\-pressure market conditions.



  





**Preferred Background:** 




  




* Experience within a
 **crypto exchange, market maker, liquidity provider, prop trading firm, or institutional digital asset platform.**
* Exposure to both
 **centralised and decentralised trading environments.**
* Experience supporting
 **token listings, launches, or liquidity programmes.**
* Familiarity with
 **trading infrastructure** 
 , including pricing systems, funding mechanisms, and execution frameworks.
* Experience operating in
 **institutional or regulated environments** 
 with strong governance and controls.
* Proven ability to manage
 **external partners and counterparties** 
 , including exchanges, custodians, and liquidity providers.
* Understanding of
 **exchange requirements, market\-making obligations, and multi\-jurisdictional considerations.**



  





**Why Join Us?** 




  




* Work with an industry\-leading global financial institution.
* Competitive salary and comprehensive employee benefits.
* Opportunities for professional growth and career advancement.
* Collaborative, inclusive, and dynamic work environment.
* Commitment to innovation and professional excellence.



  





*Become part of our international community at MultiBank Group and mb.io, dedicated to excellence, innovation, and shaping the future of digital finance.*

data.title: Manager - Content
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description**
 The women and men working at Publicis are more ready to face the future than at any other creative company. Since our birth in 1926, we have always been the leaders of change.
   

  

 We have always managed to anticipate the developments and inflection points of our indust
data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
 The women and men working at Publicis are more ready to face the future than at any other creative company. Since our birth in 1926, we have always been the leaders of change.
   

  

 We have always managed to anticipate the developments and inflection points of our industry – successfully investing in digital in its early stages, for example.
   

  

 Transformation means keeping pace with the huge changes taking place in the economy, in technology and in society at large. In an age of convergence and empowerment, we aim to attract people can help our clients reinvent themselves and guide them through their transformation. That’s the challenge: help our clients transform their business. It demands colorful personalities with an irrepressible passion for all the opportunities unleashed by digital disruption.
   

  

**Overview**
* Accountable to deliver on the marketing strategy that has been put in place through creative \& innovative implementation.
* Oversee the delivery and the activation of all marketing campaigns across all set channels.
* Manage the operations of the core pillars of the marketing stream which include Creative \& Social.
* Work closely with the Business Director and the rest of the streams (Data Science, CRM, Experience Design \& Media) to support the through the content for all communications.
* Researches, coordinates, edits and integrates work from writers and designers to produce layouts that meet established branding and style guidelines from existing campaigns. sources, selects and creates targeted content.


**Responsibilities**
* Overall, the Socia Media Manager is acting as a creative gatekeeper on all the brand's social platforms.
* Overseeing the brand being communicated accurately through the social content
* Has a POV on the media omnichannel management along with a media team driving a 360 experience, digital, offline, on ground.
* Ability to manage budgets and dynamically shift for best business outcomes
* Manage a complex launch strategy across markets, across target groups, and across campaign objectives (awareness, consideration, conversion, retention…).
* Creative: Lead the day\-to\-day on the creative stream along with content by:
* Managing seasonal campaigns are aligned with the overall brand narrative/storytelling.
* Optimizing brand \& performance marketing creative based on learnings and performance.
* Conducting market analysis to identify challenges and opportunities for growth
* Managing the integrated creative team and working as an hybrid creative manager who able to:
* Research, brainstorm, Ideate on concept with the creatives
* Monitor the copywriting to ensure it is as per the brand tone of voice
* Provide Visual Cues (at times) to the Client’s brief to the creative team
* Project Mgmt and Traffic Mgmt the day to day to ensure campaigns are delivered on time
* Work closely with the social exec on the publishing \& community management to ensure delivery of creative/content is in line with consumer sentiment.
* Social: Supervise the Content exec and work closely to manage and drive conversation around:
* Social content calendars development and management
* Social platforms management to fit set strategy
* Cross social platform messaging with tone of voice and purpose taken into consideration
* Community management understanding and the intricacies of crisis management
* Social listening tools and ability to analyze sentiments and drive positive change


**Qualifications**
* At least 5 years of experience in social media marketing, account management, or related field.
* Proven experience managing social media channels on various platforms, including Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, and TikTok.
* Experience in creating engaging social media content, as well as using social media tools for monitoring and analyzing performance metrics.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and Arabic, with the ability to communicate effectively with different audiences.
* Experience in leading and managing a team of social media account managers.


**Additional Information**
 R\-3627P\-4115

data.raw_snippet:
**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES** 




  





**Casework \& Beneficiary Support** 




 • Conduct needs assessments and provide appropriate case management.
 



 • Deliver psychosocial support and referrals to beneficiaries.
