 • Undertake
data.jd_text:
**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES** 




  





**Casework \& Beneficiary Support** 




 • Conduct needs assessments and provide appropriate case management.
 



 • Deliver psychosocial support and referrals to beneficiaries.
 



 • Maintain accurate and confidential records of all cases.
 



 • Undertake visits to beneficiary sites for inspecting and vetting process
 



 • Prepare periodical reports, case summaries as and when required by the management
 



  





**Program Implementation \& Community Outreach** 




 • Support execution of workshops, awareness, volunteering \& fund\-raising campaigns, and outreach initiatives.
 



 • Conduct field visits, meetings with vendors and partners to ensure effective delivery of programs. • Mobilize community members to participate in Foundation initiatives.
 



  





**Collaboration \& Reporting** 




 • Coordinate with internal teams, program managers, and external partners.
 



 • Prepare reports, case studies, and beneficiary feedback for monitoring and evaluation.
 



 • Escalate sensitive or complex cases to the Program Manager or Director General.
 



  





**Compliance \& Professional Standards** 




 • Ensure safeguarding, protection, and confidentiality of all beneficiary data.
 



 • Comply with organizational policies, ethical codes of practice, and legal requirements.
 



 • Promote DP World’s values and represent the Foundation positively. Perform other secondary tasks as assigned by the management.
 



  





**Job Context** 




 The role is performed in community\-based settings, often dealing with sensitive social issues requiring empathy, resilience, and discretion. The outsourced Social Worker functions as part of a team, ensuring smooth delivery of program activities in collaboration with internal staff and external service providers. The role requires flexibility to adapt to dynamic program needs and changing community priorities, while maintaining professional standards and safeguarding requirements.
 



  





**Job Type:** 
 Contract (6months)
 



**Salary** 
 : 10K AED
 



  





**QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS** 




  





**Education \& Professional Background:** 




 • Bachelor’s degree in Social Work, Psychology, Sociology, or related field.
 



 • Certification in counselling, case management, or social services is desirable.
 



  





**Experience \& Knowledge :** 




 • Minimum 2–3 years’ experience in social services, NGO projects, or community development.
 



 • Experience working with vulnerable groups, such as children, families, or marginalized communities.
 



 • Knowledge of referral pathways and local support networks.
 



  





**Skills \& Competencies:** 




 • Strong communication, empathy, and cultural awareness.
 



 • Ability to manage multiple cases effectively. • Good reporting, documentation, and IT skills (MS Office).
 



 • Fluency in English is required; Arabic is an advantage

data.title: Interface Stakeholder Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for an Interface \& Stakeholder Manager – Aviation Projects to join our team in KSA/ UAE. The Interface \& Stakeholder Manager will be responsible for managing all project interfaces across aviation ‑ sector stakeholders, including gove
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for an Interface \& Stakeholder Manager – Aviation Projects to join our team in KSA/ UAE. The Interface \& Stakeholder Manager will be responsible for managing all project interfaces across aviation ‑ sector stakeholders, including governmental authorities, airport operators, contractors, consultants, utility providers, and internal technical teams. The role ensures seamless coordination, clear communication, and the timely resolution of interface issues that may affect programme delivery. It also involves developing and implementing structured stakeholder engagement plans to maintain alignment, avoid conflicts, and support smooth project execution. The Manager will provide regular reporting to the Project Director, highlighting interface risks, dependencies, and mitigation strategies critical to the success of the aviation programme.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead and manage all interface activities across aviation stakeholders (government bodies, airport operators, contractors, consultants, utilities, and internal teams).
* Establish and maintain effective communication channels to ensure seamless coordination between all project parties.
* Identify, track, and resolve interface issues that could affect project progress, technical delivery, or schedule performance.
* Develop, implement, and maintain structured Stakeholder Engagement Plans to ensure alignment throughout all project phases.
* Facilitate interface workshops, coordination meetings, and technical discussions with project stakeholders.
* Liaise with regulatory authorities and airport operators to ensure compliance with aviation and infrastructure requirements.
* Prepare regular interface status reports and provide interface ‑ risk updates to the Project Director and leadership team.
* Maintain a comprehensive interface register, ensuring risks, dependencies, and actions are clearly documented and managed.
* Support integration between design, procurement, and construction teams, ensuring all disciplines are aligned.


 Promote a collaborative working environment across multidisciplinary teams
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Project Management, or a relevant field.
* 20\+ years of experience in interface management, stakeholder management, or project coordination within large ‑ scale aviation or major infrastructure projects.
* Experience working with airport authorities, regulatory bodies, or large PMC/consultancy organisations (highly preferred).
* Strong technical understanding of aviation infrastructure, design processes, construction interfaces, and multi ‑ party coordination.
* Proven track record resolving complex interface issues in fast ‑ paced project environments.


 Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.
   

  

 Join our close\-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
   

  

**With us, you can** 
**. Apply today.**

data.title: Account Manager
data.raw_snippet: As a Manager, Global Account Management, you will contribute to Sirva's success by working closely with the Vice President of Account Management and Global Account Management team to develop, maintain and shape client partnerships and enhance the client and customer experience. You will be a trusted
data.jd_text:
As a Manager, Global Account Management, you will contribute to Sirva's success by working closely with the Vice President of Account Management and Global Account Management team to develop, maintain and shape client partnerships and enhance the client and customer experience. You will be a trusted advisor to the client and collaborate with them on identifying best practices within the talent mobility industry. The position works closely with client contact(s) to provide seamless customer service and maximize Sirva's value to the client.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Client Consulting and Issue Resolution (50%)**
* Provide communication link between Sirva and the Client regarding relocation issues, household good issues, service level agreements and projects.
* Acts as a trusted advisor to the client and collaborates with them on identifying best practices within the talent mobility industry.
* Plays a key role in identifying solutions and resolving client issues across the client team and/or in partnership with other operational divisions.
* Exercise solid business judgment while making decisions and addressing transferee/assignee and client issues.


**Collaboration with Global Account Management (20%)**
* Assist with upselling and overall project management, including the management and calculation of client SLA results.
* Provide support, as requested, with client implementations.
* Collate and validate data and content for Client Reviews and Governance meetings.
* Work with the account management team to establish delivery of strategic account plans with understanding and recognition of all global and regional requirements.
* Works collaboratively with the Account management and the client team to understand the client delivery requirements and drive client profitability and revenue growth.


**Internal Consulting (20%)**
* Works with the Customer Experience teams to help educate on client policies and preferences.
* Collaborates with internal teams, management and VP/Director, Global Account Management to ensure client performance metrics are implemented, maintained, measured and achieved.
* Partner with local business development teams to support acquisition of new business
* Oversees VIP moves internally to ensure they are successful for the customer and Sirva.


**Reporting (10%)**
* Collaborates with Analytics team to ensure successful delivery of client reporting.
* Serves as a consultant for all client divisions/departments who need assistance with reporting such as: volume, performance metrics, relocation and assignment costs, budgeting and accrual.
* Keeps clients informed of available client reports and new products and services, and helps to encourage and ensure understanding and increased usage of the available tools and products.
* Works closely with the Digital IT team to help them enable effective client self\-service applications and processes and provides assistance with the implementation of new digital functionality to client contacts.


**Qualifications And Preferred Skills**
* 3\-5 years of equivalent customer relationship management work experience required
* Strong organizational skills
* Strong verbal, written communication and presentation skills (English and Arabic preferred).
* Able to think critically and proactively solve issues
* Strong client relationship Skills
* Excellent critical thinking skills with an understanding of data analytics and interpretation
* Global business experience a plus
* Proficient with productivity and reporting applications e.g. Microsoft Office (Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Teams), etc.
* Interest in growing revenue in client accounts through upselling products and services


**Education/Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree preferred
* Experience in global mobility or similar customer service roles with a focus on client relationships


**Line Management Responsibility**
* NO

data.title: Interface Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**About the Job:**
* Responsible for managing internal and external communications and activations, that support commercial objectives, build brand awareness, and promote the companys culture of excellence through captivating and informative storytelling. Support Director \| Asso
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**About the Job:**
* Responsible for managing internal and external communications and activations, that support commercial objectives, build brand awareness, and promote the companys culture of excellence through captivating and informative storytelling. Support Director \| Associate Director \- Communications and PR in managing day\-to\-day operations.
* Working closely with the Hotel to support any operational needs as per the job description.
* Support the Associate Director to set strategies and develop plans in partnership with external agencies.
* Manage day\-to\-day external and internal communications activities to deliver key messages to internal and external stakeholders.
* Assist the Associate Director of Marketing with the development of the annual external communications plans to promote the hotel focused around the three brand pillars service, dining, design and ensuring quality rollout of the plan.
* Review, edit and sign off content intended for internal and external channels to ensure consistency in the global narratives, compliance with brand guidelines and maximum impact on target audiences.
* Responsible for managing and delivering original stories and campaigns designed to build brand and colleague engagement with the support of agency partners and immediate direct reports.
* Assist Associate Director in delivery of internal comms programs, initiatives, and branded content e.g., quarterly town hall, Spirit of Jumeirah activations, etc.
* Manage various projects as and when required by visualizing the scope of work, deliverables, and milestones in line with property goals and objectives and ensure successful execution and implementation alongside Associate Director.
* Assist Associate Director in building relationships with key business partners, media and KOLs to support business objectives.
* Working closely with the marketing, sales and e\-commerce functions to ensure integration of activity across the relevant channels.
* Building relationships with key media in the UAE and ensuring their attendance at relevant hotel events.
* Oversee media FAM and influencer FAM logistics as arranged by wider internal team.
* Oversee the creative design communications collateral not limited to newsletters,
* presentations, reports, media collateral and video communications.
* Oversee administrative function of the department including contract management, budget management, invoicing, ROI analysis for all campaigns, and departmental document management.
* Day\-to\-day liaison with external PR and social media agencies, ensuring the quality of delivery.
* Ensure news is shared in a timely manner across internal communications channels.
* Oversee the management of social channels communications and activations in a timely manner.
* Accomplishes departments objectives by assisting Director\| Associate Director as necessary with planning, monitoring, and successful execution of projects and campaigns.
* Manage effective working relationship with all stakeholders.
* Manages periodic review, update and version control of SOPs on SharePoint and ensure that all changes are communicated to Colleagues on time and standards are followed.
* Oversees regular departmental meetings, responds to issues, and share updates, provide counselling and shares feedback. Respond with two\-way communication. Manages Colleagues
* appraisals and bi\-monthly reviews where applicable.
* Support the corporate office to handle any issues that occur in the hotel with the aim of protecting the reputation of the hotel /brand in the media and on social channels.
* Responsible for increasing brand awareness through the effective use of social media.
* Implementing content strategies on social media platforms.
* Analyze engagement data, identifying trends in customer interactions.
* Coach, mentor and develop Social Media Assistant Manager.
* Manage social media calendars ensuring content is on brand and approved.
* Setting key performance indicators (KPIs) for social media campaigns.
* Perform related tasks and duties as assigned and deemed responsible by management.
* Ensure adherence to departmental policies, HSE processes, standard operating procedures, and instructions enabling excellent service delivery in line with Jumeirah standard of excellence.


 Financial Responsibilities
   

  

* Responsible for timely review of financial statements, Profit and Loss and annual budget with reporting manager.
* Manage and oversee administrative function of the department including contract management, budget management, invoicing, and departmental document management.
* Manage and oversee Department performance against the budget. Works with direct reports to determine areas of concern and establish ways to improve the departments financial performance.
* Identifies key drivers of business success and keeping leadership focused on the critical few to achieve results.


**﻿qualifications**
* Minimum of 5 years experience in Communications and PR preferably within the international luxury hospitality industry.
* Experience working in a multi\-cultural environment.
* Bachelors degree in marketing, Public Relations or equivalent from an accredited and renowned University.
* Strong media contacts within top tier luxury, lifestyle, fashion, and business press.


**About The Benefits**
 We offer an attractive tax\-free salary, paid in Dirhams (AED), the local currency of the UAE. In addition, we offer generous F\&B benefits, reduced hotel rates across our properties globally, excellent leave and health care package including dental coverage, flights home, life insurance, incentive programs, children's education assistance and other employee benefits making the role attractive to high performers and any applicant looking for a career with one of the most luxurious brands in the hospitality industry.
   

  

 Apply Now!

data.jd_text:
**Initial term:** 
 3 months (with likely extension)
 



**Location:** 
 UAE (partial on‑ground presence required)
 



 £190 \- £200 per hour
 



  





**The Opportunity** 




 Alongside the Operating Partner, the investor is seeking a Transformation Director to take ownership of day‑to‑day execution of the transformation agenda within the portfolio business.
 



 This role is focused on delivery, cadence, and implementation, acting as the engine room beneath the senior sponsor.
 



  





**Role Mandate** 




 Key responsibilities include:
 



  




* Translating transformation objectives into structured workstreams with clear ownership and timelines
* Driving execution across operations, organisation, cost base, and performance improvement initiatives
* Establishing governance, cadence, and reporting mechanisms
* Working closely with functional leaders and site‑level management to unblock issues
* Tracking benefits, momentum, and delivery against plan
* Acting as a trusted counterpart to the Operating Partner and CEO



  





**Candidate Profile** 




 The successful candidate will typically have:
 



  




* Senior experience as a Transformation Director, Programme Director, or senior consultant
* Strong delivery bias, with evidence of having run complex execution programmes, not just designed them
* Background in operations, transformation, or performance improvement in large, asset‑heavy businesses
* Experience in PE‑backed or highly performance‑driven environments
* Ability to operate in cross‑cultural, multinational settings
* Consulting background acceptable provided the individual has strong execution credibility



 Sector experience in transport/logistics or food/agriculture is preferred but not mandatory.

* 📈 Experience building scalable, high\-traffic platforms from the ground up.

* 🏢 Background in
 **agency, consultancy, or high\-growth startup environments is a plus.**



  





**🎁 Package \& Benefits:** 




  




* 💰 Salary: 60,000\-75,000 AED per month (depending on experience)
* 🛂 Full VISA sponsorship
* 🏥 Private medical insurance
* ✈️ Annual flight tickets home
* 💻 Flexible working setup: Hybrid role with time in their incredible office near the Dubai World Trade Centre 🌆✨



  





 Interested in finding out more? Hit that apply button and we'll be in touch if your profile is a good match.
 



  





 Please note, this role would require you to work on non\-shariah compliant products.

**Job Description**
 In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
   

  

 At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate an innovative culture that empowers you to achieve your full potential.  Parsons is looking for an amazingly talented
 **Lead Structural Design Engineer** 
 to join our team! In this role you will be responsible for

 on multiple
 **high\-profile projects** 
 and playing your part in the development of the City's infrastructure for the 21st Century.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Leading Technical Delivery of Bridge / Structure designs on multiple projects in parallel.

* Identifying opportunities for Innovative solutions and Value Engineering.

**What Desired Skills You'll Bring**
* Previous experience in UAE and GCC is an advantage.
* Experience in design delivery of cut and cover covered tunnels
* Experience working in ISO 19650 BIM\-compliant environment and software in a Common Data Environment.


 Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.

data.raw_snippet:

data.jd_text:
**About Us** 
 : Network International is the largest Financial Technology company in Middle East and Africa. Payments is our core business where we provide services in more than 50 countries – UAE, Jordan, South Africa, Egypt are some of our key markets. Apart from payments, we provide services on Data\[SM1] and Insights, Lending, Insurance, Risk Solutions, etc. Our core customers are businesses at every scale and segment, though recently we are growing in direct to consumer card segment as well.
 



**Our EVP :** 
 At Network International, we always stay ahead. . In the fast\-paced world of financial services, we thrive on innovation, agility, and purposeful collaboration. We invest first in our people, empowering you to make bold decisions, learn fast, and grow your expertise alongside industry leaders. Here, solving complex problems means more than using cutting\-edge technology; it’s about creating meaningful value for our customers, together. We foster a culture where trust, accountability, and achievement go hand in hand—because success isn’t just a goal; it’s how we work, every day, as one team.
 



**About the Role:** 




 The Issuing Advisory team partners closely with banks and financial institutions to design, launch, optimize, and scale card issuing and consumer financing propositions. The role focuses on combining
 **payments domain expertise, data\-driven insights, and commercial advisory** 
 to help issuers improve portfolio profitability, customer acquisition, and product performance across credit, debit, prepaid, EPP, and BNPL solutions.
 



 The candidate will work on
 **end\-to\-end advisory engagements** 
 , including new card program launches, portfolio diagnostics, revenue and cost optimization, scheme economics, and advanced analytics\-led use cases. This role requires strong cross\-functional collaboration with product, technology, data, and commercial teams.
 



  





 Responsibilities for Internal Candidates
 



  




* Support
 **go\-to\-market (GTM) strategy and readiness assessment** 
 for new and existing card issuers, including product proposition, underwriting alignment, pricing, and launch planning.
* Conduct
 **portfolio diagnostics and financial analysis** 
 covering interchange, scheme fees, non\-compliance fees, EPP economics, and issuer P\&L optimization.
* Lead and contribute to
 **revenue assurance and scheme cost optimization** 
 initiatives for issuing banks.
* Support design and rollout of
 **value\-added issuing solutions** 
 such as EPP 2\.0, BNPL, installment products, and card\-linked financing.
* Work with data and product teams on
 **analytics and AI\-led advisory use cases** 
 , including card recommendation engines, scorecards, and performance dashboards.
* Develop
 **client\-facing materials** 
 (business cases, proposals, whitepapers, and presentations) to support advisory engagements and sales motions.
* Coordinate with internal stakeholders (Sales, Product, Technology, Data, Schemes) to ensure
 **successful execution and delivery** 
 of advisory outcomes.
* Track KPIs, financial impact, and post\-launch performance to demonstrate measurable value delivered to issuers.



  





 Qualifications for Internal Candidates
 



  





 Candidate with 3 to 5 years experience in similar role
 


* Strong understanding of
 **card issuing economics** 
 , including interchange, scheme fees, authorization flows, compliance fees, and portfolio profitability.
* Proficiency in
 **data analysis and coding** 
 , with hands\-on experience in
 **Python and SQL** 
 for data extraction, analysis, automation, and building analytical models.
* Experience in
 **credit cards, consumer financing, BNPL, EPP, or payments consulting** 
 roles.
* Ability to perform
 **financial modeling, business case development, and data analysis** 
 to support decision\-making.
* Proven capability to translate
 **data insights into actionable recommendations** 
 for issuers.
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills, with experience working across functions.

**Job Purpose:** 




 The Sales Coordinator – International, supports the international sales team by coordinating export operations, managing order processing, preparing quotatio
data.jd_text:
**Sales Coordinator – International (for Jomara Products)** 




 Reports to: Business Development Manager
 



  





**Job Purpose:** 




 The Sales Coordinator – International, supports the international sales team by coordinating export operations, managing order processing, preparing quotations and reports, and facilitating communication between internal teams and international clients.
 



 The role ensures efficient export operations, accurate documentation, and timely coordination of orders, samples, and promotional materials to support smooth sales processes, timely deliveries, and effective client engagement across international markets.
 



  





**Key Accountabilities:** 




  





**Quotation \& Order Management** 



* Support Business Development Managers in preparing price lists and quotations for international clients.
* Coordinate with Customer Service for the preparation and issuance of Proforma Invoices (PI).
* Ensure Proforma Invoices are confirmed by customers and follow up on required approvals.
* Monitor and follow\-up on customer payments to support timely collection and order processing.
* Track order status and ensure alignment with agreed delivery timelines.



  





**Coordination \& Communication** 



* Liaise with the Production Planning team to ensure customer ETD and ETA requirements are met.
* Coordinate with Customer Service, logistics, finance, and warehouse teams to ensure smooth export operations.
* Provide regular updates to international clients regarding order status, shipment progress, and delivery schedules.
* Support Business Development Managers and the Sales Director with operational coordination and internal communication.



  





**Sample \& Promotional Material Management** 



* Coordinate preparation and shipment of product samples for international clients.
* Monitor inventory and availability of brochures, catalogues, and promotional materials.
* Assist in preparing materials and logistics required for local and international exhibitions and trade shows.



  





**Documentation \& Record Management** 



* Maintain export sales records, documentation, and filing systems in accordance with internal procedures.
* Ensure export documentation complies with company policies and international trade requirements.
* Maintain accurate and up\-to\-date international sales databases.








**Reporting \& Sales Monitoring** 



* Prepare weekly export sales reports for management review.
* Monitor pending Proforma Invoices, payment status, and delivery timelines.
* Provide regular updates with the Sales Director and Business Development Managers regarding export performance and operational status.








**Ad\-hoc \& Operational Support** 



* Support Business Development Managers and the Sales Director with administrative and
* operational tasks as required.
* Assist with cross\-functional initiatives involving sales, logistics, marketing, and finance
* teams.
* Contribute to process improvement initiatives to enhance efficiency in export operations



  





**Experience requirement:** 



* Minimum 2–4 years of experience in sales coordination, export operations, or commercial administration, preferably within FMCG or international trade environments.
* Experience coordinating export orders, documentation, and logistics processes.
* Strong reporting, coordination, and communication skills.
* Proficiency in Excel and sales reporting tools.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced commercial environment.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field.
* Strong command of English.



  





 \*\*Due to the volume of applications we are receiving ONLY SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES FOR INTERVIEW will be contacted.

data.title: BIM Manager - Digital Delivery
data.raw_snippet: Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development
data.jd_text:
Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development. Operating in 100 countries, Egis puts the expertise of its 19,500 employees at the service of its clients and develops cutting\-edge innovations accessible to all projects. Through its wide range of activities, Egis is a key player in the collective organisation of society and the living environment of citizens all over the world.
   

  





 With 3,500 employees across 8 countries in the Middle East, Egis has delivered over 700 complex development projects, stimulating economic growth and enhancing quality of life. Ranked among the top ten firms in the Middle East by Engineering News Record (ENR), Egis is committed to sustainable development. The Group’s operations in the Middle East are built on strategic acquisitions and a deep understanding of local market conditions. Egis’ long history of providing comprehensive engineering, consulting, and project management services makes it a trusted partner for regional governments, investors, and developers.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 We are seeking an experienced BIM Manager to join our innovative team in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. In this pivotal role, you will lead our Building Information Modelling (BIM) initiatives and drive digital transformation across our construction projects.
   

  




* Develop and implement BIM strategies aligned with organizational goals and project requirements
* Oversee the creation and management of BIM models throughout the project lifecycle
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of BIM processes
* Establish and maintain BIM standards, protocols, and best practices
* Lead and mentor a team of BIM professionals, fostering a culture of innovation and continuous improvement
* Liaise with clients, contractors, and stakeholders to ensure effective communication and coordination
* Analyze and optimize BIM workflows to enhance efficiency and productivity
* Conduct regular quality assurance checks on BIM deliverables
* Stay abreast of emerging technologies and trends in digital construction
* Provide technical support and troubleshooting for BIM\-related issues
* Prepare and deliver BIM training programs for staff and project teams


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Engineering or a related field.
* Master's degree in a related field is advantageous.
* Minimum of 8 years of experience in BIM management or a related role.
* Proven track record of successfully managing large\-scale projects using BIM.
* ACC expert with administrative experience.
* BIM certification (e.g., Autodesk Certified Professional) is advantageous.
* Advanced proficiency in BIM software, particularly Autodesk Revit, Navisworks \& ACC.
* Strong knowledge of 3D modelling and visualization tools.
* Familiarity with project management software and methodologies
* In\-depth understanding of BIM standards, best practices and digital delivery workflows.
* Excellent leadership and team management skills.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities.
* Outstanding communication skills, both written and verbal.
* Ability to work effectively in a fast\-paced, collaborative environment.
* Experience with digital delivery implementation in construction projects.
* Knowledge of local building codes and regulations in UAE is advantageous.

data.title: Senior Staff – Medical & Scientific Affairs Liaison – Infectious Diseases and Microbiology
data.raw_snippet:
**Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?**
**At Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, one of** 
**Danaher’s** 
**15\+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangi
data.jd_text:
**Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?**
**At Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, one of** 
**Danaher’s** 
**15\+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.**
**You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.**
**As a global leader in clinical diagnostics, Beckman Coulter Diagnostics has challenged convention to elevate the diagnostic laboratory’s role in improving patient health for more than 90 years. Our diagnostic solutions are used in routine and complex clinical testing, and are used in hospitals, reference and research laboratories, and physician offices around the world. Every hour around the world, more than one million tests are run on Beckman Coulter Diagnostics systems, impacting 1\.2 billion patients and more than three million clinicians per year. From uncovering the next clinical breakthrough, to rapid and reliable sample analysis, to more rigorous decision making—we are enabling clinicians to deliver the best possible care to their patients with improved efficiency, clinical confidence, adaptive collaboration, and accelerated intelligence. Learn about the** 
**Danaher Business System** 
**which makes everything possible.**
**The Senior Staff – Medical \& Science Affairs Liaison– Infectious Diseases and Microbiology primarily develop and executes on medical and scientific education for the Infectious Disease and Microbiology Disease area. The staff MSL also contributes to important Medical and Scientific initiatives such as fostering KOL relationships, participates in scientific advisory boards, sustaining of scientific and clinical studies and providing field intelligence to internal teams. This is a vital role that serves as a medical liaison between Beckman Coulter Diagnostics and the academic/clinical community, strengthening and supporting advancements in and utilization of Infectious Disease and Microbiology diagnostics. Primary responsibilities include contributing to medical and scientific education, training and engagement strategy, developing and cultivating strong relationships with key opinion leaders (KOLs) and healthcare professionals, identifying unmet needs and scientific gaps in medical research, providing insights into clinical practice paradigms and development and delivery medical and scientific education for Infectious Disease and Microbiology products.**
**This position reports to the Senior Director, Medical \& Scientific Affairs – Infectious Diseases and Microbiology and is part of the Medical \& Scientific Affairs organization, a team of medical specialists dedicated to all medical aspects of safe and effective in vitro diagnostics across therapeutic areas.**
**This role may be fully remote in designated territory, working remotely to cover a global business area. Beckman Coulter has a major site presence in South Florida, Southern California, Hebron Kentucky, and Minneapolis Minnesota, as well as major hubs in Europe and Asia.**
**In This Role, You Will Have The Opportunity To**
* Support development and implementation of strategic engagement plans to build relationships with KOLs, Infectious Disease providers and other stakeholders, and medical societies in the Infectious Disease and Microbiology field
* Support development and implementation of strategic education and training plans for internal and external stakeholders
* Assist with execution and maintenance of clinical study and research initiatives
* Act as a scientific authority and engage in scientific exchange for Infectious Disease and Microbiology, streamlining complex scientific information and delivering medical and scientific education and training to internal and external collaborators
* Stay current on Infectious Disease and Microbiology clinical practice trends and diagnostic innovation, prepare materials for presentations, and participate in scientific symposia, conferences, and educational programs


**The Essential Requirements Of The Job Include**
* Bachelor’s degree with 14\+ years of experience or Master’s/Doctoral degree with 12\+ years of experience in the relevant therapeutic area required. Minimum of 5 or more years of experience in a Medical Affairs/Medical Science Liaison role or clinical practice preferred.
* Extensive knowledge of clinical and laboratory practice in the testing, diagnosis and treatment of infectious diseases.
* Strong understanding of clinical research methodologies, regulatory or laboratory standards guidelines and medical terminology.
* Proven track record to establish and maintain relationships with KOLs, providers, laboratorians and other healthcare professionals.
* Excellent interpersonal, communication and presentation skills, with the ability to effectively communicate complex scientific concepts to both scientific and non\-scientific audience.


**Travel, Motor Vehicle Record \& Physical/Environment Requirements**
* Ability to travel a minimum 20\-25% of the time (domestic and international)


**It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience in:**
* 10\+ years of domain knowledge of healthcare technologies and clinical practice trends
* 8\+ years’ MSL experience working in the medical technology, medical device, or IVD industry in Medical and Scientific or Clinical Affairs roles
* Advanced degrees: PhD, MPH, PharmD, RN , MHA or similar


 Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real\-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.
   

  

 For more information, visit www.danaher.com.

data.raw_snippet:
We're a Dubai\-based IT solutions studio specialising in structured cabling, enterprise networking, AV integration, CCTV, access control, cybersecurity, and full IT fit\-out delivery.
 



 Our clients include financial institutions, private equity offices, family offices, real estate developers, an
data.jd_text:
We're a Dubai\-based IT solutions studio specialising in structured cabling, enterprise networking, AV integration, CCTV, access control, cybersecurity, and full IT fit\-out delivery.
 



 Our clients include financial institutions, private equity offices, family offices, real estate developers, and professional services firms across the UAE.
 



  





 We operate as a senior\-engineer studio, not a volume contractor.
 



 Every project is led by experienced engineers, and our reputation is built on precision, technical depth, and trusted client relationships.
 



  





 We're hiring a Sales Manager to build our commercial function from the ground up.
 



 You'll design and execute the sales strategy, recruit and develop a team of three Sales Executives, and take full ownership of pipeline growth across project\-based and managed service revenue streams.
 



  





 You'll report directly to the Managing Director and play a central role in shaping the next phase of the company's growth.
 



  





**Expectations** 




 → Build and lead a sales team of three, defining territories, vertical specialisations, and individual KPIs
 



 → Own the full sales cycle — from outbound prospecting through to contract signature
 



 → Develop pipeline across structured cabling, AV, networking, CCTV, access control, and managed IT services
 



 → Implement CRM processes and forecasting disciplines to track pipeline health and conversion
 



 → Drive outbound activity via LinkedIn, email sequences, industry events, and direct engagement
 



 → Build a referral network across fit\-out contractors, MEP consultants, and facilities management companies
 



 → Identify cross\-sell and upsell opportunities — turning project wins into recurring managed service contracts
 



 → Represent OPS IT at industry events and networking opportunities across Dubai and Abu Dhabi
 



  





**Your Team** 




 You'll recruit and develop three Sales Executives, each with a defined focus:
 



  





 1\. Projects \& Fit\-Outs — new\-build and fit\-out opportunities through contractor partnerships and construction announcements
 



 2\. Enterprise \& Managed Services — recurring revenue through IT support contracts and network monitoring agreements
 



 3\. Financial Services \& Regulated Sectors — DIFC and ADGM corridors, targeting PE offices, family offices, and regulated entities
 



  





**What We're Looking For** 




 • 5\+ years of B2B sales experience, with at least 2 years leading or managing a sales team
 



 • Track record of hitting revenue targets in the UAE market
 



 • Experience selling IT infrastructure, technology solutions, AV, or related services to commercial clients
 



 • Proven ability to recruit and develop high\-performing salespeople
 



 • Strong understanding of the UAE commercial real estate, construction, and fit\-out landscape
 



 • Proficiency with CRM platforms and sales enablement tools
 



 • Excellent English communication skills — Arabic is a strong advantage
 



  





**Nice to Have** 




 • Existing network among facilities managers, IT managers, and procurement teams in the UAE
 



 • Experience selling into regulated sectors (DIFC, ADGM, healthcare)
 



 • Familiarity with Apollo.io, HubSpot, or similar outbound platforms
 



 • Conversational understanding of networking, structured cabling, or AV technologies
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 • Competitive base salary \+ performance\-based commission tied to team revenue
 



 • Company vehicle or vehicle allowance
 



 • Mobile phone
 



 • Medical insurance
 



 • Direct line to the Managing Director — no layers, no bureaucracy

data.raw_snippet:
**Who are we?**
 At Finastra, we are a dynamic global provider of open finance software solutions, dedicated to expanding access to financial services. Our innovative applications span Lending, Payments, Treasury and Capital Markets, and Universal Banking. Proudly serving over 8,000 customers, inclu
data.jd_text:
**Who are we?**
 At Finastra, we are a dynamic global provider of open finance software solutions, dedicated to expanding access to financial services. Our innovative applications span Lending, Payments, Treasury and Capital Markets, and Universal Banking. Proudly serving over 8,000 customers, including 45 of the world's top 50 banks, we aim to boost financial inclusion for all. Join us and be part of a vibrant company that embraces diverse perspectives, and is committed to doing well by doing good.
   

  

**What will you contribute?**
**The Presales and Project Management Principal** 
 is responsible for ensuring that all projects within the portfolio are delivered on time, within the client's budget, and meet or exceed financial targets, including baseline margins. This role defines project objectives and oversees quality assurance throughout the project lifecycle. A key aspect of the role is to consistently foster strong client relationships and uphold Finastra’s reputation for excellence. Additionally, the Principal ensures that all presales proposals are submitted punctually and are aligned with budget expectations in coordination with Sales and the Client.
   

  

**Principal Project Manager** 
 is responsible for managing all aspects of Large to moderately complex projects for a defined segment of strategic initiatives from project definition and intake to transition to full operational support.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Your deliverables as a
 **Principal Project Manager** 
 will include, but are not limited to, the following
   

  

* Leads and drives the development of the project intake process including developing scope, schedule and cost
* Defines the goals and objectives of specific project and defines individual team member’s roles and responsibilities for the duration of the project
* Manages multiple mid to large scale projects ensuring that they will complete on time and within budget and that the solution aligns with/meets the business objective
* Manages the daily/weekly project team assignments and monitors progress against the work plan to assure that objectives are met within the prescribed time, cost, and quality measures
* Identification and impact analysis of potential project changes and facilitation of change control board to approve or disapprove said changes.
* Meets financial objectives by forecasting requirements; preparing a project budget; scheduling expenditures analyzing variances; initiating corrective actions
* Continual identification, qualification and tracking of risks, defining mitigation and contingency plans, assigning appropriate resources, and constantly communicating status
* Responsible for identification of resource requirements and proper communication of those requirements in a timely manner to ensure the project is properly staffed with the skilled resources required
* Responsible for identifying internal and external stakeholders, understanding their communication requirements and fulfilling those requirements


**Requirements And Qualifications**
* 15\+ years of end\-to\-end Project Management experience
* Fluent in Arabic; native\-level proficiency is highly preferred
* Experience must be with customer\-facing projects and not internal to the organization
* Experience assisting project management teams with identification of action items, tasks and activities and tracking progress
* Experience at defining, implementing and continually improving standards, processes and procedures utilizing industry best practice (PMI, CMMI, etc.)
* Experience developing project budgets based on the development of Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)


**Benefits**
 We are proud to offer a range of incentives to our employees worldwide. These benefits are available to everyone, regardless of grade, and reflect the values we uphold:
   

  

* Flexibility: Enjoy unlimited vacation, based on your location and business priorities. Hybrid working arrangements, and inclusive policies such as paid time off for voting, bereavement, and sick leave.
* Well\-being: Access Confidential one\-on\-one therapy through our Employee Assistance Program, find support from our network of Wellbeing Champions and Gather Groups, and a calendar of monthly events and initiatives designed to help you thrive \- Inside and Outside of work.
* Medical, life \& disability insurance, retirement plan, lifestyle and other benefits\*
* ESG: Benefit from paid time off for volunteering and donation matching.
* DEI: Participate in multiple DE\&I groups for open involvement (e.g., Count Me In, Culture@Finastra, Proud@Finastra, Disabilities@Finastra, Women@Finastra).
* Career Development: Access online learning and accredited courses through our Skills \& Career Navigator tool.
* Recognition: Be part of our global recognition program, Finastra Celebrates, and contribute to regular employee surveys to help shape Finastra and foster a culture where everyone is engaged and empowered to perform at their best.
* Specific benefits may vary by location.


 At Finastra, each individual is unique, bringing their own ideas, thoughts, cultural beliefs, backgrounds, and experiences together. We learn from one another, embrace and celebrate our differences, and create an environment where everyone feels safe to be themselves.
   

  

 Be unique, be exceptional, and help us make a difference at Finastra!

 AMESA is a priority growth cluster, with a current busin
data.jd_text:
**Overview**
* There is an internal slated candidate being considered for this position. However, all qualified candidates are encouraged to apply.


 Lipton Ice Tea is the global No.1 RTD tea brand with over $3Bn in global turnover.
   

  

 AMESA is a priority growth cluster, with a current business of \~$80Mn and an ambition to double the business by 2028, driven by consumer shifts away from sugary carbonated drinks towards healthier alternatives and a clear JTBD to recruit new consumer \& develop the RTD tea category, by establishing Lipton Ice tea as a “Better for you beverage” vs other sugary drinks.
   

  

 Even within the Pepsico system, Lipton Ice tea is aligned as a priority to expend the portfolio.
   

  

 What makes the opportunity exciting?
   

  

 Ice Tea is a nascent category (\<2% of LRB) in AMESA, offering significant headroom for recruitment\-led growth anchored on rapid acceleration of health and better\-for\-you consumer trends
 - Growing consumer shift from carbonated beverages to healthier alternatives

- Globally this region has strong Lipton brand equity from Hot Tea (\+60% market share) provides a unique advantage, as the brand enjoys strong affinity and brand love.

- Lipton has an established GTM, with Pepsi bottling system, being small, it needs a disruptive and entrepreneurial approach to growth

 The Brand Manager based in Dubai, plays a critical role in governing and deploying the brand growth agenda across region’s multi\-market, multi\-bottler ecosystem (17\+ bottlers)and leading brand activations to drive performance.
   

  

 Specifically, this includes:
   

  

* Accountable for regional brand Seed strategy deployment and execution leadership across AMESA
* Support the Marketing Managers on developing integrated brand communication for the region
* Own regional A\&M budget tracking and governance across AMESA
* Project leadership and ownership of regional brand activation initiatives \& innovation deployment
* Develop \& deploy E\-com \& AFH (Away from home) channel activation and communication programs
* Packaging Development \& implementation of 2D changes across markets
* Business Performance Tracking \& Continuous Optimization


**Responsibilities**
 The role works in close partnership with the AMESA Marketing Director and with regional marketing managers, regional Insights and country franchise managers to drive implementation of the marketing plans.
   

  

 Specific activities include:
   

  

* Regional Brand Seed Strategy Deployment
* Deploy the Lipton Ice Tea Seed Strategy across AMESA, ensuring brand consistency with local relevance in line with the JTBT
* Translate strategy into clear, executable briefs and toolkits and act as the regional brand guardian.
* Lead the white\-space agenda by advancing the seed strategy with clearly defined Job\-to\-Be\-Done (JTBD) to recruit new consumers, accelerate RTD tea category development and scale the business by leveraging best practices from priority cluster geographies.
* Support the Marketing Managers on developing integrated brand plans \& communication for the region
* Partner with Marketing Managers on integrated brand communication, from planning to in\-market rollout.
* Co\-own the Annual Operating Plan (AOP) \& JBP (Joint Business Planning) with Marketing Managers end\-to\-end, from planning, cross\-functional alignment, deployment and in\-year sharpening by systematically integrating learnings from prior years.
* Enable leading\-edge digital and creator deployment and drive speed to market through cross functional coordination.
* Drive post\-launch evaluations across key initiatives, synthesizing performance, insights and gaps into holistic, actionable learnings for the broader business.
* Own A\&M Governance \& Budget tracking Quarterly
* Own regional A\&M tracking and governance across AMESA.
* Partner with marketing managers to prioritise spends and track phasing, flagging risks and deviations early.
* Project leadership and ownership of regional brand activation initiatives \& innovation deployment
* Lead regional innovation and activation deployment, from adaptation to launch execution.
* Develop activation toolkits and best\-practice playbooks for consistent market rollout.
* Develop and deploy brand activation plans aligned to AOP calendars, leading sampling and on\-ground consumer engagement and scaling impact through structured learning transfer across the cluster and continuous process optimization.
* Develop \& deploy E\-com \& AFH (Away from home) channel activation and communication programs
* Lead development and deployment of E\-commerce and AFH strategies across AMESA
* Work closely with franchise team to build channel\-specific propositions and activation models
* Build channel\-specific activation models and unlock new consumption occasions.
* Digital, Social \& Creator Ecosystem deployment
* Own regional social media deployment and creator strategy for Lipton Ice Tea.
* Ensure high\-quality, locally relevant, performance\-driven content through market and agency partnerships.
* Bring forth the best practices with key learnings across markets and create a tracking dashboard liaising with the agencies.
* Packaging Development \& implementation of 2D changes across markets
* Lead end\-to\-end management of 2D packaging changes across AMESA.
* Act as regional interface across Global, R\&D, Supply Chain, Legal, and markets to ensure on\-time delivery.
* Drive alignments \& implement plans with Bottling partners (19\+ Bottlers)
* Leading discussions with Bottling team, to ensure alignment and deployment of POSM toolkits across markets
* Drive alignment through strong influence, clarity of direction and structured engagement
* Performance Tracking \& Continuous Optimization
* Market Penetration: Monitor market penetration, brand performance and campaign impact in middle east markets, ensuring continuous growth.
* Business performance snapshot: Own business performance snapshots through monthly deep dives on the top 3\-4 markets in the cluster, analysing the 6Ps, identifying efficiency gaps and defining clear, action oriented interventions to improve market performance.
* Best Practices: Build and share best practices to scale white space market success across other priority regions.


**Qualifications**
 Person Profile
   

  

 Business \& Functional Skills
   

  

* Strategic Marketing Expertise: Proven track record in executing strategic marketing plans that drive growth in new and underdeveloped markets.
* Business Acumen: A strategic thinker with a deep understanding of the 3 C’s (Consumer, Customer, Competition), trends, practices, information, and insights impacting the business, enabling sound decisions to be made.
* Execution Excellence: Balance of strategic vision and hands\-on execution support, ensuring marketing initiatives drive business impact.
* Demonstrated capability in budget management, innovation deployment, packaging execution and digital marketing.
* Data\-Driven: Consumer and data savvy – everything we do is led by insights and data. You must be obsessed with it!
* Cross\-Functional Collaboration: Skillful at navigating a complex, matrix organization to drive clarity, alignment, and accountability across global, regional, and local teams.
* Strong influencing and people management skills \- ability to engage/motivate colleagues and stakeholders and lead projects independently


 Key Competencies
   

  

* Exceptional project leadership management with experience leading agile teams in a fast\-paced environment and managing multiple, competing priorities simultaneously.
* Active listener \- considering the perspective of others, activating the right plan based on holistic understanding of the business challenge and business needs.
* Curious connector \- ability to connect the dots across people, projects and partners, creating new opportunities for innovative collaboration that enables successful activation of digital brand strategies.
* Commercially minded \- able to identify opportunities and deliver business results through digital
* Team\-worker \- proactive networking across a complex organizational hierarchy
* Resilient and influential \- thriving on challenge, bringing colleagues along on the journey
* Strong communicator \- Superior verbal and written communications skills with extreme attention to detail
* Tenacity and sense of urgency \- the ability to make things happen quickly with large, less nimble partners and/or teams. Ability to perform in ambiguity and uncertainty


 Main interactions:
   

  

* Reporting into the Marketing Director
* Supporting Marketing Managers
* Pepsi Inter /Pepsi Bottlers \& Marketing teams
* Regional Leadership Team (brand agenda and innovation)
* Lead Creative Agency and other agencies for digital, adaptation, activation etc.
* Regional R\&D, Franchise, Supply chain \& cross functional stakeholders

data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose** 




 The Assistant Project Manager will work in conjunction with Operations, Design Department, Procurement, Supply Chain, MIS, Real Estate, Lease Admin and General Admin to construct world class restaurants with optimal quality, time and cost. This role has a direct impact on New Store Openings, Remodels and Capex.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Liaise with Landlords, developers, Development department and establish project design parameters.
* Prepare Preliminary Site Survey with detailed project construction and design requirements and constraints.
* Liaise with Design Team during the Project design stage.
* Evaluate Site, Prepare Detailed FS, Review B.O.Q. and Assign vendors.
* Scout and Evaluate New vendors.
* Liaise with contractors or outside consultants and obtain building permits.
* Prepare Construction Program and timeline.
* Start construction and follow up with requisite site visits.
* Approved Materials for Contractors based on Contracts, B.O.Q. specification.
* Liaise with Design team and ensure project is executed as per Design parameters.
* Prepare signage, furniture, and all other owner provided packages by liaisoning with approved Sub\-contractors.
* Assess Interim payments and prepare Final payment and additional/variation works.
* Complete Construction and hand\-over.
* Prepare Snag list and complete snags.
* Follow\-up maintenance period snags and complaints and thereafter release retention money on successful completion.



  





**Education \& Experience** 



* Bachelor’s degree in engineering/architecture
* 7\+ years experience with the FMCG / Retail / Restaurant Industry



  





**Knowledge** 



* Ability to plan, organise and adapt in various situations to meet business objectives.
* Strong understanding of building codes, accessibility standards, and life safety regulations.
* Knowledge of F\&B or retail specific design considerations (kitchen layouts, display areas, customer flow) is an essential.
* Knowledge of materials, finishes, and construction methods specific to F\&B or retail environments (a must).
* Strong project management skills.



  





**Skills** 



* Exceptional presentation skills.
* Ability to meet deadlines.
* Ability to prioritize and manage multiple projects.
* Strong organizational skills
* High\-quality work ethics without supervision
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Ability to solve problems by drawing upon the collective thinking of the broader team through design solutions.
* Strong leadership skills
* Client relationship management skills.

data.title: Head of Agency | Marketing Director | Customer Success
data.raw_snippet:
Ecomma is a rapidly growing private equity firm with proven expertise in acquiring ecommerce brands worldwide. We excel in a range of areas that drive genuine results and online growth, including:
 


* **Value Creation** 
 : Strategically investing to maximize the potential of our acquired brands.
data.jd_text:
Ecomma is a rapidly growing private equity firm with proven expertise in acquiring ecommerce brands worldwide. We excel in a range of areas that drive genuine results and online growth, including:
 


* **Value Creation** 
 : Strategically investing to maximize the potential of our acquired brands.
* **Operational Excellence** 
 : Leveraging best practices and a seasoned team to optimize brand operations.
* **Sustainable Growth** 
 : Prioritizing long\-term success with sustainable practices.
* **Data\-driven Marketing Strategies** 
 : Using data to tailor marketing campaigns for optimal reach and conversion.



  





 We asked our current team members to tell us what they love about working at Ecomma, and here's what they shared:
 


* Supporting
 **top\-tier brands** 
 that truly make a difference in the world.
* Knowing the impact of our
 **expertise** 
 (check out our success stories).
* Connecting with
 **C\-level executives** 
 and leading e\-commerce businesses.
* Working in the world's most progressive industry at a firm that prioritizes
 **personal development.**
* Enjoying a
 **great atmosphere** 
 with fun team outings.
* Having the opportunity for
 **substantial compensation, including lucrative bonuses.**
* As
 **Head of Agency \| Marketing Director \| Customer Success** 
 , you will be the driving force behind the operational performance of Ecomma's active portfolio businesses and post\-sale agency accounts. Your mission is simple: build and run a tight operating system that stabilises businesses quickly, drives revenue and EBITDA improvement, makes portfolio businesses exit\-ready, and ensures the engine behind both Portfolio and Agency runs with discipline, speed, and accountability.



  





 This is a highly commercial and turnaround\-focused role. You will take ownership of portfolio business performance, agency operations oversight, transition and handover discipline, EBITDA improvement, and Build Your Own project coordination, with the clear goal of turning around the businesses we manage and making them commercially stronger, more stable, and less founder\-dependent. You will work closely with our COO, CEO and leadership team to ensure operations directly support commercial outcomes, retention, and exit readiness. We are looking for a Head of Agency \| Marketing Director \| Customer Success with a strong operator background in e\-commerce, portfolio management, or multi\-brand business operations. Someone who understands revenue, margin, and EBITDA, how to identify where a business is leaking, how to move fast, and how to use AI tools and workflows to run a lean and highly effective operating department. Are you the next Head of Agency ready to scale Ecomma to the next level?
 



  





 What you will do
 



  




* **Own Portfolio Business Performance** 
 : Take full ownership of the weekly operating rhythm across all active portfolio businesses. Track revenue, gross margin, and EBITDA by business, identify underperforming brands early, and drive recovery plans that push businesses toward stronger commercial performance and exit readiness.
* **Drive Agency Operations Oversight** 
 : Oversee the operating side of agency\-managed businesses after handover. Ensure clear alignment between what has been promised and what is realistically deliverable, with tight coordination between CSM, performance, ops, and technical support. Improve account stability, issue resolution speed, and internal accountability to support retention.
* **Own Transition and Handover Discipline:** 
 Own and enforce seller\-to\-portfolio and portfolio\-to\-agency handover standards. Ensure all required inputs, documents, and business context are transferred properly, flag incomplete handovers early, and reduce loss of momentum during change of ownership and internal transition.
* **Drive EBITDA and Self\-Sustainability:** 
 Push portfolio businesses toward stronger EBITDA performance. Improve visibility into what is driving profitability or dragging it down, support working capital awareness and operational cost discipline, and help the division move toward being financially healthier and less dependent on founder intervention.
* **Oversee Build Your Own Projects:** 
 Lead the operational coordination of active BYO projects once live. Ensure structured follow\-through across launch, setup, and performance phases, and coordinate with relevant teams to keep projects moving and commercially on track.
* **Solve Cross\-Functional Operating Issues:** 
 Work with internal teams to resolve supplier, logistics, customer service, marketing, and website issues affecting portfolio performance. Be the person who unblocks things quickly so senior leadership does not need to jump in constantly.
* **Make Portfolio Businesses Exit\-Ready:** 
 Drive brands toward stronger commercial performance, operational stability, and sellability so portfolio numbers become visible, reliable, and improving.
* **Build a High\-Performance Operating Team:** 
 Set a clear weekly cadence for priorities, blockers, follow\-ups, and accountability. Ensure team members know what they own and by when, push for strong follow\-through rather than just updates, and escalate issues early rather than allowing drift.
* **Implement AI\-First Workflows:** 
 Bring an AI\-first mindset to the operating department by using AI tools, automations, and systems to improve speed, output, reporting, and team efficiency across portfolio and agency.
* **Track Performance Relentlessly:** 
 Set clear KPIs and reporting structures across portfolio and agency, including portfolio revenue growth, EBITDA, number of exit\-ready businesses, time to stabilise post\-handover, red/at\-risk brand count, recovery rate on underperforming brands, handover completion quality, and operational SLA follow\-through. You understand that operations exist to generate measurable business outcomes, not activity reports.
* **Improve Stability and Accountability:** 
 Continuously refine operating rhythm, escalation paths, and cross\-functional discipline so agency ops become less reactive and more structured, and businesses stop drifting after handover.
* **Create a Scalable Operating Engine:** 
 Build an operating function that is structured, repeatable, lean, and able to scale alongside the company as we continue to grow.



  





 We operate using Google Workspace, Slack, and Notion. Thus, familiarity and hands\-on experience with these platforms are important for this role. The candidate should be fluent in English, with excellent interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills. A strong commercial instinct, analytical thinking, fast execution, and high ownership are essential. Tools in use may include portfolio performance trackers, P\&L and EBITDA reporting dashboards, handover and documentation systems, project and task management platforms, client/account management tools, and AI platforms that improve output, speed, and operating efficiency.
 



  





 What you bring to the table:
 


* 5\+ years of experience in e\-commerce operations, portfolio management, multi\-brand business operations, or agency operations leadership, ideally in a high\-growth, roll\-up, or aggregator environment.
* Proven experience stabilising, turning around, and driving commercial improvement across multiple businesses at the same time.
* A strong background in operations and commercial performance, with clear evidence that you know how to move businesses from underperforming to exit\-ready.
* Experience leading and coordinating cross\-functional teams, including CSM, performance, ops, finance, and client/account contributors.
* A highly commercial mindset. You understand revenue, gross margin, and EBITDA, not just task execution, and you know how operations should directly support commercial outcomes.
* Experience working in e\-commerce operations, roll\-up/aggregator/multi\-brand portfolios, agency operations, or GM/multi\-store environments is a strong plus.
* Strong analytical skills and confidence with P\&L, reporting, attribution, and decision\-making based on data.
* An AI\-first mindset. You actively use AI tools, workflows, and automations to improve operating output, team efficiency, and speed of execution.
* Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple businesses, handovers, and priorities at the same time.
* Strong follow\-through, escalation, and cross\-functional coordination skills. Able to work with performance, ops, finance, and client/account teams without getting lost in the noise.
* A hands\-on mentality. You are strategic, but you are also willing to dig into the detail, fix issues directly, and drive accountability when needed.
* Calm under pressure, but not soft on accountability. High standards, strong ownership, and the ability to build a culture of urgency and operational clarity.
* Fluent in English with strong verbal and written communication skills.
* High ethical standards and a commitment to conducting business with integrity.



  





 The position will be filled immediately for the right candidate.
 



  





 Working at Ecomma is more than just a job. If you believe in seizing the present to enhance your future, you're in the right place. Combining hard work with the right atmosphere is our golden formula. We don't operate with a 9\-6 mindset, allowing you to manage your own working hours. We've found this approach yields the best results. Ecomma: a private equity firm you can count on.
 



  





 Please note: Proficiency in English is required.
 



  





 Does this opportunity excite you? Are you eager to dive in and unleash your creative finance mind? If you want to be a part of the Ecomma team, send your motivation letter and CV addressed to the respective job title application.
 



  





*If this role isn't a fit for you but you know someone it might suit, please share it with them \- we'd greatly appreciate it!*
