data.title: Construction Director
data.raw_snippet:
The Construction Director is the senior leader responsible for overseeing the delivery performance of the EPC contractor across the full project life cycle. Reporting directly to the CEO, this role leads project planning, design coordination, procurement, construction, and commissioning.
   

  

 T
data.jd_text:
The Construction Director is the senior leader responsible for overseeing the delivery performance of the EPC contractor across the full project life cycle. Reporting directly to the CEO, this role leads project planning, design coordination, procurement, construction, and commissioning.
   

  

 The successful candidate will help ensure the project is delivered on time, within budget, to the required quality standards, and in line with safety, environmental, and regulatory requirements. This is a key leadership role for someone with strong experience in large and complex civil infrastructure projects.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

**Project Planning And Delivery**
* Develop, implement, and oversee the overall project plan, including schedules, budgets, resource planning, and quality control procedures.
* Make sure project delivery remains aligned with the company's strategic objectives.


**Construction Execution And Site Leadership**
* Lead and monitor all construction activities, including civil works, tunnelling, pipe\-laying, treatment plant construction, and related infrastructure.
* Support efficient site progress, compliance with specifications, and timely resolution of on\-site issues.


**Contract, Procurement, And Contractor Management**
* Oversee the selection, negotiation, and management of major EPC contractors, subcontractors, and key suppliers.
* Ensure contractors and suppliers meet their contractual obligations and perform effectively.


**Risk, Quality, And Compliance**
* Identify, assess, and manage project risks across technical, operational, financial, safety, and environmental areas.
* Implement strong quality assurance and quality control practices to support delivery of a high\-quality and sustainable asset.


**Stakeholder Management And Reporting**
* Act as the main point of contact for technical and construction\-related matters with the CEO, Board, lenders' technical advisors, regulatory authorities, and other key stakeholders.
* Provide clear, accurate, and regular progress updates to leadership and stakeholders.


 Academic Requirements
   

  

* Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or a closely related field from a reputable university.
* Master's degree in Engineering, Project Management, or Business Administration (MBA) is highly preferred.
* Professional Engineer (PE) licence or an equivalent professional accreditation in civil engineering or construction.
* Project Management Professional (PMP) or an equivalent certification (for example PgMP or MSP) is highly desirable.
* Ongoing professional development in advanced construction techniques, tunnelling methods, or water/wastewater infrastructure is an advantage.


**Experience Requirements**
* Minimum of 20 years of progressive experience in civil infrastructure construction.
* At least 10 years in a senior project management or Construction Director role on mega\-projects valued above USD 2 billion.
* Proven success in leading the full life cycle delivery of at least one large\-scale tunnelling project and/or sewage or wastewater treatment plant project, from concept through commissioning.
* Extensive experience managing large, multidisciplinary construction teams, including direct labour, contractors, and consultants, in fast\-paced and high\-pressure environments.
* Strong understanding of project delivery methods such as EPC and Design\-Build, including management of complex interfaces between work packages.
* Demonstrated experience developing and managing project budgets above USD 1 billion, schedules, risk registers, and cost control and progress reporting systems.


 Key Skills and Competencies
   

  

* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to motivate teams, resolve conflicts, and negotiate effectively with a wide range of stakeholders.
* Strong technical knowledge in tunnelling (including TBM operations and ground improvement), large\-diameter pipe\-laying, and advanced wastewater treatment processes.
* Ability to make important decisions under pressure, solve complex technical and logistical issues, and adapt to changing project conditions.
* High level of resilience and adaptability, with the ability to manage uncertainty and respond effectively during critical situations.
* Good knowledge of international construction standards, HSE regulations, and quality management systems such as ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 / OHSAS 18001\.
* Advanced proficiency in project management software such as Primavera P6, MS Project, BIM tools, and other relevant construction management technologies.

data.title: Director International Regulatory Policy and Intelligence (International Regulatory Affairs) – MEA & Eurasia
data.raw_snippet:
**JOB TITLE**
**Director International Regulatory Policy and Intelligence (International Regulatory Affairs) – MEA \& Eurasia**
**About Astrazeneca**
 AstraZeneca is a global, science\-led, patient\-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialisation o
data.jd_text:
**JOB TITLE**
**Director International Regulatory Policy and Intelligence (International Regulatory Affairs) – MEA \& Eurasia**
**About Astrazeneca**
 AstraZeneca is a global, science\-led, patient\-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialisation of prescription medicines for some of the world’s most serious diseases. But we’re more than one of the world’s leading pharmaceutical companies.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 This role is a strategic role with responsibility as international regulatory policy and intelligence director focusing on the MEA and Eurasia Region (EAEU, Ukraine, Moldova, Georgia) and working closely with Senior Area Regulatory Director (SARD)\- MEA, SARD Eurasia, International Policy \& Intelligence Senior Director, Marketing Companies within the region, and regional and global functions. This role will be part of International Regulatory Policy and Intelligence Team.
   

  

 The International Director for MEA and Eurasia Regulatory Policy and Intelligence is responsible for driving the development of impactful regulatory policy and advocacy with primary focus in the MEA and Eurasia regions and key international topics in cooperation with global, regional, local and functional experts. Also, will lead regulatory intelligence and legislation surveillance across the region, translating legislative developments and regulatory trends into strategic insights that enable to anticipate challenges, seize opportunities, and ensure our medicines reach patients across the region.
   

  

 The Director provides a broad strategic view for regulatory policy issues based on in\-depth knowledge of the internal and external regulatory environment in MEA and Eurasia and across key international topics .The Director will contribute to and co\-develop policy positions including stakeholder interactions and help to implement these policy positions regionally, leading to more impactful external engagements for AZ’s regulatory science priority topics, disease areas of interest, new therapeutic modalities, CMC \& quality, and cross\-area topics.
   

  

 The Director will be a major participant in articulating AZ’s consolidated view on key international and MEA and Eurasia Region regulatory guidance and regulations. This includes maintaining and developing key health authority relationships and being able to influence proposed rules and regulations that specifically impact AZ and ultimately the pharmaceutical industry. The incumbent can also lead implementation of changes to international strategy and processes due to significant regulatory environment changes (new legislation/guidance etc.) and can lead AZ’s response to key regulatory policy topics within MEA and Eurasia, and at Global and International Level. The director will assess the impact of new legislative/environmental changes on product strategy and communicate relevant information to international Regulatory Affairs (inRA) Strategy groups for onward communication to Global Project Teams
   

  

 The Director will have a major role interacting with other parts of the AZ organization that are influencing policy and legislation at local, regional, and global levels and developing advocacy plans for their areas of responsibility whilst capturing key KPIs and metrics.
   

  

 The Director attends relevant external meetings or conferences of value to the business, and contributes to the overall strategy, direction and efficient operation of the function. There will be an opportunity for the incumber to engage with Governments, trade associations, and other stakeholders on international policy issues and represent AZ in the relevant platforms externally.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead or manage regulatory policy priority topics as coordinated by the Global Regulatory Policy Team /International Policy and Intelligence lead
* Provide key regulatory procedural/ environmental advice on assigned topics to key customers/stakeholders within international and Global, including the Regulatory TAs, Commercial, MC regulatory, R\&D, Operations and CMO functions.
* Support preparation of regulatory policy documents, including position statements, reports, draft papers and presentation materials.
* Support with the oversight and management of international policy and intelligence scorecard KPIs, and its metrics for performance internally and externally
* Support the development for the International Regulatory Policy Training Capability Framework within MEA and Eurasia
* Establish the international CMC\-RA Policy Framework in collaboration with international CMC RA
* Represents AZ International Regulatory Affairs on selected external International Trade Association committees, with focus on MEA and Eurasia, to ensure AZ International Regulatory views on key issues are represented
* Attend relevant external meetings/conferences, with focus in MEA and Eurasia, to obtain relevant intelligence of value to the business and communicate effectively.
* May represent AZ in external benchmarking on advocacy business practices.
* Has personal responsibility for creating a culture of courageous leadership, creativity and collaboration
* Contribute to the strategy, direction and efficient operation of the immediate team and function.


**Essential For The Role**
* 10\+ years in global regulatory affairs, including international regions (Asia, Latin America and Middle East \& Africa)
* Understands the role of external policy and advocacy and connections to business goals in the International Regions.
* Demonstrated expertise in Regulatory policy related matters, through Health Authority or Industry experience, and more specifically in two or more International Regions such as Asia, Eurasia, Latin America and Middle East \& Africa.
* Working knowledge of AZ focused disease areas, new therapeutic modalities, CMC \& quality, and cross\-area topics.
* Thorough understanding and application of the Drug Development and associated regulatory processes globally and internationally. Prior experience with phase 3 design including end of phase 2 health authority interactions is desired. Contribution to a regulatory approval including leading response team and labelling negotiations would be a plus.
* Working experience in developing and executing new product strategies for global and international regions across different therapeutic areas
* A collaborative, entrepreneurial mindset—comfortable with ambiguity and adept at building from the ground up
* Demonstrated proficiencies in critical thinking, critical influencing, innovation, initiative, leadership and excellent oral and written communication skills.
* The ability to think strategically and critically and evaluate risks to regulatory activities.
* Collaborative and able to build consensus with peers and leadership (ability to influence upwards)
* Strong oral and written communication skills
* Experience in knowledge management and digital information management


**Desirable for the role**
* Experience working in Health Authority
* Problem solving skills
* Focus on delivery and results
* Experience in new modalities ie antibody conjugates, cell and gene therapy, radiotherapeutics
* Experience of participating in key industry groups and policy for especially within MEA and Eurasia
* Excellent strategic influencing and negotiation
* Experienced Regulatory Professional with degree in scientific discipline, typically pharmacy and biological science.
* Experience or aptitude in using AI/Gen AI within regulatory space.


**Why AstraZeneca?**
 At AstraZeneca we’re dedicated to being a Great Place to Work. Where you are empowered to push the boundaries of science and unleash your entrepreneurial spirit. There’s no better place to make a difference to medicine, patients, and society. An inclusive culture that champions diversity and collaboration, and always committed to lifelong learning, growth, and development. We’re on an exciting journey to pioneer the future of healthcare.
   

  

**So, what’s next?**
* Are you already imagining yourself joining our team? Good, because we can’t wait to hear from you.
* Are you ready to bring new ideas and fresh thinking to the table? Brilliant! We have one seat available, and we hope it’s yours.


**Where can I find out more?**
 Our Social Media, Follow AstraZeneca on LinkedIn
   

  

 Follow AstraZeneca on Facebook
   

  

 Follow AstraZeneca on Instagram
   

  

**Date Posted**
 20\-Apr\-2026
   

  

**Closing Date**
 02\-May\-2026
   

  

 AstraZeneca embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry\-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non\-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.

data.title: Resident Architect
data.raw_snippet:
We are looking for a Resident Architect to join our DSA team in Dubai.
 



  





**1\. Role Overview**




  





 To lead the on\-site architectural supervision and consultant services for major construction projects. This includes the administration of post\-contract responsibilities as define
data.jd_text:
We are looking for a Resident Architect to join our DSA team in Dubai.
 



  





**1\. Role Overview**




  





 To lead the on\-site architectural supervision and consultant services for major construction projects. This includes the administration of post\-contract responsibilities as defined by the appointment, managing and coordinating multidisciplinary site teams where applicable, ensuring alignment with the approved design intent, and monitoring compliance with the project’s contract, codes, and specifications. When appointed in a Design Guardian capacity, the role is limited to safeguarding the design intent through review, coordination, and advisory input only, and does not include construction supervision, inspection, certification, contract administration, or Defects Liability Period services unless expressly agreed and appointed under a separate scope. The role serves as a primary interface between the client, contractors, design teams, and other stakeholders. The exact scope of services may differ on a project\-by\-project basis and will be further defined as part of the project\-specific deliverables..
 



  





**2\.Job Accountabilities Linked To Objectives**




  





 The Resident Architect is responsible for leading the on\-site project team and driving the successful delivery of the project. As the most senior project representative for DSA on site, this role carries the critical responsibility of safeguarding the company’s interests, contractual, legal, and commercial responsibilities throughout the construction phase and ensuring the project aligns with DSA’s standards and obligations.
 



  





 The Resident Architect may be assigned responsibilities across one or multiple projects, as well as strategic or special initiatives aligned with the company's broader objectives. These special assignments may extend beyond project\-specific duties and can include tasks such as conducting quality audits, developing procedures, manuals and supporting internal process improvements \& development.
 



  





 In all cases, the Resident Architect is expected to work closely, not only with their direct team/ the Client but also with their immediate supervisor and line manager to clearly define the scope of responsibilities, deliverables, and resource requirements specific to each assignment. The final scope of duties and level of authority will be established in consultation with and subject to approval by the Site Operations Director, Project Director or relevant senior leadership.
 



  





**A. Design Site Leadership** 




 • Lead the site\-based lead consultancy team (where present) to ensure high standards of quality, compliance, coordination, and delivery across all stakeholders, proactively addressing deficiencies as they arise.
 



 • Oversee and assist with design deliverables, pre\-engineering, shop drawings, RFIs, submittals, inspections, and construction queries to support timely resolution and adherence to project requirements.
 



 • Review and approve works, including but not limited to mock\-ups, sample rooms, materials, and finishes, ensuring alignment with the approved design / designer, specifications, and project requirements.
 



 • Ensure effective design coordination across all disciplines and contribute to the resolution of design and construction\-related conflicts.
 



 • Conduct regular architectural and design\-focused site walks to monitor the implementation of the approved design intent, including look, feel, materiality, and spatial quality.
 



 • Identify, document, and report design, aesthetic, and quality\-related risks or non\-compliances to the LDC / Client through structured observations and reporting.
 



 • Prepare and issue monthly architectural / design guardianship reports summarising site observations, key risks, and matters requiring attention.
 



 • Review and provide comments on material samples, mock\-ups, mood boards, finishes, look \& feel assessments, and sample rooms to support alignment with the approved design intent.
 



 • Provide architectural and interior design clarifications, including aesthetic and design intent matters, where requested by the Client.
 



 • Participate in value engineering and design development discussions, providing input on architectural quality, aesthetic impact, and alignment with the approved design intent.
 



 • Coordinate closely with PMCM, the Contractor, and the wider consultant team during site reviews, technical meetings, and design discussions to maintain alignment between design intent, construction execution, and client expectations.
 



 • Monitor that the executed works reflect the approved design, client expectations, and applicable codes and regulations throughout the construction process.
 



 • Ensure RFIs, approvals, instructions, and IFC changes are managed through the established project communication and authority channels and are properly coordinated across all parties.
 



 • Produce and issue timely internal and external dashboards capturing progress, quality, design alignment, and emerging risks.
 



  





**B. Site Supervision Team Management** 




 • Direct and manage the day\-to\-day performance of DSA's site supervision team (architects, engineers, inspectors, sub\-consultants and the like).
 



 • Ensure all team members are properly briefed on their roles and responsibilities.
 



 • Implement structured delegation and reporting mechanisms.
 



 • Conduct periodic audits, QA/QC / technical reviews, and performance assessments.
 



 • Maintain a collaborative, professional, and high\-performing supervision environment on site.
 



 • Ensure employees / team members conduct are upheld to the highest standards
 



 • Monitor and update in coordination with the Client and Site Operations Director the project, staff deployment, associated schedule and ensure timely delivery of the same at the agreed frequency
 



  





**C. Project \& Contract Administration** 




 • Oversee compliance with the project’s construction contract (FIDIC or equivalent).
 



 • Issue formal communications, manage variations, evaluate contractor claims, and contribute to extension of time assessments.
 



 • Ensure proper documentation, records \& communication protocols are established, used and maintained for all supervision activities.
 



 • Coordinate with the Employer’s Representative and Client\-appointed Consultants.
 



 • Act as Engineer’s Representative / Employer’s Representative if appointed, ensuring responsibilities are discharged in line with the delegated authority.
 



 • Assist in stake holder and lead in team dispute resolution
 



  





**D. Project Coordination \& Stakeholder Interface** 




 • Act as the senior site representative of the lead consultant.
 



 • Establish and manage coordination mechanisms among the consultant team, contractor, suppliers, and client representatives.
 



 • Participate in progress meetings, site coordination meetings, and technical reviews.
 



 • Monitor and steer project progress and associated scheduling and produce relevant reports
 



 • Provide strategic input and advice to the client to ensure project objectives are met.
 



  





**E. Quality \& Compliance Oversight** 




 • Enforce quality control standards and escalate issues that risk the design quality or compliance of the project / deliverables
 



 • Monitor health, safety, and environmental practices on site.
 



 • Participate in final inspections, testing, and commissioning phases.
 



 • Ensure defect lists, non\-conformance reports and site observations are compiled and rectified in line with contract obligations.
 



 • Ensure pre\-engineering deliverables are in line with contract agreement and implement measures to maintain and or rectify resulting shortfalls
 



 • Monitor and advise on change control process
 



  





**F. Leadership \& Mentorship** 




 • Serve as mentor and technical advisor to staff, engineers and sub\-consultants.
 



 • Lead internal training and onboarding of new site staff.
 



 • Foster a knowledge\-sharing culture that emphasizes continuous improvement and professional development to the benefit of the project and company.
 



  





**G. Commercial \& Invoicing Responsibilities** 




 • Coordinate with the head office/accounts team to prepare and validate monthly consultancy service invoices in line with contract terms.
 



 • Review and confirm site\-based and related staff, timesheets for inclusion in monthly billing.
 



 • Collect, verify, and consolidate sub\-consultant timesheets for accuracy, completeness, and scope alignment.
 



 • Track sub\-consultant invoices and ensure timely submission to accounts for processing.
 



 • Maintain a project\-specific log of all invoicing activities, including issue dates, payment terms, and receipt confirmations amongst others.
 



 • Monitor outstanding invoices and follow up with clients and relevant stakeholders to ensure prompt payment.
 



 • Flag and escalate delays in payment or disputed invoices to the Project Director and commercial team.
 



 • Liaise with sub\-consultants regarding their payment status and provide updates on payment cycles and client approvals.
 



 • Ensure compliance with internal financial procedures and contractual invoicing requirements.
 



 • Support monthly project \& financial reporting with updates on invoice status, forecasted income, and payment risks.
 



 • Assist in reconciling client payment records with internal accounts to resolve discrepancies, if any.
 



 • Track any approved variations or scope changes and coordinate with the commercial team to ensure these are invoiced accordingly.
 



  





**3\. Qualification / Experience / Requirements**




  





 • Qualified Architect (BArch / MArch) with minimum 15 years’ experience; at least 10 years on\-site in the Middle East.
 



 • Proven experience as a Resident Architect on large\-scale or complex projects.
 



 • Strong working knowledge of FIDIC contract administration and construction management practices.
 



 • Experience managing multidisciplinary supervision teams in fast\-track environments.
 



 • Familiar with UAE/ Regional Authority codes, regulations, and approval procedures.
 



 • PMP, MCIOB, or similar certifications are advantageous.
 



 • Strong documentation, reporting, technical and problem\-solving capabilities.
 



  





 Interested candidates can share their resume directly on recruit.dxb@dsa\-arch.com mentioning "Resident Architect" as a subject.

data.title: Director Business Development - Lummus Consultants
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Company** 




  





  





 At Lummus Technology, innovation thrives, and excellence is a shared pursuit. When you join Lummus, you are empowered to make an impact and be part of a dynamic team that celebrates creativity, encourages professional development, and fosters collaboration
data.jd_text:
**About the Company** 




  





  





 At Lummus Technology, innovation thrives, and excellence is a shared pursuit. When you join Lummus, you are empowered to make an impact and be part of a dynamic team that celebrates creativity, encourages professional development, and fosters collaboration. From our technology portfolio to our global workforce, Lummus is growing at a rapid pace, and we hope that you will grow with us during this exciting time. Lummus Consultants International (LCI) is an autonomous business within Lummus Technology that provides technical, environmental \& social and management consulting services worldwide. We work primarily in the energy industry, with a depth of expertise in power generation, oil \& gas, refining and petrochemicals. We maintain a very strong presence in the international technical due diligence markets to support the global financial industry. LCI has a far\-reaching organization with offices in the United States, UK, the Middle East and Asia.
 



  





  





**About the Role** 




  





  





 Lummus Consultants is looking for a Business Development Director to grow the company into the area of technical and management consulting in the energy industry – offshore and onshore oil \& gas, LNG, pipelines, power generation and transmission, as well as refining and petrochemicals. This role will be expected to help grow the consulting practice area in the fields of oil \& Gas, power delivery and decarbonization and will primarily entail growing relationships with the financial community and project developers. Assignments require a high level of experience and ability to focus quickly on important issues. The individual we are seeking must be comfortable and confident to work in a seller/doer organization structure.
 



  





  





**Responsibilities** 




  





  




* Grow Lummus Consultants’ business – in cooperation with the existing business heads. His growth strategy should be heavily focused on technical solutions but with a broad business perspective beyond traditional due diligence assignments.
* Develop a business plan to capitalize on existing talents and resources within Lummus Consultants and Lummus Technology; the candidate’s strengths; and market opportunities.
* Grow name recognition of Lummus Consultants in all Energy industry segments (with assistance from the Lummus Communication team and other internal resources).
* Carry out business development, marketing, and proposal preparation efforts and lead Key Account Management teams efforts.
* Lead or participate in consulting project work.
* Prepare clear and concise written reports on assignments, develop conclusions and present clear and precise written and verbal results to clients.
* Expand the Lummus Consulting practice area (globally), consistent with the business plan – identify gaps in skills and potential recruits.
* Achieve objectives with minimal oversight.
* Management of the P\&L forecast by close collaboration with his supervisor and finance.
* Report to Senior Director of Lummus Consultants in Dubai office.



  









**Qualifications** 




  





  




* A degree\-educated Engineer; MBA is a plus but not required.
* The candidate should have at least 20 years relevant professional experience.
* Prior experience with an owner/operator or major engineering company and/or consultancy.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills, including ability to write clear and concise reports in English.
* The candidate should have strong interpersonal skills and be comfortable conversing with clients and senior management.
* Demonstrated management and project management skills.



  









**Required Skills** 




  





  




* Strong leadership abilities and excellent interpersonal skills.
* Strong communicator with excellent written and oral communication skills.
* Must have a high degree of self\-motivation and energy.
* Must have proven ability to manage business forecasting, short and long term projection.
* Capability of earning respect from the team and capable of influencing others without authority.
* Excellent professional image/presentation.
* Knowledge of many cultures/international style.
* Strong commercial savvy and negotiating skills.
* Interest in being knowledgeable in all services offerings in Lummus Consultants portfolio.
* Ability to work well with finance partners.
* Must have a strong balance of technical and commercial capabilities.



  





  





 Dubai office. Relocation is not being offered. Job\-related travel (business trips usually requiring less than a two\-week duration; often just one or two days) which includes international travel to financial institutions in London, is an important part of the work. Time away from the office may average 10 to 30 percent of work hours.
 



  





  





 Lummus Technology is the global leader in developing technology solutions that make modern life possible and focus on a more sustainable, low carbon future. We license process technologies in clean fuels, renewables, petrochemicals, polymers, gas processing and supply lifecycle services, catalysts, proprietary equipment and digitalization to customers worldwide.

data.title: Sales & Project Manager SAP
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Company** 




  





 INSIRE is a specialized management consultancy headquartered in Germany, focused on Finance, Accounting, and IT Transformation. Our core competencies span the entire Record\-to\-Report (R2R) process, financial consolidation, finance \& controlling, planning \& for
data.jd_text:
**About the Company** 




  





 INSIRE is a specialized management consultancy headquartered in Germany, focused on Finance, Accounting, and IT Transformation. Our core competencies span the entire Record\-to\-Report (R2R) process, financial consolidation, finance \& controlling, planning \& forecasting, and business intelligence – implemented in SAP\-centric system landscapes.
 



  





 INSIRE LLC is our new regional subsidiary based in Dubai, established to bring our deep SAP Finance expertise to clients across the United Arab Emirates and the broader GCC region. We partner with leading organizations to transform their finance operations through SAP S/4HANA, SAP Group Reporting, SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP BW/4HANA, and adjacent technologies.
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





 We are looking for a driven and consultative Sales \& Project Manager to accelerate our growth in the UAE and GCC market. You will be responsible for generating new business, managing the full sales cycle, our projects and building long\-term client relationships – all within the SAP ecosystem. This role sits at the intersection of sales acumen and technical credibility: you understand what CFOs, Finance Directors, and SAP program leads care about, and you know how to position INSIRE’s services compellingly in the Emirates market. This role is very hands\-on with “one man show character” at the beginning.
 



  





  





**Responsibilities** 




  





***Sales***




* Identify, qualify, and pursue new business opportunities in the SAP space across the UAE and GCC market.
* Own the end\-to\-end sales cycle: prospecting, discovery, proposal, negotiation, and close.
* Represent INSIRE at events, SAP partner forums, and client briefings in the region.
* Track market trends, competitor activity, and SAP ecosystem developments in the Middle East to sharpen INSIRE’s regional positioning.



  





***Client Relationship Management***




* Establish and deepen trusted relationships with C\-level and VP\-level Finance \& IT decision\-makers across UAE\-based organizations.
* Act as the primary commercial contact during pre\-sales and handover to delivery teams.



  





***Project Management***




* Independent management of SAP projects with experience in technical implementation.



  





  









**Your Profile** 




  




* 10\+ years of B2B sales and project experience in the SAP and Finance IT consulting space.
* Solid understanding of SAP modules and their business context at least one: SAP S/4HANA Finance \& Controlling, SAP Group Reporting / Financial Consolidation, SAP Analytics Cloud (Planning \& Reporting), SAP BW/4HANA or SAP Datasphere (BI \& Analytics)
* Ability to engage credibly with both technical SAP stakeholders and senior Finance executives (CFO, Controller, Head of Accounting).
* Proven experience working in or selling into the UAE / GCC market; strong understanding of local business culture and procurement processes.
* Existing network within the UAE SAP ecosystem (SAP MENA Account Executives, SAP Partner).
* Excellent written and spoken English and Arabic language skills.



  





 We look forward to receiving your application.

data.title: Head of Accounts Payable Section
data.location: Sharjah, Sharjah Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.raw_snippet: The University of Sharjah is committed to providing a world\-class educational experience that prepares lifelong learners and leaders with integrated knowledge and skills. We are passionate about building a collaborative and sustainable environment that cultivates twenty\-first\-century skills and f
data.jd_text:
The University of Sharjah is committed to providing a world\-class educational experience that prepares lifelong learners and leaders with integrated knowledge and skills. We are passionate about building a collaborative and sustainable environment that cultivates twenty\-first\-century skills and fosters pioneering research and scholarship. We seek to serve the current and future needs of our local community and beyond by offering innovative academic and professional programs.
 



 Since its foundation in 1997, the University has successfully become one of the top Universities in the UAE and has managed to make its mark in the educational and research industry worldwide united by six core values: Integrity and Ethics, Dedication, Inclusiveness, Excellence with limitless Drive, Accountability and Transparency, and Innovation and Creativity.
 



 The University of Sharjah believes in the crucial role of scientific research in the development of the modern United Arab Emirates. Since its establishment, the university has put research at the top of its list of priorities. Part of the university's strategy is to promote research among faculty members in all colleges, with the aim of attracting outstanding faculty with impressive research accomplishments.
 



  





**The University of Sharjah’s Rankings**




  





 251\-300 in Times Higher Education World University Rankings 2023
 



 Among the top 200 universities globally (176\-200\) in The World University Rankings 2023 by Subjects
 



 Among the best \#121 universities in Asia In News Best Global Universities Rankings 2022/2023
 



 \=89th in The Young University Rankings in 2022
 



 \#61 The Emerging Economies University Rankings in 2022
 



 Among the top 10 best Arab universities The Arab University Rankings 2022
 



  





**About the Role:**




  





 As the Head of Accounts Payable Section and a member of the
 **Finance Department** 
 team, you are expected to ensure that the department operates smoothly, maintain accurate and complete payment records related to suppliers, lenders, and employees in a timely and efficient manner, and process payments from clients as per the University of Sharjah's policies and procedures. As well as manage, develop and motivate the section's team members.
 



  





**Key Duties \& Responsibilities:**




  





 1\. Monitor day\-to\-day Accounts Payable activities, and ensure that business processes and workflows are executed correctly and efficiently. As well as ensure that job tasks are distributed between team members fairly and professionally.
 



 2\. Lead the development and execution of the Accounts Payable section's processes and procedures, and ensure that they are in alignment with best practices and UOS's requirements.
 



 3\. Manage the accounts payable process, ensuring that all payments related to external clients, suppliers, and vendors are settled in a timely and efficient manner.
 



 4\. Ensure compliance with all contractual payment policy terms and conditions, and report any matters of concern to the line manager for immediate action.
 



 5\. Maintain and control all accounts payable data to meet the requirements of internal and external auditors, and ensure the accuracy of financial statements to ensure conformity of information to acceptable standards.
 



 6\. Supervise invoice transactions including receipt of invoices, verification, record of transaction, and direct expense. As well as follow up where the authorization to pay has not been provided in order to ensure that payments are completed in a timely manner.
 



 7\. Examine all vouchers posted and address any issues related to the accounts payable process to ensure their resolution, as well as prepare any related documentation and clarifications required by the Compliance and Internal Audit Office
 



 8\. Ensure that vendor invoices are properly approved and in line with the official contracts, resolve all payments or billing issues with vendors, as well as review and post vendor's payments in the Banner System.
 



 9\. Provide leadership to the section's team in order to build and develop their organizational capabilities, provide them with development opportunities, as well as report on their performance.
 



 10\. Participate in the hiring process for the section including identifying job requirements, sorting and reviewing candidate resumes, and contributing to the selection and interview process in order to ensure the best and most suitable candidates are selected for the available vacancies.
 



 11\. Support the director in the development of the Finance department's KPIs by providing professional input and advice on developing and achieving the relevant KPIs. As well as report on the section's progress, and prepare the necessary action plans to the director. In addition to ensuring that each team member has a good understanding of the section's KPIs and how their roles impact their achievement.
 



 12\. Assist the director in the Finance Department's projects that help support and improve the department and the university in general, and supervise the project team when needed to ensure each member completes their work tasks accurately and on time.
 



 13\. Participate in the preparation of the department's annual budget, in collaboration with the director and other heads, and track the section's expenditures and ensure they are within the limits of the budget.
 



 14\. Prepare various reports, analyses and statistics related to the Accounts Payable section when requested by the line manager.
 



 15\. Complete any other job\-related tasks as assigned by the line manager within the expected time limit.
 



  





**Job Requirements:**




 ▪ Minimum of bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or a relevant discipline.
 



 ▪ A professional qualification as a chartered accountant or qualified member of an accountancy body (e.g. CIMA, ACCA, ICAS, etc.)
 



 ▪ 12\-14 years of UAE experience in a similar role preferably in higher education institutions.
 



  





 ▪ Excellent oral and written communication skills and the ability to prepare professional documents, in both Arabic and English.
 



 ▪ Financial accounting and management skills.
 



 ▪ Ability to work collaboratively across departmental functions.
 



 ▪ Demonstrate a good understanding of operating the required ERP system/software (e.g. Banner).
 



 ▪ Excellent leadership skills.
 



 ▪ Time management skills
 



 ▪ Analytical and critical thinking.
 



 ▪ Excellent attention to detail and problem\-solving skills.
 



 ▪ Clear presentation skills and ability to influence.
 



 ▪ Experience in managing teams including the development and delivery of on\-the\-job training and mentoring.
 



 ▪ Ability to work with diverse business units and to quickly adapt and understand key business challenges.
 



  





 Closing Date: 16/May/2026

data.raw_snippet:

 YKONE is a global marketing group trusted by iconic brands from the fashion, luxury, travel \& beauty industries. Since 2008, we have been helping brands to connect with, engage or grow their audience through impactful stories crafted and spread by the world’s most powerful or cre
data.jd_text:
**ABOUT US** 




 YKONE is a global marketing group trusted by iconic brands from the fashion, luxury, travel \& beauty industries. Since 2008, we have been helping brands to connect with, engage or grow their audience through impactful stories crafted and spread by the world’s most powerful or creative influencers.
 



 Our creative DNA \& data\-driven approach allows us to conduct international projects for various actors including Nespresso, L’Oréal, Dior, Chanel, TAG Heuer, Estée Lauder as well as several Tourism Offices in the world (Visit Abu Dhabi, Visit Turkey, Visit the USA…).
 



 Headquartered in Paris, YKONE has offices in Milan, Dubai, Berlin, Munich, Abu Dhabi, Geneva, Miami, Riyadh, Hong Kong, Shanghai, Doha and Las Vegas.
 



 The International Assistant Project Manager will report to the International Client Director and join the International Project Management team.
 



  





**The role** 




 We are looking for a Client Director to lead Ykone’s most strategic client relationships and drive the agency’s commercial growth. This is a senior leadership role, acting as a key partner to the general manager, a bridge between clients, strategy, and financial performance. You will bring strong financial acumen, market intelligence, and executive presence, ensuring that every engagement delivers both creative excellence and business impact.
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 



* Lead and own relationships with top\-tier clients at a C\-suite level
* Act as a strategic advisor, shaping long\-term partnerships and growth plans
* Drive high\-level conversations around brand, business, and market opportunities
* Own and drive revenue growth, profitability, and financial performance across accounts
* Develop and oversee budgets, forecasts, and margin optimization
* Lead pricing strategies, contract negotiations, and commercial structuring
* Build and manage a high\-value pipeline of opportunities
* Identify and unlock new revenue streams across clients and markets
* Oversee proposal development balancing creative ambition and commercial viability
* Ensure strong cross\-functional alignment with creative, strategy, and production teams



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* 12\+ years in senior client leadership, commercial, or business roles
* Strong financial acumen (P\&L ownership, margins, forecasting, pricing)
* Proven track record managing high\-value clients and driving revenue growth
* Experience in complex deal structuring and negotiations
* Strong understanding of luxury, culture, retail, and experiential industries
* Executive presence with ability to present and influence at C\-level
* Strategic thinking combined with strong commercial instinct
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management
* Full\-time, on\-site role based in Dubai



  





**Mindset** 



* A business\-first leader with a strong understanding of numbers and growth
* A trusted advisor capable of influencing senior stakeholders
* Highly ownership\-driven with a focus on results and impact
* Strong judgment, presence, and credibility
* Thrives in a fast\-moving, entrepreneurial environment



  





**How to Apply** 




 Please submit your CV along with any relevant portfolio, case studies, or business

data.title: Art Director
data.raw_snippet:
ChillBase studio is an independent and innovative player in the gaming industry. We’re fueled by our passion for crafting outstanding products.
 



  





 We’re creating
 **OneState** 
 , a mobile life simulator built in Unity. Our art team is facing ambitious challenges as we develop the project
data.jd_text:
ChillBase studio is an independent and innovative player in the gaming industry. We’re fueled by our passion for crafting outstanding products.
 



  





 We’re creating
 **OneState** 
 , a mobile life simulator built in Unity. Our art team is facing ambitious challenges as we develop the project with a realistic approach and high standards for visual quality and technical solutions. We use modern technologies and tools, continuously refining our pipelines and aiming for the highest level of quality and immersion.
 



  





 If you are seeking to be a part of an engaged team, work on captivating projects with minimal bureaucracy, and receive regular, constructive feedback, then you’ll find your place with us.
 



  





**Expectations** 




  





**What we want to see** 



* Experience as an Art Director or Head of Art on game projects
* Strong expertise in mobile AAA realism
* Deep understanding of mobile platform limitations and how to work within them
* Experience building art systems, standards, and processes
* Experience collaborating with producers and directors as partners
* Strong skills in presenting and defending creative decisions
* Cross platform experience with mobile, PC, or console projects is a strong plus
* Strategic mindset
* High level of ownership and responsibility
* Strong communication skills
* Focus on results and business value
* Willingness to work in a partnership model rather than manual micromanagement



  





**What you will be doing** 



* Shaping and evolving the project’s art strategy together with the CCO
* Building an autonomous art structure including roles, ownership, standards, and processes
* Ensuring AAA level quality and visual consistency across the product
* Making key visual decisions and defending them at the producer and director level
* Developing head level roles and growing strong leaders within the art team
* Managing the balance between quality, timelines, cost, and value
* Growing the art direction as a driver of product and IP growth



  





**Benefits** 




  





**Growth and development** 




 Our project is actively growing, as well as the team that creates it. We invest in the growth of each specialist and regularly review salaries based on performance. Moreover, we have a promotion system that allows specialists to showcase their talents in more responsible positions.
 



  





**Comfortable conditions** 




 You can choose various work types: hybrid or office. Also we have flexible hours with the option of taking days off.
 



  





**Care for employees** 




 We offer sick days without salary loss, assistance in difficult life situations, no bureaucratic nightmares and processes for the sake of processes.
 



  





**Relocation assistance** 




 If you’re ready to join the team at our hub in Dubai, we will help you make it happen.
 



  





 Employment
 



 We offer an employment system, including official labor relations in Dubai, as well as any other options that suit you.

data.title: Head of Operations - Civil
data.raw_snippet: The Head of Operations is responsible for the end\-to\-end execution, performance, and delivery of all construction projects across the organization. The role ensures alignment with time, cost, quality, safety, and cash flow objectives while driving operational efficiency across high\-rise, horizont
data.jd_text:
The Head of Operations is responsible for the end\-to\-end execution, performance, and delivery of all construction projects across the organization. The role ensures alignment with time, cost, quality, safety, and cash flow objectives while driving operational efficiency across high\-rise, horizontal, and infrastructure projects.
 



 This position acts as the central coordination point between Projects, Planning, Commercial, Procurement, Finance, and Executive Management, ensuring seamless execution and optimized project performance across the portfolio.
 



  





**Core Responsibilities** 




**1\. Project Execution \& Delivery** 



* Oversee execution of multiple projects ensuring delivery within approved timelines, budgets, and quality standards
* Monitor planned vs actual progress across all active projects
* Ensure alignment between planning schedules and on\-site execution
* Conduct regular site visits, performance reviews, and progress assessments



**2\. Planning \& Scheduling Control** 



* Ensure baseline schedules and lookahead programs are established and maintained
* Identify delays and enforce corrective and recovery plans
* Coordinate with planning teams on:
* Recovery programs
* Resource optimization
* Milestone tracking and reporting



**3\. Budget Control \& Cost Management** 



* Drive strict monitoring of Budget vs Actual performance across all projects
* Identify cost overruns and implement corrective cost control measures
* Validate Estimate at Completion (EAC) and forecast project profitability
* Work closely with Commercial and Finance teams to ensure cost transparency



**4\. Revenue \& Cash Flow Alignment** 



* Oversee billing performance against planned targets
* Ensure alignment between project progress and billing/certification cycles
* Support cash flow planning through accurate revenue forecasting
* Monitor collection cycles in coordination with Finance



**5\. Procurement \& Resource Management** 



* Oversee procurement strategies for materials, equipment, and subcontractors
* Ensure timely resource availability aligned with project schedules
* Monitor procurement efficiency, pricing, and vendor negotiations
* Avoid overstocking while ensuring continuity of execution



**6\. Subcontractor \& Supplier Management** 



* Participate in subcontractor prequalification, bid evaluation, and selection
* Monitor subcontractor performance in productivity, quality, and timelines
* Ensure proper deployment and coordination of subcontractors and resources



**7\. Quality \& Compliance** 



* Ensure adherence to project specifications, contract requirements, and UAE regulatory standards
* Oversee QA/QC processes including:
* Inspections
* Testing
* Snagging and close\-out management



**8\. Health, Safety \& Environment (HSE)** 



* Work closely with HSE teams to implement safety programs across all projects
* Ensure compliance with UAE safety regulations and standards
* Drive initiatives to reduce incidents and improve safety performance



**9\. Risk Management** 



* Identify operational, financial, and contractual risks across projects
* Develop mitigation strategies and proactive action plans
* Monitor risk registers and escalation mechanisms



**10\. Client \& Stakeholder Management** 



* Act as the primary interface with clients, consultants, and key stakeholders
* Ensure high levels of client satisfaction and relationship management
* Drive timely resolution of project\-related issues



**11\. Internal Coordination** 



* Coordinate closely with:
* Planning
* Commercial
* Procurement
* Finance
* HR
* Eliminate execution bottlenecks and improve cross\-functional efficiency



**12\. Team Leadership \& Development** 



* Lead and manage Project Managers and site teams
* Conduct performance reviews, mentoring, and capability development
* Build a high\-performance culture focused on accountability and execution excellence



  





**Key Result Areas (KRAs)** 




**Project Delivery** 



* Percentage of projects delivered on time
* Effectiveness of delay recovery measures



**Cost Control** 



* Budget vs Actual variance
* Reduction in cost overruns



**Profitability** 



* Achievement of project margins
* Final vs planned profitability



**Cash Flow Performance** 



* Billing vs planned billing
* Collection efficiency



**Resource Efficiency** 



* Labor productivity
* Equipment utilization



**Quality** 



* Reduction in NCRs and rework
* Snag closure timelines



**Safety** 



* Incident frequency rate
* Compliance with HSE standards



**Client Satisfaction** 



* Repeat business and retention
* Client feedback and satisfaction scores



**Reporting Structure** 



* Reports to: Managing Director / Chairman
* Direct Reports: Project Managers and Project Teams
* Cross\-functional Coordination: Planning, Commercial, Procurement, Finance, HR



**Governance \& Meetings** 



* Weekly:
* Operations review meetings
* Project progress reviews
* Monthly:
* Budget vs Actual review
* Project progress and profitability review
* Billing and cash flow forecast review
* Risk and escalation review



**Authority \& Decision\-Making** 



* Authority to allocate resources and define execution strategies
* Recommend subcontractor and supplier selections
* Escalate critical risks and operational issues to senior management



**Ideal Candidate Profile (Recommended Addition)** 



* 15\+ years of experience in construction/EPC contracting within the UAE
* Proven track record managing multi\-project portfolios (high\-rise \+ infrastructure)
* Strong commercial acumen with experience in cost, cash flow, and contract management
* Deep understanding of UAE authority requirements and contractor operations
* Leadership experience managing large project teams and cross\-functional departments

data.title: Head of Construction /Construction Director
data.raw_snippet: The Head of Construction/Construction Director oversees the full execution of the high\-rise development projects in Abu Dhabi and Dubai, from pre\-construction through to handover, acting as the key link between the project site, consultants, contractors, and internal stakeholders. In addition to t
data.jd_text:
The Head of Construction/Construction Director oversees the full execution of the high\-rise development projects in Abu Dhabi and Dubai, from pre\-construction through to handover, acting as the key link between the project site, consultants, contractors, and internal stakeholders. In addition to technical and construction oversight, the role assumes broad project management responsibilities to ensure timely delivery, budget control, quality assurance, and alignment with MERED’s ultra\-luxury standards.
   





  





**Key Responsibilities**



* Act as the Client’s Point of contact on\-site, representing the company in all day\-to\-day project operations, stakeholder communications, technical decisions, and program management—ensuring seamless execution of the company’s development vision.
* Take responsibility for the execution and monitoring of the project master schedule, overseeing critical path activities and proactively resolving bottlenecks across all trades and work fronts.
* Lead all site\-level decision\-making, interfacing daily with the Consultant and Contractor, while aligning with the strategic objectives of the Executive Management team.
* Coordinate and chair all weekly progress meetings, technical coordination meetings, and task force sessions with internal and external parties; follow preparation of comprehensive MOMs, trackers, and follow\-ups to ensure accountability and implementation.
* Ensure that all procurement, long lead items, shop drawings, and authority approvals are aligned with the schedule and proactively track their timelines with the planning department to avoid execution delays.
* Review and assess contractor’s programs, lookahead plans, recovery schedules, and mitigation plans; reject or revise plans that do not meet MERED's standards or fail to support critical milestones.
* Monitor and supervise site works for full scope disciplines including:
+ Soil Investigation.
+ Enabling Works.
+ Structural: Sequencing, rebar installation, slab formwork, PT works, cast\-in items.
+ Architectural: Blockworks, waterproofing, screeding, ceiling frameworks, partitions, stone and tile installations.
+ Façade: System panels, brackets, brackets coordination with MEP penetrations and PT zones, balcony closures.
+ ID: Joinery, veneer mockups, lighting details, finishing tolerances, and detail verifications.
+ MEP: Shaft coordination, riser alignment, containment readiness, T\&C planning and authority inspections.

* Take charge of all government authority coordination (DDA, DEWA, Civil Defense, DM, RTA), ensuring that submissions, site inspections, approvals, and NOCs are prepared and executed on time.
* Maintain direct oversight of design coordination activities, ensuring all site conditions, RFI responses, and consultant instructions are technically reviewed, confirmed, and closed in collaboration with design managers and consultants.
* Represent the Developer in all commercial and contractual coordination together with commercial team by:
+ Evaluating technical claims, cost implications, and time extension requests.
+ Providing technical input to Contracts/Legal for variation orders, claims rebuttals, and scope clarifications.
+ Assessing additional work justifications and holding the Contractor accountable for scope performance.

* Take full leadership of QA/QC implementation:
+ Approve method statements and ITPs.
+ Review NCRs and ensure rectification with zero recurrence.
+ Verify material submittals, shop drawing accuracy, and as\-built records.

* Manage construction digital tools and systems, ensuring workflows, WIRs, MIRs, and document reviews are completed accurately, with continuous system training and performance follow\-up.
* Support planning department for internal weekly reporting to Executive Management:
+ Progress dashboards, milestone tracking, risk registers, productivity comparisons, and KPI compliance reviews.

* Oversee cost control interfaces with the commercial team by tracking site quantities, abortive works, unexecuted scope, and opportunities for value engineering or savings through optimization.
* Support the tendering process by preparing and coordinating technical evaluations, organizing site visits for bidders, reviewing PTC’s, technical submissions and providing input on contractor selection in coordination with the Commercial and Design teams.
* Support the Marketing team by preparing monthly construction progress updates, facilitating site readiness for content creation activities (photoshoots, videography, walkthroughs), and coordinating materials that reflect the company’s culture, particularly in health, safety, and environmental standards.
* Drive logistics and construction phasing strategies including crane operations, platform reconfigurations, hoist planning, material laydown, storage areas, and emergency access.
* Coordinate with the Contractor and Engineer to uphold a high standard of HSE culture across the project by leading weekly HSE\-focused site walks, enforcing compliance with UAE regulations and MERED’s internal safety policies, and ensuring that all activities reflect a clean, safe, and well\-managed construction environment.
* Spearhead initiatives to elevate site culture:
+ Ensure strict housekeeping compliance.
+ Maintain site readiness for walkthroughs.

* Facilitate pre\-handover activities including testing and commissioning, authority handover, DLP coordination, and unit inspections aligned with project branding and customer satisfaction goals.


 Requirements
   

  


**Required Qualifications**



* Bachelor’s degree in civil engineering or architecture.
* 15–20 years of experience in high\-rise construction, including luxury residential towers (experience with offices and hotels is a plus).
* Relevant experience in high\-rise construction projects in Abu Dhabi and Dubai.
* Verifiable experience working for Tier 1 contractors or developers.
* Understanding of FIDIC contracts and construction contract administration.
* Knowledge of construction planning and phasing.
* Appreciation for customer care and commitment to handing over projects with a customer\-centric approach.
* Understanding of RERA inspections and approvals for Dubai projects, and relevant authority regulations for Abu Dhabi projects.
* Strong technical knowledge in structural, MEP, façade, ID, and authority regulations.
* Proficient in project management tools (Primavera, MS Project), AutoCAD, and document control systems.








**Preferred Qualifications**



* Professional certification if applicable, PMP certification or equivalent project management training.
* Experience with Dubai development regulations and authorities (DDA, DEWA, RTA, etc.).
* Exposure to design management or contractor\-side execution is an advantage.
* Working knowledge of sustainability certifications (LEED) in construction execution, if applicable.
* Industry\-recognized professional whose expertise and reputation are valued by contractors.



  





**Skills and Competencies**



* Strong leadership and decision\-making capabilities.
* Excellent coordination and conflict resolution skills.
* Meticulous attention to detail and organizational discipline.
* Proactive problem\-solver with a results\-oriented mindset.
* Comfortable managing complex teams and high\-pressure timelines.
* Fluent in English; knowledge of Russian or Arabic is an asset.



 ·
   

  

  

  




 Benefits
   

  

* Competitive salary package.
* Annual flight ticket allowance.
* Performance discretionary bonus.
* Comprehensive health insurance.
* Employment visa.

data.title: Group SVP - Corporate Finance & Business Development
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 To be a transaction leader in charge of Group Corporate Finance \& Business Development transactions and to take a senior leadership role in the implementation and review of business development projects from across the regions.
   

  

 The role demands a holistic understandin
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 To be a transaction leader in charge of Group Corporate Finance \& Business Development transactions and to take a senior leadership role in the implementation and review of business development projects from across the regions.
   

  

 The role demands a holistic understanding of the ports, economic zones, marine, and logistics businesses, with very high technical skills in project appraisal, corporate finance, project finance, capital structuring, and transaction documentation. The job also needs a high level of understanding of commercial drivers of projects, and our key requirements from concessions and other elements of project structuring including JV arrangements and consolidation requirements.
   

  

 To provide leadership, on the job training and guidance to more junior members of the team, and to work closely with senior management to develop and implement strategies for growth and expansion. The individual in this role will also be responsible for managing relationships with key stakeholders, including investors, lenders, and government officials. Strong negotiation, communication, and analytical skills are essential for success in this role. Additionally, the ability to work effectively in a fast\-paced and dynamic environment is crucial, as is the ability to think strategically and make sound business decisions.
   

  

**Key Accountabilities**
* To be a transaction leader of the Corporate Finance \& Business Development Function which includes:
* Playing a key role in driving the business development strategy for DP World.
* Representing DP World to senior external parties including Government Ministers, heads of port authorities, potential sellers and co\-investors, and other senior political figures.
* Range of projects to include investment commitments for existing \& new concessions, M\&A, monetization \& disposals, restructuring \& capital raising.
* Developing and managing the strategy for DP World to enter key new markets.
* Lead the execution of the Business Development process of key new projects and provide guidance to regional BD Function.
* Presenting projects to the Board and ExCom and using relationships with key senior managers to win support for projects within the organisation.
* Identify potential investment projects and assess initial viability from a commercial, financial and strategic perspective
* Lead and mobilise internal resources to conduct detailed due diligence on the country, market, competitive environment, legal/regulatory environment, civil engineering issues, operational requirements and funding alternatives
* Represent DP World to external parties (port authorities, governments, corporate partners) in respect of substantial projects.
* Select and appoint external resources, including legal, tax, financial and engineering, as necessary
* Prepare and/or review detailed financial models to project business performance and conduct sensitivity analyses in order to determine potential returns to DP World
* Identify and negotiate with potential equity partners
* Review and analyze tender documentation, including information memorandums, draft concession agreements, etc.
* Identify bid strategies and prepare legal submissions, including negotiating transaction documentation such as SPA, Shareholders Agremment, Concession Agreements etc.
* Acquire internal project approvals and prepare final presentation to Senior Management
* Prepare recommendation for Board approval, if and when necessary
* Prepare handover files for the Regional Office responsible for the implementation of the new business unit
* Managing the process within the required timeframe
* Provide guidance and development for other team members allocated to the project
* Identifying and avoiding structures and agreements that may damage DP World’s reputation.
* To provide oversight to the regions on their projects and their process through the DP World approval process.
* Ensuring projects submitted are in line with corporate strategy and internal valuation requirements
* Projects not in line with strategy or corporate preferences are eliminated at the earlier opportunity.
* Liaise with internal and external resources as necessary to verify information presented and ensure that commercial, operational and financial assumptions are reasonable
* Providing clear recommendations to senior management of what projects are acceptable and what approach should be followed.
* Prepare recommendation for Board approval, if and when necessary
* Managing the process within the required timeframe
* Lead efforts to raise external project finance for new business units and advising other team members (and regions) on issues faced in project finance.
* Supervise and review financial models that are appropriate for external lenders in order to determine the appropriate gearing level and optimum debt structure
* Co\-ordinate the preparation of information memorandums for potential lenders that effectively describe the steps taken to take advantage of a projects inherent strengths and to mitigate any project weaknesses in order to obtain favourable debt terms, thereby maximizing the lift on the return on equity
* Select and appoint external resources, including legal, tax, financial and the various advisors required by lenders
* Participate in the selection of appropriate lenders, in conjunction with the DP World Treasury department, and lead the negotiation process to finalize the required finance agreements
* Advise the business unit finance director on the process to satisfy all the conditions precedent to financial close
* Prepare handover files for business unit finance director who will be responsible for the on\-going administration of the loan facility.
* Develop DP World “human capital” through involvement in informal and formal training seminars either as a participant or facilitator
* Continuously improve Business Development policies and procedures used at Head Office and Regional Offices
* Valuation techniques and internal financial/strategic requirements
* Financial modelling best practices
* Investment case preparation and presentation
* Assist in other corporate\-level initiatives as required, such as supporting the development of corporate strategy
* Train and develop junior members of the Head Office Corporate Finance \& Business Development department


**Others**
* Accountable for leading an engaged team, providing direction and promoting collaboration while ensuring they are enabled to carry out the goals and objectives of the business
* Promotes and demonstrates positive behaviours in harmony with DP World’s values and culture
* Ensure that the highest levels of safety are applied in all activities.
* Understands and adheres to DP World’s Code of Conduct and Ethics policies
* Performs other related duties as assigned.


**Job Context**
* The Head Office Corporate Finance \& Business Development department has a global responsibility particularly with respect to investment review, strategic portfolio management, project financing and other corporate initiatives.
* It is essential to develop a personal network within DP World in order to effectively perform this role.


 QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCE \& SKILLS:
   

  

* QUALIFICATIONS:
* Minimum requirement of a Bachelors degree in fields such as Management, Commerce, Law, Economics, Accounting or Mathematics
* Masters in Business Administration (or similar) and/or financial accreditations are preferable
* EXPERIENCE:
* 10 plus years’ experience in investment evaluation and project management
* 5 plus years experience in the ports industry
* 10 plus years’ experience in an international and/or multicultural environment
* SKILLS:
* Business acumen: identify key revenue and cost drivers and understand their impact on an overall business case
* Financial analysis: Excellence in understanding complex financial models to determine the accuracy of projections and potential value of a project to DP World
* Communication: Be able to represent DP World in a range of environments from counterparty negotiating meetings to more sales focused pitches for projects. Also be able to make strong internal presentations necessary to gain support for projects and to communicate the concerns with less favourable projects.
* Relationship building: interact effectively with multiple levels of DP World, senior government officials and external advisors/consultants
* Multilingual: multiple language skills are preferable (Arabic, French, Spanish, etc.)
* OTHERS
* Willingness to travel to emerging market countries is required

data.jd_text:
**Senior Technical Project Manager** 




 📍 Location: Dubai
 



 💼 Experience: 10–15 Years
 



 📅 Immediate / Short Notice Preferred
 



  





 We are looking for an experienced
 **Senior Technical Project Manager** 
 with a
 **strong technical background** 
 to lead large\-scale
 **Cloud \& Infrastructure Transformation Programs** 
 . This is a strategic leadership role requiring hands\-on technical understanding combined with strong delivery management expertise.
 



 The ideal candidate will drive hybrid cloud initiatives across private cloud, public cloud, and enterprise shared infrastructure platforms while engaging with executive stakeholders and technical teams.
 



  





 🔹 Key Responsibilities
 



 ☁️ Cloud Program Leadership
 


* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of enterprise cloud transformation programs including:
* Sovereign Private Cloud
* Public Cloud Platforms (Azure, Oracle Cloud, etc.)
* Hybrid / Multi\-Cloud Architectures
* Shared Infrastructure Services (IaaS / PaaS / XaaS)
* Manage multiple workstreams such as:
* Cloud Foundations
* Networking \& Connectivity
* Security \& Compliance
* DR \& Resilience
* Operations \& Service Readiness



 🔹 Technical Leadership (Must Have)
 


* Act as a
 **technical leader** 
 , not just a coordinator
* Review and challenge architecture designs and technical approaches
* Validate:
* Cloud architectures
* Network \& Security designs
* Migration strategies
* Capacity / Performance models
* DR strategies



 📊 Program \& Project Management
 


* Own project plans, roadmaps, schedules, risks, budgets, dependencies, governance, and reporting
* Deliver multiple parallel technical programs on time and within scope



 🤝 Stakeholder \& Vendor Management
 


* Coordinate with Infrastructure, Cloud, Security, DevOps, Operations, PMO teams
* Manage vendors, system integrators, and cloud partners
* Ensure milestones, quality, SLAs, and technical deliverables are achieved



 🔄 Migration \& Platform Enablement
 


* Lead cloud migration programs
* Ensure service continuity, security compliance, and onboarding readiness



 🔹 Required Experience
 



 ✔️ 10–15 years total IT experience
 



 ✔️ 5\+ years in Senior Project / Program Management roles
 



 ✔️ Strong technical background in Infrastructure / Cloud / Systems Engineering
 



 ✔️ Proven experience managing Hybrid Cloud / Multi\-Cloud programs
 



 🔹 Technical Expertise Required
 


* Cloud Platforms: Azure / OCI / VMware / Others
* Networking: WAN, SD\-WAN, Cloud Connectivity
* Security \& Compliance Architecture
* Virtualization / Containers / Platform Services
* Backup, DR \& Resilience
* IT Operations \& Service Management



 🔹 Preferred Certifications
 


* PMP / PgMP / PRINCE2
* Azure Architect / OCI / VMware
* ITIL v4
* Enterprise Architecture / Security Certifications

* الإشراف على دراسة المشاريع ذات الصلة بالقطاع واستيعاب متطلبات وأهداف وأغراض هذه المشاريع وضمان حساب الن
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
* وضع وتنفيذ إجراءات تشغيل قياسية للمشروعات المقرر إقامتها وتقديم عمليات تطوير مستمرة لهذه الإجراءات لضمان اتباع المشاريع التابعة للإدارة لأفضل الممارسات الدولية المعمول بها.
* الإشراف على دراسة المشاريع ذات الصلة بالقطاع واستيعاب متطلبات وأهداف وأغراض هذه المشاريع وضمان حساب النفقات بشكل صحيح، وخلاف ذلك، يتعين القيام بالبحث اللازم وتوفير الدعم والأساس المنطقي للفروقات التي يتم تحديدها.
* تقييم ومراقبة أداء وكفاءة جميع المشروعات والبرامج ذات الصلة لضمان تنفيذ البرامج على النحو المخطط لها.
* مراجعة نماذج الاتصال الرسمية مع أصحاب المصلحة ذوي الصلة بهذه المشاريع ودعم وضع اشتراطات تأهيل المستشارين الذين يتم الاستعانة بهم.
* التنسيق مع موظفي وأعضاء الفريق وأصحاب المصلحة المعنيين في شأن إعداد التقارير حول المشاريع الكبرى ذات الصلة والتي تشمل على سبيل المثال لا الحصر إعداد الدراسات الاستباقية وتخطيط موارد المشروعات وإدارة ميزانياتها ومتطلبات التخطيط وتقديم التقارير للإدارة وضمان الجودة وإدارة المخاطر وتحليل عمليات الأعمال ووضعها والتفاوض بشأن العقود.
* قيادة جميع أنشطة أصحاب المصلحة وتنسيقها لدعم المشروع وإيجاد استراتيجيات تضمن تحقيق المطلوب والالتزام بالجدول الزمني الموضوع وضمان الدقة والتواصل الفعال المناسب.
* التعاون مع أصحاب المصلحة داخليًا وخارجيًا في المسائل ذات الصلة بإدارة المشروعات وذلك بهدف تسهيل تدفق المعلومات.
* تقديم الدعم للإدارات الخارجية عن طريق جمع البيانات وتحليلها خلال فترة تحديد ووضع عملية الأعمال والسياسات والإجراءات و/أو مواصلة تطبيقها .
* الإشراف على عمليات تخطيط المشروعات عمومًا من خلال إعداد التقارير بشأن الجداول الزمنية للمشروعات ومخرجاتها.
* تنسيق إعداد التقارير الداخلية والخارجية من خلال جمع وتحليل وتلخيص البيانات والمعلومات ذات الصلة بجميع المشاريع.
* الإشراف على إدارة جميع ما يخص المشروع بما في ذلك السجل المالي والتقارير وتقييم الأعمال المكتملة.
* المشاركة في تطوير السياسات والعمليات والإجراءات الخاصة فنيًا وتشغيليًا، وضمان الالتزام بحيث يتم استيفاء جميع المتطلبات ذات الصلة، وتوافقها مع العمليات.
* الإشراف على العمليات اليومية وذلك لضمان الامتثال للإجراءات والمعايير القائمة، وللتأكد من أن أنشطة الموظفين يتم إنجازها بكفاءة وفاعلية وفي الوقت المناسب.
* رفع التقارير الخاصة بالأنشطة التشغيلية إلى مدير الإدارة بصورة منتظمة بما في ذلك التحديات التي تواجهها الوحدة، والعقبات وطرق حلها أو تقليلها على النحو المطلوب بهدف إبقاء المدير المباشر على علم بالأحداث وعلى اطلاع مستمر بالمستجدات الخاصة بأنشطة الوحدة.
* الالتزام بتطبيق سياسات وإجراءات أمن المعلومات، والحفاظ على سرية البيانات، وإبلاغ ضابط أمن المعلومات عن أي تجاوزات أو اختراقات للسياسات المعتمدة.
* الالتزام بإجراءات وسياسة وتعليمات السلامة والصحة المهنية وسياسة نظام إدارة البيئة المطبقة في الهيئة.
* أداء مهام ومسؤوليات أخرى مرتبطة بالوظيفة وكما هو مكلف به.


**Qualifications**
* درجة البكالوريوس في إدارة الأعمال أ الإدارة العامة أو علوم المكتبات والمعلومات او التعليم أو إدارة المشاريع أو ما يعادلها من جامعة معتمدة.
* 7 فما فوق من الخبرة العملية ذات الصلة.


**Job Category**
 Administration
   

  

**Advertiser**
 Dubai Culture
   

  

**Educational\-level**
 Bachelor
   

  

**Required Nationality**
 UAE Only
   

  

**Monthly Salary**
 Unspecified
   

  

**Schedule\-Time**
 Full time
   

  

**Job Posting**
 27/04/2026
   

  

**Unposting Date**
 12/06/2026
