data.jd_text:
**Senior Account Manager \- Experiential BTL activation and Trade Marketing experience** 




  





**Job Description** 




 About the Company \- Our client is seeking a Senior Account Manager to join their dynamic and fast growing marketing agency, driving the development and implementation of marketing strategies for some of the Middle East’s leading brands. It's a high\-paced, results driven environment that requires a proactive individual, with a positive can\-do attitude to manage a portfolio of key accounts and projects with a focus on shopper marketing strategy and retail trade activations.
 



  





  





**About the Role** 
 \- Reporting to the Group Account Director, the key responsibilities of the role include:
 



  




* Strengthening and expanding relationships with key clients and stakeholders.
* Taking client briefs and developing creative and strategic solutions, with the support of the Account Directors, Account Managers and design team.
* Researching all facets of marketing to support and assist in the execution of client briefs.
* Assisting the development of key accounts and providing strategic input into campaign development.
* Communicating with clients and internal and external stakeholders the goals of an overall project and ensuring project timelines and budgets are met.
* Trafficking communication through departments to aid the development of creative, strategy, POS, marketing collateral and premiums.
* Plan and execute events, including product launches and brand activations.
* Ensuring jobs are completed to an impeccable standard.
* Leading, assisting and participating in client presentations, responding to briefs, concepts and initiatives.
* Building strong relationships with team members to establish sound working relationships.



  





  





**Qualifications** 
 \- To be eligible for the role you must possess some experience in marketing (preferably
 **Shopper Marketing/Trade Marketing** 
 ) in an Account Manager role. Experience in planning and executing marketing campaigns would be ideal.
 



  





  





**Required Skills** 
 \- We’re looking for someone who is positive, passionate and a great communicator. You will be a supportive team member with initiative to drive your accounts and assist your team members when required. You need to have extensive experience with
 **Shopper Marketing** 
 , including developing strategies and executing campaigns. Managing events from initiation to completion. Understanding consumer purchasing behavior. There is a great deal of autonomy in the role and to be effective you must be extremely organised, with strong attention to detail and possess the ability to respond quickly, problem solve and prioritise effectively. You must also be able to work collaboratively within a team and across departments as this is something we pride ourselves on to deliver results. The ideal candidate is a dedicated, hardworking individual, who prides themselves on their commitment to excellent client service and is seeking exposure to major brands and campaigns and a supportive team environment.

data.raw_snippet:

data.jd_text:
In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
   

  

 At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate an innovative culture that empowers you to achieve your full potential. Unleash your talent and redefine what’s possible.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Parsons is looking for an amazingly talented
 **Senior Program Controls Engineer – Reporting \& Analytics** 
 . In this hands\-on program\-level role, you will be responsible for the development, integrity, and continuous improvement of PMO reporting across the Roads Program.
   

  

 The role supports senior PMO leadership by transforming complex schedule, progress, cost, and change data into concise, accurate, and decision\-ready reports. Reports to the Program Controls Director.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Work in close coordination with the PMO PRC Sr. Reporting Manager.
* Lead the preparation, coordination, and continuous enhancement of the PMO Weekly Progress Report.
* Develop new reporting products and dashboards from scratch where required to meet Client or PMO needs.
* Ensure reports are concise, accurate, internally consistent, and aligned with the department’s governance framework.
* Consolidate inputs received from PMCMs and PMO managers across planning, progress, cost, and change.
* Verify internal consistency of reported data before inclusion in PMO\-issued reports, ensuring alignment with the Integrated Master Schedule.
* Protect the integrity of PMO reporting under tight timelines and ad\-hoc demands.
* Ability to translate raw technical data into material suitable for senior Client consumption.
* Proactively manage PMCM reporting interfaces to ensure timely, complete, and usable inputs.
* Coordinate closely with PMO discipline managers to clarify assumptions and reporting narratives.
* Challenge unclear, inconsistent, or low\-quality inputs in line with governance expectations (without commercial approval authority).
* Respond rapidly to ad\-hoc Client and PMO reporting requests.
* Produce short\-notice executive summaries and analysis under pressure.
* Understand reporting from the reader’s point of view,
* Ability to present to senior Client and PMO management audience.


**What Required Skills You'll Bring**
* Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineer with at least 10 years experience
* Excellent communication skills
* Planner or senior planner background (Project / Program level)
* Demonstrated experience producing senior\-level PMO / PMC reports
* Expert\-level in Primavera P6, MS Power BI, Excel, PowerPoint
* Exceptional attention to detail and internal consistency
* Comfortable working in a fast\-paced, deadline\-driven environment
* Confident dealing with PMCMs and senior PMO stakeholders


 Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.
   

  

 We truly invest and care about our employee’s wellbeing and provide endless growth opportunities as the sky is the limit, so aim for the stars! Imagine next and join the Parsons quest—APPLY TODAY!
   

  

 Parsons is aware of fraudulent recruitment practices. To learn more about recruitment fraud and how to report it, please refer to https://www.parsons.com/fraudulent\-recruitment/.

data.title: PMO Senior Specialist - Communications
data.raw_snippet:
**About Us**
 Tamara is the leading fintech platform in Saudi Arabia and the wider GCC region with a mission to help people make their dreams come true by building the most customer\-centric financial super\-app on earth. The company serves millions of users in the region and partners with leading g
data.jd_text:
**About Us**
 Tamara is the leading fintech platform in Saudi Arabia and the wider GCC region with a mission to help people make their dreams come true by building the most customer\-centric financial super\-app on earth. The company serves millions of users in the region and partners with leading global and regional brands such as SHEIN, Jarir, noon, IKEA and Amazon, as well as small and medium businesses.
   

  

 Tamara is Saudi Arabia’s first fintech unicorn and is backed by Sanabil Investments, a wholly owned company by the Public Investment Fund (PIF), SNB Capital, Checkout.com, amongst others. The company operates from its headquarters in Riyadh, with additional regional and global support offices.
   

  

**Your Role**
 This role requires you to be a Swiss Army knife. It'll engage every skill you have and make your brain cells perk up—left brain, right brain, and muscles you didn't know you had.
   

  

 If you're the type who enjoys building the plane while it's flying, this is your seat. We're a brand\-new comms department, inside a 1,000\-person scale\-up operating across multiple offices and time zones.
   

  

 There's structure where it matters and space to build it where it doesn't exist yet.You'll help shape how we work, not just execute what's already there.
   

  

 We're in charge of crafting the company's narrative and ensuring it's clear, consistent, and visible across all our stakeholders: customers, partners, media, talent, investors, regulators, and more.We're looking for a PMO Specialist to help run, coordinate, and deliver the work that keeps our Communications function moving forward.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
**Strategic Project Delivery:**
* Own end\-to\-end delivery: Lead high\-impact projects and special initiatives. You will drive timelines, manage complex stakeholder relations, and ensure high\-quality output across the board.
* Orchestrate complexity: Manage multiple parallel workstreams, ensuring tight alignment across cross\-functional partners (Product, Finance, Legal, etc.) and leadership.
* Agency \& Vendor Stewardship: Lead the analytical and negotiation process with agencies and vendors. You will work directly with agency owners to define scope, refine performance metrics, and ensure commercial alignment with our strategic goals.


**Strategic Planning \& Executive Influence**
* Drive planning cycles: Lead the operational aspects of annual planning, budgeting, and OKR processes. You will be responsible for the integrity of the data and the quality of materials presented to executive leadership and the CEO Office.
* Strategic facilitation: Proactively manage stakeholder alignment, ensuring clear communication and progress across the organization.


**Operational Excellence \& Architecture**
* Build and scale: Don’t just follow processes—architect them. You will identify gaps in our current operations and build scalable frameworks from scratch to improve team efficiency.
* Drive truth and transparency: Establish and enforce rigorous standards for documentation, tracking, and reporting that serve as the "single source of truth" for the department.


**Commercial \& Contract Rigor**
* Lead contract lifecycle: Take ownership of the coordination of agreements, NDAs, and vendor contracts, working closely with Legal and Finance to navigate complex procurement cycles.
* Financial stewardship: Proactively manage the financial health of the function, including budget tracking, billing, and vendor management, with high precision and autonomy.


**You'll Work Closely With**
* Internal teams (Finance, Legal, Product, IT, Design, HR)
* External agencies and vendors
* Executive leadership and the CEO Office


**Your expertise**
**Skills \& Experience**
* Strategic Project Leadership: Proven ability to manage competing priorities and complex stakeholder landscapes in a fast\-paced environment.
* Cross\-Functional Collaboration: Demonstrated success working in diverse, high\-impact teams, with the ability to bridge gaps between different departments to drive collective progress.
* Exceptional Communication: Expert\-level written and verbal communication, with the ability to synthesize complex data into clear, persuasive narratives for senior leadership.


**Mindset**
* Owner Mindset: You take full ownership of your domain. You don’t wait for instructions to fix broken processes—you see them, you build the solution, and you own the outcome.
* Comfort with Ambiguity: You thrive in environments where the path isn’t clearly defined. You have a natural ability to create structure out of chaos.
* High\-Stakes Grit: You are ambitious, hungry to learn, and capable of working effectively across multiple priorities in a high\-pressure, fast\-moving business environment.


**Independent Driver:** 
 You are a self\-starter who can navigate complex organizational structures to push progress forward, even when resources are constrained.

data.raw_snippet:
Bayut is the number one property portal in the Kingdom, connecting millions of users across the country. We are committed to delivering the best online search experience.
 



 As part of Dubizzle Group, Bayut is alongside some of the strongest classifieds brands in the market. With a collective str
data.jd_text:
Bayut is the number one property portal in the Kingdom, connecting millions of users across the country. We are committed to delivering the best online search experience.
 



 As part of Dubizzle Group, Bayut is alongside some of the strongest classifieds brands in the market. With a collective strength of 10 brands, we have more than 200 million monthly users that trust in our dedication to providing them with the best platform for their needs.
 



 The Sr. Manager PMO Wealth Management is responsible for managing the end\-to\-end Investment deal flow. This role coordinates with Wealth Managers (based at major international hubs) and oversees a dedicated Project Committee to ensure that every investor deal is treated uniformly. The Head of PMO ensures that the organization moves as one unit to handle everything for the investor.
 



**In this role, you will:** 




**Liaison \& Coordination** 



* Ensure liaison between Wealth Managers (WM), the client, and the internal Bayut team to keep everyone aligned on requirements.
* Manage the client tracking from pre\-sales, execution to post\-sales activities ensuring a smooth coordination between departments



**Project Committee formation and Management** 
  
 


* Set up the PMO Committee based on the type of client (HNWIs/Family Offices/Institutional Buyers) and their unique requirements.
* Conceive, develop and manage the Project Committee to ensure timelines, action items, reporting and execution
* Ensure timely submission of IMs to Wealth Managers so they can be shared with clients
* The incumbent will be responsible for handling client escalation and internal conflicts
* The incumbent will be responsible for the performance of multiple departments within the Project Committee, working together as one unit, and will be accountable for planned execution
* Ensure the full deal flow after the IM is accepted, overseeing core processes like payment processing, documentation, and contract finalization.
* Coordinate secondary processes when needed, such as SPV formation, company creation, or property management



**Post\-Sale Services** 



* Oversee post\-sale services and property management solutions to ensure the client's investment is maintained after the deal is closed


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in business administration, project management or a relevant field. Professional certification in project management is highly valued
* 10\+ years of experience in managing complex projects. 5\+ years of PMO experience
* In\-depth knowledge of PMO processes and the Saudi market rules and regulations
* Knowledge and understanding of Project Management Software's and Applications like Primavera, MS Project, Asana etc
* Outstanding communication skills to listen to and speak with clients and managers.
* Strong organizational skills to manage high\-stakes projects under pressure
* High level of integrity
* Highly organised and detail oriented
* Adaptability to handle changing client requirements and market conditions


**Benefits**
* High\-performing and fast\-paced work environment
* Comprehensive Health Insurance
* Rewards and recognition
* Learning \& Development



 \#KSABayut
   

  

 Bayut is an equal\-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

 \- PMO Lead

 The PMO (Project Management Office) Lead is responsible for establishing governance, standardization, and oversight across all event projects. Thi
data.jd_text:
**Position** 
 \- PMO Lead
 



  



**Duration** 
 \- June 2026 to March 2027
 



  



**Location** 
 \- KSA
 



  



**Role Overview** 




  



 The PMO (Project Management Office) Lead is responsible for establishing governance, standardization, and oversight across all event projects. This role ensures that multiple events and production workstreams are delivered on time, within budget, and in alignment with organizational strategy, while maintaining consistency in project execution frameworks.
 



  



**Key Responsibilities** 




  



**1\. PMO Governance \& Framework** 




  

  
* Establish and implement standardized project management methodologies (Agile/Waterfall/Hybrid) for event execution.
  
* Define project lifecycle stages: initiation, planning, execution, monitoring, and closure.
  
* Develop templates, SOPs, and playbooks for event delivery.
  


  



**2\. Portfolio \& Program Management** 




  

  
* Oversee a portfolio of events (corporate, sports, exhibitions, large\-scale public events).
  
* Prioritize projects based on business objectives, timelines, and resource availability.
  
* Monitor interdependencies across multiple concurrent events.
  


  



**3\. Project Planning \& Tracking** 




  

  
* Ensure detailed project plans are created with timelines, milestones, and deliverables.
  
* Track progress using dashboards and reporting tools.
  
* Identify risks, delays, and bottlenecks, and implement mitigation strategies.
  


  



**4\. Resource \& Capacity Management** 




  

  
* Allocate project managers, technical teams, and operational staff across events.
  
* Plan workforce requirements, including outsourced staffing for large\-scale events.
  
* Optimize resource utilization across multiple projects.
  


  



**5\. Budget \& Financial Oversight** 




  

  
* Monitor project budgets, cost tracking, and financial performance.
  
* Ensure profitability and cost control across event portfolios.
  
* Provide financial forecasts and variance analysis.
  


  



**6\. Stakeholder Management** 




  

  
* Act as the central point of coordination between clients, production teams, vendors, and internal leadership.
  
* Provide regular updates to senior management and clients.
  
* Ensure alignment between commercial, operations, and production teams.
  


  



**7\. Risk, Compliance \& Quality Assurance** 




  

  
* Implement risk management frameworks across all projects.
  
* Ensure compliance with UAE regulations, venue requirements, and safety standards.
  
* Conduct post\-event reviews and continuous improvement initiatives.
  


  



**8\. Reporting \& Performance Management** 




  

  
* Develop and maintain PMO dashboards (KPIs, timelines, budget performance).
  
* Track key metrics such as:
  
  
+ Project delivery timelines
  
+ Budget adherence
  
+ Resource utilization
  
+ Client satisfaction
  

  
* Present insights and recommendations to leadership.
  


  



**Required Skills \& Competencies** 




  

  
* Strong expertise in
 **project/program management within events or production**
  
* Knowledge of
 **PMO frameworks, governance models, and reporting structures**
  
* Proficiency in tools such as:
  
  
+ MS Project / Smartsheet
  
+ Jira / Asana / Monday.com
  
+ Power BI / Excel dashboards
  

  
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills
  
* Excellent stakeholder and communication skills
  
* Ability to manage multiple high\-pressure projects simultaneously
  


  



**Qualifications** 




  

  
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Project Management, Event Management, or related field
  
* PMP / PRINCE2 certification (highly preferred)
  
* 7\-12\+ years of experience in project/program management
  
* Prior experience in
 **events, exhibitions, or production environment** 
 is mandatory

data.title: PMO Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Make an impact** 
 by working for sectors where technology is the enabler, everything is ground\-breaking and there’s a constant need to be innovative.
   

  

**Create and enhance projects** 
 in Java, Python, Angular, PHP, .NET and so much more while diving in the world of Blockchain, Artificia
data.jd_text:
**Make an impact** 
 by working for sectors where technology is the enabler, everything is ground\-breaking and there’s a constant need to be innovative.
   

  

**Create and enhance projects** 
 in Java, Python, Angular, PHP, .NET and so much more while diving in the world of Blockchain, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Security and Internet of Things.
   

  

**Be part of the team** 
 that combines business knowledge, technological edge and a design experience. Our different backgrounds and know\-how are key in developing solutions and experiences for digital clients.
   

  

**Face challenges** 
 and learn other ways of thinking and seeing the world \- there’s always room for your energy and creativity.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The PMO Manager is responsible for overseeing and optimizing project management activities across multiple streams to ensure the successful delivery of projects. This role involves supporting Project Managers (PMs), managing knowledge bases, ensuring the execution of Hypercare activities, and identifying and resolving risks and dependencies. The PMO Manager plays a key role in promoting cross\-stream alignment, implementing communication and escalation plans, and providing guidance to the project management team to achieve organizational goals.
   

  

**As a part of your job, you will:**
* Knowledge Management: Responsible for maintaining and organizing the project knowledge base, ensuring that all relevant project documentation is up to date and accessible.
* Support PMs in KPIs: Assist Project Managers in updating and tracking Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to ensure projects are aligned with organizational goals and performance metrics.
* Hypercare Activities: Lead and manage Hypercare activities, ensuring that projects transition smoothly from development to production and all post\-launch issues are addressed in a timely manner.
* Risk \& Issue Management: Collaborate with PMs to identify, assess, and resolve project risks, issues, and dependencies, ensuring projects remain on track and within scope.
* Promote Cross\-Stream Alignment: Foster strong communication and alignment between different project streams and teams, ensuring efficient collaboration and minimizing conflicts or misunderstandings.
* Communication \& Escalation Plans: Design, implement, and manage comprehensive communication and escalation plans to ensure timely updates and issue resolution across all levels of the project.
* Escalation to PMO Director: Escalate any critical project risks, issues, or delays to the PMO Director, providing them with necessary insights and support to make informed decisions.
* Coaching \& Mentoring: Provide guidance and mentorship to Project Managers, helping to build their skills and ensure adherence to best practices and processes.
* Vendor Management: Manage relationships with external vendors, ensuring they meet project requirements, timelines, and quality standards. Collaborate with vendors to address any performance issues and ensure smooth project delivery.


**What are we looking for?**
**Education:** 
 Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field. PMP, PRINCE2, or similar project management certifications are highly desirable.
   

  

**Experience:** 
 Minimum of 5\+ years of experience as a PMO, PM or technical project manager
   

  

**Skills:**
* Strong understanding of project management methodologies (Agile, Waterfall, Hybrid).
* Quality Assurance Management is optional but highly valued.
* Technical background, team leader or Solution Architect roles are optional but highly valued.
* Excellent problem\-solving and risk management abilities.
* Ability to communicate complex information effectively to stakeholders at all levels.
* Leadership and mentoring skills, with the ability to guide and develop project managers.
* Proficient in project management software and tools (e.g., MS Project, Jira, Asana, etc.).
* Strong organizational skills with attention to detail.
* Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to work in a collaborative team environment.
* Proactive and solution\-oriented mindset.
* Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.


**Personal traits**
* Ability to adapt to different contexts, teams, and Clients;
* Teamwork skills but also a sense of autonomy;
* Motivation for international projects and ok if travel is included;
* Willingness to collaborate with other players;
* Strong communication skills.


 At Celfocus, we are committed to cultivate a diverse and inclusive workplace. As an equal\-opportunity employer, we welcome applicants of all backgrounds, gender identities, and abilities. We are dedicated to providing reasonable accommodations for candidates with specific needs. If you require any adjustments during the selection process, please inform our Talent Acquisition Team.
   

  

**Come join the Team!**
**Celfocus is pioneering the future of business through Next\-Gen Intelligence \- the convergence of data, AI, and human creativity to build more autonomous and adaptive organisations.**
 Guided by our core belief \- Making Data Actionable \- we partner with leading companies to co\-create intelligent solutions that turn data into insight, agility, and business value.
   

  

 Operating in over 25 countries, we bring together business experts, data scientists, and AI engineers to turn complexity into clarity and vision into measurable impact.
   

  

 Founded in 2000, Celfocus is part of Novabase, listed on Euronext Lisbon.
   

  

 To know more, visit www.celfocus.com

data.title: Riyadh Business Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**About Us**
 The Luxury Closet is a company born in Dubai, the heart of luxury in the Arabian Peninsula, where we are redefining the world of luxury. We seek to challenge the norms and build a sustainable company that is loved and admired, and inspires the modern\-day luxury consumer.
   

  

 Our
data.jd_text:
**About Us**
 The Luxury Closet is a company born in Dubai, the heart of luxury in the Arabian Peninsula, where we are redefining the world of luxury. We seek to challenge the norms and build a sustainable company that is loved and admired, and inspires the modern\-day luxury consumer.
   

  

 Our aim is to unlock and curate the most valuable and exclusive closets from around the world.
   

  

 What do we offer?
   

  

* A young, dynamic and forward\-thinking environment
* Fast paced and very short decision times for changes
* A canvas for you to truly excel
* 99% of uptime on sunshine


**About The Role**
 We are looking for a dynamic, results\-driven
 **Riyadh Business Manager** 
 to lead our commercial growth and operational execution in Saudi Arabia. This role is the driving force behind our success in the region, requiring a leader who can balance high\-level business development with hands\-on operational management.
   

  

 You will be responsible for the end\-to\-end client lifecycle and local logistics—from acquiring high\-value sellers and driving buyer revenue to overseeing product on boarding and managing shipments. If you are a versatile leader passionate about the luxury market, possessing a strong commercial mindset, and capable of running a seamless local operation to deliver a world\-class Net Promoter Score (NPS), this role is for you.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Seller Growth \& Supply Acquisition**
* Increase High\-Demand Supply: Formulate and execute strategies to acquire high\-value, highly desirable luxury items from sellers within Saudi Arabia.
* Seller Retention \& VIP Management: Build out retention programs to keep top\-tier sellers engaged, ensuring they consistently choose our platform for their luxury resale needs.
* Marketing Collaboration: Work closely with the regional marketing team to design, launch, and optimize targeted campaigns aimed at new seller acquisition.
* Conversion Optimization: Oversee the seller journey, identifying bottlenecks and training the sales team to improve conversion rates from initial inquiry to successful listing.


**Buyer Engagement \& Sales Leadership**
* Drive Buyer Revenue: Manage the Riyadh sales team to achieve and exceed regional revenue targets, focusing on high\-ticket conversions and repeat purchases.
* Cross\-Pollination: Develop initiatives to convert our top buyers into sellers, and our top sellers into buyers, maximizing the lifetime value of every Saudi client.
* Clienteling Excellence: Ensure the sales team is executing proactive, personalized outreach to VIP buyers to maintain top\-of\-mind brand awareness.


**Local Operations \& Logistics Management**
* Product On boarding \& Processing: Oversee the local item on boarding workflows. Ensure that high\-value supply is processed, verified, and prepped for listing with maximum efficiency and minimal turnaround time.
* Order \& Shipment Fulfilment: Manage end\-to\-end local logistics, including coordinating inbound shipments from sellers and outbound deliveries to buyers.
* Operational SLA \& Quality Control: Monitor operational KPIs to ensure strict adherence to service level agreements (SLAs), minimizing delays, shipping errors, and friction in the physical product journey.


**Team Management \& Client Experience**
* Lead and Coach: Manage, mentor, and scale the local Business Development, Sales, and Operations teams. Set clear KPIs, conduct regular performance reviews, and foster a high\-performance culture.
* NPS Champion: Own the Net Promoter Score (NPS) for the KSA region. Monitor client feedback deeply across both sales interactions and operational fulfilment, implementing changes to ensure a flawless luxury experience.
* Market Intelligence: Act as the eyes and ears on the ground. Report on local market trends, operational challenges, competitor activities, and shifting consumer behaviours to global leadership.


**Requirements**
* Experience: 5\+ years of experience in Business Management, Business Development, or Operations, preferably within the luxury goods, e\-commerce, or premium retail sectors.
* Dual Skillset: Proven ability to manage both commercial sales / clienteling targets and physical operations/logistics workflows.
* Local Market Expertise: Deep understanding of the Saudi Arabian consumer and cultural nuances, with an existing network of high\-net\-worth individuals (HNWIs) being a strong plus.
* Leadership: Proven track record of managing, coaching, and scaling cross\-functional teams to hit ambitious targets.
* Data\-Driven: Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data (conversion rates, NPS, logistics SLAs, acquisition costs) to drive strategic decisions.


**Communication:** 
 Exceptional interpersonal and negotiation skills.
 ***Fluency in both Arabic and English is required.***

data.title: Manager, Corporate Functions Process Excellence (1036)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**
 Coordinate and manage the Corporate Functions Process Excellence within the Corporate Excellence division to support effective process governance and facilitate continuous improvement. Responsibilities include assisting in defining and updating policies and processes, handling chang
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
 Coordinate and manage the Corporate Functions Process Excellence within the Corporate Excellence division to support effective process governance and facilitate continuous improvement. Responsibilities include assisting in defining and updating policies and processes, handling change requests, and maintaining current documentation. Monitor service performance, help identify improvement actions, and support continuous improvement initiatives. In addition, identify needs for new or revised services, contribute to the service catalogue updates, and assess implications on manpower planning. Support customer onboarding for the Corporate Process Owner role, ensuring alignment with organizational goals.
   

  

**Policy and Process Definition**
* Assist in defining and revising corporate policies and processes to align with evolving organizational needs.
* Maintain and update documentation such as process maps and operating manuals in coordination with the team.


**Process Governance**
* Manage change requests and variations through established governance procedures.
* Ensure process documentation stays current and faithfully reflects actual operations.


**Service Performance Monitoring**
* Monitor service delivery metrics, identify gaps, and propose improvement actions to enhance quality.


**Continuous Improvement**
* Lead or support continuous improvement initiatives aimed at process, automation, or technology enhancements.
* Apply recognized best practices to optimize execution and reduce inefficiencies.


**Service Requirements Identification**
* Gather and clarify requirements for new or revised services.
* Evaluate the potential impact of these requirements on manpower needs and resource allocation.


**Service Catalogue Management**
* Contribute to defining and updating the service catalogue documents.
* Ensure changes are communicated to customers and stakeholders in a clear, timely manner.


**Customer Onboarding**
* Support and coordinate the onboarding of customers to the Corporate Process Owner function.
* Ensure alignment of onboarding processes with organizational objectives and stakeholder expectations.


**Stakeholder Collaboration**
* Work closely with internal and external stakeholders to ensure smooth process execution.
* Help resolve issues arising from process execution or service delivery in a timely manner.


**Performance Reporting**
* Prepare periodic reports on service performance and process improvement initiatives.
* Use data insights to support recommendations and decision\-making at the manager level.


**Compliance and Risk Management**
* Ensure processes under your purview comply with relevant policies, standards, and regulations.
* Help detect and mitigate risks associated with process execution and service delivery.


**Our Commitment**
 At Team Saudi, we care deeply about creating a safe, supportive, and empowering environment for our athletes and employees. We welcome applicants who demonstrate integrity, professionalism, and a commitment to maintaining a safe and respectful workplace where everyone is protected, valued, and given fair opportunities to thrive.

data.title: Senior Director - Commercial (MAS123)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Overview:**
 The Senior Director \- Commercial (MAS123\) at Qiddiya Investment Company is a pivotal leadership role responsible for directing and managing the commercial strategy, contract management, and operational commercial activities across the organization's diverse portfolio. This role
data.jd_text:
**Job Overview:**
 The Senior Director \- Commercial (MAS123\) at Qiddiya Investment Company is a pivotal leadership role responsible for directing and managing the commercial strategy, contract management, and operational commercial activities across the organization's diverse portfolio. This role requires an expert commercial professional who can ensure that commercial objectives are met while supporting the company's vision to develop a world\-class entertainment, sports, and cultural destination.
   

  

 As Senior Director \- Commercial, you will lead negotiations, develop commercial frameworks, and foster strong partnerships with internal and external stakeholders. Your strategic insight will drive value creation, risk mitigation, and commercial excellence to support the company's ambitious growth plans.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Develop and execute comprehensive commercial strategies aligned with the company's objectives and projects
* Lead contracting processes including negotiation, drafting, and finalizing complex agreements with vendors, partners, and service providers
* Oversee contract administration ensuring compliance, performance tracking, and risk mitigation throughout the contract lifecycle
* Collaborate closely with legal, finance, and project teams to deliver seamless commercial operations
* Manage and mentor the commercial team to achieve high performance and professional development
* Monitor industry trends and market conditions to identify opportunities and threats, providing strategic recommendations
* Prepare and present regular reports and insights to executive leadership and stakeholders
* Ensure adherence to corporate governance, procurement policies, and regulatory requirements


**Requirements**
**Qualifications and Experience:**
* Bachelor's degree in Quantity Surveying, Finance, Law, Engineering, or a related discipline; MBA or equivalent advanced degree preferred
* Minimum 15 years of progressive experience in commercial management, contract negotiation, and strategic sourcing, preferably within large\-scale infrastructure, entertainment, or investment sectors
* Proven track record of leading complex commercial negotiations and managing high\-value contracts
* Strong leadership skills with experience managing and developing diverse teams
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management abilities
* Sound knowledge of procurement processes, commercial frameworks, and compliance standards
* Ability to operate effectively in a fast\-paced, multi\-cultural environment and adapt to changing priorities


**Benefits**
 Comprehensive benefits package

data.title: Senior Director - Commercial - Transport DMO 20003762 CDU8
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Overview**
 The Senior Director \- Commercial for Transport DMO at Qiddiya Investment Company is responsible for leading the commercial management and strategic procurement functions within the Transport DMO. This role ensures effective commercial oversight, contract administration, and procur
data.jd_text:
**Job Overview**
 The Senior Director \- Commercial for Transport DMO at Qiddiya Investment Company is responsible for leading the commercial management and strategic procurement functions within the Transport DMO. This role ensures effective commercial oversight, contract administration, and procurement strategies that align with the organization's objectives to deliver transport infrastructure projects successfully.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the development and implementation of commercial strategies related to transport projects, ensuring alignment with business objectives and governance frameworks
* Manage contract administration activities, including negotiation, execution, change management, claims, and close\-out processes
* Oversee procurement activities, ensuring competitive sourcing, value for money, and compliance with internal policies and relevant regulations
* Drive cost management and budgeting processes to support project delivery within approved financial parameters
* Collaborate with project delivery, finance, legal, and risk teams to mitigate commercial risks and resolve issues promptly
* Develop and maintain commercial frameworks, policies, procedures, and templates tailored to transport projects
* Provide leadership, coaching, and mentoring to commercial and procurement teams to enhance performance and capability
* Ensure robust reporting and governance through regular updates to senior management and executive stakeholders
* Engage with external stakeholders, including contractors, suppliers, and regulators, to maintain strong commercial relationships
* Identify and implement continuous improvements in commercial processes and practices


**Requirements**
**Education**
* Bachelor's degree in Commercial Management, Business Administration, Engineering, Transport Management, or related field
* Postgraduate qualifications (Masters or MBA) preferred


**Experience And Skills**
* 15\+ years of progressive experience in commercial leadership roles within transport infrastructure or related sectors
* Strong expertise in contract administration, procurement strategy, and commercial risk management
* Proven track record managing complex transport projects, preferably within large infrastructure or governmental organizations
* Demonstrated leadership and team management capabilities
* Excellent negotiation, communication, and stakeholder management skills
* Experience working within stringent governance and compliance frameworks
* Ability to drive cost control and value optimization strategies
* Strong problem\-solving skills and commercial acumen


**Benefits**
 Comprehensive benefits package

data.raw_snippet: Turner \& Townsend is a global professional services company with over 22,000 people in more than 60 countries. Working with our clients across real estate, infrastructure, energy and natural resources, we transform together delivering outcomes that improve people’s lives. Working in partnership mak
data.jd_text:
Turner \& Townsend is a global professional services company with over 22,000 people in more than 60 countries. Working with our clients across real estate, infrastructure, energy and natural resources, we transform together delivering outcomes that improve people’s lives. Working in partnership makes it possible to deliver the world’s most impactful projects and programmes as we turn challenge into opportunity and complexity into success.
   

  





  

  

 Our capabilities include programme, project, cost, asset and commercial management, controls and performance, procurement and supply chain, net zero and digital solutions.
   

  

 We are majority\-owned by CBRE Group, Inc., the world’s largest commercial real estate services and investment firm, with our partners holding a significant minority interest. Turner \& Townsend and CBRE work together to provide clients with the premier programme, project and cost management offering in markets around the world.
   

  





  

  

  

  




**Job Description**

  

  





**The role**




 This role will lead the project, championing the evolving operation of the project office, to ensure all the required support services to enable the effective management of the project are implemented. This role will assure the overall integrity and coherence of the project execution, supporting the client and key stakeholders in their decision\-making to ensure that the delivery of the project is optimised.
   

  





 It is expected that the Project Director will have the gravitas to successfully influence at all levels across both internal and external stakeholders.
   

  





 The functional leads will report directly to the Project Director.
   

  





  

  





**Key responsibilities**



* Accountable for leading, coaching and developing the project team, ensuring that activities support delivery of the client’s strategic objectives and add value to the business.
* Accountable for ensuring that the client discharges its regulatory obligations in relation to the project to ensure that capital investments are delivered demonstrably efficiently and with appropriate consultation.
* Accountable for developing and deploying effective and consistent working practises and standards which support delivery of the project (e.g. Risk, Schedule, Cost, Quality), aligned to Turner \& Townsend Best Practice. Provide capability support including training, coaching and independent assurance.
* Accountable for the assurance and scrutiny of the project through the gateway process and ensuring that all investments have robust business cases, and that investments deliver demonstrable capital efficiency.
* Accountable for the baseline integrity and for the provision of relevant, timely and accurate management information to inform effective decision making for an optimised investment.
* Accountable for the effective and efficient deployment of resources across the project.



  

  





  

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

  

  





  

  




* Strong
 **Data Centre** 
 experience
* Minimum of 20\+ years' experience in project management
* Bachelor’s degree in architecture, engineering, construction management or a relevant field
* Recognised Project Management qualifications
* Professionally qualified or equivalent. Preferably strong Portfolio, Programme, Project and Risk Management skills or strategy/business planning strengths to ensure the integrity of the project.
* A strong and inspiring leader, able to create a clear vision for the future, build a strong high performing team, engaging and motivating others to follow and pursue that vision.
* Proven track record of planning and implementing major projects, with experience of delivering in an operational environment with complex stakeholders.
* Experienced in solution development (or design) of complex projects of all types, especially complex construction projects.
* An effective problem solver, with a track record of applying a challenging and analytical approach to complex issues and developing innovative yet pragmatic solutions.


**Additional Information**

 Join our social media conversations for more information about Turner \& Townsend and our exciting future projects:
   

  





 Twitter
   

  





 Instagram
   

  





 LinkedIn
   

  




  


*It is strictly against Turner \& Townsend policy for candidates to pay any fee in relation to our recruitment process. No recruitment agency working with Turner \& Townsend will ask candidates to pay a fee at any time.*




*Any unsolicited resumes/CVs submitted through our website or to Turner \& Townsend personal e\-mail accounts, are considered property of Turner \& Townsend and are not subject to payment of agency fees. In order to be an authorised Recruitment Agency/Search Firm for Turner \& Townsend, there must be a formal written agreement in place and the agency must be invited, by the Recruitment Team, to submit candidates for review.*

data.title: Corporate Excellence Manager
data.company: Mfaheem Al Emar for Trading and Contracting Company
data.raw_snippet:
**Corporate Excellence Manager** 




 The role involves developing and implementing strategies to drive operational excellence and improve business performance. Leading and driving organizational excellence initiatives across construction projects, engineering functions, and corporate departments t
data.jd_text:
**Corporate Excellence Manager** 




 The role involves developing and implementing strategies to drive operational excellence and improve business performance. Leading and driving organizational excellence initiatives across construction projects, engineering functions, and corporate departments to ensure alignment with company strategy, operational efficiency, and high\-quality project delivery.
 



 Report to: CEO
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Responsible for designing, implementing, and governing the company's performance management, quality, HSE, risk, and continuous improvement systems across all construction projects, engineering functions, and corporate departments
* Ensures the entire organization operates according to world\-class excellence standards and aligns with corporate strategy
* Lead the corporate strategic planning process and track execution progress
* Develop, deploy, and govern Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) across the organization — including project\-level metrics such as schedule adherence, cost variance, productivity, HSE, and quality
* Manage performance management systems for projects and departments
* Maintain, and continuously improve Quality Management Systems (ISO 9001\)
* Oversee compliance with HSE Management Systems (ISO 45001 and ISO 14001\) through audits and performance monitoring
* Lead internal audits across all projects and departments to ensure adherence to policies, procedures, and industry standards
* Develop governance frameworks, policies, and standard operating procedures for organizational effectiveness
* Oversee enterprise risk management frameworks, ensuring project risks are integrated into the corporate risk profile
* Lead readiness for external audits, certifications, and excellence assessments (e.g., EFQM, Baldrige, or client excellence awards)
* Drive enterprise\-wide continuous improvement initiatives to enhance project delivery, engineering quality, and corporate efficiency
* Analyze organizational and project performance data using tools like Power BI to identify trends, risks, and improvement opportunities
* Promote a culture of excellence, accountability, and continuous improvement across all business units
* Support digital transformation initiatives related to performance management, reporting, and governance systems (e.g., ERP, dashboards, project management software)
* Prepare executive\-level reports with actionable insights for the CEO.
* Collaborate with the PMO and project management teams to ensure alignment with corporate excellence standards and performance frameworks
* Provide governance and oversight to ensure project controls (planning, cost control, risk) are functioning effectively



  
 



**Qualifications \& Experience:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in engineering (Civil / Industrial preferred) or Business Administration.
* Master’s degree is an advantage.
* 10\+ years of experience in construction, engineering, or contracting environments.
* Proven experience in organizational excellence, performance management, or quality governance (not purely project execution roles).
* Strong understanding of project management frameworks (PMO, planning, cost control) from a governance and oversight perspective.
* Hands\-on experience with ISO standards (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001\).
* Experience in enterprise performance management and KPI frameworks.
* Familiarity with ERP systems and data visualization/reporting tools.



  
 



**Core Competencies:** 



* Strategic Thinking \& Governance
* Organizational Performance Management
* Data\-Driven Decision Making
* Risk \& Compliance Management
* Continuous Improvement \& Excellence Frameworks
* Policy \& Process Development
* Executive Reporting \& Insight Generation
* Influencing \& Collaboration Across Functions



  





**Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):** 



* Organization\-wide KPI alignment and reporting accuracy
* Improvement in project performance trends (time, cost, quality)
* Reduction in recurring performance issues across projects
* Compliance with governance frameworks and audit results
* Effectiveness of risk management at enterprise level
* Maturity level of organizational excellence practices
* Implementation rate of continuous improvement initiatives
* HSE and quality performance trends at corporate oversight level.

data.jd_text:

**About Our Client**
 Our client is a major development organisation delivering a globally significant, mixed‑use portfolio spanning hospitality, residential, retail and cultural assets. The organisation is recognised for scale, ambition and long‑term investment, operating with robust governance and best‑in‑class delivery standards.
   

  

**Job Description**
* Own and lead the end‑to‑end commercial strategy across multiple assets and workstreams
* Provide executive oversight of AQS teams, cost consultants and commercial advisors
* Sign off cost plans, estimates and BOQs at key gateways and approvals stages
* Ensure cost certainty through benchmarking, value engineering and risk management
* Set procurement and contracting strategies from pre‑contract through to award
* Lead or support commercial negotiations with consultants, contractors and partners
* Establish and enforce commercial controls, reporting and governance frameworks
* Partner with development, delivery, legal and finance teams to support decision‑making
* Act as senior commercial authority to the executive team and board


**The Successful Applicant**
* Senior commercial leader with experience on large‑scale, complex developments
* Strong grounding across pre‑contract cost planning and post‑award commercial management
* Experience managing AQS functions, procurement strategies and contract frameworks
* Comfortable operating at board and C‑suite level with strong stakeholder gravitas
* Background in major real estate, infrastructure or destination‑scale programmes
* Middle East experience advantageous but not essential


**What's on Offer**
* Long‑term role on a career‑defining, flagship development
* Senior leadership exposure with genuine influence and authority
* Flexible working culture with focus on outcomes and accountability


**Contact: Joel Thomas**

data.title: Director & Senior Director, Public Sector (Infra, KSA)
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
**About Alvarez \& Marsal**
 Alvarez \& Marsal (A\&M) is a global consulting firm with over 11,000 entrepreneurial, action and results\-oriented professionals in over 40 countries. We take a hands\-on approach to solving our clients' problems and assisting them in reaching their pote
data.jd_text:
**Description**
**About Alvarez \& Marsal**
 Alvarez \& Marsal (A\&M) is a global consulting firm with over 11,000 entrepreneurial, action and results\-oriented professionals in over 40 countries. We take a hands\-on approach to solving our clients' problems and assisting them in reaching their potential. Our culture celebrates independent thinkers and doers who positively impact our clients and shape our industry. The collaborative environment and engaging work—guided by A\&M's core values of Integrity, Quality, Objectivity, Fun, Personal Reward, and Inclusive Diversity—are why our people love working at A\&M.
   

  

**The Team**
 The Infrastructure and Capital Projects (Infra) team focuses on improving return on investment capital and reducing the risks specific to capital projects. The Infra team is built on deep industry sector expertise with a demonstrably differentiated ability to address the most complex business problems and by supporting our owner/operator/contractor clients with the expertise of our deep project, Alvarez \& Marsal's ultimate goal is to reduce the level of uncertainty associated with the development and operational costs of your projects, contributing to greater shareholder value drawn from procurement through execution and asset management through different solutions.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute**
 A\&M continues to expand in EMEA, and we are looking to recruit a Director \& Senior Director to be based in our Riyadh office. Working with some of the industry's brightest and most experienced colleagues, you will:
   

  

* Lead the execution of project workstreams, demonstrating expertise and identifying opportunities for process improvement within the assigned tasks.
* Conduct meetings and presentations with clients, as well as internal managerial and executive stakeholders, showcasing proficiency and confidence in discussing project matters.
* Collaborate with teams and clients, engaging in negotiations and fostering effective partnerships between leadership.
* Develop and nurture client relationships, seeking to understand their needs and contributing to their satisfaction.
* Participate in industry events and associations to broaden professional connections and identify potential growth avenues.
* Contribute to the identification and pursuit of new business prospects, aligned with the strategic goals of Infra and other Business Units.
* Drive project analyses, propose actionable plans, and exhibit strong decision\-making capabilities.
* Demonstrate leadership qualities while effectively guiding project delivery.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's or master’s degree in business administration, Engineering, or a related field.
* Proven experience in project management and business development, ideally within consulting or related industries.
* 8\+ years experience within public sector large scale projects experience is necessary.
* Arabic language skills is required
* Strong interpersonal and communication skills, capable of articulating ideas to diverse audiences.
* Willingness to travel as required.
* Demonstrated ability to analyze complex situations and develop solutions, emphasizing creativity and critical thinking.
* Self\-starter with strong business acumen and a results\-driven approach.
* Ability to adapt and thrive in a dynamic, fast\-paced environment.
* Collaborative and team\-oriented mindset.
* Effective verbal and written communication skills for interactions with senior management, clients, and colleagues.
* Entrepreneurial mindset with ambition and risk appetite.
* Exceptional analytical and problem\-solving capabilities.
* Developing client management skills and aptitude for business development and negotiation.
* Thrives in a high\-energy, fast\-paced, and dynamic culture.


**Your journey at A\&M**
 We recognize that our people are the driving force behind our success, which is why we prioritize an employee experience that fosters each person’s unique professional and personal development. Our robust performance development process promotes continuous learning, rewards your contributions, and fosters a culture of meritocracy. With top\-notch training and on\-the\-job learning opportunities, you can acquire new skills and advance your career.
   

  

 We prioritize your well\-being, providing benefits and resources to support you on your personal journey. Our people consistently highlight the growth opportunities, our unique, entrepreneurial culture, and the fun we have together as their favorite aspects of working at A\&M. The possibilities are endless for high\-performing and passionate professionals.
   

  

 Inclusive Diversity
   

  

 A\&M’s entrepreneurial culture celebrates independent thinkers and doers who can positively impact our clients and shape our industry. The collaborative environment and engaging work—guided by A\&M’s core values of Integrity, Quality, Objectivity, Fun, Personal Reward, and Inclusive Diversity—are the main reasons our people love working at A\&M. Inclusive Diversity means we embrace diversity, and we foster inclusiveness, encouraging everyone to bring their whole self to work each day. It runs through how we recruit, develop employees, conduct business, support clients, and partner with vendors. It is the A\&M way.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Employer
   

  

 It is Alvarez \& Marsal’s practice to provide and promote equal opportunity in employment, compensation, and other terms and conditions of employment without discrimination because of race, color, creed, religion, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, sex or gender, gender identity or gender expression (including transgender status), sexual orientation, marital status, military service and veteran status, physical or mental disability, family medical history, genetic information or other protected medical condition, political affiliation, or any other characteristic protected by and in accordance with applicable laws. Employees and Applicants can find A\&M policy statements and additional information by region here.
   

  

 Unsolicited Resumes from Third\-Party Recruiters
   

  

 Please note that as per A\&M policy, we do not accept unsolicited resumes from third\-party recruiters unless such recruiters are engaged to provide candidates for a specified opening. Any employment agency, person or entity that submits an unsolicited resume does so with the understanding that A\&M will have the right to hire that applicant at its discretion without any fee owed to the submitting employment agency, person or entity.

**The Project**
 Mace is providing strategic project man
data.jd_text:
Mace combines construction expertise with consultancy to unlock potential in every person or project and redefine the boundaries of ambition. Our values shape the way we consult and define the people we want to join us on our journey.
   

  

**The Project**
 Mace is providing strategic project management consultancy for major new\-build stadiums, multiple stadium redevelopments, and wider precinct transformations in Riyadh. The scope includes the delivery of new stadiums, increasing existing stadia capacity, delivering major mixed\-use amenities, and introducing robust knowledge transfer to ensure operational excellence and long\-term sustainability beyond construction.
   

  

 Leads PMO and project controls delivery across commissions and hubs, driving best\-in\-class service and team performance. Acts as subject matter expert, promoting Mace’s reputation through industry engagement, ensuring client expectations are exceeded and delivery remains competitive, innovative, and aligned with strategic goals.
   

  

**You’ll Be Responsible For**
* Leads PMO and project controls strategy and delivery across commissions and hubs.
* Acts as subject matter expert, guiding cost, schedule, risk, and reporting.
* Builds trusted client relationships and mentors high\-performing teams.
* Aligns delivery with Mace Control Centre, driving innovation, compliance and sustainability.


**You’ll Need To Have**
* Chartered status and relevant degree.
* Extensive PMO and project controls leadership experience.
* Expert in tools, data analytics, and reporting.
* Deep sector knowledge and industry engagement.
* Necessary visa criteria for the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and have relevant work experience working on high\-valued projects/programmes for a project management consultancy business, which are required for immigration and client approval.


**Our values**
**Safety first \- Going home safe and well:** 
 We champion a safe, diverse and inclusive working environment, understanding the importance of wellbeing in every team.
   

  

**Client focus \- Deliver on our promise:** 
 We own the quality of deliverables, strategic outcomes and build long term relationships with our clients.
   

  

**Integrity \- Always do the right thing:** 
 We influence positive outcomes within our industry, while always aligning with our compliance obligations.
   

  

**Create opportunity \- For our people to excel:** 
 We champion a continuous improvement culture throughout all activities, inspiring our people and teams to develop.
   

  

 Mace is an inclusive employer and welcomes interest from a diverse range of candidates. Even if you feel you do not fulfil all the criteria, please apply, as you may still be the best candidate for this role or another role within our organisation.
   

  

 We are also open to discussing part\-time, flexible, and hybrid working options if suitable within the role

This role is central to ensuring the seamless launch and ongoing operation of world\-class f
data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is actively seeking a Senior Manager \- Operational Readiness to lead and coordinate all aspects of operational preparedness for our innovative entertainment and cultural projects. This role is central to ensuring the seamless launch and ongoing operation of world\-class facilities, focusing on strategic planning, risk mitigation, and cross\-functional collaboration to deliver exceptional guest experiences.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop, implement, and continuously improve comprehensive operational readiness plans aligned with Qiddiya's strategic objectives
* Collaborate closely with project teams, operations, engineering, and stakeholder groups to integrate operational readiness considerations into project execution phases
* Lead readiness assessments to identify risks, gaps, and opportunities; develop mitigation strategies to ensure successful project launches and sustained operations
* Oversee training and development initiatives aimed at preparing staff and operational teams to meet defined performance standards
* Establish and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) related to operational readiness and performance, reporting findings and recommendations to senior leadership
* Drive continuous improvement by leveraging best practices and industry standards in operational readiness
* Champion a guest\-focused approach throughout all operational readiness efforts to enhance the overall visitor experience


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, Hospitality, or a related field; Master's degree preferred
* Minimum of 7 years' experience in operational management or readiness, including at least 3 years in a senior leadership role, preferably within the entertainment or large\-scale infrastructure sectors


**Benefits**
 Comprehensive benefits package
