data.title: Manager - Content Delivery
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description**
 Saatchi \& Saatchi is a leading global communications and advertising network known for its impactful creative ideas that generate powerful emotional connections between consumers and brands. Present in over 67 countries, Saatchi \& Saatchi employs 6,500 professionals over 1
data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
 Saatchi \& Saatchi is a leading global communications and advertising network known for its impactful creative ideas that generate powerful emotional connections between consumers and brands. Present in over 67 countries, Saatchi \& Saatchi employs 6,500 professionals over 114 offices. Global clients include HSBC, P\&G, Toyota, Visa and GSK. Saatchi \& Saatchi is part of Publicis Communications a key division of Publicis Groupe, the world’s third largest communications group.
   

  

**Overview**
 Work with wider team and client to handle day\-to\-day operations of client’s social activity.
   

  

 Key responsibilities include gathering insights to supercharge social ideas, recommending and managing social activity (and calendar) and delivering best\-in\-class social content
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Technical \& Product**
* Write, edit, and proofread content (captions) in both Arabic and English
* Vary copywriting voice, style, and other characteristics demanded by industry, target audience, social platform, and objective
* Publish content across different social media channels
* Set up social listening monitors \& conduct regular social listening exercises
* Perform quality assurance of community management and provide recommendations to client to improve community management response
* Create monthly competitive reports by monitoring social media activity of competition
* Track social content performance on the different channels and formulate monthly reports
* Assemble creative briefs for creative teams, within social media specifications


**Business Acumen \& Operational Efficiency**
* Engage with client stakeholders on daily basis
* Maintain up\-to\-date knowledge of content and technology trends
* Execute projects with excellence
* Maintain positive relationships with all partners and teammates


 Innovative \& Analytical Mindset
   

  

* Report on and analyse competitor and brand activity
* Synthesise social sentiment for takeaways on brand perception
* Suggest ways to leverage latest content and technology trends to clients’ benefit
* Propose fresh ideas for social content


**Qualifications**
* 2\-4 years professional experience in similar role
* Bachelor’s degree in communication, journalism, business, or related field
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Experience with social listening tools
* Bi\-lingual \- Arabic and English fluency is a must
* Highly computer literate
* Knowledge of the different social media platforms and post formats


**Additional Information**
 R\-3597L\-1137

* Lead client conversations and work closely with Business Lead(s) to ensure excellence in strategy, creative
* and production.
* Oversee strategy, planning, creative execution, production for all assigned client accounts. Responsible
* for winning client commitment to the agency and Group’s direction, strategy, recommendations, and
* subsequent execution, translating business needs to creative challenges and ensuring a timely delivery
* milestone.
* Perceived as a trusted advisor by your own clients and as an expert in specific industry, internally and in the
* market, by demonstrating deep understanding and knowledge of category.
* Be able to define the correct scope, the needed resources and deliver accordingly to financial targets for the
* current year.
* Support in business development reports alongside other senior agency stakeholders and engage relevant
* group resources when appropriate.


**Business Acumen \& Operational Efficiency**
* Responsible of all outcomes, quality control and the health of the relationship with the client across all
* disciplines, practices, facets of the business internal and external.
* Build strong client relationships to understand the needs and requirements to proactively support the
* day\-to\-day delivery of projects.
* Set the yearly strategic roadmap with the client on business transformation by becoming the trusted
* consultant and authority on the client’s consumer journey.
* Ensure that the brand strategy, client messaging and deliverables (from planning to roll out) are consistent.
* Serve in a brand guardian role.
* Responsible for the smooth operating of day\-to\-day workstreams and foster positive collaboration between
* senior team members, strategy \& creative colleagues, and all other experts to facilitate smooth process and
* project management delivery.
* Lead your team on all plans (check and upload from markets), ensuring the process is running timely and
* efficiently.
* Drive business transformation and innovation for clients.
* Drives integration and interdependence across all capabilities to deliver high\-standard integrated communication solutions
* Capable of breaking down silos to enable collaboration across different Groupe verticals and practices.
* Constantly aim to have award winning work delivered to get recognition for clients in their industry and
* get recognition as an industry leader in our field.
* Support other teams when pitching for clients of similar industry.
* Responsible for the management of a healthy and profitable client P\&L.
* Responsible for the commercial tracking, forecasts, and numbers ensuring no blindsides negatively affect the
* agency’s commitments.
* Inspire, mentor, and nurture the team to build capability and develop competence.


**Qualifications**
* 10 years experience with a track record in creative, brand, digital, social and data\-driven marketing projects in creative agencies, with a strong focus on healthcare communication.
* Experience in being client facing in a leading role
* Management experience of a team
* Arabic fluency is a must, as well as English
* Excellent understanding of end\-to\-end communication eco\-system, with a deep understanding of the health industry , communications trends, and latest trends in data and marketing integration.
* Experience in planning, strategy, managing and activating multichannel campaigns.
* BA degree (or similar)


**Additional Information**
 R\-3712L\-1170

data.title: PR Group Account Director - Destination, Sport, Entertainment & Culture
data.raw_snippet:
**Who We Are**
 Burson, part of WPP, is the global communications leader built to create value for clients through reputation. With highly specialized teams, industry\-leading technologies and breakthrough creative, we help brands and businesses redefine reputation as a competitive advantage so they
data.jd_text:
**Who We Are**
 Burson, part of WPP, is the global communications leader built to create value for clients through reputation. With highly specialized teams, industry\-leading technologies and breakthrough creative, we help brands and businesses redefine reputation as a competitive advantage so they can lead today and into the future. When you work at Burson, you are part of a global community of lifelong learners who thrive at the edge of innovation.
   

  

 WPP (LSE/NYSE: WPP) is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite cutting\-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world\-class creativity, next\-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel in a single company – powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open, to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit WPP.com
   

  

 For more information visit bursonglobal.com and follow us on LinkedIn and Instagram.
   

  

**More About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly experienced and dynamic Riyadh\-based PR Group Account Director (or Account Director) to join our Destination, Sport, Entertainment \& Culture team. In this pivotal role, you will lead high\-impact public relations initiatives for some of the region's most significant and exciting projects. You will be responsible for driving strategic client relations, fostering robust media engagement across the Arabic media landscape, and providing exemplary leadership to your team.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Lead the development and execution of strategic PR and communications plans, overseeing integrated campaigns across destination, sport, entertainment, and culture sectors.
* Cultivate and manage strong client relationships, leading regular meetings, handling ongoing requests, and ensuring the timely delivery of high\-quality outputs.
* Develop and own deep relationships with key Arabic media contacts, including journalists and editors, to drive proactive and reactive media engagement and secure impactful coverage.
* Oversee the strategic planning and flawless execution of all media FAM trips, coordinating closely with KSA Account Executives for logistical support.
* Craft compelling briefing documents, media briefs, key messages, and background materials, ensuring alignment with client strategic narratives and media positioning.
* Provide expert on\-ground communications support for major events, launches, and press engagements, ensuring seamless coordination with media and stakeholders.
* Monitor and analyze campaign performance, timelines, and deliverables to ensure successful execution, strategic alignment, and measurable outcomes.
* Lead, guide, and mentor the KSA team, fostering clear accountability, efficient project delivery, and consistent quality control across all client deliverables.


**Experience That Contributes To Success**
* Proven experience as an Account Director or Group Account Director within a public relations agency setting.
* Extensive and demonstrable background in public relations within the destination, sport, entertainment, or culture sectors.
* Strong media relations expertise, with a particular focus on and established connections within the Arabic media landscape.
* Exceptional ability to develop and produce high\-quality Arabic content and compelling communication materials.
* Fully bilingual proficiency in both written and spoken Arabic and English is essential.
* Demonstrated leadership skills, with a track record of effectively guiding, mentoring, and overseeing PR teams.
* A strong portfolio showcasing successful strategic planning, integrated campaign management, and client relationship excellence.
* Practical experience in providing on\-ground communications support and managing press engagements for high\-profile events.


**You Belong At Burson**
 Our vision is for Burson to be the leading ‘academy company’ for creative communications professionals and emerging leaders. We provide a dynamic environment where ambitious colleagues come to elevate their skills, expand their networks, and ultimately, produce the best solutions for today’s leading brands. Our commitment to your growth is reflected in our robust benefits and people programs, which include professional development opportunities, mentorship programs with industry leaders, a vibrant and inclusive company culture fostering collaboration and innovation and packages designed to reward and retain top talent. We invest in our people because we believe their success is our success.
   

  

 At Burson, we’re an agency of learn\-it\-alls. We recognize that the things we do best, creativity and communications, require a level of nuanced understanding. That’s why it’s imperative for us to hire extraordinarily talented people of all backgrounds and identities. Without that we can’t do the essential work of inspiring bold ideas, fostering constructive dialogue, cultivating meaningful experiences, and driving innovation and creativity for our partners. Your unique point of view—your talent—is what makes you a \#BursonPerson, and it’s how we deliver exceptional results for our clients, together.
   

  

 We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.
   

  

 When you click the "Submit Application" button below, this will send any information you add below to Burson. Before you do this, we think it's a good idea to read through our  Recruitment Privacy Policy. California residents should read our  California Recruitment Privacy Notice. This explains what we do with your personal data when you apply for a role with us, and, how you can update the information you have provided us with or how to remove it.

data.title: Product Delivery Manager - Offer Optimization
data.raw_snippet: Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub \- a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100
data.jd_text:
Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub \- a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 destinations.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Are you a delivery\-focused technical leader with a passion for building next generation airline retailing capabilities?
   

  

 We are seeking a driven product delivery manager to oversee the operational delivery, integration, and readiness of Riyadh Air’s Offer Management platforms.
   

  

 In this role, you will guide the end to end execution of critical retailing capabilities, ensure alignment with digital and commercial strategies, and lead cross functional squads and vendors to deliver reliable, scalable, and future ready systems.
   

  

 You will manage the rollout of NDC compliant workflows and implement key offer Management functions such as continuous pricing, offer construction, optimization, order servicing, refunds, and disruption handling.
   

  

 You are expected to translate strategic roadmaps into clear delivery plans, establish operational readiness criteria, and ensure smooth technical integrations across multiple platforms.
   

  

 A core part of this role includes maintaining delivery discipline, managing risks and dependencies, coordinating Agile ceremonies, enforcing quality controls, and ensuring stable releases that meet Riyadh Air’s performance and SLA expectations.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to influence Riyadh Air’s commercial technology foundation and play a leading role in shaping a world class retailing ecosystem for one of the industry’s most ambitious airline startups.
   

  

**About You**
 Degree qualified, you will bring at least 8 years’ experience in enterprise product delivery or technology delivery, ideally within the airline or travel domain. Experience working with PSS transformation (Amadeus, Sabre, or similar) and Passenger Revenue Management platforms (PROS, Amadeus NRMS, Sabre RO) is highly desirable.
   

  

 You are expected to airline merchandising engines, ancillaries, bundling, and competitor pricing capabilities. Strong experience coordinating cross functional teams, managing vendors, and delivering technically complex integrations is essential.
   

  

 You will excel at converting strategy into structured delivery plans, maintaining RAID governance, driving Agile execution, and ensuring operational readiness across multiple delivery streams. Experience in managing technical checkpoints, quality gates, and integration dependencies will be key.
   

  

 Your ability to collaborate effectively, communicate clearly, manage complexity, and consistently deliver high quality outcomes will set you up for success in this role.
   

  

 This is your opportunity to shape the future of air travel. Bring your best and show us why you can own this position within Riyadh Air.
   

  

 Please submit your application by clicking on the Apply button. Our Talent Acquisition team will be reviewing applications shortly.

data.title: Senior Staff – Medical & Scientific Affairs Liaison – Infectious Diseases and Microbiology
data.raw_snippet:
**Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?**
**At Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, one of** 
**Danaher’s** 
**15\+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangi
data.jd_text:
**Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?**
**At Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, one of** 
**Danaher’s** 
**15\+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.**
**You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.**
**As a global leader in clinical diagnostics, Beckman Coulter Diagnostics has challenged convention to elevate the diagnostic laboratory’s role in improving patient health for more than 90 years. Our diagnostic solutions are used in routine and complex clinical testing, and are used in hospitals, reference and research laboratories, and physician offices around the world. Every hour around the world, more than one million tests are run on Beckman Coulter Diagnostics systems, impacting 1\.2 billion patients and more than three million clinicians per year. From uncovering the next clinical breakthrough, to rapid and reliable sample analysis, to more rigorous decision making—we are enabling clinicians to deliver the best possible care to their patients with improved efficiency, clinical confidence, adaptive collaboration, and accelerated intelligence. Learn about the** 
**Danaher Business System** 
**which makes everything possible.**
**The Senior Staff – Medical \& Science Affairs Liaison– Infectious Diseases and Microbiology primarily develop and executes on medical and scientific education for the Infectious Disease and Microbiology Disease area. The staff MSL also contributes to important Medical and Scientific initiatives such as fostering KOL relationships, participates in scientific advisory boards, sustaining of scientific and clinical studies and providing field intelligence to internal teams. This is a vital role that serves as a medical liaison between Beckman Coulter Diagnostics and the academic/clinical community, strengthening and supporting advancements in and utilization of Infectious Disease and Microbiology diagnostics. Primary responsibilities include contributing to medical and scientific education, training and engagement strategy, developing and cultivating strong relationships with key opinion leaders (KOLs) and healthcare professionals, identifying unmet needs and scientific gaps in medical research, providing insights into clinical practice paradigms and development and delivery medical and scientific education for Infectious Disease and Microbiology products.**
**This position reports to the Senior Director, Medical \& Scientific Affairs – Infectious Diseases and Microbiology and is part of the Medical \& Scientific Affairs organization, a team of medical specialists dedicated to all medical aspects of safe and effective in vitro diagnostics across therapeutic areas.**
**This role may be fully remote in designated territory, working remotely to cover a global business area. Beckman Coulter has a major site presence in South Florida, Southern California, Hebron Kentucky, and Minneapolis Minnesota, as well as major hubs in Europe and Asia.**
**In This Role, You Will Have The Opportunity To**
* Support development and implementation of strategic engagement plans to build relationships with KOLs, Infectious Disease providers and other stakeholders, and medical societies in the Infectious Disease and Microbiology field
* Support development and implementation of strategic education and training plans for internal and external stakeholders
* Assist with execution and maintenance of clinical study and research initiatives
* Act as a scientific authority and engage in scientific exchange for Infectious Disease and Microbiology, streamlining complex scientific information and delivering medical and scientific education and training to internal and external collaborators
* Stay current on Infectious Disease and Microbiology clinical practice trends and diagnostic innovation, prepare materials for presentations, and participate in scientific symposia, conferences, and educational programs


**The Essential Requirements Of The Job Include**
* Bachelor’s degree with 14\+ years of experience or Master’s/Doctoral degree with 12\+ years of experience in the relevant therapeutic area required. Minimum of 5 or more years of experience in a Medical Affairs/Medical Science Liaison role or clinical practice preferred.
* Extensive knowledge of clinical and laboratory practice in the testing, diagnosis and treatment of infectious diseases.
* Strong understanding of clinical research methodologies, regulatory or laboratory standards guidelines and medical terminology.
* Proven track record to establish and maintain relationships with KOLs, providers, laboratorians and other healthcare professionals.
* Excellent interpersonal, communication and presentation skills, with the ability to effectively communicate complex scientific concepts to both scientific and non\-scientific audience.


**Travel, Motor Vehicle Record \& Physical/Environment Requirements**
* Ability to travel a minimum 20\-25% of the time (domestic and international)


**It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience in:**
* 10\+ years of domain knowledge of healthcare technologies and clinical practice trends
* 8\+ years’ MSL experience working in the medical technology, medical device, or IVD industry in Medical and Scientific or Clinical Affairs roles
* Advanced degrees: PhD, MPH, PharmD, RN , MHA or similar


 Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real\-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.
   

  

 For more information, visit www.danaher.com.

data.raw_snippet:
**Title**
 Planning Manager
   

  

**Job Purpose**
 The
 **Project Controls Manager \- Planning** 
 plays a crucial role in the successful execution of a portfolio of Programmes, Districts, Mega Projects and Projects. They oversee and manage all aspects of Performance and Reporting ensuring effect
data.jd_text:
**Title**
 Planning Manager
   

  

**Job Purpose**
 The
 **Project Controls Manager \- Planning** 
 plays a crucial role in the successful execution of a portfolio of Programmes, Districts, Mega Projects and Projects. They oversee and manage all aspects of Performance and Reporting ensuring effective large volume data management, baselining, quality assured progress outputs, forecasts, trends and monitoring to drive and achieve both innovative and established goals within scope, budget, time, quality and risk management constraints.
   

  

 The role requires a comprehensive understanding of Project Management principles, exceptional leadership skills and a deep knowledge of Engineering, Procurement and Construction (EPC) processes. The unique construct of the KBR delivery environment focusses the need for an ability to collaborate with a wide range of key stakeholders at Executive, Client, Programme, Project and Supply Chain level, and more broadly across industry.
   

  

 Reporting to the Project Controls Director, the
 **Project Controls Manager \- Planning** 
 is responsible for every aspect of planning for the Programme, including integration, collaboration and liaison internally with KBR Teams, with the wider Client Project Controls Team, Client Delivery and Developments Teams, Design, PMO and PMC Teams and all Supply Chain Teams to ensure that success factors, requirements and expectations are always surpassed.
   

  

**Project Description**
 The Diriyah Gate project, located on the Western outskirts of Riyadh, is a 7\.1 million square\-metre major infrastructure programme and mixed\-use development aiming to be a global landmark, recognized for its unique vision and position as an authentic destination in Riyadh. The Diriyah Gate community will be a distinct, self\-sustaining hub for Riyadh offering a wide range of iconic assets. KBR provide Project Management Consultancy Services in Project Controls, Project Planning, Design and Engineering Management, as well as implementation of development and early works packages.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* To be accountable for defining and maintaining the schedules, metrics and information framework, including the establishment of planning standards, policies, procedures, protocols and systems to facilitate efficient and effective Project Management and Execution.
* Provide leadership, guidance, and mentoring to the Planning Team. Foster a collaborative and high\-performance work environment, promoting continuous learning and professional development. Lead Performance and Reporting resources at Programme level and resources and Teams embedded within Projects.
* To be accountable for best\-in\-class and innovative quality, timeliness and consistency of scheduling work produced by the Planning Team.
* To be accountable for providing leadership and insight on interdependencies, baselines, trends, forecasts and performance, along with Subject Matter Expert (SME) advice to Senior Leaders in managing the successful delivery of KBR Programme and Projects. Leads the development and implementation of Performance and Reporting strategies aligned with organizational objectives, ensuring effective Performance and Reporting practices are established and followed throughout the Project Lifecycle.
* To be accountable for supporting, challenging and influencing Senior Leaders to ensure ‘best for KBR and Client’ decisions and to be accountable for ensuring that the vertical Supply Chain, at all levels, develop and deliver Performance Reports in accordance with leadership requirements. Work with leaders across KBR and Clients to highlight trends and performance insights.
* To be accountable for leading and coordinating scheduling activities within the Supply Chain, development and delivery areas to assure the accuracy and quality of information being captured across all functional, Programme and Project disciplines.
* To be accountable for providing strategic analysis of the schedules submitted and provide insights, trends on performance and risks to support decision making and to provide periodic project performance updates to key Senior Stakeholders, with key strategic insights and trends to support development and delivery trade off decisions.
* To be accountable for the specific timely, accurate, comprehensive, quality assured and delivery of all schedules contained within the Project Controls Performance and Reporting daily, weekly, monthly and ad\-hoc cadence.
* To be accountable for the comprehensive collection, analysis, assessment and reporting of date, metrics and information across Planning and Scheduling, Estimating, Budget and Cost Control, Commercial, Financial, Risk Management, Change Management, Project Management Information Systems, Document Control, BIM and Digital Transformation, Design, Technical and Procurement capabilities and disciplines within the KBR Team, Client Teams, Consultant Programme Teams and Supply Chain.
* Establish and enforce governance and quality control measures to ensure adherence to Programme specifications, industry standards and regulatory requirements. Implement robust assurance processes to identify and resolve quality issues promptly.
* Integrate with the Information Management \& Technology Leads, and Project Controls Leads, establish Programme and Project wide Digital Strategies and identify, establish, implement and manage software, tools, controls systems, workflows, processes and tools.
* Coordinate with Functional Teams to ensure appropriate identification, onboarding and allocation of resources, including personnel, equipment, and materials, to support Project Execution. Optimize resource utilization to maximize efficiency and productivity. Manage resource performance and attrition.
* Undertake self\-assessment of procedural compliance and sharing lessons learnt, and best practice within the Project Planning community.
* Actively promote and support and comply with all organisational initiatives, policies and procedures.


**Technical Skills**
* The Project Controls Manager \- Planning will be an expert level developer, implementor and manager of Planning systems (P6\), capable of transforming large volume raw data into meaningful, logical, interactive and user\-friendly schedules. Specifically, the Project Controls Manager \- Planning will be an expert level implementor and manager of schedules, data imports, data analytics, data manipulation and building data visualisations and reports.
* A demonstrable ability to implement, manage and control best\-in\-class solutions, processes and delivery within the Performance and Reporting capability.
* Comprehensive knowledge and understanding of Programme management innovation, principles, practices, and methodologies.
* Proficiency in the use of Project Control and Project Management tools and software relating to Performance and Reporting, including but not limited to: Primavera P6, Microsoft Project, Data Analysis and Reporting systems, Risk Management tools (facilitating and analysing), Cost Management systems, Estimating systems, Electronic Document Management Systems (EDMS).
* Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to anticipate and mitigate Project risks and capitalise on Project opportunities.
* Exceptional leadership and communication skills, with the ability to influence and engage stakeholders at all levels.
* Strong organizational and time management abilities, with the capacity and ability to manage multiple projects and large Teams simultaneously.
* Knowledge and understanding of relevant industry standards, regulations and best practice.


**Experience, Skills And Knowledge Requirements**
* Essential: Degree (BSc, BA, BEng) level professional qualification in Project Management, Project Controls or Engineering disciplines, or equivalent experience.
* Essential: A minimum of 15 years of relevant industry and Planning or Project Controls, experience with proven, extensive and demonstrable experience in Project Controls within the Engineering, Procurement and Construction (EPC) industry, with a track record of successfully delivering complex and high value Programmes, Mega Projects and Projects.
* Essential: A minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in similar volume Programme and Projects and a minimum of 5 years of Middle East regional experience, managing and working with diverse Teams and people.
* Essential: Membership of a role appropriate cognate Professional Institute or recognised Certificates of Learning and Competence.
* Essential: A high standard of spoken and written English.
* Essential: A commitment to future learning and education in industry innovation, development and change with a demonstrable recent record of Continued Professional Development (CPD).


**R2105658**

data.jd_text:

**About Our Client**
 A government‑backed organisation delivering one of Middle East's large‑scale development programmes. The organisation works with global contractors, consultants and investors on projects of national significance.
   

  

**Job Description**
* Lead and manage complex construction disputes, claims and arbitrations
* Draft, review and negotiate settlement agreements and dispute documentation
* Advise on contractual risk across major construction and development projects
* Support PPP, joint venture and consortium arrangements from a legal perspective
* Work closely with senior leadership, project teams and external counsel
* Provide pragmatic legal input during live project execution
* Contribute to dispute avoidance strategies and claims management processes


**The Successful Applicant**
* 4\-6 years' post‑qualification experience in contentious construction law
* Background in a well‑regarded private practice law firm within the GCC
* Strong experience handling construction claims, disputes and arbitrations
* Exposure to large‑scale development or infrastructure projects
* Solid understanding of contractual risk management and dispute resolution
* Familiarity with KSA regulations and relevant Sharia law principles
* Admitted or eligible to practise in a Commonwealth jurisdiction


**What's On Offer**
* Exposure to globally recognised, landmark development projects
* Competitive package with long‑term career progression
* Senior role with influence across legal and commercial strategy


**Contact: Matt Jones**

data.title: Senior Project Manager - Land Development
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 We are seeking a highly qualified and experienced Senior Project Manager with a strong technical background in infrastructure and/or master planning to lead and oversee complex Land Development projects within our organisation. The role will have a focus on KSA projects, either
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 We are seeking a highly qualified and experienced Senior Project Manager with a strong technical background in infrastructure and/or master planning to lead and oversee complex Land Development projects within our organisation. The role will have a focus on KSA projects, either based in KSA or in UAE with a requirement for periodic travel to KSA to meet project requirements.
   

  

 The successful candidate will have extensive project management experience as well as a strong technical understanding in Land Development disciplines (master planning, infrastructure, transport planning, landscaping, sustainability). The ideal candidate will possess Middle East experience with the knowledge, skills and expertise to lead multi\-disciplinary land development teams and drive internationally significant Land development projects from inception to completion.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Project Leadership – Lead and manage Land Development Projects (Master Planning, Transport Planning, Roads, Utilities, Landscape), ensuring alignment with Client objectives and regulatory requirements
* Team Management – Build and lead cross\-functional project teams, providing guidance, mentorship and motivation to team members to achieve project goals
* Client Interaction – Cultivate and maintain strong client relationships, understand their needs and ensure project deliverables meet or exceed client expectations whilst aligning with project budgets
* Cost and Resource Management \- Develop project budgets, monitor and control expenditures, and allocate resources efficiently to optimise project outcomes
* Risk Management \- Identify potential project risks and develop mitigation strategies to ensure project success
* Scope and Schedule Management \- Develop a work breakdown structure for the project, create schedules, monitor and control project progress against schedule. Ensure scope and deliverables are well defined. Ensure variance and scope creep are identified and that change is adequately documented and managed
* Quality Management \- Manage and control quality on the project by implementing WSP processes and templates and instilling and maintaining a quality culture across the project.
* Procurement Management \- Apply commercial and legal acumen (with the contributions of support functions) to manage procurement activities on the project, ensuring Main Agreement Execution, Change Control and supplier / subcontractor appointments,
* Stakeholder and Communication Management \- Establish stakeholder and communication management plans. Ensure communication is efficiently and accurately flowing into and out of the project, in accordance with business protocols. Evaluate stakeholder power and influence and ensure relevant feedback is considered and requisite approvals sought


**Qualifications**
* Proven project management experience on large and complex Land Development projects in the Middle East
* Minimum 10 years of experience in Land Development discipline (e.g. Civil Engineering, Utilities, Roads, Transport Planning, Master Planning)
* Degree in Land Development discipline (e.g. Civil Engineering, Utilities, Roads, Transport Planning, Master Planning)


**Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.**
 Work on landmark projects around the world and embrace opportunities to make an even bigger impact in the communities you care about. What if you could do the best work of your life and create a legacy for yourself?
   

  

**With us, you can. Apply today**

data.title: Senior Project Manager (MEP) - Data Centre
data.location: Middle Oraija Dist, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
data.raw_snippet:
At Turner \& Townsend we’re passionate about making the difference. That means delivering better outcomes for our clients, helping our people to realize their potential, and doing our part to create a prosperous society.
   

  





 Every day we help our major global clients deliver ambitious and
data.jd_text:
At Turner \& Townsend we’re passionate about making the difference. That means delivering better outcomes for our clients, helping our people to realize their potential, and doing our part to create a prosperous society.
   

  





 Every day we help our major global clients deliver ambitious and highly technical projects, in over 130 countries worldwide.
   

  





 Our team is dynamic, innovative and client\-focused, supported by an inclusive and fun company culture. Our clients value our proactive approach, depth of expertise, integrity and the quality we deliver. As a result our people get to enjoy working on some of the most exciting projects in the world.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 The Senior Project Manager MEP is the interface between the Employer and the contractor and is responsible for the successful delivery of the project to the required standard and programme.
   

  





 The Senior Project Manager MEP will need to have excellent communication skills and proven abilities to manage the main contractor, sub\-contractors and the Supervision Consultant to ensure the project is delivered to the highest quality.
   

  





  

  




* Works with the Planner to ensure effective planning is carried out for Project including production of Progress/Programme Reports, Construction/Tender programs, weekly look\-ahead programs and Management of the critical path.
* Monitors Supervision Consultants performance with respect to contractor/subcontractor submittals and QA/QC and recommends corrective action when required.
* Develops and writes the schedule commentary that appears in the monthly progress and similar reports. Identifies and reports activities that have a critical or potential impact on the schedule and prepares and presents the Critical Items Action Report.
* Assist in responses to FIDIC claim notices with respect to EOT claims and in preparation of Determinations.
* Set up and control a strict regime to capture information of daily resource on site (main contractor and sub\-contractor labor, plant and materials) to help inform potential delay issues and to respond to claims, as appropriate.
* Ensure programme construction with correct logic and sequencing to meet contract requirements and constraints.
* To be aware of and maintain an understanding of the contract documents, codes of practice, standards and specifications
* Provide consistent and proactive reporting at project, delivery team and business level.
* Committed to anticipating and seeking out Client needs both internally and externally.
* Understand the financial implications of the methods and sequences of construction that are proposed and planned.
* Able to analyze and advise project teams on programme risk.
* Manage all Key Interfaces at project level.
* Ability to review and propose programme recovery strategy.
* plications of the methods and sequences of construction that are proposed and planned.



  

  





  

  





  

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

  

  




* **Must have Data Centre experience**
* Mechanical or Electrical Engineering degree essential.
* 7 \- 12 years experience
* Proven ability to perform in a technical role, possess good written and oral communication skills, and have a thorough understanding of HSEE and industry practices and regulations.
* Fully understands all elements of MEP services.
* Demonstrable experience of preparing Testing and Commissioning Plans and delivering on site.
* Demonstrable experience of delivering Real Estate and Infrastructure projects
* Computer literacy – Minimum Microsoft Office applications, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Primavera P6\.
* Demonstrable knowledge/experience of successful project delivery of complex projects with multiple interfaces.



  

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

 Turner \& Townsend is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and actively encourage applications from all sectors of the community.
   

  





 Please find out more about us at www.turnerandtownsend.com
   

  





  

  





 Join our social media conversations for more information about Turner \& Townsend and our exciting future projects:
   

  





 Twitter
   

  





 Instagram
   

  





 LinkedIn

data.raw_snippet:
**Who Is Musco**
 Musco, a privately held company since 1976, is the global leader in sports and large\-area lighting solutions, with projects in 135 countries. Headquartered in Oskaloosa, Iowa, Musco employs more than 1,900 team members worldwide.
   

  

**Team Culture and Partnerships**
 At Musc
data.jd_text:
**Who Is Musco**
 Musco, a privately held company since 1976, is the global leader in sports and large\-area lighting solutions, with projects in 135 countries. Headquartered in Oskaloosa, Iowa, Musco employs more than 1,900 team members worldwide.
   

  

**Team Culture and Partnerships**
 At Musco, we offer meaningful work in a team\-first culture with continuous learning and professional development. We value work\-life balance, providing flexibility for community involvement, family activities, and personal time. We have a generous benefit package created with the Team in mind. It includes varying health insurance plans, paid leave, profit sharing, and more!
   

  

 As supporters of recreational organizations, we help ensure safer and more enjoyable playing experiences worldwide.
   

  

**At Musco** 
***, we make it happen***
**and want you to be a part of it.**
**Primary Purpose**
 The Project Manager is responsible for leading, coordinating, and delivering construction and lighting projects across Saudi Arabia. This role covers the full project lifecycle, including engineering coordination, site execution, client management, commercial oversight, and subcontractor supervision. The PM ensures projects are delivered safely, on time, within scope, and to the highest quality standards while maintaining strong client relationships and internal alignment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Project Planning \& Coordination
* Develop and manage project schedules, milestones, and deliverables.
* Coordinate with engineering teams to ensure timely issuance of drawings, calculations, and technical documentation.
* Review BOQs, drawings, and specifications to ensure accuracy and compliance.
* Identify project risks and implement mitigation plans.
* Site Execution \& Supervision
* Lead site activities including installation, commissioning, testing, and handover.
* Manage subcontractors, ensuring compliance with scope, quality, and safety requirements.
* Conduct regular site visits across KSA to monitor progress and resolve issues.
* Ensure adherence to safety standards and site protocols.
* Client \& Stakeholder Management
* Serve as the primary point of contact for clients throughout the project lifecycle.
* Conduct progress meetings, prepare reports, and maintain transparent communication.
* Address client concerns promptly and professionally.
* Ensure client satisfaction and maintain long\-term relationships.
* Commercial \& Contractual Oversight
* Monitor project budgets, variations, and commercial risks.
* Support procurement activities and vendor coordination.
* Ensure compliance with contractual obligations and project documentation.
* Assist in preparing claims, change orders, and commercial justifications when required.
* Quality Assurance \& Documentation
* Ensure all project deliverables meet company and industry quality standards.
* Maintain accurate project records, reports, and documentation.
* Oversee testing, commissioning, and final handover packages.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Electrical or related field).
* Minimum 3–5 years of project management experience in construction, lighting, or related industries.
* Strong understanding of site execution, engineering coordination, and commercial processes.
* Valid driver’s license and willingness to travel across KSA.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* PMP certification (preferred but not mandatory).
* Experience in construction, lighting, or infrastructure projects.
* Knowledge of Saudi construction standards and regulations.


**Key Skills**
* Strong leadership and team coordination abilities.
* Excellent communication and client\-facing skills.
* Ability to read and interpret AutoCAD drawings and technical documents.
* BOQ review and quantity verification skills.
* Subcontractor and vendor management.
* Strong problem\-solving and decision\-making capabilities.
* High level of organization and attention to detail.


**Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)**
* On\-time project delivery.
* Budget adherence and variation control.
* Client satisfaction and communication quality.
* Quality of installation and compliance with standards.
* Accuracy of documentation and reporting.
* Safety performance on site.


**Work Conditions**
* Based in Riyadh with frequent travel to project sites across KSA.
* Combination of office, site, and client\-meeting environments.
* Fast\-paced, deadline\-driven project environment.

data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 We are seeking an experienced
 **Project Manager** 
 with a strong background in
 **construction supervision of infrastructure projects** 
 such as roads, highways, bridges, and tunnels. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record in
 **delivering major transportation projects** 
 within the
 **construction consultancy sector** 
 in
 **Saudi Arabia** 
 or the Gulf region. This role requires effective leadership, technical oversight, contract administration, and stakeholder coordination to ensure timely, cost\-effective, and quality project delivery.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the construction supervision team for major infrastructure projects including roads, bridges, highways, and tunnels.
* Manage day\-to\-day project operations, ensuring compliance with contract documents, specifications, quality standards, and local regulations.
* Coordinate with clients, contractors, subconsultants, and government authorities to resolve technical and contractual issues.
* Prepare and manage project schedules, monitor progress, and implement corrective actions as needed.
* Oversee quality assurance/quality control (QA/QC) and health, safety \& environmental (HSE) compliance on\-site.
* Review and approve project documentation such as method statements, shop drawings, RFIs, and technical submittals.
* Monitor contractor performance, track delays or variations, and support the preparation of change orders and claims.
* Lead progress meetings, provide regular reporting to senior management and the client.
* Ensure project milestones and deliverables are met within budget and on schedule.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Minimum 20 years of experience in construction supervision of roads, bridges, highways, and tunnels.
* At least 5 years of experience in Saudi Arabia or the GCC region in a consultancy role.
* Proven experience in managing large\-scale infrastructure projects in accordance with Saudi Arabian standards (MOT, Aramco, or other authorities).
* Strong knowledge of FIDIC or similar contract frameworks.
* Certification such as PMP (Project Management Professional) is preferred.
* Excellent communication, leadership, and client\-facing skills.
* Fluency in English is mandatory; knowledge of Arabic is an advantage.

data.title: Senior Project Manager - Data Centre
data.location: Middle Oraija Dist, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
data.raw_snippet: Turner \& Townsend is a global professional services company with over 22,000 people in more than 60 countries. Working with our clients across real estate, infrastructure, energy and natural resources, we transform together delivering outcomes that improve people’s lives. Working in partnership mak
data.jd_text:
Turner \& Townsend is a global professional services company with over 22,000 people in more than 60 countries. Working with our clients across real estate, infrastructure, energy and natural resources, we transform together delivering outcomes that improve people’s lives. Working in partnership makes it possible to deliver the world’s most impactful projects and programmes as we turn challenge into opportunity and complexity into success.
   

  





  

  

 Our capabilities include programme, project, cost, asset and commercial management, controls and performance, procurement and supply chain, net zero and digital solutions.
   

  

 We are majority\-owned by CBRE Group, Inc., the world’s largest commercial real estate services and investment firm, with our partners holding a significant minority interest. Turner \& Townsend and CBRE work together to provide clients with the premier programme, project and cost management offering in markets around the world.
   

  





  

  

  

  




**Job Description**

  

  





 The Senior Project Manager will act as the key, day to day client interface, ensuring that client objectives are met and that projects are delivered to time and cost targets and the appropriate quality, sustainability and safety standards.
   

  





 We are looking for an enthusiastic self\-motivated individual who has excellent written and verbal communication skills and who wants to make a difference to the Project Management division.
   

  





  

  





**Key Attributes and Duties:**




  

  





 You will have both a strong precontract and post contract delivery background. You will show excellent management and interpersonal skills and possess a very strong core technical skillset, an understanding of construction and commercial and contractual awareness.
   

  





 As a smart and enthusiastic Senior Project Manager you will understand the complexities of a large\-scale building projects.
   

  





 Your strong interpersonal skills and exceptional relationship management experience will enable you to effectively liaise with a diverse range of clients, sub\-contractors and key stakeholders. You are immaculately presented and possess a perceptive knowledge of the end to end project delivery lifecycle inclusive of design, procurement, permitting, construction and handover processes.
   

  





 Your proven success in delivering building projects will allow you to execute the following key responsibilities as Senior Project Manager:
   

  




* Develop and manage a suite of governance, communication and management control systems for the proper conduct and assured delivery of the client’s essential services and works.
* Review the organisation structures of the parties and recommend alignment measures.
* Monitor overall team performance and initiate any required safety or performance improvement measures and methodologies.
* Monitor and audit compliance with the requirements of the management systems and report as required.
* Continually identify any project risks, actively assign and manage mitigations as appropriate.
* Initiate and conduct weekly technical and progress meetings relating to the services and works.
* Manage any client stage gateway reviews and attainment of conditions precedent to such approvals.
* Manage the attainment of design stage deliverables to schedule and quality that may be concurrent with any fast track works package procurements and associated permitting and approvals requirements.
* Attend the site(s) as often as required to review HSSE, logistics and progress against the programme.
* Produce formal reports on project progress measured against the baseline and milestone dates and agreed project\-wide KPI’s.
* Prepare weekly, monthly and ad\-hoc reports on project progress for the Employer’s representative, prepare and conduct presentations as required.
* Manage and administer the relevant contracts affording appropriate protection of the client’s interests.
* Manage the timely issuance of company invoices and receipts against the agreed contract.



  

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

  

  





**Essential**



* **Data Centre Experience**
* Degree in architecture, engineering, construction management or an equivalent technical qualification
* Buildings sector experience
* Minimum 8 years Project Management experience



**Desirable**



* Recognised Project Management Qualification
* Membership or chartership of a recognised professional industry body, such as RICS


**Additional Information**

 Join our social media conversations for more information about Turner \& Townsend and our exciting future projects:
   

  





 Twitter
   

  





 Instagram
   

  





 LinkedIn
   

  




  


*It is strictly against Turner \& Townsend policy for candidates to pay any fee in relation to our recruitment process. No recruitment agency working with Turner \& Townsend will ask candidates to pay a fee at any time.*




*Any unsolicited resumes/CVs submitted through our website or to Turner \& Townsend personal e\-mail accounts, are considered property of Turner \& Townsend and are not subject to payment of agency fees. In order to be an authorised Recruitment Agency/Search Firm for Turner \& Townsend, there must be a formal written agreement in place and the agency must be invited, by the Recruitment Team, to submit candidates for review.*

data.title: Director Investment & Business Development - Saudi National
data.raw_snippet: Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development
data.jd_text:
Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development. Operating in 100 countries, Egis puts the expertise of its 19,500 employees at the service of its clients and develops cutting\-edge innovations accessible to all projects. Through its wide range of activities, Egis is a key player in the collective organisation of society and the living environment of citizens all over the world.
   

  





 With 3,500 employees across 8 countries in the Middle East, Egis has delivered over 700 complex development projects, stimulating economic growth and enhancing quality of life. Ranked among the top ten firms in the Middle East by Engineering News Record (ENR), Egis is committed to sustainable development. The Group’s operations in the Middle East are built on strategic acquisitions and a deep understanding of local market conditions. Egis’ long history of providing comprehensive engineering, consulting, and project management services makes it a trusted partner for regional governments, investors, and developers.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 As the Investment and Business Development Director, you will spearhead the company's efforts in identifying and capitalizing on investment opportunities for sustainable urban development projects. Drawing upon your extensive experience in investment management and your deep understanding of the engineering industry, you will lead initiatives to attract funding, secure partnerships, and drive the financial success of our projects.
   

  





 The Investment and Business Development Director will work closely with the Investment Planning Director and the team.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**
* Investment and Business Development Strategy: Develop and execute a comprehensive Business development strategy aligned with projects objectives and market dynamics.
* Opportunity Identification: Conduct in\-depth market research and feasibility studies to identify potential investment opportunities in sustainable urban development projects.
* Investor Relations: Cultivate and maintain relationships with investors, financial institutions, and other stakeholders to secure funding and support for project development.
* Due Diligence: Conduct thorough due diligence on potential investment opportunities, including financial, legal, and technical assessments, to mitigate risks and ensure investment viability.
* Deal Structuring: Lead negotiations and structuring of investment deals, including equity investments, debt financing, joint ventures, and strategic partnerships.
* Compliance and Reporting: Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and reporting standards, and provide regular updates to stakeholders on investment performance and portfolio management.
* Team Leadership: Provide leadership and guidance to the investment development team, fostering a culture of excellence, collaboration, and innovation.


**Additional Information**
* Bachelor's degree in Finance, Business Administration, or a related field; MBA or CFA designation preferred.
* Minimum of 15 years of experience in investment management, financial analysis, or corporate finance, with a focus on infrastructure or real estate investments.
* Strong understanding of investment principles, financial markets, and project finance structures.
* Proven track record of successfully sourcing, structuring, and closing investment deals, preferably in the infrastructure or real estate sector.
* Excellent analytical, quantitative, and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to assess complex investment opportunities and risks.
* Effective communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with a diverse range of stakeholders.
* Strategic thinker with a results\-oriented mindset, capable of identifying and pursuing profitable investment opportunities.
* Proficiency in financial modeling and valuation techniques; familiarity with investment analysis software is a plus.
* Fluency in English and proficiency in Arabic \- reading and writing.

data.jd_text:
Assystem is an international company with one mission: accelerate the energy transition around the world.
   

  

 Every day, our 6,500 switchers located in 12 countries (Europe, Middle East, Pacific Asia \& Africa) connect their six thousand billion neurons to tackle the task of the century: switching to low\-carbon energy.
   

  

 We are a collective committed to the actors who are making the energy switch. Sharing our knowledge, expertise and values allows us to innovate and think differently about the energy transition.
   

  

 Drawing on more than 55 years' experience in highly regulated sectors subject to strict security and safety requirements, we provide our customers with engineering and project management services, as well as digital services and solutions to optimize the performance of complex infrastructure projects throughout their life cycle. The Group is currently ranked second in the world for nuclear engineering.
   

  

 To ensure a viable, efficient, and reliable energy future for all
   

  

**Job Description**
* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of digital projects
* Define project scope, objectives, and deliverables
* Develop project plans, schedules, and budgets
* Manage project risks, issues, and change requests
* Coordinate with cross\-functional teams and stakeholders
* Ensure timely delivery and quality of project outcomes
* Monitor project performance and provide regular reports
* Manage client expectations and communication
* Oversee vendor and contractor performance
* Drive continuous improvement and digital innovation initiatives


**Qualifications**
* Ensure compliance with Quality Management System
* Maintain proper project documentation and reporting
* Promote continuous improvement practices


**Additional Information**
 We are committed to equal treatment of candidates and promote, as well as foster all forms of diversity within our company. We believe that bringing together people with different backgrounds and perspectives is essential for creating innovative and impactful solutions. Skills, talent, and our people’s ability to dare are the only things that matter !. Bring your unique contributions and help us shape the future.

data.title: BIM Manager - AlUla Project
data.raw_snippet:
Req ID: 516800
   

  

 At Alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. From high\-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. Eve
data.jd_text:
Req ID: 516800
   

  

 At Alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. From high\-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. Every day, more than 80 000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.
   

  

 Could you be the full\-time onsite BIM Manager in AlUla, SA we’re looking for?
   

  

**Your future role**
 "Take on a new challenge and apply your BIM management and engineering expertise in a new cutting\-edge field. You’ll work alongside collaborative and detail\-oriented teammates.
   

  

 You'll play a pivotal role in overseeing, organizing, and coordinating the production of BIM models, ensuring seamless integration and alignment with project requirements. Day\-to\-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business (Civil Work contractors, BIM coordinators, and Electromechanical field teams), define and implement interface control documents (ICD), and lead the enforcement of BIM best practices within Alstom teams, and much more."
   

  

 We’ll look to you for:
   

  

* Defining the interface and the Interface Control Documents (ICD) relevant to the Civil Work interfaces.,
* Developing and validating the Civil interface report that gathers all E\&M installation requirements with Civil Work entities.,
* Establishing the Civil Work integration process with contractors, including CAD manuals, Civil interface reports, CSD, and BIM rules.,
* Managing integration processes via Combined Drawings or within a BIM context in accordance with the contract and Alstom’s project experience.,
* Piloting the BIM management ramp\-up steps required for the project.,
* Leading the codification definition and metadata management with the support of the Information Manager, both internally and with Civil Work teams.,
* Organizing and coordinating Information Management for the project in collaboration with the BIM Information Manager, including reviewing information\-sharing protocols.,
* Monitoring design integration progress with the support of the CSD Manager or BIM Coordinator and ensuring BIM information is aligned with contractual terms and specifications.,
* Coordinating communication around the BIM model to ensure alignment across teams and stakeholders.,
* Supporting the construction manager in reviewing Civil Work delivery to ensure compliance with the integrated design."


**All About You**
 We value passion and attitude over experience. That’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. Instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:
   

  

* Degree in Civil Engineering, Architecture, or a related field. ,
* Experience or understanding of Building Information Modeling (BIM) processes and methodologies. ,
* Knowledge of Civil Work integration processes, including CAD standards, Combined Drawings, and BIM rules. ,
* Familiarity with Interface Control Documents (ICD) and Civil interface reports. ,
* Strong communication and stakeholder coordination skills. ,
* Proficiency in BIM software tools (e.g., Revit, Navisworks, or similar). ,
* Commitment to promoting BIM good practices and continuous improvement within teams. ,
* Problem\-solving skills with a focus on design integration and conflict resolution. ,
* Organizational skills to manage information sharing protocols and monitor project progress.


**Things you’ll enjoy**
 Join us on a life\-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. You’ll also:
   

  

* Collaborate with transverse teams and helpful colleagues ,
* Work with advanced Building Information Modeling (BIM) tools and multidisciplinary teams to ensure seamless integration and coordination of Civil Work and Electromechanical systems ,
* Progress towards becoming a key leader in driving innovation, efficiency, and excellence in BIM management for large\-scale infrastructure projects ,
