data.title: Country Head – Saudi Arabia, Senior Vice President
data.raw_snippet:
**Country Head/CEO – Saudi Arabia, Senior Vice President**
**Purpose, Key Responsibilities, And Scope Of The Role**
* Drive and execute State Street’s Investment Services and Investment Management strategy in Saudi Arabia by establishing, maintaining and growing strong local relationships and partne
data.jd_text:
**Country Head/CEO – Saudi Arabia, Senior Vice President**
**Purpose, Key Responsibilities, And Scope Of The Role**
* Drive and execute State Street’s Investment Services and Investment Management strategy in Saudi Arabia by establishing, maintaining and growing strong local relationships and partnerships with clients and prospects, ensuring delivery of high quality service and maintenance and evolution of strong product solutions to clients as a foundation for future growth.
* Act as CEO of State Street’s (SSSAFS) CMA regulated legal entity which houses both the IS and IM business, ensuring compliance with regulatory and legal expectations as set out by law and regulatory guidance and dialogue with all relevant stakeholders in the Kingdom.
* Execute oversight of all State Street divisions in Saudi Arabia (including the CRD strategy/staff as part of the legal entity)), ensuring best practices are shared and observed, and that all entities meet legal entity and corporate governance standards
* Manage the State Street country relationship with and play an active and effective advocacy role with the CMA, Ministry of Investment, Ministry of the Economy and Planning as well as with relevant stakeholders at the Royal Court, public agencies and acting as the public face and voice of State Street in the market
* Oversee the execution of the 5 year Strategic Plan of One State Street which includes to triple revenues in the next 5 years (end 2028\) establish locally domiciled ETF’s, Saudi Sub\-Custody, Fund Administration and an optimized UCITS Fund environment/Infrastructure to compete over the mid/long term with established centres around the world.
* Leverage established Network of both Private and Public Sector Relationships for the benefit of Vision 2030 and State Street as a Firm in Saudi playing a role in the Kingdom’s overall development.


**Managerial Responsibilities**
* Execute a country\-level strategy for State Street’s IS \& IM businesses in Saudi and cultivate a “One State Street” culture across all groups
* Act as local owner of services delivered by State Street in the Kingdom, working with functional leadership and global client executives and relationship managers as appropriate to ensure that our clients receive and experience an excellent and market\-leading level of service, taking local ownership of significant client\-related projects as appropriate (e.g. remediation program, new business acquisition and onboarding)
* Develop and cultivate relationships with locally\-based clients, management companies, Government and Government related entities as well as private Sectors Executives.
* Working with Product, Sales and Relationship Management leadership, develop and actively manage a pipeline of new business prospects and cross\-sells of new and emerging products and solutions to existing clients
* Working with GA/CCO/Global Delivery leadership, ensure the Saudi team meet client service, operational risk management and local regulatory requirements and expectations, especially concerning outsourcing and any emerging issues signalled by the regulator
* Contribute to and meet/where possible exceed sales and expense management financial targets
* Drive employee engagement and related initiatives across all locations to attain corporate expectations and advocate for actions that enhance the employer value proposition including measures that enhance Inclusion, Diversity \& Equity, as well as narrowing of the gender pay gap.
* Act as CEO of State Street Saudi Arabia Financial Solutions, ensuring the entity is managed and governed in line with company law, Saudi regulatory standards (as applicable) and State Street’s legal entity governance standards
* Lead and chair as appropriate the Country Leadership team and relevant risk and legal entity committees
* Represent State Street Saudi on regional and global committees and working groups as required
* Oversee the corporate functions teams in Saudi – those supporting the underlying business contracted from Saudi Arabia and centres of excellence (e.g. cyber security center)
* Ensure all Saudi legal entities adopt corporate governance and organizational standards commensurate with their size, complexity and regulatory rating
* Drive and act as a role model for cultures and behaviours in Saudi Arabia consistent with enterprise standards
* Develop and enhance through relevant dialogue and industry forums State Street’s relationship with regulators and government/public policy makers and their agencies
* Represent State Street in the business community and in industry organizations, ensuring our profile and reputation are enhanced


**About State Street**
 Across the globe, institutional investors rely on us to help them manage risk, respond to challenges, and drive performance and profitability. We keep our clients at the heart of everything we do, and smart, engaged employees are essential to our continued success.
   

  

 We are committed to fostering an environment where every employee feels valued and empowered to reach their full potential. As an essential partner in our shared success, you’ll benefit from inclusive development opportunities, flexible work\-life support, paid volunteer days, and vibrant employee networks that keep you connected to what matters most. Join us in shaping the future.
   

  

 As an Equal Opportunity Employer, we consider all qualified applicants for all positions without regard to race, creed, color, religion, national origin, ancestry, ethnicity, age, disability, genetic information, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, citizenship, marital status, domestic partnership or civil union status, familial status, military and veteran status, and other characteristics protected by applicable law.
   

  

 Discover more information on jobs at StateStreet.com/careers
   

  

 Read our CEO Statement
   

  

 Job ID: R\-788994

data.title: Senior SME – Merchant Acquiring Transformation
data.raw_snippet:
**About Us**
 Specialized, disciplined, and driven by measurable growth across every engagement.
   

  

 Ektis, founded in 2025, is a financial services consulting firm built on decades of combined industry experience. Our diverse team of specialists brings deep sector expertise across the regiona
data.jd_text:
**About Us**
 Specialized, disciplined, and driven by measurable growth across every engagement.
   

  

 Ektis, founded in 2025, is a financial services consulting firm built on decades of combined industry experience. Our diverse team of specialists brings deep sector expertise across the regional financial ecosystem, enabling us to turn complex challenges into practical, high\-impact solutions.
   

  

 As an expert\-led, boutique firm, we operate as an extension of our clients \- partnering closely with financial institutions to translate ambition into measurable progress. We focus on building enduring internal capability and applying creative problem\-solving that delivers lasting impact.
   

  

 Our approach integrates real\-world insights with strategic thinking and disciplined execution. We define objectives with precision, map the pathways required, and deliver outcomes that work in practice \- not just in presentation decks. Every deliverable is designed to be actionable, professional, and reflective of the capability and results our clients aim to achieve.
   

  

**Our Vision**
 Redefining financial services consulting for a new era \- accelerating ideas, deepening execution, and driving outcomes that matter.
   

  

**Our Mission**
 We partner with financial institutions to turn ambition into measurable results. Guided by our entrepreneurial spirit, we integrate with client teams and combine strategic clarity, disciplined execution, and creative problem\-solving to deliver lasting impact and build capabilities that endure
   

  

**About The Opportunity**
 Our client is a leading player within the Saudi payments market. As part of this engagement, Ektis is seeking a Senior SME to support the next phase of the programme.
   

  

 This is a highly hands\-on role for an experienced payments professional with experience across merchant acquiring, payment gateways and fintech acquiring set\-up. The successful candidate will bring a blend of commercial, technical and regulatory expertise, with the ability to support the design, launch and scaling of an acquiring business within Saudi Arabia.
   

  

**Role Focus**
 To act as the lead SME across the merchant acquiring transformation programme, providing strategic guidance and hands\-on support across the commercial model, technology architecture and Saudi regulatory requirements.
   

  

 The role will work closely with senior client stakeholders and the Ektis project team to help shape and deliver a modern acquiring proposition, ensuring it is commercially viable, technically robust and fully compliant with local regulations.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Commercial \& Business**
* Define the commercial strategy and business model for the acquiring proposition.
* Shape the merchant services offering, including target customer segments, proposition, pricing and go\-to\-market approach.
* Develop the target operating model, including sales channels, merchant onboarding, partnerships and service structure.
* Build commercial forecasts, revenue models and business plans.
* Advise on acquiring economics, including interchange, scheme fees, merchant pricing and profitability.
* Identify partnership opportunities with banks, fintechs, payment gateways and payment service providers.
* Support the roadmap for launching and scaling the acquiring business.


**Technology \& Platform**
* Define the target technology architecture for the acquiring and payment gateway platform.
* Lead or advise on the technical set\-up, integration and implementation of acquiring systems.
* Support build versus buy decisions and the selection of technology vendors and partners.
* Design the end\-to\-end payments architecture, including integration with banks, card schemes, processors and merchant systems.
* Provide expertise across payment gateways, merchant acquiring platforms, POS and SoftPOS, settlement, reconciliation and fraud systems.
* Ensure the solution is scalable, secure and aligned to PCI DSS, cybersecurity and data protection requirements.


**Regulatory \& Compliance**
* Advise on the Saudi regulatory requirements for establishing and operating a merchant acquiring business.
* Support the preparation and submission of acquiring license applications where required.
* Ensure the acquiring model and operating framework are aligned with local legal and regulatory obligations.
* Provide guidance across SAMA requirements, KYC, AML, merchant onboarding, transaction monitoring and settlement processes.
* Identify regulatory risks and recommend appropriate mitigation actions.
* Support engagement with regulators and key stakeholders across the Saudi payments ecosystem.


**Candidate Profile**
* Minimum 7 years' experience within payments, merchant acquiring, payment gateways or fintech acquiring set\-up.
* Proven experience helping banks, fintechs or payment providers establish, launch or transform acquiring businesses.
* Strong understanding of both the commercial and technical components of acquiring and payments.
* Deep familiarity with the Saudi payments landscape and regulatory environment.
* Experience working with SAMA, acquiring license processes and broader Saudi payments regulation is highly desirable.
* Background from Visa, Mastercard, a leading fintech, merchant acquirer, payment gateway provider or major payments organisation is strongly preferred.
* Acquiring Technology or Commercial Lead
* Strong understanding of merchant acquiring economics, payment gateway infrastructure, scheme integration and acquiring technology architecture.
* Existing experience within Saudi Arabia or the GCC is strongly preferred.
* Previous experience in roles such as: Head of Acquiring, Head of Merchant Services, Payments Transformation Lead, Senior Payments Consultant.


**Key Skills**
* Ability to operate at both strategic and hands\-on delivery level.
* Strong stakeholder management skills with experience engaging senior leadership.
* Ability to work across commercial, technology and regulatory workstreams simultaneously.
* Excellent communication, presentation and influencing skills.
* Proven experience within fast\-paced, transformation\-led environments.
* Experience supporting greenfield or large\-scale payments transformation programmes.


**Engagement Details**
* Senior advisory / consulting engagement through Ektis
* Project\-based appointment
* Based in Saudi Arabia or the GCC, with travel as required
* Immediate or short\-notice availability preferred

data.jd_text:
Sulzer is a leading engineering company with a proud heritage of innovation. Join our global team to grow your expertise and develop innovative solutions that enable a prosperous and more sustainable society.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Job Summary
   

  

 The Head of Procurement is responsible for ensuring efficient and reliable supply of materials to support optimal production processes. The role is accountable for on\-time material availability, fulfillment of quality requirements, delivery performance (OTD), and cost optimization. This position works closely with Regional Procurement, Category Managers, and the local management team to ensure alignment between procurement activities and business objectives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Responsibility for the procurement activities of all direct materials and defined indirect materials in SSPC
* Management of the local team of operational and category buyers
* Alignment and challenging of commodity strategies with category managers and the Management Team
* Support the coordination of procurement optimization activities across EMEA
* Support purchasers in the optimization of procurement costs
* Procurement controlling for SSPC
* Support supplier management
* Proactively engage and support company initiatives designed to promote a culture of safe working, environmental protection and continual improvement.
* Remain accountable for the health, safety and welfare of their departmental workforce.
* Ensure compliance to systems and procedures developed for the health and safety of the workforce and environmental protection
* Ensure that Safe Systems of Work are developed and implemented for all activities, through risk assessment and operating procedures
* Visibly lead EH\&S improvement through observation, intervention and workplace tours.


**Qualifications / Requirements**
* Technical or commercial university degree
* Significant experience of working in an international matrix organization this could limit your choices too much
* Significant management experience in the procurement of an engineering company
* Proven skills in supply chain management, supplier development,
* Excellent leadership, management and technical skills
* Strong negotiation skills
* Analytical skills and structured work
* Excellent communication skills, motivation and a high level of personal responsibility
* Managing and motivating teams and internal and external stakeholders
* Being able to work within a matrix organization
* Drive for results
* Direct and indirect leadership skills
* Ensuring accountability and integrity
* High level of loyalty to the company
* Strategic agility and global mindset
* Decision making within a complex environment, taking care about local and EMEA targets
* Functional / Technical competency
* Interpersonal skills
* Good MS Office skills and knowledge of relevant IT solutions, in particular SAP (MM)


 What we offer you
   

  

* Excellent opportunities for development, along with a competitive salary and company bonus scheme.
* A great working environment.
* Work Location: Riyadh\- Industrial Area 2


 Sulzer is an equal opportunity employer. We believe in the strength of a diverse workforce and are committed to offering an inclusive work environment.
   

  

 We are proud to be recognized as a Top Employer 2026 in Brazil, Canada, China, Finland, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, Switzerland, South Africa, the UK and the USA.

data.jd_text:
**Position: Head of Occupational Therapy Department**
**Company: ABC Center**
**Job Summary:**
 The ABC Center is seeking a dynamic and experienced professional to take on the role of Head of the Occupational Therapy Department. In this leadership position, you will be responsible for overseeing the department's operations, ensuring the delivery of high\-quality occupational therapy services, and driving the strategic vision and growth of the department. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in occupational therapy, excellent leadership skills, and a commitment to patient\-centered care.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Provide leadership and direction for the Occupational Therapy Department, fostering a collaborative and innovative work environment
* Develop and implement department policies, procedures, and protocols to ensure best practices in occupational therapy services
* Oversee the hiring, training, and performance evaluation of departmental staff, fostering professional development and growth
* Manage departmental budget and resources effectively, ensuring efficient service delivery
* Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to coordinate patient care and ensure comprehensive treatment plans
* Monitor and evaluate patient outcomes, utilizing data to drive quality improvement initiatives
* Stay updated with advancements in occupational therapy practices, guidelines, and regulations, implementing relevant changes within the department
* Engage in community outreach and education to promote occupational therapy services and enhance the center's visibility
* Conduct regular departmental meetings to address operational issues, provide updates, and inspire team collaboration


**Requirements**
* Master's degree in Occupational Therapy or a related field
* At least 7 years of clinical experience in occupational therapy, with a minimum of 3 years in a leadership role
* Valid and active license in Occupational Therapy
* In\-depth knowledge of current practices, trends, and regulations in the field of occupational therapy
* Proven leadership and management skills, with a track record of effective team development
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
* Commitment to quality patient care and continuous improvement
* Language proficiency in both English and Arabic is preferred

data.title: Account Director, Luxury Sales KSA
data.raw_snippet:
Hilton is one of the largest and fastest growing hospitality companies in the world, with more than 9,000 properties with more than 1,300,000 rooms in 120 countries and territories.
   

  

 In the 105\+ years since our founding, we have defined the hospitality industry and established a portfolio
data.jd_text:
Hilton is one of the largest and fastest growing hospitality companies in the world, with more than 9,000 properties with more than 1,300,000 rooms in 120 countries and territories.
   

  

 In the 105\+ years since our founding, we have defined the hospitality industry and established a portfolio of 25 world\-class brands, with the emergence of the Tempo brand and including our flagship Hilton Hotels \& Resorts brand, which is the most recognised hotel brand in the world. We have more than 200\+ million members in our award–winning customer loyalty programme, Hilton Honors
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The Account Director – Luxury is responsible for driving strategic sales growth across Saudi Arabia, with a strong focus on luxury travel partners, high\-value accounts, and government delegations. This role plays a critical part in strengthening Hilton Luxury Brands’ presence in the region by cultivating long\-term relationships, unlocking new business opportunities, and positioning our portfolio of luxury hotels globally.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Develop and manage a portfolio of luxury travel trade accounts across primarily the KSA and potentially middle east, with a focus on high\-potential and strategic partners
* Identify, onboard, and grow new luxury accounts in line with regional and global sales objectives
* Strengthen relationships with government entities, royal offices, and protocol departments to drive luxury delegation business internationally
* Represent Hilton Luxury Brands to key stakeholders, ensuring brand positioning aligns with the expectations of ultra\-high\-net\-worth and VIP clientele
* Work closely with global luxury hotels to align market needs, client preferences, and commercial opportunities
* Drive production, track performance, and deliver against agreed revenue targets
* Lead and support client engagement initiatives including FAM trips, luxury events, roadshows, and international trade shows
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with internal teams to ensure seamless client servicing and strong post\-sale execution
* Monitor market trends, competitor activity, and emerging opportunities within the luxury travel segment


**What are we looking for?**
**Key Skills \& Experience**
* Proven experience in luxury sales, account management, or luxury travel trade (hospitality experience preferred)
* Strong network within the Saudi luxury travel ecosystem
* Experience working with government, protocol, or high\-level delegation business is a strong advantage
* Excellent relationship\-building and stakeholder management skills
* Commercially driven with strong negotiation and presentation abilities
* Culturally aware, detail\-oriented, and comfortable engaging at senior and VIP levels
* Ability to work independently while contributing effectively within a regional and global team
* Ability and flexibility to travel.


**What Success Looks Like**
* Strong growth in luxury account production across Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
* Increased number of active, high\-quality luxury travel partners
* Expanded government and delegation business for Hilton luxury hotels globally
* Trusted partnerships built on long\-term value, credibility, and performance


**What will it be like to work for Hilton?**
 Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full\-service hotels and resorts to extended\-stay suites and mid\-priced hotels. For more than a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision “to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality” unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And, our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all!
   

  

**Work Locations**
 Hilton Hotels – Riyadh
   

  

**Schedule**
 Full\-time
   

  

**Brand**
 Hilton Corporate
   

  

**Job**
 Technology Operations

This leadership role is critical in ensuring that lighting is not only a functional element but also a transformative aspect
data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking a highly experienced and visionary Director of Lighting to lead and elevate the lighting design across our dynamic portfolio of projects. This leadership role is critical in ensuring that lighting is not only a functional element but also a transformative aspect of design that enhances ambiance, safety, and the overall guest experience.
   

  

 As the Director \- Lighting, you will be responsible for developing lighting strategies, managing a talented team of lighting designers, and collaborating closely with architects, engineers, and other stakeholders to deliver innovative and sustainable lighting solutions that align with Qiddiya's mission and brand identity.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and oversee the implementation of comprehensive lighting design strategies across all projects at Qiddiya
* Lead, mentor, and manage the lighting design team to ensure creativity, excellence, and efficiency
* Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to integrate lighting effectively with architecture, landscape, and interior design
* Ensure all lighting designs comply with relevant codes, sustainability standards, and quality requirements
* Review and approve lighting design proposals, making sure they meet aesthetic, technical, and budgetary goals
* Stay informed on emerging lighting technologies, trends, and best practices, promoting their adoption within the organization
* Manage relationships with external consultants, vendors, and contractors to ensure successful project delivery
* Prepare and present reports and presentations to executive leadership, updating on project progress and innovations in lighting design


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Lighting Design, Electrical Engineering, Architecture, or a related field; Master's degree preferred
* Minimum of 12 years of progressive experience in lighting design and leadership roles, preferably within large\-scale projects
* Proven track record of managing complex lighting design projects from concept to completion
* Exceptional leadership, communication, and team management skills
* Advanced proficiency with lighting design software and tools such as Dialux, Relux, AutoCAD, BIM/Revit, and Adobe Creative Suite
* Strong understanding of lighting technologies, energy efficiency, and sustainable design principles
* Ability to effectively collaborate across disciplines and manage stakeholder expectations
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and a creative, innovative approach to lighting design challenges


**Benefits**
 Comprehensive benefits package

data.title: Enterprise Account Executive
data.raw_snippet:
Creatio is a global vendor of an AI\-native platform to automate workflows and CRM with no\-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI\-first architecture, composable no\-code tools, and enterprise\-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
   

  

 We’re
data.jd_text:
Creatio is a global vendor of an AI\-native platform to automate workflows and CRM with no\-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI\-first architecture, composable no\-code tools, and enterprise\-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
   

  

 We’re proud to be recognized by top industry analysts as a Leader and Strong Performer in multiple Gartner and Forrester reports.
   

  

 In 2025, Creatio was named to Inc.’s Best Workplaces list, recognizing our commitment to employee wellbeing and a strong workplace culture.
   

  

 For the role of
 **Enterprise Account Executive (KSA)** 
 , we are seeking an experienced field sales professional to help us scale the number of Enterprises that use the Creatio platform. Candidates must have experience building and developing a territory to high performance within an innovative SaaS technology provider. Successful candidates will help to build a portfolio of business within the top target enterprises in their territory. Successful candidates will need to drive their own activity and build a funnel while being supported by the broader Creatio organization of diverse and executive, product, and technical teams.
   

  

 The role is based in
 **Riyadh (KSA)** 
 and will report to the Regional Sales Director MEA (based in Dubai).
   

  

 Our targets are ambitious, and we are seeking engaging, collaborative, successful Enterprise Account Executives who have the skills, experience, and track record to make an immediate impact. We’re fast\-paced, innovative, and collaborative. We pursue excellence in everything and have a lot of fun along the way.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Deliver against revenue targets and all key performance metrics.
* Generate new business opportunities on an assigned territory, manage pipeline, opportunities, forecasting, and other items related to a normal outside sales function.
* Manage the end\-to\-end enterprise sales process and resource to create and execute winning solution sales strategies.
* Establish relationships with VP/C\-level buyers (Business and IT).
* Develop and orchestrate sales presentations and product demonstrations.
* Focus on new logo acquisition and manage relationships with the existing accounts to identify opportunities for cross and up\-sales.
* Ability to work with all customer functions including executive\-level personnel, various customer stakeholders, architecture, operations, design, vendor management, innovation, sourcing, and customer procurement.


**Desired Skills And Experience**
* Minimum 5 years of experience working within enterprise SaaS platform sales to large enterprises
* Proven track record of meeting quarterly and annual targets
* Deep understanding of executive\-level Enterprise and/or Global Account sales and methodologies
* Superb written and verbal communications and organizational skills
* 4\-year degree required, with technical curiosity and desire to learn
* Experience with CRM/BPM software space is strongly preferred
* Fluency in English and native Arabic


**What You Should Expect From Us**
* The award\-winning product (a Leader in Gartner Quadrants) to be proud of.
* Focus on making our clients successful (NPS score – 42%).
* Dedicated leadership with open doors.
* Steady stream of inbound leads (though we expect you to generate your own leads as well).
* Collaborative environment where everybody is happy to help.
* A remote\-first hybrid model: while giving plenty of space for concentration and personal working habits, we encourage regular meetings in one of our five hubs worldwide.
* Culture of genuine care, ownership, dedication, and high standards (learn more here).
* A vibrant corporate life: enjoy the opportunity to explore your teammates' cultures in online and offline events, participate in sports competitions, enjoy art master classes, and create your new favorite memories at our parties.
* Creatio offers all team members competitive pay.
* Paid leave options for life\-qualifying events, sicknesses, etc.

data.title: Senior Director - Central DMO - 20004885 CDU5
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Overview**
 The Senior Director \- Central DMO is responsible for establishing, leading, and optimizing centralized development management functions across the organization's portfolio. This role ensures consistency, efficiency, governance, and excellence in the planning and execution of deve
data.jd_text:
**Role Overview**
 The Senior Director \- Central DMO is responsible for establishing, leading, and optimizing centralized development management functions across the organization's portfolio. This role ensures consistency, efficiency, governance, and excellence in the planning and execution of development projects, from concept through delivery. The position plays a critical leadership role in aligning project execution with strategic objectives, operational standards, and financial targets
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Strategic Leadership
* Establish and lead the Central Development Management Office, defining its vision, structure, and operating model
* Align development management strategies with corporate goals and long\-term business plans
* Drive standardization of processes, tools, and methodologies across all development projects
* Act as a key advisor to executive leadership on development performance and risks
* Governance \& Oversight
* Implement governance frameworks to ensure projects are delivered on time, within budget, and to required quality standards
* Oversee project controls including scheduling, cost management, risk management, and reporting
* Ensure compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and industry best practices
* Lead stage\-gate review processes and investment committee inputs
* Portfolio \& Program Management
* Monitor and manage a portfolio of development projects across multiple asset classes
* Prioritize initiatives based on strategic importance, resource allocation, and ROI
* Identify and mitigate risks at portfolio and program levels
* Ensure effective coordination between projects to maximize efficiencies
* Process Excellence \& Continuous Improvement
* Develop and implement standardized development management frameworks, templates, and KPIs
* Drive digital transformation initiatives (PMIS, dashboards, reporting tools)
* Benchmark performance against industry standards and introduce best practices
* Lead lessons\-learned programs and continuous improvement initiatives
* Stakeholder Management
* Collaborate with internal departments including design, finance, procurement, legal, and operations
* Interface with external stakeholders such as consultants, contractors, and government authorities
* Ensure transparent communication and reporting to senior leadership and board\-level stakeholders
* Team Leadership
* Build, lead, and mentor a high\-performing team within the CDMO
* Define roles, responsibilities, and performance metrics for team members
* Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, and excellence
* Drive talent development, succession planning, and capability building


**Requirements**
**Qualifications \& Experience**
* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Architecture, Construction Management, or related field (Master's preferred)
* 20\+ years of experience in real estate development, construction, or project management
* Proven track record in leading large\-scale, complex development portfolios
* Experience in establishing or managing PMOs/CDMOs or similar centralized functions
* Strong understanding of project management methodologies (e.g., PMP, PRINCE2 preferred)


**Skills \& Competencies**
* Strategic thinking and leadership capability
* Strong governance and project controls expertise
* Financial acumen and commercial awareness
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
* Change management and organizational transformation experience
* Ability to manage complexity and drive results in a fast\-paced environment


**Benefits**
 Competitive benefits package

data.title: Performance Improvement - Management Consultant
data.raw_snippet: At AlixPartners, we solve the most complex and critical challenges by moving quickly from analysis to action when it really matters; creating value that has a lasting impact on companies, their people, and the communities they serve. By understanding, respecting, and honouring the needs of our emplo
data.jd_text:
At AlixPartners, we solve the most complex and critical challenges by moving quickly from analysis to action when it really matters; creating value that has a lasting impact on companies, their people, and the communities they serve. By understanding, respecting, and honouring the needs of our employees, clients, and communities, AlixPartners actively promotes an inclusive environment. We strongly believe in the value that diversity brings to our experiences and are committed to the perpetual enhancements of initiatives, policies, and practices. We hold ourselves accountable by providing the space for authenticity, growth, and equity for everyone.
   

  

 AlixPartners has embraced a hybrid work model to provide flexibility and support our employees’ work\-life integration. Our hybrid model combines a mix of in\-person (at client site or AlixPartners office) and remote working. Travel is part of this position, but the frequency may vary based on client, team, and individual circumstances.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 The Performance Improvement practice is experiencing significant growth. Here you will be able to seize a unique opportunity to truly develop your long\-term career objectives. Our clients are top\-tier, household brands from a diverse range of sectors. We also advise a number of the leading private equity firms, supporting them on accelerating value creation within their portfolio companies, as well as on transaction\-related matters.
   

  

 This Vice President role is a permanent position located in Riyadh and reports to a Director.
   

  

* A crucial component of our specialist teams working on projects across a range of industries including Retail, Energy, Real Estate, Investment Funds, Aerospace \& Defence, etc.
* Support end\-to\-end delivery of performance improvement projects, including operational diagnostics, supply\-chain optimisation, cost\-reduction initiatives, and financial modelling to quantify impact and support decision\-making


 This description is not designed to encompass a comprehensive listing of required activities, duties or responsibilities.
   

  

**What You’ll Need**
* Master’s degree with evidence of strong academic success. Degree(s) in Business, Finance, Engineering (or foreign equivalent) preferable
* 5\-8 years of Consulting experience in a top tier international Consulting firm
* A broad range of functional expertise across supply chain, large transformations, financial modelling and pricing
* Strong knowledge of Excel and PowerPoint
* Willingness to travel across the GCC for client engagements
* You will hold valid residency for Saudi Arabia, or be able to obtain such, (administrative support will be provided by AlixPartners to obtain permits); ability to obtain work permit to travel and work across EU
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, Arabic is advantageous
* Willingness to work outside of normal business hours, and in particular as unique projects/needs arise.
* Ability to work full time in an office and remote environment; physically able to sit/stand at a computer and work in front of a computer screen for significant portions of the workday
* Must become familiar with, and promote and abide by, our Core Values as defined by the AlixPartners’ Code of Conduct and foster an inclusive environment with people at all levels of an organisation


 Office Location: KAFD, Riyadh
   

  

 Working hours: 8:30am – 5:30pm, Sunday to Thursday, hybrid model
   

  

*The firm offers market\-leading benefits that provide flexible options to support our employee’s needs, you can read more about the AlixPartners benefits here.*
*This advert will be removed once a suitable candidate has been identified.*
*AlixPartners is an equal opportunity employer.*
*\#* 
*LI\-Hybrid*

 NEP is the leading worldwide technical production partner supporting premier content producers across live sports, entertainment, music, and corpora
data.jd_text:
**Location:** 
 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
   

  

**Department:** 
 Commercial
   

  

**Reporting To:** 
 Regional Sales Director
   

  

* ABOUT NEP


 NEP is the leading worldwide technical production partner supporting premier content producers across live sports, entertainment, music, and corporate events. With innovation at our core, we empower our clients to create exceptional experiences through cutting\-edge broadcast and media solutions.
   

  

* PURPOSE OF POSITION


 As the Business Relations Manager – KSA, you will represent NEP’s world\-class broadcast and media services across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Focusing on strengthening our presence in the region, you will build lasting partnerships with key stakeholders in sports, entertainment, government, and live events. Your role will drive revenue growth, elevate our market footprint, and ensure seamless delivery of NEP’s solutions in alignment with Vision 2030 and other national initiatives.
   

  

* POSITION KEY RESPONSIBILITIES AND JOB TASKS
* Strategic Client Engagement
* Cultivate and manage relationships with broadcasters, event organizers, production companies, and government entities across KSA.
* Serve as NEP’s primary interface for key clients, ensuring consistent communication and customer satisfaction.
* Business Growth \& Opportunity Development
* Identify, pursue, and convert new business opportunities across major verticals including live sports, concerts, festivals, and national mega\-events.
* Prepare client\-centric proposals in collaboration with NEP’s technical and commercial teams that highlight our integrated production capabilities.
* Market Insight \& Positioning
* Monitor developments within Saudi Arabia’s broadcast, entertainment, and sports production landscape.
* Translate market insights into actionable intelligence to help shape NEP’s regional go\-to\-market strategy.
* Project Interface \& Client Success
* Support project delivery by acting as a liaison between clients and NEP’s production and engineering teams.
* Ensure a best\-in\-class client experience through proactive communication, onboarding support, and post\-project follow\-up.
* Reporting \& Pipeline Management
* Maintain up\-to\-date CRM entries, sales pipelines, and regular reporting to regional leadership.
* Provide input into forecasting, planning, and revenue tracking for the Saudi market.
* QUALIFICATIONS / PROFESSIONAL REGISTRATION / OTHER INDUSTRY REQUIREMENTS


**Education \& Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Media, Communications, or related field.
* Minimum 7 years’ experience in the broadcast, production, or live events sector within KSA.
* Experience managing government and large enterprise accounts is strongly preferred.
* Familiarity with Saudi procurement portals and bidding frameworks.


**Skills \& Competencies**
* Solid understanding of broadcast technologies and live production workflows (e.g., OB vans, remote production, IP transmission).
* Deep network and knowledge within the KSA entertainment, sports, and government ecosystem.
* Bilingual proficiency in Arabic and English (spoken and written).
* Excellent communication, presentation, and commercial negotiation skills.


**Personal Attributes**
* Relationship\-driven, highly professional, and culturally tuned to the Saudi market.
* Confident self\-starter with the ability to operate independently and travel as required across the Kingdom.
* Team player who collaborates effectively across departments and functions.

data.title: QNB3662 - Associate Strategy PMO (Qatarization)
data.raw_snippet:
**About QNB**
 Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari\-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
   

  

 QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countri
data.jd_text:
**About QNB**
 Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari\-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
   

  

 QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
   

  

 QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard \& Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3\) and Fitch (A\+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
   

  

 Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
   

  

 QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
   

  

**Job Purpose Summary**
 Support the Strategy PMO (Senior) Managers in managing, monitoring, steering, and tracking projects in order to ensure implementation and successful completion within the defined time, budget, and scope. Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed. Assist in the day\-to\-day operations of the Group Project Management Office (PMO) for all planned, ongoing, and ad hoc projects in QNB. Assist in rolling out and championing the overall project management methodology, processes, procedures, tools and templates to manage the overall project portfolio within QNB Group Learn and acquire knowledge of comprehensive project management methodology and the associated standards, tools, templates and processes
   

  

**Essential Duties \& Responsibilities By Dimensions**
* Shareholder \& Financial:
* Assist in reporting against Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to successfully monitor and track the Group’s portfolio of on\-going projects.
* Implements KPI’s and best practices for Associate Strategy PMO.
* Promote cost consciousness and efficiency and enhance productivity, to minimise cost, avoid waste, and optimise benefits for the bank.
* Customer (Internal \& External):
* Assist within the Group PMO in all project related matters (e.g., collection of data, liaison with project managers) and reporting of projects with regards Group PMO standards, processes, tools and templates
* Maintain issue/ risk logs, project plans, preparation of reporting, communication within the project team, and project meetings
* Support and manage the smooth planning, running and follow up of Group PMO meetings where necessary and act as an ambassador for the Group PMO in customer facing meetings and communication, promoting the professionalism and best practices of the Group PMO
* Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed
* Support in rolling\-out the new project management methodology within QNB Group where necessary \- Build and maintain strong and effective relationships with other related departments
* Internal (Processes, Products, Regulatory):
* Assist and support in the maintenance and development of Group PMO documentation, including processes and policies
* Support the day\-to\-day internal operational Group PMO processes as directed by the Strategy PMO (Senior) manager(s) and VP, Strategy PMO
* Assist in the maintenance of the inventory of projects including all related and necessary documentation and information within the appropriate Group PMO tools
* Regularly update project information through the preparation of project status reports, using a fact driven approach aligned against the original project scope, plan and objectives
* Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed
* Support the (Senior) Strategy PMO manager(s) and VP, Strategy, PMO as requested with additional mandates, and other ad hoc requests as necessary
* Participate and support in the set up and running of relevant project/ team meetings as and when required
* Support the development of training material and the rollout of training sessions to project managers
* Learning \& Knowledge:
* Possess a basic understanding of Project Management theory and practice
* Identify areas for professional and self\-development \- Strive to learn project management methodology


**Education/Experience Requirements**
* Bachelor degree from leading academic institution with focus on business administration, finance or science
* Fresh Qatari graduates, no previous experience required.
* Basic understanding of project methodology and approach, e.g., Prince II and/ or PMP is an advantage, as is any certification
* Proven academic track record or some work experience in a strategy consulting environment, or a similar environment of a well renowned international financial services related institution
* High degree of methodological\-conceptual skills \- Well\-developed numerical, analytical and evaluation skills


 Note: you will be required to attach the following:
   

  

* Resume/CV
* Copy of Passport or QID
* Copy of Education Certificate

 The
 **Group Senior Contracts and Commercial Director**

data.jd_text:
**Job Summary** 




  





 The
 **Group Senior Contracts and Commercial Director** 
 is responsible for leading all contract and commercial activities across the organization. This role ensures contracts are well negotiated, risks are managed, budgets are controlled, and commercial strategies support business growth. The role also involves leading a team and ensuring compliance with laws and company policies.
 



 The position requires a strong
 **international commercial background** 
 , preferably supported by a
 **Quantity Surveying degree or professional chartership** 
 , and extensive experience managing complex, large\-scale commercial operations.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 Contracts \& Commercial Management
 


* Lead the negotiation, drafting, and management of contracts.
* Ensure contracts are legally compliant and commercially favorable.
* Monitor contract performance and ensure all parties meet their obligations and KPIs.
* Manage and resolve contract disputes and claims effectively.



 Strategy \& Risk Management
 


* Develop and implement commercial strategies aligned with company goals.
* Identify and manage commercial risks in contracts and projects.
* Conduct market research to understand industry trends and business opportunities.



 Financial \& Performance Management
 


* Manage budgets related to contracts and commercial operations.
* Ensure cost control and strong financial performance.
* Oversee performance reporting and commercial tracking.



 Compliance \& Governance
 


* Ensure compliance with relevant laws, regulations, and company policies.
* Apply proper contract standards (e.g., FIDIC, QCS, and other relevant forms).



 Leadership \& Stakeholder Management
 


* Lead, mentor, and develop the commercial and contracts team.
* Communicate effectively with internal and external stakeholders.
* Support business growth and operational efficiency.



  





**Required Knowledge \& Skills** 



* Strong international commercial background.
* Degree in Quantity Surveying or related field; professional chartership preferred.
* Strong experience with contract forms such as FIDIC and other bespoke agreements.
* Knowledge of contract and tender procedures and Qatar Construction Specifications (QCS).
* Extensive experience in large, complex commercial negotiations.
* Strong understanding of budgeting, financial reporting, and contract law.
* Knowledge of ERP systems (SAP experience preferred).



  





**Experience Requirements** 



* Minimum
 **15 years of total work experience** 
 (15\+ years required for the Director position).
* At least
 **10 years in a management or leadership role** 
 .
* Minimum
 **10–15 years’ experience overall** 
 , depending on role level.
* **GCC experience (minimum 5 years) preferred** 
 .

data.jd_text:
**Primary Purpose Of The Job**
 Lead and supervise the Project Services team in delivering comprehensive Cost Estimation, Cost Monitoring and Control (including budget management), Planning and Scheduling, Invoice Processing and Monitoring, and Document Control services. Ensure all activities support the successful execution of projects on schedule, within budget, and in full alignment with project requirements. Promote and uphold the highest standards of Quality, Health, Safety, and Environment (QHSE) in strict compliance with the QHSE Management System.
   

  

**Required Experience And Skills**
* Minimum of 15 years’ relevant experience in the Oil \& Gas industry with an IOC, NOC, EPIC contractor, or major Oil \& Gas company, focused on large\-scale project execution. At least 5 of those years must be in a Head or Lead Project Control Engineer role within an IOC/NOC or EPIC contractor environment.
* Proficient, hands\-on experience with planning and scheduling software including Primavera P6, P6 Analytics, Primavera Risk Analysis, MS Project, MS Office, and SAP.
* Demonstrated expertise in Cost Monitoring, Cost Control, and Reporting processes.
* Proven capability in implementing industry best practices along with company systems, standards, and processes.
* Experience supporting the development of project execution strategies, engineering workflows, project management processes, and detailed project execution plans.
* Strong familiarity with activities related to engineering, procurement, fabrication, installation, commissioning, and start\-up of major onshore projects.
* Possesses strong management, communication, conflict resolution, and presentation skills.


**Educational Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in an Engineering discipline from a recognized university; a higher academic qualification is considered an advantage.
* Membership in a recognized professional engineering association or institution is required.
* Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalent is an added advantage.

data.raw_snippet:

 To ensure customer satisfaction through effective project management and delivering results from order entry to project commissioning that ensure repeatable customer business.
   

  

**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Leading the successful execution of High Voltage Orders booked
data.jd_text:
**The opportunity**
 To ensure customer satisfaction through effective project management and delivering results from order entry to project commissioning that ensure repeatable customer business.
   

  

**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Leading the successful execution of High Voltage Orders booked in UAE.
* Monitor and achieve importance KPIs including Revenue, Cash Flow, Inventory, On\-time Delivery, Customer Satisfaction, etc.
* Ensure that all order execution related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, contractual agreements, quality standards, health, safety and environment requirements, financial targets as well as schedule commitments.
* Build up strong relations with customers and manage customer satisfaction by on time execution of projects.
* Project reviews with factory management and factory Project Managers to ensure contract fulfilment.
* Take an active role in identifying risks, negotiating and resolving escalated issues especially those raised by the customer.
* To ensure that the portfolio of projects follows good methodology and execution practices in accordance with internal standard procedures, and that projects are closed as per contracts entered with customers.
* Lead the coordination of any customer request whether they are related to execution or additional requests to projects which lead for additional sales.
* Responsible for ensuring compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines.
* Living Hitachi Energy core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.


**Your background**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering, or equivalent with strong technical background
* Experience in High Voltage Industry with exposure to Project Management in Qatar.
* Project Executed in under EPC added advantage
* Possess strong leadership skills and ability to lead the team and convince stakeholders in the interest of the project.
* Ability to work under pressure to deliver the projects with time, cost, and quality.
* Experience of SAP or another ERP platform knowledge is an advantage.
* Strong attention to detail, ensuring accuracy and quality in project deliverables.
* Capability to develop work practices and to take lessons learned and implement them into the processes.
* Ability to adapt to changing priorities and work under tight deadlines and excellent collaboration and work with cross functional and cross\-cultural team.
* Analytical and problem\-solving mindset, with the ability to identify and mitigate risks and challenges.
* Proficiency in both spoken \& written and English is required.


 Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader in electrification, powering a sustainable energy future through innovative power grid technologies with digital at the core. Over three billion people depend on our technologies to power their daily lives.
   

  

 With over a century in pioneering mission\-critical technologies like high\-voltage, transformers, automation, and power electronics, we are addressing the most urgent energy challenge of our time – balancing soaring electricity demand, while decarbonizing the power system.
   

  

 Headquartered in Switzerland, we employ over 50,000 people in 60 countries and generate revenues of around $16 billion USD. We welcome you to apply today.

data.title: EOI - Project Control Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Control Manager to join our team in Qatar.
   

  

 Project Control Manager leads the cost; planning, scheduling and risk assessment support to assignments / project teams and clients, typically on projects of moderate siz
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Control Manager to join our team in Qatar.
   

  

 Project Control Manager leads the cost; planning, scheduling and risk assessment support to assignments / project teams and clients, typically on projects of moderate size and complexity. Oversees the set up and running of all required project controls systems, tools and interfaces to allow successful management and reporting of the project costs, schedule and risks on projects and specific assignments. Responsible for managing a team of project control resources in support of project delivery excellence
   

  

 The role interfaces with a number of key stakeholders across the project and wider business. Primary focal point for the Project Manager, Client or Project Team for all matters relating to project costs, schedules and risk; and resources requirements. Develops and implements the project control execution plan for projects of moderate size and complexity
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Act as the focal point with the client and any contractor Project Controllers as appropriate to ensure costs and progress are reported accurately, ensure alignment with the project reporting requirements and ensure timely and accurate cost and progress reporting
* Monitor overall project / assignment progress status, achievement and non\-achievement of major milestones and analyse and forecast performance in relation to plan
* Identification, monitoring and reporting against the project critical path providing early warning to the Project Manager of any potential slippages
* Identifies and establishes the communications interfaces essential for the delivery of cost, planning, scheduling and risk deliverables and services
* Report project status and KPI to management
* Develops the project Work Breakdown Structure?
* Manage the implementation of the cost and planning control structures in alignment with the project Work Breakdown Structure
* Manage and oversee the project work approval process in terms of accurate cost code allocation and initial budget set\-up and approvals
* Timely control and forecasting of budgets and ensure that the impact of all change requests are properly assessed and included in the budget and schedules if applicable
* Accountable for accuracy and timeliness of S\-curves and histograms produced by team
* Accountable for delivery and ongoing maitenance of the projects fully resourced, logic linked Gantt Charts within preferred planning software to the agreed project and programme requirements
* Accountable for providing analysis of current and future resource needs for the project and programme to the Project Manager
* Manages and oversees the recovery process followig identified slippages or significant float erosion
* Responsible for timely and accurate development and issuing of project change orders / variations in accordance with contract / assignment change notifications
* Promote the project change management system and facilitate assurance activities to ensure the process is adhered to
* Serve as Chair for ongoing internal team and client team Project Controls meetings (Cost, Schedule and Progress).
* Oversee the preparation of proposal schedules and CTR packs
* Lead cost and schedule risk analysis workshops / sessions both internally and with clients
* Ensure risk is managed and monitored at project level in line with local standards and processes
* Ensure Project Controls processes and procedures are accurate, that the project controls team are familiar with them and comply with their requirements
* Responsible for ensuring that projects are managed effectively to ensure delivery in a manner which meets quality, time and budget specifications
* Accountable for the accuracy and completeness of all cost, planning and risk deliverables prior to issue to internal or external customer
* Responsible for ensuring all project specific control tools and systems are set up and functioning adequately
* Manage the workload, performance and development of the project controls team. Provides constructive feedback and coaching.
* Responsible for ensuring project control staff are competent to carry out assigned work
* Reviews contractual obligations and ensures that cost control activities are performed in accordance with the contractual agreements and the Client’s requirements
* Ensuring that lessons learned are captured and implemented in support of continuous improvement
* Motivates project control team to meet project aims; promotes communication and teamwork within group and project.


**Qualifications**
* B.S. or equivalent degree
* Minimum of 15\+ years relevant experience in major Brownfield oil \& gas projects, including at least five (5\) years in similar position
* Pre\-FEED, FEED experience
* Typically requires a minimum of eight (8\) years of relevant industry experience, with at least six (6\) years in project control positions.
* Excellent client service focus
* Exceptional organisational skills and able to multi\-task"
* Working knowledge of risk management processes and techniques and experience in facilitating Risk workshops with project / assignment teams
* Advanced Working Knowledge of relevant software tools such as Microsoft Project and Primavera


**About Us**
 Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
   

  

**Diversity Statement**
 We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non\-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

data.title: Senior Project Manager -Fitout
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 We are currently seeking a Senior Project Manager – Fit Out to lead the fit\-out delivery of high\-rise projects in Qatar.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will bring proven experience in a Senior Project Manager role, with a strong track record in managing fit\-out delivery, testi
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 We are currently seeking a Senior Project Manager – Fit Out to lead the fit\-out delivery of high\-rise projects in Qatar.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will bring proven experience in a Senior Project Manager role, with a strong track record in managing fit\-out delivery, testing and commissioning, snagging, handover, and project close\-out on high\-rise PMC projects.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead and manage the fit\-out phase of high\-rise projects from planning through to handover
* Oversee fit\-out execution to ensure works are delivered on time, within budget, and to the required quality standards
* Manage project scope, programme, cost, and risk while ensuring alignment with client requirements and business objectives
* Coordinate and lead the project team, including contractors, consultants, architects, engineers, and support staff
* Monitor project progress and provide regular updates, financial control, and reporting
* Ensure fit\-out works are properly coordinated with all disciplines and completed in line with project delivery processes
* Review and manage contractor performance, shop drawings, material approvals, mock\-ups, and installation quality
* Lead testing, commissioning, snagging, handover, and close\-out activities related to fit\-out packages
* Support resolution of site issues, commercial matters, claims, and interface challenges during the fit\-out stage
* Ensure robust project plans, look\-aheads, and forecasts are prepared and regularly updated


**Qualifications**
* A bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Architecture, or a related field
* PMP certification or membership of an equivalent professional institution
* 20\+ years of experience in project management/construction management, with strong experience in fit\-out delivery
* Proven experience as a Senior Project Manager leading high\-end fit\-out packages on complex high\-rise or large\-scale building projects
* Strong knowledge of fit\-out coordination, finishing trades, testing and commissioning, snagging, and handover processes
* Experience managing contractors, consultants, and multidisciplinary teams through the fit\-out stage
* Demonstrable understanding of commercial management, claims, and project close\-out requirements
* Experience using modern project delivery and coordination tools, including BIM
* International consultancy experience, with at least 5 years in the Middle East preferred
* Strong ability to manage technical and delivery matters across all disciplines associated with fit\-out projects

data.title: Senior Project Manager – Hyperscale Data Center
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Senior Project Manager** 
 to lead the delivery of
 **hyperscale, mission\-critical data center projects** 
 from design through commissioning and handover. The role will take full ownership of project execution, ensuring delivery within agreed timelines, budget, qua
data.jd_text:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Senior Project Manager** 
 to lead the delivery of
 **hyperscale, mission\-critical data center projects** 
 from design through commissioning and handover. The role will take full ownership of project execution, ensuring delivery within agreed timelines, budget, quality standards, and risk parameters while managing multidisciplinary teams across civil, structural, MEP, and ICT systems.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead the full lifecycle delivery of hyperscale data center projects, from design through to commissioning and final handover.
* Develop and implement execution strategies, phasing plans, and master schedules aligned with project objectives.
* Ensure full compliance with international standards, regulatory requirements, and client specifications.
* Establish and manage baseline project schedules using Primavera P6 or MS Project.
* Perform delay analysis, develop recovery plans, and implement effective risk mitigation strategies.
* Identify critical dependencies and proactively manage project constraints to avoid delays.
* Lead and manage multidisciplinary teams across Civil, MEP, ICT, and Commissioning functions.
* Coordinate closely with clients, consultants, contractors, and relevant authorities to ensure smooth project execution.
* Support commercial activities including claims management, RFIs, and change control processes.
* Oversee all levels of Testing and Commissioning (Level 1 to Level 5\), ensuring adherence to project requirements.
* Ensure successful integrated systems testing and seamless project handover to operations.
* Drive completion of all technical documentation and ensure full operational readiness.
* Maintain accurate project dashboards, progress reports, and performance tracking systems.
* Present clear and structured updates to senior management and key stakeholders.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of PMO processes, governance frameworks, and delivery standards.



  





**Qualifications \& Experience** 



* Minimum 10\+ years of project management experience, with strong exposure to data center or mission\-critical projects.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or a related discipline.
* Proven track record in managing large\-scale, multidisciplinary projects from initiation to handover.
* Strong expertise in project scheduling, delay analysis, and recovery planning using Primavera P6 or MS Project.
* Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, and communication skills.
* Solid understanding of data center delivery risks, constraints, and industry best practices.
* Professional certifications such as PMP, PMI\-SP, or AACE PSP are preferred; knowledge of Uptime Institute and ASHRAE standards is an advantage.

**Description**
**About the role**
 As a Project Manager, you will be responsible to oversees the initiation, planning, implementation, monitoring \& Controlling and closure of specific project(s)bv/ assignments from start until delivery, in\-line with QAS vision and mission ensuring the specified project scope and deliverables are successfully delivered in a successful, efficient and cost effective manner.
   

  

**Th** 
**e** 
**key responsibilities are**
 ▪ Design and deliver project management plans as directed, to develop practical application of works in a way that contributes to the success of the project and its Strategic Plan
   

  

 ▪ Managing all assigned project\-related assignments including overall planning, tracking and documentation of one or several projects from the project proposal phase to the project closeout of all assigned QAS Projects within budget and timeline.
   

  

 ▪ Responsible to develop and implement analytical reports for tendering and commercial structure to create a feedback system for senior management.
   

  

 ▪ Support continuous improvement through cost modelling techniques and processes, identifying in order to accomplish cost optimisation opportunities for QAS.
   

  

 ▪ Evaluate current business practices, looking for ways to improve productivity, reduce costs, and make the best use of the business's resources.
   

  

 ▪ Plan and schedule project timelines providing regular updates to the QAS management.
   

  

 ▪ Define project tasks and resource requirements, liaising with the other departments' managers
   

  

 ▪ Work with executive leadership, Line Managers, HOD and other staff to develop appropriate design, evaluation and reporting tools for project work.
   

  

 ▪ Communicate issues to the Line Manager as soon as noticed them and update of project schedule, budget and Milestones at all times in order to achieve successfully delivery of assigned projects.
   

  

 ▪ Monitor, control and manage project budgets notifying the Line manager to any discrepancies and
   

  

 providing regular reporting as directed. Anticipate issues that may cause budget to overrun and setup
   

  

 budget control measures. Check regularly that every deadline is still possible, and report any delays as soon as possible.
   

  

 ▪ Work with and co\-ordinate associates and other members of staff to ensure that projects are delivered on time, within budget and to specification.
   

  

 ▪ Monitor of business processes, business rules, metrics and standard operating procedures as a result of improvement initiatives. Monitor and Track the project's progress at every state, from start\-up through every activity until the project sponsor accepts the final product. Track project deliverables using appropriate systems and tools and report as required
   

  

 ▪ Make sure the assigned project documents are developed, maintained, updated and completes all project documents in the project library ensuring the accuracy of each document.
   

  

 ▪ Identify and manage the Risks until resolution and make sure to register it to the Risk Register. Discuss the register at team meetings and Project Steering Committee meetings. Mention any new risks you identify to the manager and develop mitigation actions to tackle the risks until resolution.
   

  

 ▪ Implement and manage project changes and interventions to achieve project outputs as directed by the line manager.
   

  

 ▪ Plans and oversees the work of project personnel, developments and implementation of operating policies to ensure timely task completion, and prepares progress reports. Sets goals and deadlines by which
   

  

 subordinates must complete duties and performs periodic staff evaluations.
   

  

 ▪ Communicate project evaluations and assessment of results as directed and report to the line Manager.
   

  

 ▪ Draft and oversee the production of communications tools for any event, including reports, presentations, video and social media output.
   

  

 ▪ Perform other department duties related to his / her position as directed by the Head of the Department
   

  

**Be Part Of An Extraordinary Story**
 Your skills. Your imagination. Your ambition. Here, there are no boundaries to your potential and the impact you can make. You’ll find infinite opportunities to grow and work on the biggest, most rewarding challenges that will build your skills and experience. You have the chance to be a part of our future, and build the life you want while being part of an international community.
   

  

 Our best is here and still to come. To us, impossible is only a challenge. Join us as we dare to achieve what’s never been done before.
   

  

 Together, everything is possible.
   

  

 Qualification

 Without a Degree:

 Diploma Based on Role) with Minimum 7 years of job\-related experience
   

  

 OR
   

  

**With a Degree**
 ▪ Grade 8: External \& Internal: Bachelor’s Degree or Equivalent with Minimum 6 years of job\-related
   

  

**Experience**
 For Qatari Nationals
   

  

 ▪ Grade 8: Bachelor's Degree or Equivalent without prior experience
   

  

**Essential**
 ▪ Experience of working within a multicultural environment
   

  

**Preferred**
 ▪ Experience in Ground Handling Operation
   

  

**▪ Project Management Course And/ Or Qualifications**
**About Qatar Airways Group:**
 Our story started with four aircraft. Today, we deliver excellence across 12 different businesses coming together as one. We’ve grown fast, broken records and set trends that others follow. We don’t slow down by the fear of failure. Instead, we dare to achieve what’s never been done before.
   

  

 So whether you’re creating a unique experience for our customers or innovating behind the scenes, every person contributes to our proud story. A story of spectacular growth and determination. Now is the time to bring your best ideas and passion to a place where your ambition will know no boundaries, and be part of a truly global community.

**Greetings from Linnk Group** 








**Job Summary** 




 We are looking for an experienced Project Manager to lead the delivery of City OS platform and smart city enabler projects, including integration, data platforms, APIs, IoT, cybersecurity, and shared digital services. * Manage end\-to\-end delivery of City OS and enabler technology projects

**Preferred** 



* PMP / PRINCE2 certification
