 Provides administrative \& Logistical support to the Project Manager. Coordinates departmental, functional meetings, logistics support and other activities for the team. Proactively addresses potential problems in order to ensure an efficient functioning office. Intimately familiar wit
data.jd_text:
**Overview**
 Provides administrative \& Logistical support to the Project Manager. Coordinates departmental, functional meetings, logistics support and other activities for the team. Proactively addresses potential problems in order to ensure an efficient functioning office. Intimately familiar with day\-to\-day operations of all functional areas within the program and manages administrative duties for all personnel. Proactively manages phone calls, calendar and travel arrangements for Project Manager. Keeps PM on schedule throughout the work day. Time management a must. Individual will be responsible for assisting Project Manager and Deputy Project Manager and Director of Operations along with Shift Supervisors with administrative duties. Must be able to take the initiative and solve problems with minimal guidance.
   

  

 This position description is subject to change at any time as needed to meet the requirements of the
   

  

 program or company.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Supervise the Admin/Logistical Support Specialist, HR Admin, \& Finance Analyst, as the team performs the following tasks in support of the project:
* Prepare administrative reports for COS3 in support of various military organizations and higher headquarters.
* (Weekly reports, timesheets, etc.) utilizing various Microsoft Office tools as directed by Project Manager or designated representative.
* Prepare metrics as directed by Project Manager in support of Statement of Work.
* Interface with PMO personnel in support of above\-mentioned functions as well as Project Manager's Office (PMO) and its staff.
* Keep track of personnel assigned to the country location as well as those temporarily
* assigned. Will also be POC for all individuals within the country who are on administrative hold for whatever reason until they return to normal duty status and/or released from work.
* Assist with in\-processing/out\-processing. Will ensure where possible any necessary paperwork for items such as badges are completed prior to arrival of personnel.
* Will support the logistic supply chain function of Vectrus HQ as well as regional logistics operations support.
* This position requires a strong background in logistics with proven accomplishments with cross\-functional teamwork, experience collaborating with remote teams and solid negotiation skills. As such, we are seeking someone with excellent communication and leadership skills to function as a main interface for vendors and subcontractors within their assigned scope.
* Will be part of and cooperate with and direct the Vectrus Supply Chain Team in Doha, Qatar, with regards to support for the COS3 Project.
* Must be comfortable in collaborating with subcontractors/suppliers and providing a summary of the discussions.
* Ensure materials and resources and services flow through the system in a timely manner.
* Manage COS3 on\-CAS and off\-CAS housing assignments and vehicle assignments and the respective data/fuel tracking and usage.
* The Manager must have good planning skills and the ability to anticipate problems and develop a plan of action to prevent delays in the delivery workflow.
* The Admin/Log Manager must communicate with individuals at various levels in the organization and may be required to prepare budget, discrepancy, tracing, time of delivery, delay, and develop KPI standards.
* Maintain applicable Project directives, regulations, manuals, and guidelines.
* Properly account for, control, transmit, transport, package and safeguard protected material and documents. Track accountability records, schedule inventories and maintain hand receipts.
* Assist in certifying and receiving visitor clearances and accesses.
* Assist management in the oversite of program personnel, information, and physical and technical security actions and procedures.
* Provide technical assistance with the processing of eligibility requests.
* Aid with annual self\-assessments.
* Assist in the creation and routing of documentation/reports as they relate to security incidents that occur within the office.
* Assist with timekeeping functions and training and tracking of status of both systems/requirements.
* Performs other duties and assignments as required and/or assigned by the Project Manager.


**Qualifications**
* Education / Certifications: One\-year related experience may be substituted for one year of education, if degree is required.
+ High School/GED, 3\+ years, Performs complex tasks
+ Prefer military veteran.
+ May be required to qualify for and maintain Secret clearance; if not required maintain a CAC card and/or DBIDS or DoS badging requirements, when published.

* Experience:
+ 10\+ Years Related Administrative Experience

* Skills \& Technology Used:
+ Experience in normal office functions: phone, fax, machine, scanner, desktop computer, to include working knowledge of Microsoft Office software.

* Other Requirements:
+ You must satisfy all host country requirements to legally work in the host country to be qualified for this position.
+ This position requires a strong background in administration \& logistics with proven accomplishments with cross\-functional teamwork, experience collaborating with remote teams and solid negotiation skills.
+ We are seeking someone who is a self\-starter and takes the initiative with excellent communication and leadership skills to function as a main interface for vendors and subcontractors within their assigned scope.

* Supervisory Responsibilities:
+ Supervise Admin/Log Specialist, Fiance Analyst (potentially), and HR Admin. General Supervision \& direction of all COS3 personnel as required when in situation demanding direction and leadership related to Admin \& Logistics of the Project.


**At V2X, we are deeply committed to both equal employment opportunity, including protection for Veterans and individuals with disabilities, and fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We ensure all individuals are treated with fairness, respect, and dignity, recognizing the strength that comes from a workforce rich in diverse experiences, perspectives, and skills. This commitment, aligned with our core Vision and Values of Integrity, Respect, and Responsibility, allows us to leverage differences, encourage innovation, and expand our success in the global marketplace, ultimately enabling us to best serve our clients.**

data.title: Delivery Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Who You'll Work With**
 Driving lasting impact and building long\-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture \- doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try anoth
data.jd_text:
**Who You'll Work With**
 Driving lasting impact and building long\-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture \- doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.
   

  

 In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.
   

  

 When you join us, you will have:
   

  

* Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast\-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
* A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
* Global community: With colleagues across 65\+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
* World\-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well\-being for you and your family.


**Your Impact**
 In this role, you will take ownership of delivering a small project or an independent workstream within a larger initiative, creating functionally aligned plans with clear initiatives and timelines.
   

  

 You will work alongside public\-sector and healthcare client leaders and other McKinsey teams to design and implement innovative solutions. You’ll actively manage client relationships during the project, supervising or working closely with client teams to achieve project goals. You’ll be part of the project team on the ground, monitoring and evaluating performance and efficiency, and coaching less tenured team members.
   

  

 You will strive to build client capabilities through continuous, on\-the\-job coaching to ensure sustained impact beyond the end of the project. You’ll specialize in one or more service lines and will become a subject matter expert in your chosen sector or function.
   

  

 You’ll strengthen the firm’s knowledge base by codifying learnings from projects and sharing your knowledge with your teams. You’ll chart your own development journey, attending formal training programs, working with the partners you find most inspiring, and focusing on the business areas you are most passionate about.
   

  

 Experience with digital transformations in the public sector will be highly relevant for this role, particularly in navigating the unique challenges and opportunities associated with implementing large\-scale initiatives.
   

  

**Your Qualifications and Skills**
* Undergraduate degree in business, economics, engineering or a related field with an outstanding academic record
* 6\+ years of consulting/business experience, with a clear record of achievements and proven drive for personal growth; international experience is a plus
* Digital Transformation experience within the public sector is highly desirable
* Demonstrated experience in one or more of the following key service offerings is a plus: organizational development (including org. design/set up, talent management, etc.), transformational delivery (implementing large transformational programs), and productivity and performance improvement
* Ability to successfully manage and deliver small – medium sized projects and/or manage small units with budget responsibility
* Superior problem solving and relationship building skills, including a demonstrated high level of client service commitment
* Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and with people across all levels of an organization
* Proven ability to lead, coach, and develop teams
* Willingness to travel, predominantly within the EEMA region
* Effective communication skills to explain complex ideas effectively in English and Arabic

data.jd_text:
**🚀 Welcome to Your Next Adventure!**
 We’re looking for a freelance
 **Graphic Designer with strong illustration skills** 
 to collaborate with us on a project.
   

  

 We’re currently preparing the interior of our new office and are looking for a versatile designer who can help create graphic concepts for different wall spaces across the office. The project may include a variety of graphic formats — from large murals to typographic compositions, pictograms, and illustrative elements
   

  

 The project will be developed in collaboration with the
 **Snoonu Art Director and design team** 
 , exploring visual directions and creating graphics aligned with the
 **Snoonu brand identity** 
 .
   

  

**🛠 What You’ll Get Your Hands On**
* Develop graphic concepts and illustrations for different office wall spaces that integrate with the Snoonu brand identity
* Depending on the space and concept, the work may include different types of graphic content such as illustrations, icons and pictograms, typographic compositions, graphic patterns, decorative elements, and adaptations of the Snoonu mascot within the interior graphics
* Prepare interior mockups to present design concepts in context
* Collaborate with the Art Director and design team during the concept and refinement stages
* Prepare production\-ready files for wall graphics implementation


**🧙‍♂️ The Magic You Bring**
* Senior\-level graphic designer with strong illustration skills
* Ability to adapt to different visual references and styles
* Strong sense of composition, typography, and graphic storytelling
* Experience creating illustrations, icons, and graphic systems
* Ability to translate ideas into large\-scale environmental graphics
* Experience preparing mockups and presentation visuals
* Ability to prepare production\-ready files
* Strong portfolio demonstrating illustration and graphic design work


**✨ Bonus Points If You Have**
* Experience working on wall graphics, murals, or environmental graphics
* Experience working within established brand systems
* Experience collaborating with creative teams or art directors


 Project Details
   

  

* Format: Freelance / remote
* Location of project: Snoonu office, Lusail (Qatar)
* Project duration: Approximately 6 months


**Inside Snoonu’s Universe**
 Snoonu is Qatar’s homegrown Super App, reinventing daily life with blazing\-fast delivery, shopping, and more – all in one place. Powered by tech, driven by a global team, and obsessed with making life easier.
   

  

**The Dream We’re Chasing**
 To be the first Qatari Ultra App that propels the region and its community through innovation and technology. We have global ambitions where what we do surpasses norms and limitations every time.
   

  

**The Quest We’re On**
 To radically transform how people live by leveraging technology to connect them with endless possibilities.
   

  

**Our Everyday Superpowers**
**👥 Be Customer Obsessed** 
 : “Focus on the customer and all else will follow.”
   

  

**💪 Act with Integrity:** 
 “We are honest, ethical, and trustworthy in everything we do.”
   

  

**🧪 Be Curious and Creative:** 
 “We constantly innovate and create solutions to bring a lasting positive impact.”
   

  

**🏅Lead by Example and Take Ownership:** 
 “Be the change you want to see and take ownership.”
   

  

**🚀 Work Smart and Deliver Results** 
 : “You can do more by doing less, better, and faster.”
   

  

**👨‍💼 It's All About People:** 
 “Be a team player; together we are stronger.”
   

  

**Perks \& Worklife Magic At Snoonu**
**🌐 Global Vibes** 
 – Collaborate with a worldwide crew.
   

  

**🧠 Brain Boosters** 
 – Learning budgets, access to courses, and tools for your growth.
   

  

 🚒
 **Builder’s Playground** 
 – Own your tasks, own your path! We’re big on autonomy.
   

  

 🏝️
 **Flexible Time Off** 
 – We take recharging seriously. Generous leave and wellness policies.
   

  

 🛠️
 **Agile Everything** 
 – Scrum isn’t a buzzword here. It’s how we roll, from product to ops.
   

  

**Great Place to Work® Certified**
 We’re certified as a Great Place to Work®, a recognition that celebrates a culture we’ve built together where people come first, always. This certification reflects our commitment to creating a workplace where everyone feels valued, empowered, and inspired to do their best work.
   

  

**Certified for Excellence**
 Our ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018 certifications demonstrate our dedication to world\-class quality and a safe, supportive workplace, reinforcing our promise to deliver exceptional service while prioritizing the wellbeing of our people.
   

  

**Beyond the Code: Giving Back Matters**
 We don’t just build apps. We’re committed to doing business sustainably and giving back to the community that fuels us. From eco\-conscious practices to CSR projects, we’re always finding ways to do better—and we invite you to be a part of that mission.
   

  

**Diversity Isn’t Just a Buzzword**
 At Snoonu, fairness and inclusion are the foundation of everything we do. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity workplace that welcomes people from every walk of life. Be bold. Be you. Thrive here.

data.title: IND Head , Qatar
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**
 The IND Head, Qatar leads the Industry \& Energy TIC business within the assigned geography, with full accountability for strategy, growth, profitability, and customer satisfaction across upstream, downstream, power, and renewable energy sectors. This role drives end\-to\-end busine
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
 The IND Head, Qatar leads the Industry \& Energy TIC business within the assigned geography, with full accountability for strategy, growth, profitability, and customer satisfaction across upstream, downstream, power, and renewable energy sectors. This role drives end\-to\-end business performance — from tendering and contract negotiation to project delivery and asset lifecycle management — ensuring operational excellence, safety, and compliance across all activities. The position requires deep understanding of CAPEX project execution, commissioning, shutdowns, turnarounds, and asset integrity programs within complex industrial environments. The Industry Manager serves as the face of Bureau Veritas, representing its values of Trust, Responsibility, Ambition, and Ethics, and positioning the company as the preferred TIC partner for critical energy infrastructure.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Strategic Leadership \& P\&L Management**
* Define and execute the Industry \& Energy business strategy across Oil \& Gas (upstream, midstream, downstream), Power, Utilities, and Renewables.
* Own full P\&L responsibility, delivering revenue growth, profitability, and cash targets.
* Develop and manage annual sales, revenue, and profit budgets aligned with company goals.
* identify and capture growth opportunities in major CAPEX projects, operating assets, and new energy transitions (hydrogen, CCUS, solar, wind, nuclear, etc.).
* Integrate digital inspection, condition monitoring, and asset performance technologies to strengthen service differentiation.


**Business Development, Tendering \& Contracting**
* Lead opportunity identification, bid preparation, tender response, and contract finalization for complex industrial projects.
* Work closely with sales, marketing, and operations to build winning proposals for EPCs, operators, and utilities.
* Negotiate commercial terms and manage key frame agreements and long\-term service contracts.
* Maintain direct access to C\-suite and senior stakeholders within client organizations and industry bodies.
* Develop partnerships and local alliances to expand market reach and achieve business growth.


**Operational Excellence \& Project Delivery**
* Oversee safe, timely, and high\-quality delivery of all testing, inspection, and certification services across:
* CAPEX project phases: engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning, and start\-up
* Operations phases: asset integrity management, shutdowns, turnarounds, maintenance, reliability, and life extension programs
* Ensure compliance with international codes, client specifications, and local regulatory frameworks.
* Drive operational efficiency, standardization, and productivity across sites, labs, and field teams.
* Monitor delivery KPIs (on\-time completion, utilization, safety performance, customer feedback) and act decisively on deviations.
* Champion a customer\-centric delivery model recognized for quality and reliability.


**Experience**
* 15\+ years professional work experience, preferably in the following areas:
+ Design, Operations and Maintenance in the Oil \& Gas, Power and Utilities, and Renewables sectors
+ Testing, Inspection \& Certification (TIC) services
+ Business development activities
+ Sales and Marketing experience


**Education**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering or a related technical discipline (Master’s preferred).
* Additional qualifications in Business Administration, Project Management, or Maintenance and Asset Integrity desirable

data.location: Al Khor, Al Khor and Al Thakhira, Qatar
data.raw_snippet:
**HEAD OF SCIENCE (Physics or Biology Specialism)**
**Nord Anglia International School Al Khor (NAISAK), Qatar**
**Job Overview**
**Head of Science (Physics or Biology Specialism)**
 Nord Anglia International School Al Khor is looking to appoint an outstanding Head of Science (Physics or Biology Spe
data.jd_text:
**HEAD OF SCIENCE (Physics or Biology Specialism)**
**Nord Anglia International School Al Khor (NAISAK), Qatar**
**Job Overview**
**Head of Science (Physics or Biology Specialism)**
 Nord Anglia International School Al Khor is looking to appoint an outstanding Head of Science (Physics or Biology Specialism) to lead the Science Department and join a well\-established, supportive team in a highly successful and expanding school.
   

  

**About You**
 You will be an exemplary teaching practitioner, with the ability to become an outstanding Head of Science. Together with the Senior Leadership Team, you will work to develop a vision for excellence and continual improvement at NAISAK. You must have the ability to lead and manage people by creating a culture where colleagues are both supported and challenged to deliver the best possible learning experience for students. You should be capable of developing a highly motivated team by nurturing positive working relationships built on respect, trust, support, and recognition. You will lead improvement through rigorous self\-evaluation of science performance and use quality assurance feedback to identify improvement priorities moving forward. You should already demonstrate excellent management skills such as resource management, curriculum planning, data analysis, performance tracking, task delegation and the organisation of meetings.
   

  

 You will be asked to lead a learning culture where students are supported, challenged, and inspired to be the best they can be, students in classes across the Science will believe there are no limits to what can be achieved. Your excellent motivation and communication skills enable you to create a feeling of energy, excitement, and personal investment within all lessons across the department.
   

  

 Receptive to feedback and ready to embrace change, you will be keen to share best practice with colleagues and peers. As a strong ambassador for the school, you will be able to develop new ways to engage students and parents across Secondary school, and the wider Nord Anglia Education communities. Your strong motivation and communication skills will also enable you to create a feeling of energy, excitement, and personal investment within the classroom.
   

  

 Since NAISAK offers a Sixth Form, knowledge of AS/A levels would be an advantage.
   

  

 Finally, you must also be able to meet visa\-related restrictions for Qatar, including possession of a Bachelor's degree and a teaching qualification from a face\-to\-face (non\-online) course.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Join our dynamic international education environment, where you will lead the delivery of a bespoke Secondary curriculum, built on the English National Curriculum. You will be preparing students at NAISAK for external examinations at IGSCE, AS \& A Level. You will lead the development of a culture in which students are challenged to be ambitious learners and teachers are required to be innovative to enhance the student experience and outcomes.
   

  

 Your educational philosophy will equip you to meet the needs of all learners, including those who have English as a second language, and you must be able to teach students with a range of prior achievement, knowledge, and skills. Your expertise and planning adaptability will allow you to map out pathways for all students to progress in your subject, creating opportunities for all learners to achieve success based on individualised targets. You will contribute to good practice by demonstrating a collegiate approach to departmental development and sharing strategies with colleagues.
   

  

 As Head of Science, you will be responsible for leading the planning, delivery and evaluation of the curriculum, teaching and learning, assessment, reporting and for the professional development of teachers in your team.
   

  

 Please refer to the Job Description of the role for the following information:
   

  

  

* Job purpose
* Reporting to
* Key relationships
* Key results areas
* Performance measurement


**About Our School**
 Nord Anglia International School Al Khor (NAISAK) is a highly successful, growing school with a committed and inspirational team of teaching professionals at its heart. Our close\-knit, supportive team is proud to be at the centre of the local community, educating over 1350 young people aged 3\-18\. Secondary is 4\-form entry at Key Stage 3, and 3\-form entry in KS4 upwards, with approximately 530 students aged 11\-18\.
   

  

 Our school resides in the town of Al Khor, 35 minutes north of Doha (the capital of Qatar). We educate both local and expat students through a bespoke Secondary curriculum which draws on both the English National curriculum and the Qatar Ministry of Education curriculum.
   

  

 The school is focused on supporting students towards enhanced English language acquisition, excellent academic outcomes and outstanding learning experiences through STEAM, Performing Arts, extra\-curricular activities, residential trips, and international awards for wider achievement.
   

  

 The school prides itself on fostering student wellbeing, personalisation of learning and a strong sense of multiculturalism and global citizenship. We also have strong through\-school links and ensure consistent progression from Primary to Secondary to offer all our students a rewarding learning journey. The Primary school buildings have recently undergone further refurbishment following the opening of a brand\-new Secondary building in August 2019\. Our students also now benefit from a new 25m outdoor pool.
   

  

 To learn more about NAISAK, please visit
   

  

 https://www.nordangliaeducation.com/nais\-al\-khor
   

  

**About Nord Anglia Education**
 Each Nord Anglia Education school is unique in character and designed to meet the needs of its community. We are united by our philosophy, to be ambitious for our students, our people, and our family of schools. We believe that being part of our family of schools gives them a special advantage. Working together, we can achieve more than we can individually. Our schools have access to a wide range of resources and support to enhance their success. We also create unique opportunities to benefit our students and people, such as the Global Campus, Nord Anglia University, and our collaborations with The Juilliard School, MIT, UNICEF, and King's College London.
   

  

 When you join a Nord Anglia Education school, you join a global community of more than 13,000 people working together to support our students' success. We offer you unsurpassed opportunities to innovate and develop best practice across our family, to access extensive professional development, and to gain exceptional experience and career development in our schools. At Nord Anglia, you will have opportunities to progress more, learn more, and collaborate more.
   

  

 Our collaborations with The Juilliard School, MIT, UNICEF, and King's College London, offer our teachers unrivalled access to leading experts in their fields. We also offer selected candidates from our staff worldwide an opportunity to earn their Executive Master's in International Education in an exclusive collaboration with King's College London.
   

  

 Alongside great training and a competitive package, you'll enjoy the chance to live and work in one of the world's most vibrant countries.
   

  

 As a Nord Anglia Education teacher, you enjoy the following benefits:
   

  

  

* A fast\-paced, global experience so that you can progress on a global scale
* An enabling environment founded on creativity, challenge and collaboration
* A culture that is fair and consultative
* Unique opportunities to grow professionally and develop your career
* Opportunities to apply for further leadership positions


**Essential**
**EXPERIENCE / QUALIFICATIONS SOUGHT**
* University degree in Physics or Biology
* Teaching qualification (QTS ,PGCE/PGDE )
* At least 6 to 9 years of teaching experience within the British curriculum
* Extensive knowledge of the English National curriculum to IGCSE


**Desirable**
* Prior middle leadership experience, for example as a Head of Subject
* Master's degree, or other significant professional development
* Previous international experience


**PERSONAL QUALITIES SOUGHT**
* Fluent English speaker
* Values\-led approach; integrity and honesty are paramount
* Reliability, loyalty and commitment
* Personal confidence and presence
* Energetic and positive with a ‘can\-do' approach
* Strong interpersonal skills
* Effective communication skills, both orally and in writing
* Approachable to all; able to show respect and display cultural sensitivity
* Sense of humour and grace under pressure
* Ability to understand complex issues and solve problems
* Able to manage own time and prioritise; organized
* Flexible and adaptable; able to handle uncertainty
* Able to delegate effectively


**To apply**
 Please apply for this vacancy using our recruitment portal.
   

  

 Online applications should contain a CV, a two\-page letter of application and the details of three professional references.
   

  

**Closing date for applications:** 
 30th June 2026
   

  

**Start date for this role:** 
 1st August 2026
   

  

**Selection Process**
 Applicants should submit a CV, letter of application, and the details of three professional referees, one of which should be your current Principal/Head Teacher. Interviews will be conducted at the school or via Microsoft Teams.
   

  

 Please visit us online at www.nordangliaeducation.jobs
   

  

 Please note, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
   

  

**Safeguarding**
 At Nord Anglia Education we are committed to providing a world class, safe, happy environment in which children and young people can thrive and learn. We are committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of all our pupils irrespective of race, ability, religion, gender, or culture.
   

  

 All post holders having regular unsupervised contact with children are subject to appropriate national and international vetting procedures including satisfactory criminal record checks from both your country of residence/birth and any country of residence within the last 10 years.
   

  

 We are an equal opportunities employer, and we welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons.

data.jd_text:
Apply now
 **Job no:** 
 592505
   

  

**Contract type:** 
 Fixed Term Appointment
   

  

**Duty Station:** 
 Doha
   

  

**Location:** 
 Qatar
   

  

**Categories:** 
 Partnerships
   

  

 UNICEF works in over 190 countries and territories to save children’s lives, defend their rights, and help them fulfill their potential, from early childhood through adolescence.
   

  

 At UNICEF, we are committed, passionate, and proud of what we do for as long as we are needed. Promoting the rights of every child is not just a job – it is a calling.
   

  

 UNICEF is a place where careers are built: we offer our staff diverse opportunities for professional and personal development that will help them reinforce a sense of purpose while serving children and communities across the world. We welcome everyone who wants to belong and grow in a diverse and passionate culture, coupled with an attractive compensation and benefits package.
   

  

 Visit our website to learn more about what we do at UNICEF.
   

  

**For every child,
 *the right to a Champion***
**How can you make a difference?**
 UNICEF’s mission is to promote the rights of every child, everywhere, across programmes, advocacy and operations. In the Gulf region, this approach is being further strengthened through the GAO Reset, a strategic transformation that repositions UNICEF’s engagement model across the Gulf Area Office, including offices in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates. The Reset reflects a shift to models that integrates programme, partnerships and positioning to maximize impact for children globally. Within this sub\-regional ecosystem and strategic context, UNICEF operates in the GCC with a dual mandate: supporting national priorities while also serving as critical platforms for high\-value partnerships, policy influence and resource mobilization at scale. This positions the Gulf not only for engagement, but as a key driver of UNICEF’s global impact and sustainability.
   

  

**Purpose Of The Job**
 The Head of Office (Partnerships Manager) in Qatar reports to the GAO Director and works in close coordination with the Pillar Heads and the Head of Office for PRM in the UAE. Under the guidance of the Gulf Area Director, you are accountable for the overall management and delivery of the office’s programme and partnership commitments, as defined in the current APD (through end\-2026\) and the forthcoming framework for 2027–2031\. You represent UNICEF in Qatar and provide strategic leadership across partnerships and programme areas, ensuring UNICEF is strategically positioned to deliver of high\-quality results in line with UNICEF’s programme of cooperation, management plans, and the overall vision of the Gulf Area Office.
   

  

**Key Function**
* Building partnerships, resource mobilization and UN System coordination
* Programme Development and Management
* Management of UNICEF presence, staff and assets
* Knowledge Management and Quality of Partnerships and Programmes
* Optimum Use of Program Funds


 If you would like to know more about this position, please review the complete Job Description here: Classified Job Descriptions \- Head of Office\-Qatar April 13\.pdf
   

  

**To qualify as an advocate for every child you will have…**
**Minimum Requirements**
* Education: Master or equivalent (Advanced University Degree) in one of the following fields is required: Social Science, International Business Relations, Public Relations/Communication, Public or social policy, sociology, social or community development, or any other related fields.
* Work Experience: A minimum of 10 years of relevant work experience in Partnerships, Operations, Managerial and technical leadership in development cooperation, public financing in a substantial programme in HICs. UN system agency, private sector, and any other related fields.
* Skills: Partnerships, Programme Development, Management, Leadership, Deliver Results, Teamwork are required.
* Language Requirements: Fluency in English is required.


**Desirables**
* Language: Fluency in Arabic is highly desirable and considered as a strong asset. Knowledge of another official UN language (Chinese, French, Russian or Spanish) is an asset.
* Experience in the GCC context is considered as an asset.
* Relevant experience at country level, particularly in development, fragile settings and humanitarian contexts.


**For every Child, you demonstrate...**
 UNICEF's Core Values of Care, Respect, Integrity, Trust and Accountability and Sustainability (CRITAS) underpin everything we do and how we do it. Get acquainted with Our Values Charter: UNICEF Values
   

  

**UNICEF Competencies Required For This Post Are…**
* Builds and maintains partnerships
* Demonstrates self\-awareness and ethical awareness
* Drive to achieve results for impact
* Innovates and embraces change
* Manages ambiguity and complexity
* Thinks and acts strategically
* Works collaboratively with others


 Familiarize yourself with our competency framework and its different levels.
   

  

 This position has been assessed as an elevated risk role for Child Safeguarding purposes as it is either a role with direct contact with children, a role that works directly with identifiable children's data, a safeguarding response role, or an assessed risk role. Additional vetting and assessment for elevated risk roles in child safeguarding (potentially including additional criminal background checks) apply.
   

  

 UNICEF promotes and advocates for the protection of the rights of every child, everywhere, in everything it does and is mandated to support the realization of the rights of every child, including those most disadvantaged, and our global workforce must reflect the diversity of those children. The UNICEF family is committed to include everyone, irrespective of their race/ethnicity, disability, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, socio\-economic background, minority, or any other status.
   

  

 UNICEF encourages applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of gender, nationality, religious or ethnic backgrounds, and from people with disabilities, including neurodivergence. We offer a wide range of benefits to our staff, including paid parental leave, breastfeeding breaks and reasonable accommodation for persons with disabilities. UNICEF provides reasonable accommodation throughout the recruitment process. If you require any accommodation, please submit your request through the accessibility email button on the UNICEF Careers webpage Accessibility \| UNICEF. Should you be shortlisted, please get in touch with the recruiter directly to share further details, enabling us to make the necessary arrangements in advance.
   

  

 UNICEF does not hire candidates who are married to children (persons under 18\). UNICEF has a zero\-tolerance policy on conduct that is incompatible with the aims and objectives of the United Nations and UNICEF, including sexual exploitation and abuse, sexual harassment, abuse of authority and discrimination based on gender, nationality, age, race, sexual orientation, religious or ethnic background or disabilities. UNICEF is committed to promote the protection and safeguarding of all children. All selected candidates will, therefore, undergo rigorous reference and background checks, and will be expected to adhere to these standards and principles. Background checks will include the verification of academic credential(s) and employment history. Selected candidates may be required to provide additional information to conduct a background check, and selected candidates with disabilities may be requested to submit supporting documentation in relation to their disability confidentially.
   

  

 UNICEF appointments are subject to medical clearance.  Issuance of a visa by the host country of the duty station is required for IP positions and will be facilitated by UNICEF. Appointments may also be subject to inoculation (vaccination) requirements, including against SARS\-CoV\-2 (Covid). Should you be selected for a position with UNICEF, you either must be inoculated as required or receive a medical exemption from the relevant department of the UN. Otherwise, the selection will be canceled.
   

  

**Remarks**
 As per Article 101, paragraph 3, of the Charter of the United Nations, the paramount consideration in the employment of the staff is the necessity of securing the highest standards of efficiency, competence, and integrity.
   

  

 UNICEF is committed to fostering an inclusive, representative, and welcoming workforce. For this position, eligible and suitable female candidates are encouraged to apply.
   

  

 Government employees who are considered for employment with UNICEF are normally required to resign from their government positions before taking up an assignment with UNICEF. UNICEF reserves the right to withdraw an offer of appointment, without compensation, if a visa or medical clearance is not obtained, or necessary inoculation requirements are not met, within a reasonable period for any reason.
   

  

 UNICEF does not charge a processing fee at any stage of its recruitment, selection, and hiring processes (i.e., application stage, interview stage, validation stage, or appointment and training). UNICEF will not ask for applicants' bank account information.
   

  

 Mobility is a condition of international professional employment with UNICEF and an underlying premise of the international civil service.
   

  

 Humanitarian action is a cross\-cutting priority within UNICEF's Strategic Plan. UNICEF is committed to stay and deliver in humanitarian contexts. Therefore, all staff, at all levels across all functional areas, can be called upon to be deployed to support humanitarian response, contributing to both strengthening resilience of communities and capacity of national authorities.
   

  

 All UNICEF positions are advertised, and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted and advance to the next stage of the selection process. An internal candidate performing at the level of the post in the relevant functional area, or an internal/external candidate in the corresponding Talent Group, may be selected, if suitable for the post, without assessment of other candidates.
   

  

 Additional information about working for UNICEF can be found here.
   

  

**Advertised:** 
 16 Apr 2026 Arab Standard Time
   

  

**Deadline:** 
 30 Apr 2026 Arab Standard Time
   

  

 Back to search results Apply now
   

  

 Whatsapp Facebook LinkedIn Email App

 We are an equal opportunities employer, and we welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons.

data.title: Associate Director - Technology Economics & Performance
data.raw_snippet:
**Our business landscape** 




  





 We’re an award\-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is gui
data.jd_text:
**Our business landscape** 




  





 We’re an award\-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five key pillars:
 



  




* **Value\-Focused Portfolio:** 
 Boosting asset returns by focusing on telco operations, towers, data centres, the sea cable business and fintech.



  




* **Strengthen the Core:** 
 Optimally using deployed capital and maintain an appropriate cost structure.



  




* **Evolve the Core:** 
 Monetising opportunities to generate new revenue streams via programmes focusing on analytics, digitalisation of operations, and partnerships with digital service providers.



  




* **People:** 
 Building an engaged and empowered workforce through integrated learning programs and coaching and mentoring.



  




* **Excellence in Customer Experience:** 
 Creating superior customer experiences.



  





 From day one, every employee who joins our team becomes an integral part of our success journey. We offer you the chance to enhance your skills, advance your career, and maintain a healthy work\-life balance. Empowering you to catapult your personal and professional growth. If you’re looking to challenge your growth potential, Ooredoo is the employer for you.
 



  





**Job overview** 




  




* Provide Group\-level expertise in Technology Planning and Performance Management across the OpCos
* The role holder maintains close contact with Technology Directors at the operating companies and works closely with other members of the technology teams to enable capital efficient network plans.



  





**Your impact on our goals** 




  




* Supports definition of Group\-wide technology evolution strategy, aligned with overall Group strategy
* Supports the review of operating company strategic plans and budgets for Technologies and assess them for alignment to the overall group strategic plan and aims, identifying any misalignment or gaps and working with the OpCo’s to achieve alignment.
* Closely collaborates with other members of the technology team to drive overall vision, strategy, technology road maps, world\-class network architectures, and enable capital efficient network plans.
* Supports the review of OpCo projects and orders ensuring alignment with Group price books, practices, architectures and roadmaps
* Supports the establishment of Group\-wide guidelines, standards, and KPIs to support Technology solutions and platform performance, capacity monitoring and dimensioning.
* Monitor SLAs and KPIs for all OpCos
* Supports the liaison with Group Strategy to review OpCo business and technology plans and align on relevant performance targets and KPIs
* Supports Group Planning \& Performance Management in performance reviews and proposing corrective measures
* Participate in the development, analysis and review of technical/cost modelling for business cases/TCO, RFI/RFQ specifications and evaluations and technical/commercial trials of relevant technologies.
* Input into the development of Group\-level Technology roadmaps and architecture best practices
* Supports the Competency Centres under the Technology Leadership Team (TLT) direction.



  





**Experience and Qualifications** 




  




* 12 years’ experience directly related to the duties and responsibilities specified
* Previously held any of the following positions or similar as a team leader or head at a major telecommunications operating company, in:
* NW and/or IT Planning,
* NW and/or IT Performance,
* Technology Investments \& Demand.
* International experience
* Experience in Ooredoo Group OPCOs is a plus.
* In\-depth working knowledge of RAN, Tx, Core Networks and/or IT and Service Delivery is mandatory
* Extensive hands\-on experience in the planning, design and implementation and operation of Technology Systems in mobile and/or fixed networks
* Extensive hands\-on experience in the planning, design and implementation and operation of NW and/or IT Performance Systems in mobile and/or fixed networks
* Vast knowledge of key mobile and/or fixed telecom NW \& IT systems, platforms, and technologies, including hardware and software components
* Strong knowledge of Telecom infrastructure technologies and end\-to\-end planning practices, implementation methods and cost optimization strategies, with a specialty in NW domains (RAN, Tx, CORE) and/or IT domains (BSS, OSS, Digital Channels)
* Knowledge and experience in systems integration techniques, system engineering, systems management,
* Current working experience with NW Technology products (Planning and Performance) from group frame vendors very desirable.
* Proven ability to translate marketing needs into engineering targets, ability to guide marketing through that process, and contribute to strategy formulation
* Proven experience with Agentic AI for automatic report generation, analysis and automation of processes is a plus
* Engineering Degree or equivalent.
* Industry training in RAN, Tx, core network platform technologies preferred
* International experience, preferably in the MENA or Asia regions.

data.title: Insurance Business Development Director
data.raw_snippet: The Insurance Business Development Director is responsible for driving the growth and strategic expansion of Estithmar Capital’s insurance portfolio. This role focuses on identifying investment opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and developing innovative insurance solutions across tradi
data.jd_text:
The Insurance Business Development Director is responsible for driving the growth and strategic expansion of Estithmar Capital’s insurance portfolio. This role focuses on identifying investment opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and developing innovative insurance solutions across traditional and digital channels.
 



 The position plays a critical role in aligning insurance initiatives with the firm’s broader investment strategy, ensuring sustainable growth, profitability, and market positioning across regional and international markets.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Portfolio Management** 



* Oversee and manage the firm’s insurance investments, partnerships, and ventures.
* Monitor financial and operational performance of insurance\-related assets.
* Develop and execute strategies to enhance portfolio value, profitability, and scalability.
* Prepare performance reports and insights for senior management and shareholders.



**2\. Business Development \& Investments** 



* Identify and evaluate new opportunities across:
* Insurance companies
* Insurtech platforms
* Brokerage firms
* Strategic distribution partnerships
* Lead end\-to\-end deal execution including sourcing, structuring, negotiation, and closing.
* Develop new revenue streams and scalable insurance business models.



**3\. Strategic Partnerships** 



* Build and manage relationships with:
* Insurance and reinsurance companies
* Brokers and intermediaries
* Financial institutions and banks
* Structure and negotiate distribution agreements, joint ventures, and alliances.
* Represent Estithmar Capital in key industry engagements and forums.



**4\. Market \& Industry Analysis** 



* Conduct in\-depth research on regional and global insurance markets.
* Identify emerging trends and opportunities such as:
* Digital insurance / Insurtech
* Bancassurance
* Embedded insurance
* Health and life insurance segments
* Provide strategic insights to support investment decisions.



**5\. Product Development \& Distribution** 



* Collaborate with partners to design and launch innovative insurance products.
* Develop multi\-channel distribution strategies including:
* Corporate partnerships
* Digital platforms
* Financial services ecosystems
* Drive go\-to\-market strategies for new insurance offerings.



**6\. Regulatory \& Compliance Coordination** 



* Ensure all insurance\-related activities comply with applicable regulatory frameworks.
* Liaise with regulatory bodies and supervisory authorities where required.
* Monitor regulatory developments impacting insurance and financial services sectors.



**7\. Financial \& Investment Analysis** 



* Conduct financial modeling, valuation, and due diligence for insurance investments.
* Assess profitability, capital requirements, and associated risks.
* Support investment committees with data\-driven recommendations and insights.



**Qualifications \& Experience** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Minimum
 **12–15 years of experience** 
 in insurance, financial services, or investment management.
* Strong exposure to:
* Insurance business development
* Investment structuring and partnerships
* Insurtech / digital insurance ecosystems
* Experience within
 **investment firms, insurance groups, or financial institutions** 
 is highly preferred.
* Regional (GCC) market experience is an advantage.



**Core Competencies** 



* Strong commercial and investment acumen
* Strategic thinking with execution capability
* Advanced financial modeling and analytical skills
* High\-level negotiation and stakeholder management
* Deep understanding of insurance value chains and distribution models
* Ability to operate in a fast\-paced, multi\-asset investment environment



**Regulatory Considerations** 



* May require regulatory approval depending on the scope of insurance and investment activities.
* Must ensure compliance with applicable financial services and insurance regulations.

data.title: Project Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Project Director – Water Treatment / Desalination – Saudi Arabia** 




 I am working on behalf of a leading organisation delivering some of the Middle East’s most high\-profile water infrastructure programmes, and we are looking to engage an experienced Project Director with a proven track record
data.jd_text:
**Project Director – Water Treatment / Desalination – Saudi Arabia** 




 I am working on behalf of a leading organisation delivering some of the Middle East’s most high\-profile water infrastructure programmes, and we are looking to engage an experienced Project Director with a proven track record across large\-scale water treatment and desalination projects in Saudi Arabia.
 



  





 This is a senior leadership opportunity to take ownership of major programmes that sit at the heart of the Kingdom’s long\-term water security and infrastructure strategy.
 



  





**The Opportunity** 




 You will be responsible for the full lifecycle delivery of complex water and wastewater treatment projects, from early engineering through to commissioning and handover. These are multi\-billion SAR programmes with significant strategic importance, requiring strong leadership across multidisciplinary teams and stakeholder environments.
 



  





 You will play a critical role in driving programme performance, managing risk, and ensuring delivery against cost, schedule and quality expectations within a highly regulated and fast\-paced environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of large\-scale water treatment / desalination projects
* Manage EPC / EPCM contractors and oversee full project execution strategy
* Drive programme governance, reporting, and performance management
* Ensure compliance with Saudi regulations, standards, and client requirements
* Lead and develop high\-performing project teams across engineering, construction, and project controls
* Manage senior stakeholder relationships across client, contractor, and government entities
* Oversee commissioning, testing, and handover phases



  





**What We Are Looking For** 



* Proven experience as Project Director or Senior Project Manager on major water treatment / desalination projects in Saudi Arabia
* Strong background delivering RO plants, wastewater treatment facilities, or large\-scale utilities infrastructure
* Experience working with leading developers / operators such as ACWA Power, Marafiq, SWCC, or similar
* Demonstrated success managing large EPC or EPCM contracts
* Strong commercial, contractual, and project controls understanding
* Ability to lead complex stakeholder environments and deliver under pressure



  





**Salary \& Package** 




 A highly competitive, tax\-efficient salary and comprehensive expatriate package is on offer, designed to reflect the seniority and strategic importance of this role. This typically includes:
 


* Housing allowance or fully provided accommodation
* Annual flights for you and dependents
* Comprehensive medical and life insurance
* Performance\-related bonus aligned to project delivery
* End of service benefits in line with Saudi labour law
* Full relocation and mobilisation support



  





**Why This Role** 




 This is an opportunity to position yourself at the forefront of the Middle East’s infrastructure growth, working on projects that define national development.
 


* Exposure to flagship, high\-value programmes across Saudi Arabia
* Long\-term project pipeline offering stability and continuity
* Senior leadership role with real influence on project outcomes
* Opportunity to work with some of the most recognised organisations in the region



  





 If you are currently delivering or have delivered major water or desalination projects in Saudi Arabia and are open to exploring a strategic leadership role, I would be keen to speak with you.
 



 To apply or discuss further, please send your CV to
 **saldridge@janikin.com** 
 or reach out directly.
 



  





 Referral recommendations are also welcomed.

data.title: Vice President - Operations
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Role** 




 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced regional executive to lead operations governance across its MENA GeoMarkets. As VP Operations, you will serve as the primary performance authority between GeoMarket Managers and the COO, driving operational excellence, financi
data.jd_text:
**About the Role** 




 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced regional executive to lead operations governance across its MENA GeoMarkets. As VP Operations, you will serve as the primary performance authority between GeoMarket Managers and the COO, driving operational excellence, financial discipline, and strategic alignment across UAE, KSA, Oman, Qatar, Egypt, and Morocco.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Regional Performance Governance: Hold GeoMarket Managers accountable for Safety, Quality, Delivery, and Cost performance. Require corrective action plans where performance deviates from targets and promote replication of best practices across countries.
* Operational Excellence Deployment: Drive consistent deployment of Group operational excellence standards, digital initiatives, and performance management systems across GeoMarkets. Ensure measurable improvement in productivity, reliability, and cost performance.
* Financial Governance \& Discipline: Review and challenge regional budgets and forecasts. Consolidate regional performance visibility and ensure corrective actions are implemented when deviations occur. Escalate material risks or variances to the COO as per governance.
* Risk \& Compliance Oversight: Ensure adherence to Group standards, policies, and RHQ regulatory obligations. Maintain auditable regional management processes with risks identified, assessed, and mitigation plans executed.
* Cross\-Functional Alignment \& Escalation: Act as escalation point for cross\-border operational or commercial conflicts. Align Operations, Sales, Supply Chain, Finance, HSSE, P\&C, Legal, Planning, and Projects.
* HSSE Governance: Ensure GeoMarkets maintain a strong safety culture and full compliance with HSSE policies. Require investigation and closure of incidents and monitor preventive actions.
* People \& Leadership Development: Evaluate performance of GeoMarket Managers. Drive succession planning, leadership development, and talent reviews across the region.



  





**Qualifications \& Experience** 



* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or equivalent
* 10\+ years of senior leadership experience in multi\-site operations
* Demonstrated track record in performance governance and financial review
* Lean / Six Sigma certification (Green Belt or above preferred)
* Fluent in English (spoken and written); Arabic language proficiency is an advantage



  





**Job Specific Skills** 



* Strong financial statement literacy and performance driver analysis
* Structured performance management and execution discipline
* Strong stakeholder management across functions and countries
* Systems / ERP literacy



  





**Core Competencies** 



* Strategic Alignment \& Execution – Converts strategy into measurable execution plans and governance cadence
* Performance Leadership – Sets clear expectations; drives accountability; manages underperformance constructively
* Change Management – Leads structured transformation initiatives; manages resistance and sustains results
* Decision Making – Makes timely decisions with incomplete data; escalates appropriately
* Leadership Development – Coaches and develops GeoMarket Managers; builds bench strength

data.title: Regional Commercial Director
data.raw_snippet:
About the Role
   

  

  

  

 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced Regional Commercial Director to lead and coordinate sales and commercial activities across the Middle East and North Africa region. In this role, you will translate the global commercial strategy into regional executio
data.jd_text:
About the Role
   

  

  

  

 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced Regional Commercial Director to lead and coordinate sales and commercial activities across the Middle East and North Africa region. In this role, you will translate the global commercial strategy into regional execution plans, driving revenue growth, market expansion, and profitability. You will serve as the key link between global commercial leadership and regional sales teams, overseeing pipeline management, strategic account development, and the successful execution of key commercial opportunities.
   

  

  

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

  

  

 •        Regional Commercial Strategy Execution: Translate the global commercial strategy into regional sales plans aligned with FPI's business goals, and coordinate commercial initiatives across MENA markets to ensure consistent execution.
   

  

 •        Regional Sales Performance Management: Oversee and monitor the performance of General Manager Sales roles across MENA, reviewing pipeline development, sales forecasts, and key project opportunities to ensure targets are met.
   

  

 •        Strategic Accounts \& Major Projects: Support negotiation and closure of major regional contracts and strategic projects, while maintaining strong relationships with key clients, consultants, contractors, and partners.
   

  

 •        Market Expansion: Identify new business opportunities and sectors within the MENA region, and support market entry strategies and expansion initiatives in emerging markets.
   

  

 •        Commercial Governance \& Risk Management: Ensure adherence to company policies on pricing strategy, contract governance, and commercial risk management. Monitor margin performance and enforce commercial discipline across regional operations.
   

  

 •        Leadership \& Team Development: Provide leadership, guidance, and coaching to General Manager Sales and regional sales teams. Support talent development, succession planning, and capability building across the regional sales organization.
   

  

  

  

 Qualifications \& Experience
   

  

  

  

 •        Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or a relevant commercial discipline
   

  

 •        15\+ years of experience in sales or commercial roles within an industrial or infrastructure environment
   

  

 •        Minimum 8\-10 years of leadership experience in sales or commercial management
   

  

 •        Experience managing commercial operations across multiple MENA markets
   

  

 •        Strong background in industrial projects, EPC contractors, or infrastructure sectors
   

  

  

  

 Job\-Specific Skills
   

  

  

  

 •        Strong understanding of regional industrial markets and the competitive landscape
   

  

 •        Excellent negotiation and relationship management skills
   

  

 •        Ability to lead and coordinate multi\-country commercial teams
   

  

 •        Strategic thinking and strong commercial acumen
   

  

 •        Strong financial awareness with the ability to manage revenue and margin targets
   

  

 •        Ability to operate effectively in a dynamic and diverse regional environment
   

  

  

  

 Core Competencies
   

  

  

  

 •        Strategic Thinking – Translates global strategy into regional execution plans
   

  

 •        Leadership – Inspires and guides teams to achieve commercial objectives
   

  

 •        Customer Focus – Builds strong long\-term relationships with key clients and partners
   

  

 •        Communication – Communicates clearly across diverse teams and stakeholders
   

  

 •        Market Insight – Demonstrates strong understanding of regional market dynamics
   

  

 •        Financial Acumen – Ensures commercial decisions support profitability and growth

data.title: Head of Transformation
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking a highly organized and professional
 **Strategy and transformation Lead** 
 responsible for supporting the development and execution of the Group’s strategy and transformation initiatives, translating strategic objectives into actionable programs, and ensuring e
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking a highly organized and professional
 **Strategy and transformation Lead** 
 responsible for supporting the development and execution of the Group’s strategy and transformation initiatives, translating strategic objectives into actionable programs, and ensuring effective governance, performance monitoring, and cross\-functional alignment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





**Strategic Planning** 



* Support group long\-term strategy development through structured analysis, opportunity assessment, and benchmarking.
* Develop strategic options, scenarios, and recommendations for executive decision\-making.
* Coordinate the annual business planning cycle across subsidiaries.



  





**Transformation Execution** 



* Lead strategic transformation initiatives across the organization ensuring alignment with business goals.
* Work closely with executive leadership to translate strategic objectives into deliverable programmed and projects.
* Manage the implementation phases of transformation programs.
* Ensure transformation initiatives have defined business cases, owners, milestones, and measurable benefits.



  





**Governance \& Performance Management** 



* Establish and monitor KPIs to evaluate program effectiveness.
* Develop performance dashboards and reporting to track delivery of strategic objectives.
* Support monthly and quarterly executive reviews with structured reporting and recommendations.
* Drive policy development and governance processes to ensure operational efficiency and regulatory compliance.



  





**Collaboration \& Change Management** 



* Collaborate and build consensus around strategic solutions with senior leadership and cross\-functional teams.
* Monitor and track the progress of transformation projects and identify risks with mitigation plans.
* Facilitate change management across the organization.
* Facilitate structured resolution of cross\-entity strategic issues and priority conflicts.
* Requirements



  





  





**Background and Qualifications** 



* Degree in Business, Strategy, Management or similar fields.
* CIPD, PMP, SHRM or equivalent is preferred.
* Typically, 5 to 10 years' experience within strategy, transformation or consulting environments.
* Proven track record of delivering organisational change and transformation initiatives.



  





**Non\-Technical kills:** 



* Excellent organizational skills, having the ability to prioritize workload whilst being resilient and being able to cope well under pressure and meeting tight deadlines.
* Exposure to data gathering techniques and analysis, and reporting insights in a clear and effective way is desirable.
* Ability to evaluate and manage unique challenges.
* Excellent Arabic \& English communication skills (verbal \& written)

data.jd_text:
We are looking for a Technical Program Manager (TPM) to drive high\-impact technology initiatives. You will work at the intersection of engineering, product, and business, ensuring complex projects are executed on time, within scope, and with high quality. This role requires strong technical acumen, program management expertise, and the ability to influence cross\-functional stakeholders.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Own and drive the planning, execution, and delivery of complex technical programs across multiple teams.
* Translate business goals into actionable milestones.
* Define program scope, success metrics, schedules, and dependencies.
* Identify risks, resolve conflicts, and proactively remove roadblocks to ensure program success.
* Communicate clearly with executives, engineers, and cross\-functional teams on progress, priorities, and issues.
* Partner with product managers and engineering leads to balance short\-term priorities with long\-term strategy.
* Foster collaboration across distributed teams and promote operational excellence.
* Champion continuous improvement in program management processes and tools.



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2\+ years of experience in program or project management in a technology\-driven company or fast\-growing startups.
* Proven track record of managing large\-scale, cross\-functional programs end\-to\-end.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to work in ambiguous, fast\-paced environments.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Experience working with financial products or programs is a plus
